```css
  src: url("source-fonts/46-switzer-400-italic.woff2") format("woff2");
  font-weight: 400;
  font-style: italic;
  font-display: swap;
}

@font-face {
  font-family: "Switzer";
  src: url("source-fonts/47-switzer-400-italic.woff2") format("woff2");
  font-weight: 400;
  font-style: italic;
  font-display: swap;
}

@font-face {
  font-family: "Switzer";
  src: url("source-fonts/48-switzer-400-normal.woff2") format("woff2");
  font-weight: 400;
  font-style: normal;
  font-display: swap;
}

@font-face {
  font-family: "Switzer";
  src: url("source-fonts/49-switzer-400-italic.woff2") format("woff2");
  font-weight: 400;
  font-style: italic;
  font-display: swap;
}

@font-face {
  font-family: "Bonny";
  src: url("source-fonts/50-bonny-400-normal.woff2") format("woff2");
  font-weight: 400;
  font-style: normal;
  font-display: swap;
}

:root { --stt-source-font-family: sans-serif; --stt-source-decorative-italic-font-family: "Inter"; }

html, body, button, input, textarea, select { font-family: var(--stt-source-font-family) !important; }

h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, .display, .heading, .heading-lg, .heading-md, .heading-sm, [class*="display"], [class*="heading"] { font-family: var(--stt-source-font-family) !important; }

h1 em, h2 em, h3 em, h4 em, h5 em, h6 em, .display em, .heading em, [class*="display"] em, [class*="heading"] em, .emphasis, .italic, [class*="emphasis"], [class*="italic"] { font-family: var(--stt-source-decorative-italic-font-family) !important; font-style: italic; }
```

- None

Step 3

Full-page section inventory. This stage looks at the entire screenshot at once and decides which top-level sections exist from top to bottom before any cropping happens.

Sections
  • Inventory screenshot input
  • Section inventory prompt
  • Inventory token usage
  • Inventory output
Inventory screenshot inputruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/screenshot.webp
Section inventory promptruns/v177/section-inventory-prompt.md
You are analyzing a full-page website screenshot so a later workflow can ground each section separately.

Your only job in this step is to identify the visually distinct top-level sections from top to bottom.

## Rules

- Base your answer on visible evidence only.
- Do not estimate pixel coordinates.
- Do not output JSON.
- Do not talk about cropping.
- Focus on top-to-bottom section understanding before worrying about exact cut lines.
- Start with the navigation / header section if one is visible.
- End with the footer section if one is visible.
- The navigation/header must be its own section if visible. Do not merge it with the hero even if they share the same background.
- The hero must be its own section when it is visually distinct from the navigation.
- Different section types should not be combined into one section entry just because they share the same background color.
- Do not combine things like a logo row with stats, or navigation with hero, or a CTA block with the content above it, unless they are clearly one continuous section.
- Give strong weight to spacing rhythm, shared surface continuity, and shared container treatment when deciding whether adjacent blocks belong to one section.
- If an eyebrow / heading / intro block sits directly above cards, tabs, grids, media, or other modules on the same background or within the same enclosing surface, treat them as one section unless there is a strong visual break.
- Do not split a section just because the intro/header area and the content area use different internal layouts.
- Use content-role changes as weaker evidence than background continuity, shared borders or shells, and the vertical gap between a section header and the module below it.
- Prefer a split only when there is strong evidence such as a major spacing break, a clear change in background or enclosing surface, an obvious divider, or a standalone full-width module that reads independently.
- A section may begin with a heading, eyebrow, icon, card cluster, logo row, large feature block, or a clearly new background or surface treatment.
- Images and graphics count as section content.
- If uncertain, prefer preserving a likely heading-plus-content grouping rather than over-splitting it into multiple sections.

Return a markdown list from top to bottom.

For each section include:
- a short label
- one sentence describing what is visible
- one sentence explaining why it appears to be a separate section
Inventory token usage
Calls2
Input tokens4,624
Output tokens6,880
Inventory outputruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-inventory.md
- **Navigation / header**  
  A small brand icon appears at the top left, with compact green navigation buttons and a menu control at the top right.  
  It reads as a separate section because it functions as the site navigation and sits above the main introductory branding.

- **Hero / brand masthead**  
  A very large “RO. MA.” wordmark fills the cream background, followed immediately by a large full-width photograph of hands holding a pear.  
  It appears separate because it is the primary introductory visual moment, with oversized branding and a dominant hero image before the content sections begin.

- **“What Defines Us” values grid**  
  A centered heading introduces a bordered grid of six small content cards with icons, images, short text, and a small call-to-action button in one card.  
  This is a distinct section because the layout changes from full-bleed imagery to a structured informational grid on a light background.

- **“Roma Stories” image collage**  
  A centered label and “ROMA STORIES” heading sit above a spacious arrangement of food and lifestyle images with small captions.  
  It appears separate because it introduces a new editorial/gallery-style layout with large gaps and scattered imagery, distinct from the preceding card grid.

- **Journal section**  
  A bordered journal container includes a “JOURNAL” heading, a small action button, and three article cards with titles and large images.  
  It is separate because it has its own framed surface and a clear card-based article layout.

- **Full-width food image feature**  
  A large full-width photograph shows a plated dish with truffles and a serving utensil.  
  It reads as its own section because it is a standalone photographic band between the journal content and the footer.

- **Footer**  
  The bottom cream area contains contact details, phone information, social links, address text, footer navigation links, a small icon, and a large “RO. MA.” wordmark.  
  It is separate because it shifts into site-wide informational footer content after the photographic feature.

Step 4

Section detection and crop mapping. This stage converts the inventory into concrete section boundaries, creates the crop list, and shows how the page is being divided for per-section analysis.

Sections
  • Detection token usage
  • Section detection raw output
  • Sections JSON
  • Section map
  • Detected section crops

Step 5

Parallel per-section grounding. Each detected section crop is analyzed independently so the model can capture local layout, styling, components, and typography with less interference from the rest of the page.

Sections
  • Section grounding prompt
  • Grounding token summary
  • Grounding token breakdown
  • 01 navigation header
  • 02 hero brand masthead
  • 03 what defines us values grid
  • 04 roma stories image collage
  • 05 journal section
  • 06 full width food image feature
  • 07 footer
Section grounding promptruns/v177/section-grounding-prompt.md
You are an expert visual grounding analyst. Analyze one cropped website section and return one raw section capture YAML document.

The first image is the exact crop for the target section. When present, the second image is the full-page overview and the third image highlights the target section. Use context images only for placement, immediate neighbors, and edge continuity. Do not infer invisible DOM structure.

## Target Section Context

```yaml
target:
  section_num: {section_num}
  total_sections: {total_sections}
  detected_label: "{section_label}"
  original_bounds:
    y_start: {section_y_start}
    y_end: {section_y_end}
  crop_bounds:
    y_start: {crop_y_start}
    y_end: {crop_y_end}
  previous_section_label: "{previous_section_label}"
  next_section_label: "{next_section_label}"
section_sequence: |
{section_sequence}
```

## Purpose

Capture this one section exactly as observed so later steps can normalize many `section.yaml` files into a comparable AST. This is grounding data, not the final design system.

## Core Rules

- Return YAML only. Do not wrap it in markdown fences.
- Use `schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1`.
- Keep the YAML complete and compact. Target 4,000-8,000 output tokens for ordinary sections and never spend tokens on exhaustive decorative subparts when a summarized layer is enough.
- Include the highest-signal layout, surface, typography, component, image/graphic, and spacing facts. Do not try to transcribe every tiny text item, logo, cell, or illustration sub-shape.
- Use content-neutral IDs. IDs must describe structure, component role, or visual role, not literal site copy, brand, industry, product, or topic.
- Do not include exact visible marketing copy. Use content role, hierarchy, typography, and visual intent instead.
- Base every value on visible evidence. Use `unclear` or `low_confidence` when a detail is not recoverable.
- All measurements, colors, typography values, radii, shadows, and positions are approximate visual estimates.
- Prefer one representative value plus a note over numeric ranges. Use semantic size words when a single number would be false precision.
- Capture hierarchy inline in `tree`; avoid detached content maps.
- If a parent has children, items, or layers, describe how they are arranged.
- Separate visual description from DOM claims. Use `implementation_assumption` with one of: `likely_dom_or_layout_element`, `likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic`, `likely_css_or_svg_texture`, `likely_raster_image`, `visual_sublayer_only`, `unknown`.
- Capture composite backgrounds as systems with layers, not as a single color or gradient.
- Attribute surfaces by visual ownership. Estimate the section/root background from full-width canvas evidence such as left/right crop edges, top/bottom gutters, whitespace outside major containers, and immediate neighbor continuity. Do not use a large nested card, panel, tray, media well, or tab container fill as the root/section background just because it occupies much of the crop.
- When a nested surface covers a large area, record two separate observations: the parent/root canvas with its own path and confidence, and the nested panel/card/tray fill with its own path and confidence. If the parent canvas is only visible as thin margins or is ambiguous, mark the root surface `unclear` or lower confidence rather than promoting the nested fill to the root.
- Use the full-page overview and highlighted target context to distinguish shared parent runs from local inset modules. A color that appears only inside a rounded, padded, bordered, clipped, or internally gridded container should remain a child/inset surface unless it visibly reaches the viewport edges as the section background.
- For typography, include visible font category, style description, visual characteristics, size, line height, weight, letter spacing, transform/case, alignment, and color.
- For every meaningful image, graphic, icon, illustration, interface, texture, shader-like effect, or photo, include creative direction: imagery category, framing, crop, perspective, realism level, lighting, material/texture, color treatment, composition, placement relationship, edge behavior, density, simplicity, and approximate detail level.
- Classify imagery into exactly these reusable categories when present: `icons`, `illustrations`, `interfaces`, and `photography`. Do not merge interface mockups into illustrations or small UI/supporting glyphs into illustrations.
- Within `icons`, classify each observed icon-like item with `icon_asset_class: single-color-icon | multi-color-icon | logo/wordmark | unclear`. Use `single-color-icon` for simple one-color strokes/fills such as arrows, menu glyphs, search, cart, social glyphs, UI affordances, and small support pictograms. Use `multi-color-icon` only when the icon itself visibly needs multiple colors, gradients, dimensional rendering, or pictorial detail. Use `logo/wordmark` for brand marks, wordmarks, payment/customer logos, and logo-like marks even when they are one color.
- Record single-color icon stroke/fill style, weight, corner language, and container relationship, but do not treat it as a generated image asset. Record multi-color icon rendering detail and palette relationship because it may need raster generation later.
- For logo/wordmark slots, record only visual footprint, surface color relationship, and whether the logo can be approximated as a simple rectangle/text block; do not promote logo art into reusable illustration/icon generation style.
- For photography, record whether the photo content reaches the image/crop edges. If a photo appears inside a page card, distinguish the page's outer card/frame from the photo asset itself; do not imply the generated photo should contain its own inner card, padding, matte, border, or background plate.
- Treat category creative direction as style evidence, not subject evidence. Capture the source subject only as local slot context; the later generated site may use different subjects while keeping the same category style, density, simplicity, palette relationship, and rendering complexity.
- If an imagery category is absent in this section, do not invent it locally; use `none_observed` only in cross-section/global summaries.
- Classify visual placement as `background_blended`, `background_contained`, `foreground_graphic`, `foreground_media`, `embedded_showcase`, or `unclear`.
- For every button, link, eyebrow, badge, tag, chip, input, tab, icon button, compact label, card, panel, tray, media frame, and divider, capture host surface, child surface/fill, text/icon color, border/divider/shadow, sizing behavior, and separation mechanism.
- Mark UI-like details inside product screenshots, thumbnails, illustrations, or device mockups as `embedded_showcase_only`; do not promote them to real page UI.
- Capture edge/transition behavior at the top and bottom of the crop: same-surface continuation, tonal fade, divider, overlap, inset panel edge, hard reset, or unclear.
- Use generic reusable surface relationship language in notes, such as `primary_button_on_light_surface` or `accent_label_on_inverse_strong`, but do not create final tokens.

## Required Output Shape

```yaml
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: {section_num}
  total_sections: {total_sections}
  detected_label: "{section_label}"
  previous_section_label: "{previous_section_label}"
  next_section_label: "{next_section_label}"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: {section_y_start}
    original_y_end: {section_y_end}
    crop_y_start: {crop_y_start}
    crop_y_end: {crop_y_end}
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: content_neutral_section_id
  role: generic_section_role
  confidence: high | medium | low
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: generic_section_role
  visibility: visible
  size: {{}}
  layout: {{}}
  position: {{}}
  style: {{}}
  layers: []
  children: []
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components: []
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components: []
observed_values:
  colors: []
  gradients: []
  patterns: []
  background_systems: []
  typography: []
  font_characteristics: []
  spacing: []
  radius: []
  sizes: []
  opacity: []
  borders: []
  shadows: []
  effects: []
  icons: []
  imagery_categories:
    icons: []
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography: []
  media: []
  creative_direction: []
  implementation_assumptions: []
  components: []
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors: []
    gradients: []
    patterns: []
    background_systems: []
    typography: []
    spacing: []
    radius: []
    shadow: []
    dividers: []
  likely_components: []
  likely_section_patterns: []
  surface_specific_recipes: []
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics: []
  link_action_mechanics: []
  distinct_visual_motifs: []
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons: []
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography: []
  do_not_generalize: []
  uncertainties: []
```

## Detail Expectations

- `tree` should be deeply nested enough that parent/child surfaces, content stacks, image zones, repeated cells, and controls are traceable without reading prose elsewhere.
- For the root `tree` node, `style.background_color` must describe only the full-width section host/canvas. Put nested card, panel, tab, tray, media, and grid fills on their own child nodes even when they dominate the visible crop.
- Prefer representative repeated `items` over one child node per repeated sibling.
- Use `layers` for background systems and overlapping visual ingredients.
- Use `items` for repeated peers when that is clearer than individually named children.
- In `observed_values`, include both atomic ingredients and composite systems, with `path` values pointing back into `tree`.
- In `consolidation_notes`, make suggestions only. The later normalized AST and design-system steps decide final aliases, tokens, and components.

01 navigation header
01-navigation-header.pngruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/crops/01-navigation-header.png
Section grounding outputs
01-navigation-header.mdruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/01-navigation-header.md
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 1
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Navigation / header"
  previous_section_label: "N/A"
  next_section_label: "Hero / brand masthead"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 0
    original_y_end: 100
    crop_y_start: 0
    crop_y_end: 100
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: header_navigation_section
  role: site_header
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: site_header
  visibility: visible
  size:
    width_behavior: full_viewport_width
    height_px: 100
    crop_height_px: 100
  layout:
    type: sparse_absolute_header_layout
    horizontal_distribution: small_brand_mark_left_and_navigation_cluster_right
    vertical_alignment: elements_sit_in_upper_half_with_open_canvas_below
    content_density: very_low
  position:
    page_y: 0
    crop_y: 0
  style:
    background_color: warm_ivory_off_white
    background_confidence: high
    background_notes: full-width host canvas visible across entire crop, including open center and edges
  layers:
    - id: base_canvas_fill
      kind: background_layer
      role: section_host_surface
      visibility: visible
      style:
        fill: warm_ivory_off_white
        approximate_color: "#f4f2ec"
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
    - id: subtle_paper_texture_layer
      kind: texture_layer
      role: quiet_material_texture
      visibility: faint
      style:
        texture: very_subtle_paper_grain_or_noise
        contrast: extremely_low
        color_relationship: slightly darker and lighter flecks on ivory canvas
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
  children:
    - id: brand_mark_link
      kind: graphic_link
      role: compact_brand_home_marker
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width_px: 50
        height_px: 30
        footprint: small_horizontal_organic_mark
      position:
        placement: top_left
        offset_left_px: 13
        offset_top_px: 13
      layout:
        alignment: free_placed_against_header_canvas
      style:
        background: none
        fill_color: dark_forest_green_with_small_light_negative_details
        border: none
        shadow: none_visible
      content:
        text: not_transcribed
        visual_type: logo_or_emblem
      imagery:
        category: icons
        icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
        placement: foreground_graphic
        creative_direction:
          form: compact illustrated emblem with organic folded/leaf-like silhouette
          rendering: flat dark green ink with fine internal light linework
          detail_level: moderate_for_small_logo
          realism: stylized_mark_not_photo
          edge_behavior: transparent_or_canvas-colored negative space, no surrounding frame
          palette_relationship: dark green mark on warm ivory host
      implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
    - id: right_navigation_cluster
      kind: navigation
      role: primary_navigation_and_menu_cluster
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width_px: 260
        height_px: 78
        note: approximate, occupies compact block at far top-right
      position:
        placement: top_right
        offset_right_px: 22
        offset_top_px: 14
      layout:
        type: two_zone_panel
        columns:
          - id: nav_items_zone
            width_px: 180
            role: labeled_navigation_area
          - id: menu_button_zone
            width_px: 80
            role: icon_menu_area
        vertical_structure: left_zone_has_blank_upper_area_and_bottom_tab_row
      style:
        background_color: dark_forest_green
        approximate_color: "#174c2f"
        text_color: warm_ivory
        border_color: warm_ivory
        border_width_px: 1
        border_style: solid_thin_lines
        shadow: none_visible
        radius:
          outer: small_or_decorative_cut_corner_unclear
        notes: panel reads as one dark inverse block with thin ivory segmentation lines
      layers:
        - id: panel_fill
          kind: surface_layer
          role: inverse_navigation_surface
          visibility: visible
          style:
            fill: dark_forest_green
            approximate_color: "#174c2f"
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: panel_dividers
          kind: line_layer
          role: internal_separation
          visibility: visible
          style:
            stroke_color: warm_ivory
            stroke_width_px: 1
            opacity: high
            lines:
              - vertical_separator_between_nav_and_menu_zone
              - horizontal_separator_above_bottom_tabs_in_left_zone
              - vertical_separators_between_bottom_tab_items
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: possible_corner_notches
          kind: decorative_sublayer
          role: corner_detail
          visibility: partially_visible
          style:
            shape: small rounded/circular ivory interruptions near some corners or divider intersections
            confidence: low
          implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      children:
        - id: nav_items_zone
          kind: navigation_group
          role: compact_text_links
          visibility: visible
          size:
            width_px: 180
            height_px: 78
          position:
            within_parent: left
          layout:
            type: stacked_area
            rows:
              - id: empty_upper_row
                height_px: 56
                role: blank_dark_header_area
              - id: bottom_tab_row
                height_px: 22
                role: segmented_link_row
            item_distribution: three_equal_or_near_equal_tabs
          style:
            background_color: dark_forest_green
            border_color: warm_ivory
          children:
            - id: blank_upper_panel_area
              kind: surface_region
              role: empty_inverse_space_above_links
              visibility: visible
              size:
                height_px: 56
              style:
                background_color: dark_forest_green
              implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
            - id: bottom_segmented_nav_row
              kind: navigation_list
              role: primary_link_tabs
              visibility: visible
              size:
                height_px: 22
              layout:
                type: horizontal_segments
                item_count: 3
                equal_width: mostly
                alignment: center
              style:
                background_color: dark_forest_green
                top_border:
                  color: warm_ivory
                  width_px: 1
                dividers:
                  color: warm_ivory
                  width_px: 1
              items:
                - id: nav_tab_item_1
                  kind: link
                  role: compact_navigation_label
                  visibility: visible
                  size:
                    height_px: 22
                    width_behavior: one_third_of_left_zone
                  layout:
                    text_alignment: center
                    vertical_alignment: middle
                  style:
                    background_color: dark_forest_green
                    text_color: warm_ivory
                    border_right: thin_ivory_divider
                  typography:
                    category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    weight: 400
                    line_height: tight
                    letter_spacing: slight_or_normal
                    case: title_or_mixed_case
                  content:
                    literal_text: omitted
                    content_role: short_navigation_label
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                - id: nav_tab_item_2
                  kind: link
                  role: compact_navigation_label
                  visibility: visible
                  size:
                    height_px: 22
                    width_behavior: one_third_of_left_zone
                  layout:
                    text_alignment: center
                    vertical_alignment: middle
                  style:
                    background_color: dark_forest_green
                    text_color: warm_ivory
                    border_right: thin_ivory_divider
                  typography:
                    category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    weight: 400
                    line_height: tight
                    letter_spacing: slight_or_normal
                    case: title_or_mixed_case
                  content:
                    literal_text: omitted
                    content_role: short_navigation_label
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                - id: nav_tab_item_3
                  kind: link
                  role: compact_navigation_label
                  visibility: visible
                  size:
                    height_px: 22
                    width_behavior: one_third_of_left_zone
                  layout:
                    text_alignment: center
                    vertical_alignment: middle
                  style:
                    background_color: dark_forest_green
                    text_color: warm_ivory
                  typography:
                    category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    weight: 400
                    line_height: tight
                    letter_spacing: slight_or_normal
                    case: title_or_mixed_case
                  content:
                    literal_text: omitted
                    content_role: short_navigation_label
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: menu_icon_button
          kind: icon_button
          role: menu_toggle
          visibility: visible
          size:
            width_px: 80
            height_px: 78
            hit_area: large_square_like_area
          position:
            within_parent: right
          layout:
            icon_alignment: centered
          style:
            background_color: dark_forest_green
            border_left:
              color: warm_ivory
              width_px: 1
            text_or_icon_color: warm_ivory
            shadow: none_visible
          children:
            - id: menu_glyph
              kind: icon
              role: hamburger_menu_symbol
              visibility: visible
              size:
                width_px: 43
                height_px: 17
              position:
                alignment: centered_in_button
              style:
                stroke_color: warm_ivory
                stroke_width_px: 2
                stroke_linecap: square_or_slightly_rounded_unclear
                fill: none
              imagery:
                category: icons
                icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                placement: foreground_graphic
                creative_direction:
                  form: three parallel horizontal strokes
                  rendering: simple flat line icon
                  complexity: very_low
                  palette_relationship: ivory lines on dark green inverse button
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
  edge_behavior:
    top: section_starts_at_viewport_top_with_same_ivory_canvas_no_visible_divider
    bottom: ivory_canvas_continues_to_next_section_area_without_visible_divider_in_crop
    left: open_ivory_canvas_reaches_viewport_edge
    right: open_canvas_visible_behind_inset_navigation_cluster_until_viewport_edge
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: site_header_shell
      role: sparse_header_canvas
      host_surface: warm_ivory_off_white
      sizing_behavior: full_width_fixed_short_height
      separation_mechanism: whitespace_and_positioning_only
    - id: brand_mark_link
      role: logo_home_link
      host_surface: warm_ivory_off_white
      child_surface_fill: none
      text_icon_color: dark_forest_green
      border_divider_shadow: none_visible
      sizing_behavior: small_fixed_graphic
      separation_mechanism: isolated_top_left_positioning
    - id: right_navigation_cluster
      role: compact_primary_navigation_module
      host_surface: warm_ivory_off_white
      child_surface_fill: dark_forest_green
      text_icon_color: warm_ivory
      border_divider_shadow: thin_ivory_internal_lines_no_shadow
      sizing_behavior: fixed_or_content_sized_top_right_panel
      separation_mechanism: strong_color_contrast_and_inset_position
    - id: bottom_segmented_nav_row
      role: segmented_text_links
      host_surface: dark_forest_green_panel
      child_surface_fill: same_as_parent
      text_icon_color: warm_ivory
      border_divider_shadow: thin_ivory_top_and_vertical_dividers
      sizing_behavior: three_compact_equal_segments
      separation_mechanism: divider_lines
    - id: menu_icon_button
      role: hamburger_menu_toggle
      host_surface: dark_forest_green_panel
      child_surface_fill: same_as_parent
      text_icon_color: warm_ivory
      border_divider_shadow: thin_ivory_left_divider
      sizing_behavior: square_like_icon_button_area
      separation_mechanism: panel_column_divider_and_centered_icon
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - search_input
    - cart_or_account_controls
    - breadcrumb
    - social_link_row
    - announcement_bar
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: color_canvas_warm_ivory
      value: "#f4f2ec"
      role: full_width_header_canvas
      path: root.style.background_color
      confidence: high
    - id: color_forest_green
      value: "#174c2f"
      role: logo_and_navigation_panel_fill
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.style.background_color
      confidence: high
    - id: color_warm_ivory_on_green
      value: "#f3f0e8"
      role: inverse_text_icons_and_dividers
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.style.text_color
      confidence: high
    - id: color_logo_detail_light
      value: "#e8e5dc"
      role: tiny_negative_or_highlight_lines_inside_brand_mark
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link.style.fill_color
      confidence: low
  gradients: []
  patterns:
    - id: pattern_subtle_paper_grain
      role: host_canvas_texture
      path: root.layers.subtle_paper_texture_layer
      visual_description: near-flat warm ivory with very faint mottling/noise
      scale: fine
      contrast: extremely_low
      confidence: medium
  background_systems:
    - id: bg_header_canvas
      path: root
      layers:
        - warm_ivory_solid_fill
        - very_subtle_paper_grain
      edge_behavior: reaches_all_crop_edges
      confidence: high
    - id: bg_inverse_navigation_panel
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster
      layers:
        - solid_dark_forest_green_fill
        - thin_warm_ivory_divider_lines
        - possible_small_corner_notch_details
      edge_behavior: inset_panel_not_section_background
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: type_compact_nav_label
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.nav_items_zone.children.bottom_segmented_nav_row.items
      role: tiny_navigation_label
      category: sans_serif
      style_description: narrow_or_condensed_simple_sans, small and utilitarian
      size_px: 12
      line_height: tight_approximately_1_1
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: normal_to_slight_positive
      transform_case: mixed_or_title_case
      alignment: centered
      color: warm_ivory_on_dark_green
      confidence: medium
  font_characteristics:
    - id: font_nav_sans_character
      role: navigation_microcopy
      visible_characteristics:
        - small_x_height_relative_to_panel
        - simple_unadorned_sans_shapes
        - not_bold
        - readable_but_secondary_to_panel_geometry
      confidence: medium
  spacing:
    - id: header_height
      value_px: 100
      role: section_crop_height
      path: root.size.height_px
      confidence: high
    - id: brand_mark_top_left_offset
      value: left_approximately_13px_top_13px
      role: logo_margin_from_viewport
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link.position
      confidence: medium
    - id: nav_cluster_top_right_offset
      value: right_approximately_22px_top_14px
      role: nav_module_margin_from_viewport
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.position
      confidence: medium
    - id: nav_bottom_tab_height
      value_px: 22
      role: compact_segmented_link_row
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.nav_items_zone.children.bottom_segmented_nav_row
      confidence: medium
    - id: open_center_whitespace
      value: very_large_horizontal_gap_between_logo_and_nav
      role: sparse_header_composition
      path: root.layout.horizontal_distribution
      confidence: high
    - id: lower_header_empty_space
      value: about_5_to_20px_below_nav_cluster_until_crop_bottom
      role: header_breathing_room
      path: root
      confidence: medium
  radius:
    - id: nav_panel_corner_treatment
      value_px: 0_to_6_unclear
      role: outer_panel_corner_or_decorative_cutout
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.style.radius
      confidence: low
    - id: menu_glyph_linecap
      value: square_or_slightly_rounded
      role: hamburger_stroke_end_style
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.children.menu_glyph.style
      confidence: low
  sizes:
    - id: brand_mark_size
      value: approximately_50x30px
      role: logo_footprint
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link.size
      confidence: medium
    - id: nav_cluster_size
      value: approximately_260x78px
      role: top_right_navigation_module
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.size
      confidence: medium
    - id: menu_button_size
      value: approximately_80x78px
      role: menu_toggle_hit_area
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.size
      confidence: medium
    - id: hamburger_icon_size
      value: approximately_43x17px
      role: menu_icon_visual_size
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.children.menu_glyph.size
      confidence: medium
  opacity:
    - id: canvas_texture_opacity
      value: very_low
      role: paper_grain_visibility
      path: root.layers.subtle_paper_texture_layer
      confidence: medium
  borders:
    - id: nav_internal_dividers
      role: panel_segmentation
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.layers.panel_dividers
      width_px: 1
      color: warm_ivory
      style: solid
      confidence: high
    - id: nav_outer_edge
      role: panel_boundary
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster
      width_px: 0_to_1
      color: warm_ivory_or_canvas_edge_unclear
      style: subtle_or_implied
      confidence: low
  shadows:
    - id: no_header_shadow_observed
      role: header_and_nav_depth
      path: root
      value: none_visible
      confidence: high
  effects:
    - id: subtle_material_texture
      role: tactile_canvas_effect
      path: root.layers.subtle_paper_texture_layer
      description: faint paper-like grain/noise over ivory background
      confidence: medium
    - id: inverse_panel_contrast
      role: visual_hierarchy_effect
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster
      description: strong dark-green block contrast makes navigation dominant despite small size
      confidence: high
  icons:
    - id: icon_brand_emblem
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link
      icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
      color_style: dark_green_mark_with_tiny_light_internal_details
      container_relationship: free_on_ivory_canvas_no_container
      visual_footprint: small_horizontal_organic_emblem
      can_be_approximated_as_simple_rectangle_or_text_block: false
      confidence: high
    - id: icon_hamburger_menu
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.children.menu_glyph
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      stroke_or_fill: stroked_three_line_symbol
      stroke_weight_px: 2
      corner_language: square_or_slightly_rounded_linecaps
      container_relationship: centered_inside_dark_green_square_like_button_zone
      confidence: high
  imagery_categories:
    icons:
      - id: icons_header_logo_and_menu
        paths:
          - root.children.brand_mark_link
          - root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.children.menu_glyph
        style_summary: dark-green brand mark on ivory plus simple ivory menu glyph on dark-green panel
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography: []
  media:
    - id: brand_logo_media_slot
      type: logo_or_emblem_graphic
      category: icons
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link
      placement: foreground_graphic
      edge_behavior: does_not_touch_crop_edges
      creative_direction: small stylized organic emblem, flat ink-like rendering, moderate internal detail
      implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
  creative_direction:
    - id: header_visual_direction
      role: overall_header_style
      description: sparse editorial header using warm paper-like canvas, a small organic dark-green logo mark, and a compact architectural top-right navigation panel.
      color_mood: restrained_warm_ivory_and_forest_green
      density: minimal
      geometry: large_empty_field_with_one_inset_rectangular_control_cluster
      confidence: high
    - id: navigation_panel_direction
      role: inverse_control_style
      description: dark-green rectangular module with fine ivory rule lines, micro navigation labels, and a large centered hamburger glyph.
      material: flat_color_no_shadow
      detail_level: low_to_moderate
      confidence: high
    - id: logo_mark_direction
      role: brand_marker_style
      description: tiny organic emblem drawn in dark green with sketchy internal detail, used like a standalone logo rather than a generic decorative illustration.
      confidence: medium
  implementation_assumptions:
    - id: root_canvas_implementation
      path: root
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: full-width background color occupies header host area
    - id: canvas_texture_implementation
      path: root.layers.subtle_paper_texture_layer
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      rationale: faint uniform noise/grain appears across ivory canvas
    - id: brand_mark_implementation
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link
      implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
      rationale: small crisp logo-like artwork with internal line detail
    - id: nav_panel_implementation
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: rectangular panel, tab dividers, text labels, and button-like segmentation
    - id: menu_glyph_implementation
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.children.menu_glyph
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: simple three-line icon could be CSS or SVG, observed as page control
  components:
    - id: component_sparse_header
      path: root
      type: header
      role: global_site_header
      key_parts:
        - brand_mark_link
        - right_navigation_cluster
      style_summary: warm ivory canvas, low-density layout, no bottom rule
    - id: component_logo_link
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link
      type: logo_link
      role: home_or_brand_anchor
      style_summary: small dark-green emblem on ivory
    - id: component_navigation_cluster
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster
      type: navigation_panel
      role: compact_primary_navigation
      key_parts:
        - blank_upper_panel_area
        - bottom_segmented_nav_row
        - menu_icon_button
      style_summary: dark-green inverse block with ivory lines and text
    - id: component_segmented_nav_tabs
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.nav_items_zone.children.bottom_segmented_nav_row
      type: segmented_link_group
      role: primary_text_links
      style_summary: three tiny centered text tabs separated by thin ivory rules
    - id: component_menu_button
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button
      type: icon_button
      role: menu_toggle
      style_summary: large dark-green button area with centered ivory hamburger icon
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - warm_ivory_page_canvas
      - dark_forest_green_brand_and_inverse_surface
      - warm_ivory_inverse_text_and_rules
    gradients: []
    patterns:
      - subtle_paper_grain_on_light_canvas
    background_systems:
      - ivory_canvas_with_faint_texture
      - forest_green_inverse_panel_with_ivory_rule_grid
    typography:
      - micro_sans_navigation_label
    spacing:
      - sparse_header_outer_offsets
      - compact_panel_tab_height
      - large_empty_center_header_space
    radius:
      - minimal_or_decorative_panel_corner_treatment_uncertain
    shadow:
      - no_shadow_flat_header_controls
    dividers:
      - one_pixel_ivory_panel_dividers
  likely_components:
    - sparse_logo_plus_nav_header
    - standalone_logo_mark_link
    - compact_inverse_navigation_panel
    - segmented_micro_nav_link_row
    - large_square_hamburger_menu_button
  likely_section_patterns:
    - full_width_short_header_on_textured_ivory_canvas
    - asymmetric_header_with_brand_left_and_controls_right
    - navigation_cluster_as_inset_dark_panel_not_full_header_bar
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - ivory_canvas_supports_dark_green_logo_without_container
    - dark_green_inverse_panel_uses_ivory_text_icons_and_1px_rules
    - segmented_links_share_parent_fill_and rely_on_dividers_for_separation
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - header composition depends on very large negative space between logo and navigation cluster
    - nav cluster is inset from top and right rather than flush to viewport edges
    - bottom tab row is shallow compared with large blank upper area of nav panel
    - menu button is visually larger than individual text tabs, emphasizing global menu action
  link_action_mechanics:
    - brand mark likely acts as home link through graphic-only affordance
    - compact text navigation links are presented as segmented tabs inside inverse panel
    - hamburger icon is an icon-only button with generous hit area and no visible label
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - warm paper-like background
    - forest-green editorial palette
    - thin ivory rule grid on dark panel
    - small organic logo mark contrasted with rigid rectangular navigation module
    - possible small rounded/cut corner accents on nav panel, low confidence
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons:
      - simple single-color line icon for menu controls, ivory on dark green
      - logo/wordmark slot can use compact organic dark-green mark with internal line detail
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography: []
  do_not_generalize:
    - do not treat the dark-green navigation panel fill as the full section background
    - do not reproduce or tokenize exact visible navigation words
    - do not generalize the brand emblem artwork as a reusable decorative illustration style beyond logo-slot evidence
    - do not infer hidden dropdowns or menu states from the hamburger control
    - do not assume the possible corner notches are intentional without additional evidence
  uncertainties:
    - exact font family for navigation labels is not recoverable
    - exact corner shape of navigation panel is partially ambiguous due to small scale
    - brand mark asset type could be SVG or raster, though it reads logo-like
    - faint background texture may be screenshot/noise or intentional paper texture
    - precise panel dimensions depend on screenshot scaling and are approximate
01-navigation-header.yamlruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/01-navigation-header.yaml
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 1
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Navigation / header"
  previous_section_label: "N/A"
  next_section_label: "Hero / brand masthead"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 0
    original_y_end: 100
    crop_y_start: 0
    crop_y_end: 100
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: header_navigation_section
  role: site_header
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: site_header
  visibility: visible
  size:
    width_behavior: full_viewport_width
    height_px: 100
    crop_height_px: 100
  layout:
    type: sparse_absolute_header_layout
    horizontal_distribution: small_brand_mark_left_and_navigation_cluster_right
    vertical_alignment: elements_sit_in_upper_half_with_open_canvas_below
    content_density: very_low
  position:
    page_y: 0
    crop_y: 0
  style:
    background_color: warm_ivory_off_white
    background_confidence: high
    background_notes: full-width host canvas visible across entire crop, including open center and edges
  layers:
    - id: base_canvas_fill
      kind: background_layer
      role: section_host_surface
      visibility: visible
      style:
        fill: warm_ivory_off_white
        approximate_color: "#f4f2ec"
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
    - id: subtle_paper_texture_layer
      kind: texture_layer
      role: quiet_material_texture
      visibility: faint
      style:
        texture: very_subtle_paper_grain_or_noise
        contrast: extremely_low
        color_relationship: slightly darker and lighter flecks on ivory canvas
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
  children:
    - id: brand_mark_link
      kind: graphic_link
      role: compact_brand_home_marker
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width_px: 50
        height_px: 30
        footprint: small_horizontal_organic_mark
      position:
        placement: top_left
        offset_left_px: 13
        offset_top_px: 13
      layout:
        alignment: free_placed_against_header_canvas
      style:
        background: none
        fill_color: dark_forest_green_with_small_light_negative_details
        border: none
        shadow: none_visible
      content:
        text: not_transcribed
        visual_type: logo_or_emblem
      imagery:
        category: icons
        icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
        placement: foreground_graphic
        creative_direction:
          form: compact illustrated emblem with organic folded/leaf-like silhouette
          rendering: flat dark green ink with fine internal light linework
          detail_level: moderate_for_small_logo
          realism: stylized_mark_not_photo
          edge_behavior: transparent_or_canvas-colored negative space, no surrounding frame
          palette_relationship: dark green mark on warm ivory host
      implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
    - id: right_navigation_cluster
      kind: navigation
      role: primary_navigation_and_menu_cluster
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width_px: 260
        height_px: 78
        note: approximate, occupies compact block at far top-right
      position:
        placement: top_right
        offset_right_px: 22
        offset_top_px: 14
      layout:
        type: two_zone_panel
        columns:
          - id: nav_items_zone
            width_px: 180
            role: labeled_navigation_area
          - id: menu_button_zone
            width_px: 80
            role: icon_menu_area
        vertical_structure: left_zone_has_blank_upper_area_and_bottom_tab_row
      style:
        background_color: dark_forest_green
        approximate_color: "#174c2f"
        text_color: warm_ivory
        border_color: warm_ivory
        border_width_px: 1
        border_style: solid_thin_lines
        shadow: none_visible
        radius:
          outer: small_or_decorative_cut_corner_unclear
        notes: panel reads as one dark inverse block with thin ivory segmentation lines
      layers:
        - id: panel_fill
          kind: surface_layer
          role: inverse_navigation_surface
          visibility: visible
          style:
            fill: dark_forest_green
            approximate_color: "#174c2f"
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: panel_dividers
          kind: line_layer
          role: internal_separation
          visibility: visible
          style:
            stroke_color: warm_ivory
            stroke_width_px: 1
            opacity: high
            lines:
              - vertical_separator_between_nav_and_menu_zone
              - horizontal_separator_above_bottom_tabs_in_left_zone
              - vertical_separators_between_bottom_tab_items
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: possible_corner_notches
          kind: decorative_sublayer
          role: corner_detail
          visibility: partially_visible
          style:
            shape: small rounded/circular ivory interruptions near some corners or divider intersections
            confidence: low
          implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      children:
        - id: nav_items_zone
          kind: navigation_group
          role: compact_text_links
          visibility: visible
          size:
            width_px: 180
            height_px: 78
          position:
            within_parent: left
          layout:
            type: stacked_area
            rows:
              - id: empty_upper_row
                height_px: 56
                role: blank_dark_header_area
              - id: bottom_tab_row
                height_px: 22
                role: segmented_link_row
            item_distribution: three_equal_or_near_equal_tabs
          style:
            background_color: dark_forest_green
            border_color: warm_ivory
          children:
            - id: blank_upper_panel_area
              kind: surface_region
              role: empty_inverse_space_above_links
              visibility: visible
              size:
                height_px: 56
              style:
                background_color: dark_forest_green
              implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
            - id: bottom_segmented_nav_row
              kind: navigation_list
              role: primary_link_tabs
              visibility: visible
              size:
                height_px: 22
              layout:
                type: horizontal_segments
                item_count: 3
                equal_width: mostly
                alignment: center
              style:
                background_color: dark_forest_green
                top_border:
                  color: warm_ivory
                  width_px: 1
                dividers:
                  color: warm_ivory
                  width_px: 1
              items:
                - id: nav_tab_item_1
                  kind: link
                  role: compact_navigation_label
                  visibility: visible
                  size:
                    height_px: 22
                    width_behavior: one_third_of_left_zone
                  layout:
                    text_alignment: center
                    vertical_alignment: middle
                  style:
                    background_color: dark_forest_green
                    text_color: warm_ivory
                    border_right: thin_ivory_divider
                  typography:
                    category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    weight: 400
                    line_height: tight
                    letter_spacing: slight_or_normal
                    case: title_or_mixed_case
                  content:
                    literal_text: omitted
                    content_role: short_navigation_label
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                - id: nav_tab_item_2
                  kind: link
                  role: compact_navigation_label
                  visibility: visible
                  size:
                    height_px: 22
                    width_behavior: one_third_of_left_zone
                  layout:
                    text_alignment: center
                    vertical_alignment: middle
                  style:
                    background_color: dark_forest_green
                    text_color: warm_ivory
                    border_right: thin_ivory_divider
                  typography:
                    category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    weight: 400
                    line_height: tight
                    letter_spacing: slight_or_normal
                    case: title_or_mixed_case
                  content:
                    literal_text: omitted
                    content_role: short_navigation_label
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                - id: nav_tab_item_3
                  kind: link
                  role: compact_navigation_label
                  visibility: visible
                  size:
                    height_px: 22
                    width_behavior: one_third_of_left_zone
                  layout:
                    text_alignment: center
                    vertical_alignment: middle
                  style:
                    background_color: dark_forest_green
                    text_color: warm_ivory
                  typography:
                    category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    weight: 400
                    line_height: tight
                    letter_spacing: slight_or_normal
                    case: title_or_mixed_case
                  content:
                    literal_text: omitted
                    content_role: short_navigation_label
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: menu_icon_button
          kind: icon_button
          role: menu_toggle
          visibility: visible
          size:
            width_px: 80
            height_px: 78
            hit_area: large_square_like_area
          position:
            within_parent: right
          layout:
            icon_alignment: centered
          style:
            background_color: dark_forest_green
            border_left:
              color: warm_ivory
              width_px: 1
            text_or_icon_color: warm_ivory
            shadow: none_visible
          children:
            - id: menu_glyph
              kind: icon
              role: hamburger_menu_symbol
              visibility: visible
              size:
                width_px: 43
                height_px: 17
              position:
                alignment: centered_in_button
              style:
                stroke_color: warm_ivory
                stroke_width_px: 2
                stroke_linecap: square_or_slightly_rounded_unclear
                fill: none
              imagery:
                category: icons
                icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                placement: foreground_graphic
                creative_direction:
                  form: three parallel horizontal strokes
                  rendering: simple flat line icon
                  complexity: very_low
                  palette_relationship: ivory lines on dark green inverse button
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
  edge_behavior:
    top: section_starts_at_viewport_top_with_same_ivory_canvas_no_visible_divider
    bottom: ivory_canvas_continues_to_next_section_area_without_visible_divider_in_crop
    left: open_ivory_canvas_reaches_viewport_edge
    right: open_canvas_visible_behind_inset_navigation_cluster_until_viewport_edge
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: site_header_shell
      role: sparse_header_canvas
      host_surface: warm_ivory_off_white
      sizing_behavior: full_width_fixed_short_height
      separation_mechanism: whitespace_and_positioning_only
    - id: brand_mark_link
      role: logo_home_link
      host_surface: warm_ivory_off_white
      child_surface_fill: none
      text_icon_color: dark_forest_green
      border_divider_shadow: none_visible
      sizing_behavior: small_fixed_graphic
      separation_mechanism: isolated_top_left_positioning
    - id: right_navigation_cluster
      role: compact_primary_navigation_module
      host_surface: warm_ivory_off_white
      child_surface_fill: dark_forest_green
      text_icon_color: warm_ivory
      border_divider_shadow: thin_ivory_internal_lines_no_shadow
      sizing_behavior: fixed_or_content_sized_top_right_panel
      separation_mechanism: strong_color_contrast_and_inset_position
    - id: bottom_segmented_nav_row
      role: segmented_text_links
      host_surface: dark_forest_green_panel
      child_surface_fill: same_as_parent
      text_icon_color: warm_ivory
      border_divider_shadow: thin_ivory_top_and_vertical_dividers
      sizing_behavior: three_compact_equal_segments
      separation_mechanism: divider_lines
    - id: menu_icon_button
      role: hamburger_menu_toggle
      host_surface: dark_forest_green_panel
      child_surface_fill: same_as_parent
      text_icon_color: warm_ivory
      border_divider_shadow: thin_ivory_left_divider
      sizing_behavior: square_like_icon_button_area
      separation_mechanism: panel_column_divider_and_centered_icon
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - search_input
    - cart_or_account_controls
    - breadcrumb
    - social_link_row
    - announcement_bar
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: color_canvas_warm_ivory
      value: "#f4f2ec"
      role: full_width_header_canvas
      path: root.style.background_color
      confidence: high
    - id: color_forest_green
      value: "#174c2f"
      role: logo_and_navigation_panel_fill
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.style.background_color
      confidence: high
    - id: color_warm_ivory_on_green
      value: "#f3f0e8"
      role: inverse_text_icons_and_dividers
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.style.text_color
      confidence: high
    - id: color_logo_detail_light
      value: "#e8e5dc"
      role: tiny_negative_or_highlight_lines_inside_brand_mark
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link.style.fill_color
      confidence: low
  gradients: []
  patterns:
    - id: pattern_subtle_paper_grain
      role: host_canvas_texture
      path: root.layers.subtle_paper_texture_layer
      visual_description: near-flat warm ivory with very faint mottling/noise
      scale: fine
      contrast: extremely_low
      confidence: medium
  background_systems:
    - id: bg_header_canvas
      path: root
      layers:
        - warm_ivory_solid_fill
        - very_subtle_paper_grain
      edge_behavior: reaches_all_crop_edges
      confidence: high
    - id: bg_inverse_navigation_panel
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster
      layers:
        - solid_dark_forest_green_fill
        - thin_warm_ivory_divider_lines
        - possible_small_corner_notch_details
      edge_behavior: inset_panel_not_section_background
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: type_compact_nav_label
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.nav_items_zone.children.bottom_segmented_nav_row.items
      role: tiny_navigation_label
      category: sans_serif
      style_description: narrow_or_condensed_simple_sans, small and utilitarian
      size_px: 12
      line_height: tight_approximately_1_1
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: normal_to_slight_positive
      transform_case: mixed_or_title_case
      alignment: centered
      color: warm_ivory_on_dark_green
      confidence: medium
  font_characteristics:
    - id: font_nav_sans_character
      role: navigation_microcopy
      visible_characteristics:
        - small_x_height_relative_to_panel
        - simple_unadorned_sans_shapes
        - not_bold
        - readable_but_secondary_to_panel_geometry
      confidence: medium
  spacing:
    - id: header_height
      value_px: 100
      role: section_crop_height
      path: root.size.height_px
      confidence: high
    - id: brand_mark_top_left_offset
      value: left_approximately_13px_top_13px
      role: logo_margin_from_viewport
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link.position
      confidence: medium
    - id: nav_cluster_top_right_offset
      value: right_approximately_22px_top_14px
      role: nav_module_margin_from_viewport
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.position
      confidence: medium
    - id: nav_bottom_tab_height
      value_px: 22
      role: compact_segmented_link_row
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.nav_items_zone.children.bottom_segmented_nav_row
      confidence: medium
    - id: open_center_whitespace
      value: very_large_horizontal_gap_between_logo_and_nav
      role: sparse_header_composition
      path: root.layout.horizontal_distribution
      confidence: high
    - id: lower_header_empty_space
      value: about_5_to_20px_below_nav_cluster_until_crop_bottom
      role: header_breathing_room
      path: root
      confidence: medium
  radius:
    - id: nav_panel_corner_treatment
      value_px: 0_to_6_unclear
      role: outer_panel_corner_or_decorative_cutout
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.style.radius
      confidence: low
    - id: menu_glyph_linecap
      value: square_or_slightly_rounded
      role: hamburger_stroke_end_style
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.children.menu_glyph.style
      confidence: low
  sizes:
    - id: brand_mark_size
      value: approximately_50x30px
      role: logo_footprint
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link.size
      confidence: medium
    - id: nav_cluster_size
      value: approximately_260x78px
      role: top_right_navigation_module
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.size
      confidence: medium
    - id: menu_button_size
      value: approximately_80x78px
      role: menu_toggle_hit_area
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.size
      confidence: medium
    - id: hamburger_icon_size
      value: approximately_43x17px
      role: menu_icon_visual_size
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.children.menu_glyph.size
      confidence: medium
  opacity:
    - id: canvas_texture_opacity
      value: very_low
      role: paper_grain_visibility
      path: root.layers.subtle_paper_texture_layer
      confidence: medium
  borders:
    - id: nav_internal_dividers
      role: panel_segmentation
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.layers.panel_dividers
      width_px: 1
      color: warm_ivory
      style: solid
      confidence: high
    - id: nav_outer_edge
      role: panel_boundary
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster
      width_px: 0_to_1
      color: warm_ivory_or_canvas_edge_unclear
      style: subtle_or_implied
      confidence: low
  shadows:
    - id: no_header_shadow_observed
      role: header_and_nav_depth
      path: root
      value: none_visible
      confidence: high
  effects:
    - id: subtle_material_texture
      role: tactile_canvas_effect
      path: root.layers.subtle_paper_texture_layer
      description: faint paper-like grain/noise over ivory background
      confidence: medium
    - id: inverse_panel_contrast
      role: visual_hierarchy_effect
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster
      description: strong dark-green block contrast makes navigation dominant despite small size
      confidence: high
  icons:
    - id: icon_brand_emblem
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link
      icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
      color_style: dark_green_mark_with_tiny_light_internal_details
      container_relationship: free_on_ivory_canvas_no_container
      visual_footprint: small_horizontal_organic_emblem
      can_be_approximated_as_simple_rectangle_or_text_block: false
      confidence: high
    - id: icon_hamburger_menu
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.children.menu_glyph
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      stroke_or_fill: stroked_three_line_symbol
      stroke_weight_px: 2
      corner_language: square_or_slightly_rounded_linecaps
      container_relationship: centered_inside_dark_green_square_like_button_zone
      confidence: high
  imagery_categories:
    icons:
      - id: icons_header_logo_and_menu
        paths:
          - root.children.brand_mark_link
          - root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.children.menu_glyph
        style_summary: dark-green brand mark on ivory plus simple ivory menu glyph on dark-green panel
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography: []
  media:
    - id: brand_logo_media_slot
      type: logo_or_emblem_graphic
      category: icons
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link
      placement: foreground_graphic
      edge_behavior: does_not_touch_crop_edges
      creative_direction: small stylized organic emblem, flat ink-like rendering, moderate internal detail
      implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
  creative_direction:
    - id: header_visual_direction
      role: overall_header_style
      description: sparse editorial header using warm paper-like canvas, a small organic dark-green logo mark, and a compact architectural top-right navigation panel.
      color_mood: restrained_warm_ivory_and_forest_green
      density: minimal
      geometry: large_empty_field_with_one_inset_rectangular_control_cluster
      confidence: high
    - id: navigation_panel_direction
      role: inverse_control_style
      description: dark-green rectangular module with fine ivory rule lines, micro navigation labels, and a large centered hamburger glyph.
      material: flat_color_no_shadow
      detail_level: low_to_moderate
      confidence: high
    - id: logo_mark_direction
      role: brand_marker_style
      description: tiny organic emblem drawn in dark green with sketchy internal detail, used like a standalone logo rather than a generic decorative illustration.
      confidence: medium
  implementation_assumptions:
    - id: root_canvas_implementation
      path: root
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: full-width background color occupies header host area
    - id: canvas_texture_implementation
      path: root.layers.subtle_paper_texture_layer
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      rationale: faint uniform noise/grain appears across ivory canvas
    - id: brand_mark_implementation
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link
      implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
      rationale: small crisp logo-like artwork with internal line detail
    - id: nav_panel_implementation
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: rectangular panel, tab dividers, text labels, and button-like segmentation
    - id: menu_glyph_implementation
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button.children.menu_glyph
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: simple three-line icon could be CSS or SVG, observed as page control
  components:
    - id: component_sparse_header
      path: root
      type: header
      role: global_site_header
      key_parts:
        - brand_mark_link
        - right_navigation_cluster
      style_summary: warm ivory canvas, low-density layout, no bottom rule
    - id: component_logo_link
      path: root.children.brand_mark_link
      type: logo_link
      role: home_or_brand_anchor
      style_summary: small dark-green emblem on ivory
    - id: component_navigation_cluster
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster
      type: navigation_panel
      role: compact_primary_navigation
      key_parts:
        - blank_upper_panel_area
        - bottom_segmented_nav_row
        - menu_icon_button
      style_summary: dark-green inverse block with ivory lines and text
    - id: component_segmented_nav_tabs
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.nav_items_zone.children.bottom_segmented_nav_row
      type: segmented_link_group
      role: primary_text_links
      style_summary: three tiny centered text tabs separated by thin ivory rules
    - id: component_menu_button
      path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button
      type: icon_button
      role: menu_toggle
      style_summary: large dark-green button area with centered ivory hamburger icon
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - warm_ivory_page_canvas
      - dark_forest_green_brand_and_inverse_surface
      - warm_ivory_inverse_text_and_rules
    gradients: []
    patterns:
      - subtle_paper_grain_on_light_canvas
    background_systems:
      - ivory_canvas_with_faint_texture
      - forest_green_inverse_panel_with_ivory_rule_grid
    typography:
      - micro_sans_navigation_label
    spacing:
      - sparse_header_outer_offsets
      - compact_panel_tab_height
      - large_empty_center_header_space
    radius:
      - minimal_or_decorative_panel_corner_treatment_uncertain
    shadow:
      - no_shadow_flat_header_controls
    dividers:
      - one_pixel_ivory_panel_dividers
  likely_components:
    - sparse_logo_plus_nav_header
    - standalone_logo_mark_link
    - compact_inverse_navigation_panel
    - segmented_micro_nav_link_row
    - large_square_hamburger_menu_button
  likely_section_patterns:
    - full_width_short_header_on_textured_ivory_canvas
    - asymmetric_header_with_brand_left_and_controls_right
    - navigation_cluster_as_inset_dark_panel_not_full_header_bar
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - ivory_canvas_supports_dark_green_logo_without_container
    - dark_green_inverse_panel_uses_ivory_text_icons_and_1px_rules
    - segmented_links_share_parent_fill_and rely_on_dividers_for_separation
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - header composition depends on very large negative space between logo and navigation cluster
    - nav cluster is inset from top and right rather than flush to viewport edges
    - bottom tab row is shallow compared with large blank upper area of nav panel
    - menu button is visually larger than individual text tabs, emphasizing global menu action
  link_action_mechanics:
    - brand mark likely acts as home link through graphic-only affordance
    - compact text navigation links are presented as segmented tabs inside inverse panel
    - hamburger icon is an icon-only button with generous hit area and no visible label
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - warm paper-like background
    - forest-green editorial palette
    - thin ivory rule grid on dark panel
    - small organic logo mark contrasted with rigid rectangular navigation module
    - possible small rounded/cut corner accents on nav panel, low confidence
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons:
      - simple single-color line icon for menu controls, ivory on dark green
      - logo/wordmark slot can use compact organic dark-green mark with internal line detail
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography: []
  do_not_generalize:
    - do not treat the dark-green navigation panel fill as the full section background
    - do not reproduce or tokenize exact visible navigation words
    - do not generalize the brand emblem artwork as a reusable decorative illustration style beyond logo-slot evidence
    - do not infer hidden dropdowns or menu states from the hamburger control
    - do not assume the possible corner notches are intentional without additional evidence
  uncertainties:
    - exact font family for navigation labels is not recoverable
    - exact corner shape of navigation panel is partially ambiguous due to small scale
    - brand mark asset type could be SVG or raster, though it reads logo-like
    - faint background texture may be screenshot/noise or intentional paper texture
    - precise panel dimensions depend on screenshot scaling and are approximate
02 hero brand masthead
02-hero-brand-masthead.pngruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/crops/02-hero-brand-masthead.png
Section grounding outputs
02-hero-brand-masthead.mdruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/02-hero-brand-masthead.md
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 2
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Hero / brand masthead"
  previous_section_label: "Navigation / header"
  next_section_label: "What Defines Us values grid"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 100
    original_y_end: 1400
    crop_y_start: 100
    crop_y_end: 1400
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: masthead_media_intro_section
  role: oversized_identity_masthead_with_full_bleed_photography
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: oversized_identity_masthead_with_full_bleed_photography
  visibility: visible
  size:
    width: full_viewport_crop_approx_1366px
    height: approx_1300px
  layout:
    display: vertical_stack
    alignment: stretch
    content_flow: large_identity_plate_above_full_width_media
    horizontal_overflow: clipped_to_viewport
    vertical_density: sparse_top_identity_then_immersive_media
  position:
    crop_origin: begins_immediately_below_previous_header
    viewport_relationship: full_width
  style:
    background_color:
      value: warm_off_white
      approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
      confidence: high
      note: visible as full-width masthead plate and a narrow strip below the photo; not taken from the photo surface
    border: none_visible
    radius: none
    shadow: none
    overflow: hidden_or_clip_at_viewport_edges
  layers:
    - id: section_canvas_fill
      kind: background_layer
      role: root_canvas
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      style:
        fill: warm_off_white
        approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
      coverage: full_section_host_behind_children
  children:
    - id: identity_plate
      kind: container
      role: oversized_logo_wordmark_area
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width: full_viewport
        height: approx_376px
      layout:
        positioning: relative
        alignment: horizontally_distributed
        vertical_alignment: center_to_baseline_low
        padding:
          top: approx_35px
          left: approx_55px
          right: approx_55px
          bottom: approx_25px
      position:
        y: 0
        x: 0
      style:
        background_color:
          value: warm_off_white
          approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
          confidence: high
        border: none_visible
        radius: none
        shadow: none
      layers: []
      children:
        - id: oversized_split_wordmark
          kind: logo_or_wordmark
          role: primary_identity_mark
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: unknown
          text_content: omitted_no_literal_copy
          size:
            visual_width: nearly_full_viewport_with_large_internal_gap
            visual_height: approx_300px
          position:
            x: approx_60px_to_1290px
            y: approx_40px_to_340px
          layout:
            arrangement: two_large_word_clusters_separated_by_wide_empty_center_gap
            cluster_count: 2
            baseline: near_lower_third_of_plate
            optical_alignment: top_edges_aligned_and_baseline_aligned
          style:
            color:
              value: deep_botanical_green
              approx_hex: "#184c31"
              confidence: high
            typography:
              category: display_serif
              visual_style: ultra_large_high_contrast_didone_like_serif_with_thin_hairline_serifs_and_tall_elegant_forms
              size: approx_390px_css_equivalent_or_300px_visual_cap_height
              line_height: very_tight_single_line
              weight: regular_light_to_regular
              letter_spacing: loose_with_large_custom_gap_between_clusters
              case: uppercase_wordmark_style
              alignment: distributed_across_width
            fill_opacity: solid
            border: none_visible
            shadow: none
          items:
            - id: left_wordmark_cluster
              role: left_identity_cluster
              visual_footprint:
                x: approx_60px
                y: approx_40px
                width: approx_390px
                height: approx_300px
              note: large serif characters and punctuation-like mark; literal characters not transcribed
            - id: right_wordmark_cluster
              role: right_identity_cluster
              visual_footprint:
                x: approx_800px
                y: approx_40px
                width: approx_485px
                height: approx_300px
