              note: matching large serif characters and punctuation-like mark; literal characters not transcribed
    - id: full_width_media_band
      kind: media_frame
      role: immersive_hero_image_container
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width: full_viewport
        height: approx_910px
      layout:
        display: block
        image_fit: cover
        alignment: center
      position:
        x: 0
        y: approx_376px
      style:
        background_color:
          value: dark_image_edge_tones
          confidence: medium
          note: frame is fully occupied by the photo; not a separate page surface
        border: none_visible
        radius: none
        shadow: none
        overflow: hidden
      layers: []
      children:
        - id: hero_photograph
          kind: image
          role: primary_photographic_visual
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
          placement: foreground_media
          size:
            width: full_viewport
            height: fills_media_band
          position:
            x: 0
            y: 0
          style:
            object_fit: cover
            object_position: center_with_subject_low_center
            border: none_visible
            radius: none
            shadow: none
          image:
            category: photography
            source_subject_context: close_handheld_food_or_produce_moment
            photo_content_reaches_image_edges: true
            frame_relationship: photo_reaches_viewport_left_and_right_edges_and_top_of_media_band
            crop: close_cropped_vertical_subject_in_wide_landscape_frame
            perspective: intimate_eye_level_or_slightly_low_closeup
            realism: realistic_photography
            lighting: warm_directional_golden_light_with_strong_shadow_contrast
            depth_of_field: shallow_background_blur_with_large_soft_bokeh
            color_treatment: dark_olive_green_and_gold_cinematic_grade
            composition: central_single_object_held_by_hands_against_dark_blurred_natural_background
            edge_behavior: no_inner_padding_no_border_photo_abuts_frame_edges
            density: simple_main_subject_with_soft_complex_background
            detail_level: high_detail_on_foreground_subject_and_hands_low_detail_background
    - id: lower_canvas_sliver
      kind: spacer
      role: narrow_canvas_gap_after_media
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width: full_viewport
        height: approx_15px
      position:
        x: 0
        y: approx_1285px
      layout:
        display: block
      style:
        background_color:
          value: warm_off_white
          approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
          confidence: medium
        border: none_visible
        radius: none
        shadow: none
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: masthead_identity_wordmark
      component_type: logo_wordmark_display
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      host_surface: warm_off_white_identity_plate
      child_surface_or_fill: solid_deep_green_letterforms
      text_or_icon_color: deep_botanical_green
      border_divider_shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: oversized_viewport_spanning_wordmark_with_custom_spacing
      separation_mechanism: scale_and_negative_space
    - id: hero_media_frame
      component_type: full_bleed_image_band
      path: root.children[1]
      host_surface: none_visible_frame_filled_by_photo
      child_surface_or_fill: raster_photo
      border_divider_shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: full_width_fixed_height_cover_crop
      separation_mechanism: hard_horizontal_edge_between_identity_plate_and_photo
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - primary_button
    - secondary_button
    - text_input
    - navigation_links_inside_section
    - cards
    - tabs
    - badges_or_chips
    - carousel_controls
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: color_warm_off_white_canvas
      value: warm_off_white
      approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
      confidence: high
      path: root.style.background_color
      usage: full_width_section_canvas_identity_plate_and_lower_sliver
    - id: color_deep_botanical_green_ink
      value: deep_botanical_green
      approx_hex: "#184c31"
      confidence: high
      path: root.children[0].children[0].style.color
      usage: oversized_wordmark_letterforms
    - id: color_photo_near_black_green
      value: near_black_green
      approx_hex: "#030906"
      confidence: medium
      path: root.children[1].children[0].image
      usage: dark_background_and_shadow_regions_in_photo
    - id: color_photo_olive_gold
      value: olive_gold
      approx_hex: "#8f8419"
      confidence: medium
      path: root.children[1].children[0].image
      usage: blurred foliage highlights
    - id: color_photo_warm_yellow_subject
      value: warm_yellow_produce
      approx_hex: "#d6bf58"
      confidence: medium
      path: root.children[1].children[0].image
      usage: central foreground object
    - id: color_photo_warm_skin_shadow
      value: warm_skin_and_brown_shadow
      approx_hex: "#a8663d"
      confidence: low
      path: root.children[1].children[0].image
      usage: hands_and_warm_shadow_areas
  gradients:
    - id: photo_natural_luminance_falloff
      type: photographic_light_gradient
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      colors: dark_green_black_to_olive_gold_to_warm_yellow
      direction: irregular_natural_photo_lighting
      confidence: high
      note: part_of_raster_photography_not_css_gradient
  patterns:
    - id: subtle_off_white_canvas_texture
      type: nearly_flat_surface_with_possible_subtle_noise
      path: root
      confidence: low
      note: may be screenshot compression or very subtle paper-like background; not enough evidence for a deliberate texture
    - id: photographic_bokeh_pattern
      type: soft_blurred_natural_background_shapes
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      confidence: high
      note: raster photo content, not a repeatable page pattern
  background_systems:
    - id: root_canvas_system
      path: root
      layers:
        - warm_off_white_flat_canvas
      coverage: section_host_visible_in_masthead_plate_and_bottom_sliver
      confidence: high
    - id: media_band_photo_system
      path: root.children[1]
      layers:
        - full_bleed_cover_raster_photo
      coverage: full_width_middle_and_lower_majority_of_section
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: typography_oversized_identity_display
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      category: display_serif
      visual_characteristics: high_contrast_tall_serif_didone_like_large_caps_with_thin_hairline_serifs_and_refined_curves
      size: approx_390px_css_equivalent
      visual_cap_height: approx_300px
      line_height: very_tight_single_line
      weight: regular_light_to_regular
      letter_spacing: loose_custom_tracking
      transform_or_case: uppercase_wordmark_style
      alignment: distributed_horizontal_lockup
      color: deep_botanical_green
      confidence: high
  font_characteristics:
    - id: display_serif_character
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      traits:
        - extreme_scale
        - high_thick_thin_contrast
        - vertical_stress
        - elegant_bracketless_or_lightly_bracketed_serifs
        - narrow_tall_letterforms
        - fashion_editorial_feel
      confidence: high
  spacing:
    - id: section_vertical_stack_spacing
      path: root
      values:
        identity_plate_height: approx_376px
        media_band_height: approx_910px
        bottom_canvas_sliver: approx_15px
      confidence: high
    - id: wordmark_plate_padding
      path: root.children[0]
      values:
        top: approx_35px
        left: approx_55px
        right: approx_55px
        bottom: approx_25px
      confidence: medium
    - id: wordmark_cluster_gap
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      values:
        gap_between_left_and_right_clusters: very_large_approx_340px
      confidence: medium
      note: appears custom/compositional rather than normal inline word spacing
    - id: photo_edge_spacing
      path: root.children[1]
      values:
        left: 0
        right: 0
        top: 0
        inner_padding: 0
      confidence: high
  radius:
    - id: no_radius_section_or_media
      path: root
      value: 0px
      confidence: high
      usage: section_edges_identity_plate_media_frame
  sizes:
    - id: viewport_crop_size
      path: root
      value: approx_1366px_wide_by_1300px_tall
      confidence: high
    - id: identity_plate_size
      path: root.children[0]
      value: full_width_by_approx_376px
      confidence: high
    - id: media_band_size
      path: root.children[1]
      value: full_width_by_approx_910px
      confidence: high
    - id: wordmark_visual_size
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      value: approx_1230px_wide_by_300px_tall_visual_letter_area
      confidence: medium
  opacity:
    - id: solid_wordmark_opacity
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      value: 100_percent
      confidence: high
    - id: photo_opacity
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      value: 100_percent
      confidence: high
  borders:
    - id: no_visible_borders
      path: root
      value: none_visible_on_section_plate_or_media
      confidence: high
  shadows:
    - id: no_css_shadow_observed
      path: root
      value: none
      confidence: high
      note: photo contains natural shadows only
  effects:
    - id: hard_edge_plate_to_photo_transition
      path: root.children[0] to root.children[1]
      type: hard_horizontal_cut
      confidence: high
    - id: photographic_shallow_depth_of_field
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      type: raster_photo_depth_effect
      confidence: high
      description: sharp_foreground_subject_against_heavily_blurred_dark_foliage
    - id: warm_cinematic_photo_grade
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      type: color_grading
      confidence: high
      description: golden_highlights_deep_green_black_shadows_high_contrast
  icons:
    - id: oversized_identity_wordmark_asset
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
      visual_footprint: very_large_split_wordmark_spanning_most_of_viewport_width
      surface_color_relationship: deep_green_on_warm_off_white
      approximable_as_simple_rectangle_or_text_block: text_block_approximation_possible_for_layout_but_exact_logo_art_not_captured
      confidence: high
  imagery_categories:
    icons:
      - id: oversized_identity_wordmark_asset
        path: root.children[0].children[0]
        icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
        placement: foreground_graphic
        style_summary: solid_deep_green_high_contrast_serif_wordmark_on_light_canvas
        generation_note: do_not_recreate_literal_logo; preserve_scale_color_and_editorial_serif_feel_if_generating_alternative_identity
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - id: hero_closeup_photo
        path: root.children[1].children[0]
        placement: foreground_media
        imagery_category: photography
        framing: full_width_landscape_crop_with_centered_closeup_foreground_subject
        crop: subject_cut_by_lower_edge_with_background_reaching_all_photo_edges
        perspective: close_intimate_handheld_view
        realism_level: realistic
        lighting: warm_directional_natural_or_staged_golden_light
        material_texture: glossy_smooth_foreground_object_skin_texture_hands_and_soft_foliage_bokeh
        color_treatment: deep_olive_green_black_background_with_warm_yellow_highlights
        composition: simple_single_center_focus_with_dark_negative_space_and_blurred_foliage
        edge_behavior: photo_asset_extends_to_media_edges_no_padding_no_matte
        density: low_to_medium
        detail_level: high_foreground_low_background
        confidence: high
  media:
    - id: hero_photo_media
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      type: raster_photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame: full_bleed_rectangular_band
      dimensions: approx_1366px_wide_by_910px_tall_visible
      object_fit: cover
      object_position: center
      photo_content_reaches_image_edges: true
      outer_page_frame_or_padding: none_visible
      border_radius: 0px
      border: none
      shadow: none
      confidence: high
  creative_direction:
    - id: identity_masthead_direction
      path: root.children[0]
      category: typographic_brand_masthead
      direction: oversized_editorial_serif_identity_mark_on_warm_minimal_canvas_with_extreme_scale_and_generous_negative_space
      palette_relationship: dark_green_ink_on_warm_off_white
      complexity: simple_bold_typographic
      confidence: high
    - id: hero_photo_direction
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      category: photography
      direction: intimate_food_or_nature_closeup_photography_with_cinematic_warm_light_dark_organic_background_shallow_depth_of_field_and_central_tactile_subject
      palette_relationship: photo_picks_up_green_brand_color_through_dark_foliage_and_warm_gold_counterpoint
      complexity: simple_composition_high_photographic_texture
      confidence: high
  implementation_assumptions:
    - id: root_section_layout_assumption
      path: root
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: high
      note: section behaves visually as a vertical stack of plate and media
    - id: identity_plate_assumption
      path: root.children[0]
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: high
      note: full-width light surface hosting the oversized mark
    - id: wordmark_implementation_unclear
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      implementation_assumption: unknown
      confidence: low
      note: could be live text, SVG, or image/logo asset; only visual footprint and style are observable
    - id: photo_implementation_assumption
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      confidence: high
      note: realistic full-bleed photographic image
  components:
    - id: masthead_identity_wordmark_component
      type: logo_wordmark_display
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      host_surface: warm_off_white
      fill: deep_green
      border: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: oversized_split_lockup
      interaction_state: no_interaction_visible
      confidence: high
    - id: full_width_image_band_component
      type: media_frame
      path: root.children[1]
      host_surface: filled_by_photo
      fill: raster_image
      border: none
      radius: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: viewport_width_cover_image
      confidence: high
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - candidate: surface_warm_off_white
        approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
        observed_paths:
          - root
          - root.children[0]
          - root.children[2]
      - candidate: ink_deep_botanical_green
        approx_hex: "#184c31"
        observed_paths:
          - root.children[0].children[0]
      - candidate: photo_dark_olive_shadow
        approx_hex: "#030906"
        observed_paths:
          - root.children[1].children[0]
        note: likely imagery_palette_not_ui_token
      - candidate: photo_warm_gold
        approx_hex: "#d6bf58"
        observed_paths:
          - root.children[1].children[0]
        note: likely imagery_palette_not_ui_token
    gradients:
      - candidate: natural_photo_warm_light_falloff
        note: do_not_tokenize_as_css_gradient_unless_reused_as_image_treatment
    patterns:
      - candidate: subtle_warm_canvas_texture_or_flat_fill
        confidence: low
    background_systems:
      - candidate: warm_minimal_canvas_plus_full_bleed_photo_band
        recipe: light_identity_plate_stacked_above_edge_to_edge_photographic_band
    typography:
      - candidate: oversized_editorial_display_serif_wordmark
        traits: high_contrast_serif_extreme_scale_tight_line_height_dark_green
    spacing:
      - candidate: masthead_plate_height_large
        value: approx_376px
      - candidate: photo_band_height_immersive
        value: approx_910px
      - candidate: wordmark_outer_inset
        value: approx_55px_horizontal_35px_top
      - candidate: no_media_padding
        value: 0px
    radius:
      - candidate: square_media_edges
        value: 0px
    shadow:
      - candidate: no_elevation
        value: none
    dividers:
      - candidate: hard_horizontal_surface_transition
        value: no_line_just_abutting_surfaces
  likely_components:
    - component: oversized_identity_masthead_plate
      anatomy: warm_off_white_full_width_plate_with_giant_split_serif_wordmark
    - component: full_bleed_hero_photography_band
      anatomy: rectangular_cover_image_no_radius_no_border
  likely_section_patterns:
    - pattern: editorial_brand_masthead_followed_by_immersive_photography
      description: extreme-scale identity mark establishes brand mood before large cinematic image
    - pattern: two_surface_vertical_stack
      description: light typographic canvas above dark warm full-bleed photographic field
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - recipe: identity_on_light_surface
      surface: warm_off_white
      foreground: deep_green_oversized_high_contrast_serif_wordmark
      separation: scale_negative_space_no_boxing
    - recipe: photo_band_on_canvas
      surface: raster_photo_fills_frame
      frame: full_width_square_corners_no_padding
      transition: hard_cut_from_light_plate_to_photo
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - masthead_uses_extreme_typographic_scale_instead_of_multiple_content_blocks
    - hero_photo_directly_touches_identity_plate_with_no_visible_gap
    - section_has_no_inner_column_grid_except_custom_wordmark_distribution
    - bottom_of_crop_shows_only_a_small_light_canvas_sliver_after_media
  link_action_mechanics:
    - no_buttons_links_or_controls_visible_within_target_section
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - oversized_split_serif_wordmark_with_deep_green_ink
    - warm_off_white_editorial_canvas
    - cinematic_dark_green_and_gold_food_nature_photography
    - sharp_horizontal_switch_from_typographic_plate_to_full_bleed_photo
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons:
      - logo_wordmark_should_be_treated_as_identity_slot_not_reusable_icon_art
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - intimate_closeup_realistic_photography
      - shallow_depth_of_field_with_dark_organic_background
      - warm_golden_directional_light_and_high_contrast_shadows
      - central_simple_tactile_subject_with_low_background_detail
  do_not_generalize:
    - do_not_transcribe_or_recreate_the_literal_visible_wordmark_letters
    - do_not_assume_the_photo_subject_must_remain_the_same; preserve photographic style_and_composition_instead
    - do_not_treat_photo_dark_background_as_the_section_root_background
    - do_not_add_buttons_or_intro_copy_not_visible_in_this_crop
    - do_not_infer_header_navigation_from_context_images_into_this_section
  uncertainties:
    - exact_wordmark_implementation_is_unclear_live_text_vs_svg_vs_image_asset
    - subtle_canvas_texture_may_be_screenshot_noise
    - precise_bottom_transition_to_next_section_is_partly_outside_crop; only_a_narrow_light_sliver_is_visible
    - exact_font_family_unknown; only_display_serif_visual_characteristics_are_observed
02-hero-brand-masthead.yamlruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/02-hero-brand-masthead.yaml
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 2
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Hero / brand masthead"
  previous_section_label: "Navigation / header"
  next_section_label: "What Defines Us values grid"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 100
    original_y_end: 1400
    crop_y_start: 100
    crop_y_end: 1400
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: masthead_media_intro_section
  role: oversized_identity_masthead_with_full_bleed_photography
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: oversized_identity_masthead_with_full_bleed_photography
  visibility: visible
  size:
    width: full_viewport_crop_approx_1366px
    height: approx_1300px
  layout:
    display: vertical_stack
    alignment: stretch
    content_flow: large_identity_plate_above_full_width_media
    horizontal_overflow: clipped_to_viewport
    vertical_density: sparse_top_identity_then_immersive_media
  position:
    crop_origin: begins_immediately_below_previous_header
    viewport_relationship: full_width
  style:
    background_color:
      value: warm_off_white
      approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
      confidence: high
      note: visible as full-width masthead plate and a narrow strip below the photo; not taken from the photo surface
    border: none_visible
    radius: none
    shadow: none
    overflow: hidden_or_clip_at_viewport_edges
  layers:
    - id: section_canvas_fill
      kind: background_layer
      role: root_canvas
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      style:
        fill: warm_off_white
        approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
      coverage: full_section_host_behind_children
  children:
    - id: identity_plate
      kind: container
      role: oversized_logo_wordmark_area
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width: full_viewport
        height: approx_376px
      layout:
        positioning: relative
        alignment: horizontally_distributed
        vertical_alignment: center_to_baseline_low
        padding:
          top: approx_35px
          left: approx_55px
          right: approx_55px
          bottom: approx_25px
      position:
        y: 0
        x: 0
      style:
        background_color:
          value: warm_off_white
          approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
          confidence: high
        border: none_visible
        radius: none
        shadow: none
      layers: []
      children:
        - id: oversized_split_wordmark
          kind: logo_or_wordmark
          role: primary_identity_mark
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: unknown
          text_content: omitted_no_literal_copy
          size:
            visual_width: nearly_full_viewport_with_large_internal_gap
            visual_height: approx_300px
          position:
            x: approx_60px_to_1290px
            y: approx_40px_to_340px
          layout:
            arrangement: two_large_word_clusters_separated_by_wide_empty_center_gap
            cluster_count: 2
            baseline: near_lower_third_of_plate
            optical_alignment: top_edges_aligned_and_baseline_aligned
          style:
            color:
              value: deep_botanical_green
              approx_hex: "#184c31"
              confidence: high
            typography:
              category: display_serif
              visual_style: ultra_large_high_contrast_didone_like_serif_with_thin_hairline_serifs_and_tall_elegant_forms
              size: approx_390px_css_equivalent_or_300px_visual_cap_height
              line_height: very_tight_single_line
              weight: regular_light_to_regular
              letter_spacing: loose_with_large_custom_gap_between_clusters
              case: uppercase_wordmark_style
              alignment: distributed_across_width
            fill_opacity: solid
            border: none_visible
            shadow: none
          items:
            - id: left_wordmark_cluster
              role: left_identity_cluster
              visual_footprint:
                x: approx_60px
                y: approx_40px
                width: approx_390px
                height: approx_300px
              note: large serif characters and punctuation-like mark; literal characters not transcribed
            - id: right_wordmark_cluster
              role: right_identity_cluster
              visual_footprint:
                x: approx_800px
                y: approx_40px
                width: approx_485px
                height: approx_300px
              note: matching large serif characters and punctuation-like mark; literal characters not transcribed
    - id: full_width_media_band
      kind: media_frame
      role: immersive_hero_image_container
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width: full_viewport
        height: approx_910px
      layout:
        display: block
        image_fit: cover
        alignment: center
      position:
        x: 0
        y: approx_376px
      style:
        background_color:
          value: dark_image_edge_tones
          confidence: medium
          note: frame is fully occupied by the photo; not a separate page surface
        border: none_visible
        radius: none
        shadow: none
        overflow: hidden
      layers: []
      children:
        - id: hero_photograph
          kind: image
          role: primary_photographic_visual
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
          placement: foreground_media
          size:
            width: full_viewport
            height: fills_media_band
          position:
            x: 0
            y: 0
          style:
            object_fit: cover
            object_position: center_with_subject_low_center
            border: none_visible
            radius: none
            shadow: none
          image:
            category: photography
            source_subject_context: close_handheld_food_or_produce_moment
            photo_content_reaches_image_edges: true
            frame_relationship: photo_reaches_viewport_left_and_right_edges_and_top_of_media_band
            crop: close_cropped_vertical_subject_in_wide_landscape_frame
            perspective: intimate_eye_level_or_slightly_low_closeup
            realism: realistic_photography
            lighting: warm_directional_golden_light_with_strong_shadow_contrast
            depth_of_field: shallow_background_blur_with_large_soft_bokeh
            color_treatment: dark_olive_green_and_gold_cinematic_grade
            composition: central_single_object_held_by_hands_against_dark_blurred_natural_background
            edge_behavior: no_inner_padding_no_border_photo_abuts_frame_edges
            density: simple_main_subject_with_soft_complex_background
            detail_level: high_detail_on_foreground_subject_and_hands_low_detail_background
    - id: lower_canvas_sliver
      kind: spacer
      role: narrow_canvas_gap_after_media
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width: full_viewport
        height: approx_15px
      position:
        x: 0
        y: approx_1285px
      layout:
        display: block
      style:
        background_color:
          value: warm_off_white
          approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
          confidence: medium
        border: none_visible
        radius: none
        shadow: none
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: masthead_identity_wordmark
      component_type: logo_wordmark_display
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      host_surface: warm_off_white_identity_plate
      child_surface_or_fill: solid_deep_green_letterforms
      text_or_icon_color: deep_botanical_green
      border_divider_shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: oversized_viewport_spanning_wordmark_with_custom_spacing
      separation_mechanism: scale_and_negative_space
    - id: hero_media_frame
      component_type: full_bleed_image_band
      path: root.children[1]
      host_surface: none_visible_frame_filled_by_photo
      child_surface_or_fill: raster_photo
      border_divider_shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: full_width_fixed_height_cover_crop
      separation_mechanism: hard_horizontal_edge_between_identity_plate_and_photo
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - primary_button
    - secondary_button
    - text_input
    - navigation_links_inside_section
    - cards
    - tabs
    - badges_or_chips
    - carousel_controls
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: color_warm_off_white_canvas
      value: warm_off_white
      approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
      confidence: high
      path: root.style.background_color
      usage: full_width_section_canvas_identity_plate_and_lower_sliver
    - id: color_deep_botanical_green_ink
      value: deep_botanical_green
      approx_hex: "#184c31"
      confidence: high
      path: root.children[0].children[0].style.color
      usage: oversized_wordmark_letterforms
    - id: color_photo_near_black_green
      value: near_black_green
      approx_hex: "#030906"
      confidence: medium
      path: root.children[1].children[0].image
      usage: dark_background_and_shadow_regions_in_photo
    - id: color_photo_olive_gold
      value: olive_gold
      approx_hex: "#8f8419"
      confidence: medium
      path: root.children[1].children[0].image
      usage: blurred foliage highlights
    - id: color_photo_warm_yellow_subject
      value: warm_yellow_produce
      approx_hex: "#d6bf58"
      confidence: medium
      path: root.children[1].children[0].image
      usage: central foreground object
    - id: color_photo_warm_skin_shadow
      value: warm_skin_and_brown_shadow
      approx_hex: "#a8663d"
      confidence: low
      path: root.children[1].children[0].image
      usage: hands_and_warm_shadow_areas
  gradients:
    - id: photo_natural_luminance_falloff
      type: photographic_light_gradient
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      colors: dark_green_black_to_olive_gold_to_warm_yellow
      direction: irregular_natural_photo_lighting
      confidence: high
      note: part_of_raster_photography_not_css_gradient
  patterns:
    - id: subtle_off_white_canvas_texture
      type: nearly_flat_surface_with_possible_subtle_noise
      path: root
      confidence: low
      note: may be screenshot compression or very subtle paper-like background; not enough evidence for a deliberate texture
    - id: photographic_bokeh_pattern
      type: soft_blurred_natural_background_shapes
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      confidence: high
      note: raster photo content, not a repeatable page pattern
  background_systems:
    - id: root_canvas_system
      path: root
      layers:
        - warm_off_white_flat_canvas
      coverage: section_host_visible_in_masthead_plate_and_bottom_sliver
      confidence: high
    - id: media_band_photo_system
      path: root.children[1]
      layers:
        - full_bleed_cover_raster_photo
      coverage: full_width_middle_and_lower_majority_of_section
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: typography_oversized_identity_display
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      category: display_serif
      visual_characteristics: high_contrast_tall_serif_didone_like_large_caps_with_thin_hairline_serifs_and_refined_curves
      size: approx_390px_css_equivalent
      visual_cap_height: approx_300px
      line_height: very_tight_single_line
      weight: regular_light_to_regular
      letter_spacing: loose_custom_tracking
      transform_or_case: uppercase_wordmark_style
      alignment: distributed_horizontal_lockup
      color: deep_botanical_green
      confidence: high
  font_characteristics:
    - id: display_serif_character
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      traits:
        - extreme_scale
        - high_thick_thin_contrast
        - vertical_stress
        - elegant_bracketless_or_lightly_bracketed_serifs
        - narrow_tall_letterforms
        - fashion_editorial_feel
      confidence: high
  spacing:
    - id: section_vertical_stack_spacing
      path: root
      values:
        identity_plate_height: approx_376px
        media_band_height: approx_910px
        bottom_canvas_sliver: approx_15px
      confidence: high
    - id: wordmark_plate_padding
      path: root.children[0]
      values:
        top: approx_35px
        left: approx_55px
        right: approx_55px
        bottom: approx_25px
      confidence: medium
    - id: wordmark_cluster_gap
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      values:
        gap_between_left_and_right_clusters: very_large_approx_340px
      confidence: medium
      note: appears custom/compositional rather than normal inline word spacing
    - id: photo_edge_spacing
      path: root.children[1]
      values:
        left: 0
        right: 0
        top: 0
        inner_padding: 0
      confidence: high
  radius:
    - id: no_radius_section_or_media
      path: root
      value: 0px
      confidence: high
      usage: section_edges_identity_plate_media_frame
  sizes:
    - id: viewport_crop_size
      path: root
      value: approx_1366px_wide_by_1300px_tall
      confidence: high
    - id: identity_plate_size
      path: root.children[0]
      value: full_width_by_approx_376px
      confidence: high
    - id: media_band_size
      path: root.children[1]
      value: full_width_by_approx_910px
      confidence: high
    - id: wordmark_visual_size
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      value: approx_1230px_wide_by_300px_tall_visual_letter_area
      confidence: medium
  opacity:
    - id: solid_wordmark_opacity
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      value: 100_percent
      confidence: high
    - id: photo_opacity
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      value: 100_percent
      confidence: high
  borders:
    - id: no_visible_borders
      path: root
      value: none_visible_on_section_plate_or_media
      confidence: high
  shadows:
    - id: no_css_shadow_observed
      path: root
      value: none
      confidence: high
      note: photo contains natural shadows only
  effects:
    - id: hard_edge_plate_to_photo_transition
      path: root.children[0] to root.children[1]
      type: hard_horizontal_cut
      confidence: high
    - id: photographic_shallow_depth_of_field
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      type: raster_photo_depth_effect
      confidence: high
      description: sharp_foreground_subject_against_heavily_blurred_dark_foliage
    - id: warm_cinematic_photo_grade
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      type: color_grading
      confidence: high
      description: golden_highlights_deep_green_black_shadows_high_contrast
  icons:
    - id: oversized_identity_wordmark_asset
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
      visual_footprint: very_large_split_wordmark_spanning_most_of_viewport_width
      surface_color_relationship: deep_green_on_warm_off_white
      approximable_as_simple_rectangle_or_text_block: text_block_approximation_possible_for_layout_but_exact_logo_art_not_captured
      confidence: high
  imagery_categories:
    icons:
      - id: oversized_identity_wordmark_asset
        path: root.children[0].children[0]
        icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
        placement: foreground_graphic
        style_summary: solid_deep_green_high_contrast_serif_wordmark_on_light_canvas
        generation_note: do_not_recreate_literal_logo; preserve_scale_color_and_editorial_serif_feel_if_generating_alternative_identity
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - id: hero_closeup_photo
        path: root.children[1].children[0]
        placement: foreground_media
        imagery_category: photography
        framing: full_width_landscape_crop_with_centered_closeup_foreground_subject
        crop: subject_cut_by_lower_edge_with_background_reaching_all_photo_edges
        perspective: close_intimate_handheld_view
        realism_level: realistic
        lighting: warm_directional_natural_or_staged_golden_light
        material_texture: glossy_smooth_foreground_object_skin_texture_hands_and_soft_foliage_bokeh
        color_treatment: deep_olive_green_black_background_with_warm_yellow_highlights
        composition: simple_single_center_focus_with_dark_negative_space_and_blurred_foliage
        edge_behavior: photo_asset_extends_to_media_edges_no_padding_no_matte
        density: low_to_medium
        detail_level: high_foreground_low_background
        confidence: high
  media:
    - id: hero_photo_media
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      type: raster_photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame: full_bleed_rectangular_band
      dimensions: approx_1366px_wide_by_910px_tall_visible
      object_fit: cover
      object_position: center
      photo_content_reaches_image_edges: true
      outer_page_frame_or_padding: none_visible
      border_radius: 0px
      border: none
      shadow: none
      confidence: high
  creative_direction:
    - id: identity_masthead_direction
      path: root.children[0]
      category: typographic_brand_masthead
      direction: oversized_editorial_serif_identity_mark_on_warm_minimal_canvas_with_extreme_scale_and_generous_negative_space
      palette_relationship: dark_green_ink_on_warm_off_white
      complexity: simple_bold_typographic
      confidence: high
    - id: hero_photo_direction
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      category: photography
      direction: intimate_food_or_nature_closeup_photography_with_cinematic_warm_light_dark_organic_background_shallow_depth_of_field_and_central_tactile_subject
      palette_relationship: photo_picks_up_green_brand_color_through_dark_foliage_and_warm_gold_counterpoint
      complexity: simple_composition_high_photographic_texture
      confidence: high
  implementation_assumptions:
    - id: root_section_layout_assumption
      path: root
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: high
      note: section behaves visually as a vertical stack of plate and media
    - id: identity_plate_assumption
      path: root.children[0]
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: high
      note: full-width light surface hosting the oversized mark
    - id: wordmark_implementation_unclear
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      implementation_assumption: unknown
      confidence: low
      note: could be live text, SVG, or image/logo asset; only visual footprint and style are observable
    - id: photo_implementation_assumption
      path: root.children[1].children[0]
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      confidence: high
      note: realistic full-bleed photographic image
  components:
    - id: masthead_identity_wordmark_component
      type: logo_wordmark_display
      path: root.children[0].children[0]
      host_surface: warm_off_white
      fill: deep_green
      border: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: oversized_split_lockup
      interaction_state: no_interaction_visible
      confidence: high
    - id: full_width_image_band_component
      type: media_frame
      path: root.children[1]
      host_surface: filled_by_photo
      fill: raster_image
      border: none
      radius: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: viewport_width_cover_image
      confidence: high
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - candidate: surface_warm_off_white
        approx_hex: "#f6f3ed"
        observed_paths:
          - root
          - root.children[0]
          - root.children[2]
      - candidate: ink_deep_botanical_green
        approx_hex: "#184c31"
        observed_paths:
          - root.children[0].children[0]
      - candidate: photo_dark_olive_shadow
        approx_hex: "#030906"
        observed_paths:
          - root.children[1].children[0]
        note: likely imagery_palette_not_ui_token
      - candidate: photo_warm_gold
        approx_hex: "#d6bf58"
        observed_paths:
          - root.children[1].children[0]
        note: likely imagery_palette_not_ui_token
    gradients:
      - candidate: natural_photo_warm_light_falloff
        note: do_not_tokenize_as_css_gradient_unless_reused_as_image_treatment
    patterns:
      - candidate: subtle_warm_canvas_texture_or_flat_fill
        confidence: low
    background_systems:
      - candidate: warm_minimal_canvas_plus_full_bleed_photo_band
        recipe: light_identity_plate_stacked_above_edge_to_edge_photographic_band
    typography:
      - candidate: oversized_editorial_display_serif_wordmark
        traits: high_contrast_serif_extreme_scale_tight_line_height_dark_green
    spacing:
      - candidate: masthead_plate_height_large
        value: approx_376px
      - candidate: photo_band_height_immersive
        value: approx_910px
      - candidate: wordmark_outer_inset
        value: approx_55px_horizontal_35px_top
      - candidate: no_media_padding
        value: 0px
    radius:
      - candidate: square_media_edges
        value: 0px
    shadow:
      - candidate: no_elevation
        value: none
    dividers:
      - candidate: hard_horizontal_surface_transition
        value: no_line_just_abutting_surfaces
  likely_components:
    - component: oversized_identity_masthead_plate
      anatomy: warm_off_white_full_width_plate_with_giant_split_serif_wordmark
    - component: full_bleed_hero_photography_band
      anatomy: rectangular_cover_image_no_radius_no_border
  likely_section_patterns:
    - pattern: editorial_brand_masthead_followed_by_immersive_photography
      description: extreme-scale identity mark establishes brand mood before large cinematic image
    - pattern: two_surface_vertical_stack
      description: light typographic canvas above dark warm full-bleed photographic field
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - recipe: identity_on_light_surface
      surface: warm_off_white
      foreground: deep_green_oversized_high_contrast_serif_wordmark
      separation: scale_negative_space_no_boxing
    - recipe: photo_band_on_canvas
      surface: raster_photo_fills_frame
      frame: full_width_square_corners_no_padding
      transition: hard_cut_from_light_plate_to_photo
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - masthead_uses_extreme_typographic_scale_instead_of_multiple_content_blocks
    - hero_photo_directly_touches_identity_plate_with_no_visible_gap
    - section_has_no_inner_column_grid_except_custom_wordmark_distribution
    - bottom_of_crop_shows_only_a_small_light_canvas_sliver_after_media
  link_action_mechanics:
    - no_buttons_links_or_controls_visible_within_target_section
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - oversized_split_serif_wordmark_with_deep_green_ink
    - warm_off_white_editorial_canvas
    - cinematic_dark_green_and_gold_food_nature_photography
    - sharp_horizontal_switch_from_typographic_plate_to_full_bleed_photo
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons:
      - logo_wordmark_should_be_treated_as_identity_slot_not_reusable_icon_art
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - intimate_closeup_realistic_photography
      - shallow_depth_of_field_with_dark_organic_background
      - warm_golden_directional_light_and_high_contrast_shadows
      - central_simple_tactile_subject_with_low_background_detail
  do_not_generalize:
    - do_not_transcribe_or_recreate_the_literal_visible_wordmark_letters
    - do_not_assume_the_photo_subject_must_remain_the_same; preserve photographic style_and_composition_instead
    - do_not_treat_photo_dark_background_as_the_section_root_background
    - do_not_add_buttons_or_intro_copy_not_visible_in_this_crop
    - do_not_infer_header_navigation_from_context_images_into_this_section
  uncertainties:
    - exact_wordmark_implementation_is_unclear_live_text_vs_svg_vs_image_asset
    - subtle_canvas_texture_may_be_screenshot_noise
    - precise_bottom_transition_to_next_section_is_partly_outside_crop; only_a_narrow_light_sliver_is_visible
    - exact_font_family_unknown; only_display_serif_visual_characteristics_are_observed
03 what defines us values grid
03-what-defines-us-values-grid.pngruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/crops/03-what-defines-us-values-grid.png
Section grounding outputs
03-what-defines-us-values-grid.mdruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/03-what-defines-us-values-grid.md
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 3
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "What Defines Us values grid"
  previous_section_label: "Hero / brand masthead"
  next_section_label: "Roma Stories image collage"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 1400
    original_y_end: 2220
    crop_y_start: 1400
    crop_y_end: 2220
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: principles_grid_section
  role: editorial_values_overview
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: editorial_values_overview
  visibility: visible
  size:
    width_px: 1366
    height_px: 820
    content_width_px: 1265
  layout:
    display: vertical_stack
    horizontal_alignment: center
    vertical_flow: heading_then_bordered_grid
    overflow: visible
  position:
    x_px: 0
    y_px: 0
  style:
    background_color: "warm off-white canvas, approx #f4f1eb"
    background_texture: "very subtle paper-like grain/speckle across full section"
    color: "dark forest green"
  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
  layers:
    - id: root_canvas_base
      kind: background_layer
      role: full_width_section_surface
      style:
        fill: "warm off-white"
        coverage: "entire crop"
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
    - id: root_canvas_grain
      kind: texture_layer
      role: subtle_material_texture
      style:
        pattern: "fine low-contrast paper grain/noise"
        opacity: low
        coverage: "entire crop, visible most in empty gutters"
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
  children:
    - id: section_heading
      kind: text
      role: section_title
      visibility: visible
      position:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 27
        alignment_reference: centered_in_viewport
      size:
        width_px: 250
        height_px: 35
      layout:
        text_alignment: center
      style:
        font_category: serif_display
        font_style_description: "tall condensed uppercase editorial serif"
        font_size_px: 31
        line_height: 1.05
        font_weight: 400
        letter_spacing: "slight positive tracking"
        text_transform: uppercase
        color: "dark forest green, approx #24563a"
      content:
        literal: not_transcribed
        role: short_section_heading
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
    - id: grid_panel
      kind: panel
      role: six_cell_editorial_grid
      visibility: visible
      position:
        x_px: 51
        y_px: 103
      size:
        width_px: 1265
        height_px: 682
      layout:
        display: grid
        columns: 3
        rows: 2
        column_width_px: 421
        row_height_px: 341
        gap_px: 0
        cell_alignment: center
        horizontal_alignment: center
      style:
        background_color: "transparent over same warm off-white canvas"
        border:
          width_px: 1
          color: "muted dark green, approx #687869"
          style: solid
        border_radius_px: 0
        box_shadow: none
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      layers:
        - id: grid_hairline_system
          kind: divider_layer
          role: outer_border_and_internal_grid_lines
          style:
            line_color: "muted dark green with slightly softened contrast"
            line_width_px: 1
            opacity: medium_high
            vertical_lines:
              - x_px: 421
              - x_px: 842
            horizontal_lines:
              - y_px: 341
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      items:
        - id: grid_cell_1
          kind: grid_cell
          role: editorial_value_card_with_media
          visibility: visible
          grid_position:
            row: 1
            column: 1
          position:
            x_px: 0
            y_px: 0
          size:
            width_px: 421
            height_px: 341
          layout:
            display: vertical_stack
            horizontal_alignment: center
            vertical_alignment: start
            padding_top_px: 26
            text_block_max_width_px: 205
          style:
            background_color: transparent
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          children:
            - id: cell_1_ordinal_badge
              kind: badge
              role: compact_ordinal_marker
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 199
                y_px: 27
              size:
                width_px: 21
                height_px: 21
              style:
                shape: circle
                background_color: transparent
                border:
                  width_px: 1
                  color: "dark forest green"
                color: "dark forest green"
                font_category: serif_or_small_editorial
                font_size_px: 10
                line_height: 1
                font_weight: 400
                text_alignment: center
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                role: sequence_number
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
            - id: cell_1_media
              kind: media
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 126
                y_px: 73
              size:
                width_px: 169
                height_px: 169
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                box_shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
              media:
                category: photography
                placement: foreground_media
                frame: square
                photo_reaches_asset_edges: true
                creative_direction: "tight warm-toned food/ingredient detail, saturated orange and deep shadow palette, shallow depth, natural editorial lighting, high crop density"
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: cell_1_body
              kind: text
              role: short_value_description
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 113
                y_px: 267
              size:
                width_px: 195
                height_px: 48
              layout:
                text_alignment: center
              style:
                font_category: sans_serif
                font_style_description: "small clean editorial grotesque"
                font_size_px: 12
                line_height: 1.05
                font_weight: 500
                letter_spacing: normal
                color: "dark forest green"
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                line_count: 4
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: grid_cell_2
          kind: grid_cell
          role: editorial_value_card_with_media
          visibility: visible
          grid_position:
            row: 1
            column: 2
          position:
            x_px: 421
            y_px: 0
          size:
            width_px: 421
            height_px: 341
          layout:
            display: vertical_stack
            horizontal_alignment: center
            vertical_alignment: start
            padding_top_px: 26
            text_block_max_width_px: 215
          style:
            background_color: transparent
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          children:
            - id: cell_2_ordinal_badge
              kind: badge
              role: compact_ordinal_marker
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 200
                y_px: 27
              size:
                width_px: 21
                height_px: 21
              style:
                shape: circle
                background_color: transparent
                border:
                  width_px: 1
                  color: "dark forest green"
                color: "dark forest green"
                font_category: serif_or_small_editorial
                font_size_px: 10
                line_height: 1
                text_alignment: center
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                role: sequence_number
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
            - id: cell_2_media
              kind: media
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 126
                y_px: 73
              size:
                width_px: 169
                height_px: 169
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                box_shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
              media:
                category: photography
                placement: foreground_media
                frame: square
                photo_reaches_asset_edges: true
                creative_direction: "warm dim interior tabletop vignette, side view crop, human hand partially visible, muted brown/olive shadows, cinematic restaurant-like lighting"
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: cell_2_body
              kind: text
              role: short_value_description
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 104

              size:
                width_px: 213
                height_px: 48
              layout:
                text_alignment: center
              style:
                font_category: sans_serif
                font_style_description: "small clean editorial grotesque"
                font_size_px: 12

                font_weight: 500
                letter_spacing: normal
                color: "dark forest green"
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                line_count: 4
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: grid_cell_3

          style:
            background_color: transparent
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          children:
            - id: cell_3_ordinal_badge
              kind: badge
              role: compact_ordinal_marker
              visibility: visible
              position:

              size:
                width_px: 21
                height_px: 21
              style:
                shape: circle
                background_color: transparent

                  width_px: 1

                text_alignment: center
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed

            - id: cell_3_media

                width_px: 169

                placement: foreground_media

                photo_reaches_asset_edges: true

              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: cell_4_body
              kind: text

              visibility: visible

                font_category: sans_serif

                literal: not_transcribed
                line_count: 4
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element

          kind: grid_cell
          role: editorial_value_card_with_media
          visibility: visible

            row: 2

          position:
            x_px: 421
            y_px: 341
          size:
            width_px: 421

          layout:

              kind: badge

                width_px: 21

                  width_px: 1

                color: "dark forest green"

                border: none

              media:
                category: photography
                placement: foreground_media
                frame: square
                photo_reaches_asset_edges: true
                creative_direction: "overhead ingredient/food still life on dark warm brown surface, strong directional shadow, centered sculptural shape, sparse editorial composition"
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: cell_5_body
              kind: text
              role: short_value_description
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 102
                y_px: 268

                width_px: 218
                height_px: 45

                text_alignment: center

                font_category: sans_serif
                font_style_description: "small clean editorial grotesque"
                font_size_px: 12
                line_height: 1.05
                font_weight: 500
                letter_spacing: normal
                color: "dark forest green"
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                line_count: 4
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: grid_cell_6
          kind: grid_cell
          role: editorial_value_card_with_cta
          visibility: visible
          grid_position:
            row: 2
            column: 3
          position:
            x_px: 842
            y_px: 341
          size:
            width_px: 423
            height_px: 341
          layout:
            display: vertical_stack
            horizontal_alignment: center
            vertical_alignment: center
            content_group_y_offset_px: 27
            gap_sequence: "ordinal marker, short text, compact button"
          style:
            background_color: transparent
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          children:
            - id: cell_6_content_stack
              kind: stack
              role: centered_cta_message_stack
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 107
                y_px: 101
              size:
                width_px: 210
                height_px: 126
              layout:
                display: vertical_stack
                horizontal_alignment: center
                vertical_alignment: center
                gap_px: 21
              style:
                background_color: transparent
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
              children:
                - id: cell_6_ordinal_badge
                  kind: badge
                  role: compact_ordinal_marker
                  visibility: visible
                  position:
                    x_px: 95
                    y_px: 0
                  size:
                    width_px: 21
                    height_px: 21
                  style:
                    shape: circle
                    background_color: transparent
                    border:
                      width_px: 1
                      color: "dark forest green"
                    color: "dark forest green"
                    font_category: serif_or_small_editorial
                    font_size_px: 10
                    line_height: 1
                    text_alignment: center
                  content:
                    literal: not_transcribed
                    role: sequence_number
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                - id: cell_6_body
                  kind: text
                  role: short_invitation_copy
                  visibility: visible
                  position:
                    x_px: 0
                    y_px: 43
                  size:
                    width_px: 210
                    height_px: 31
                  layout:
                    text_alignment: center
                  style:
                    font_category: sans_serif
                    font_style_description: "small clean editorial grotesque"
                    font_size_px: 12
                    line_height: 1.1
                    font_weight: 500
                    letter_spacing: normal
                    color: "dark forest green"
                  content:
                    literal: not_transcribed
                    line_count: 2
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                - id: cell_6_cta
                  kind: button
                  role: compact_primary_link_button
                  visibility: visible
                  position:
                    x_px: 64
                    y_px: 93
                  size:
                    width_px: 125
                    height_px: 32
                  layout:
                    display: horizontal_inline
                    horizontal_alignment: center
                    vertical_alignment: center
                    label_segment_width_px: 92
                    icon_segment_width_px: 33
                  style:
                    background_color: "forest green, approx #245b3a"
                    color: "warm off-white"
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 3
                    box_shadow: none
                    overflow: hidden
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                  children:
                    - id: cell_6_cta_label
                      kind: text
                      role: button_label
                      visibility: visible
                      position:
                        x_px: 0
                        y_px: 0
                      size:
                        width_px: 92
                        height_px: 32
                      layout:
                        text_alignment: center
                        vertical_alignment: center
                      style:
                        font_category: sans_serif
                        font_size_px: 11
                        line_height: 1
                        font_weight: 500
                        letter_spacing: normal
                        color: "warm off-white"
                      content:
                        literal: not_transcribed
                        role: primary_action_label
                      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                    - id: cell_6_cta_icon_segment
                      kind: icon_button_segment
                      role: directional_arrow_affordance
                      visibility: visible
                      position:
                        x_px: 92
                        y_px: 0
                      size:
                        width_px: 33
                        height_px: 32
                      style:
                        background_color: "same forest green as parent"
                        border_left:
                          width_px: 1
                          color: "slightly lighter green or translucent off-white divider"
                        color: "warm off-white"
                      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                      children:
                        - id: cell_6_cta_arrow_icon
                          kind: icon
                          role: right_arrow
                          visibility: visible
                          position:
                            x_px: 10
                            y_px: 10
                          size:
                            width_px: 12
                            height_px: 12
                          style:
                            icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                            stroke_color: "warm off-white"
                            stroke_width_px: 1.2
                            fill: none
                            corner_language: "straight geometric line with arrow head"
                          implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: section_title_component
      path: root.children.section_heading
      role: centered_section_heading
      anatomy: "single uppercase display text line"
    - id: bordered_grid_component
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      role: six_cell_editorial_grid
      anatomy: "outer hairline border, 3 columns, 2 rows, internal hairline dividers, transparent cell backgrounds"
    - id: value_card_component
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1
      role: repeated_content_cell
      anatomy: "small circular ordinal badge, square photo, centered compact paragraph"
    - id: cta_card_component
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6
      role: text_and_action_cell
      anatomy: "centered ordinal badge, short centered copy, compact filled compound button"
    - id: compact_primary_button
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      role: primary_link_button_with_icon_segment
      anatomy: "filled label segment plus separated square arrow segment"
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - navigation
    - form_fields
    - tabs
    - carousel_controls
    - modal_or_overlay
    - video_player_controls
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: warm_off_white_canvas
      value: "approx #f4f1eb"
      usage: "full-width section root background and cell interiors"
      path: root.style.background_color
      confidence: high
    - id: dark_forest_green_text
      value: "approx #24563a"
      usage: "heading, body text, ordinal marks, button fill family"
      path: root.children.section_heading.style.color
      confidence: high
    - id: muted_green_hairline
      value: "approx #687869"
      usage: "grid outer border and internal dividers"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.layers.grid_hairline_system
      confidence: medium
    - id: button_forest_green
      value: "approx #245b3a"
      usage: "compact CTA filled background"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.style.background_color
      confidence: high
    - id: button_light_text
      value: "approx #f4f1eb"
      usage: "CTA label and arrow on green fill"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      confidence: high
  gradients: []
  patterns:
    - id: subtle_paper_grain
      type: low_contrast_noise_texture
      colors: "off-white tonal variation"
      usage: "full section canvas"
      path: root.layers.root_canvas_grain
      confidence: medium
  background_systems:
    - id: warm_paper_section_canvas
      path: root
      layers:
        - "solid warm off-white base"
        - "subtle paper-like noise/speckle overlay"
      notes: "grid cells do not introduce a new fill; they remain transparent over this canvas"
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: centered_display_heading
      path: root.children.section_heading
      font_category: serif_display
      visual_characteristics: "condensed uppercase, elegant editorial contrast, tall narrow letterforms"
      size_px: 31
      line_height: 1.05
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: slight_positive
      transform: uppercase
      alignment: center
      color: dark_forest_green_text
      confidence: high
    - id: compact_cell_body
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_body
      font_category: sans_serif
      visual_characteristics: "small clean grotesque, compact leading, dense but legible"
      size_px: 12
      line_height: 1.05
      weight: 500
      letter_spacing: normal
      transform: none
      alignment: center
      color: dark_forest_green_text
      confidence: high
    - id: compact_ordinal_badge_type
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_ordinal_badge
      font_category: serif_or_small_editorial
      visual_characteristics: "tiny sequence numerals inside thin circular outline"
      size_px: 10
      line_height: 1
      weight: 400
      alignment: center
      color: dark_forest_green_text
      confidence: medium
    - id: cta_label_type
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.children.cell_6_cta_label
      font_category: sans_serif
      visual_characteristics: "small button label, medium weight, centered"
      size_px: 11
      line_height: 1
      weight: 500
      alignment: center
      color: button_light_text
      confidence: medium
  font_characteristics:
    - id: editorial_serif_character
      description: "high-end editorial display serif with condensed proportions and refined thin/thick contrast"
      observed_in:
        - root.children.section_heading
    - id: compact_grotesque_character
      description: "neutral small sans-serif used for body copy and button copy, with tight line-height"
      observed_in:
        - root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_body
        - root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
  spacing:
    - id: section_outer_inset
      value_px: 51
      usage: "left and right inset from viewport edge to grid panel"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.position.x_px
      confidence: high
    - id: top_padding_to_heading
      value_px: 27
      usage: "top crop edge to section heading"
      path: root.children.section_heading.position.y_px
      confidence: medium
    - id: heading_to_grid_gap
      value_px: 42
      usage: "heading bottom to grid top"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.position.y_px
      confidence: medium
    - id: grid_bottom_margin
      value_px: 35
      usage: "grid bottom to crop bottom"
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      confidence: medium
    - id: badge_to_media_gap
      value_px: 25
      usage: "repeated media cells from ordinal badge bottom to photo top"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1
      confidence: medium
    - id: media_to_body_gap
      value_px: 24
      usage: "repeated media cells from photo bottom to text block"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1
      confidence: medium
    - id: cta_stack_gap
      value_px: 21
      usage: "cell 6 centered stack spacing between ordinal, copy, and button"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.layout.gap_px
      confidence: medium
  radius:
    - id: ordinal_circle_radius
      value_px: 10.5
      usage: "sequence badges"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_ordinal_badge
      confidence: high
    - id: cta_corner_radius
      value_px: 3
      usage: "compact filled CTA button"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      confidence: medium
    - id: square_photo_corners
      value_px: 0
      usage: "all visible photo media slots"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_media
      confidence: high
    - id: grid_panel_corners
      value_px: 0
      usage: "outer bordered grid"
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      confidence: high
  sizes:
    - id: grid_panel_size
      width_px: 1265
      height_px: 682
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      confidence: high
    - id: grid_cell_size
      width_px: 421
      height_px: 341
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1
      confidence: high
    - id: square_media_size
      width_px: 169
      height_px: 169
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_media
      confidence: high
    - id: ordinal_badge_size
      width_px: 21
      height_px: 21
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_ordinal_badge
      confidence: high
    - id: compact_cta_size
      width_px: 125
      height_px: 32
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      confidence: medium
  opacity:
    - id: grid_line_opacity
      value: "medium-high, softened against off-white"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.layers.grid_hairline_system
      confidence: medium
    - id: texture_opacity
      value: low
      path: root.layers.root_canvas_grain
      confidence: medium
  borders:
    - id: grid_outer_border
      width_px: 1
      color: muted_green_hairline
      radius_px: 0
      path: root.children.grid_panel.style.border
      confidence: high
    - id: grid_internal_dividers
      width_px: 1
      color: muted_green_hairline
      path: root.children.grid_panel.layers.grid_hairline_system
      confidence: high
    - id: ordinal_badge_border
      width_px: 1
      color: dark_forest_green_text
      radius: circle
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_ordinal_badge
      confidence: high
    - id: cta_icon_segment_divider
      width_px: 1
      color: "subtle lighter divider on green"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.children.cell_6_cta_icon_segment
      confidence: medium
  shadows:
    - id: no_elevation_shadows
      value: none_observed
      path: root
      confidence: high
  effects:
    - id: editorial_hairline_grid_effect
      description: "thin green lines create a restrained print-like grid without card elevation"
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      confidence: high
    - id: paper_texture_effect
      description: "subtle texture prevents flat pure white canvas"
      path: root.layers.root_canvas_grain
      confidence: medium
  icons:
    - id: cta_right_arrow_icon
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.children.cell_6_cta_icon_segment.children.cell_6_cta_arrow_icon
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      placement: foreground_graphic
      style:
        stroke_color: "warm off-white"
        stroke_width_px: 1.2
        fill: none
        geometry: "simple right arrow with horizontal shaft and angled head"
        container_relationship: "centered inside separate square segment of filled button"
      confidence: high
  imagery_categories:
    icons:
      - id: cta_right_arrow_icon
        icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
        style_summary: "small one-color line arrow, off-white on green, no pictorial detail"
        path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.children.cell_6_cta_icon_segment.children.cell_6_cta_arrow_icon
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - id: square_editorial_photography_set
        path: root.children.grid_panel.items
        placement: foreground_media
        count_visible: 5
        style_summary: "square editorial food/interior stills, warm natural or cinematic light, high color saturation in subject areas, minimal framing, no visible border or shadow"
  media:
    - id: media_cell_1
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_media
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: square
      reaches_edges: true
      border_or_mat: none
      crop: "tight close-up"
      color_treatment: "warm saturated oranges and deep shadows"
      detail_level: medium_high
    - id: media_cell_2
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_2.children.cell_2_media
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: square
      reaches_edges: true
      border_or_mat: none
      crop: "small tabletop scene with hand detail"
      color_treatment: "muted warm brown and olive shadows"
      detail_level: medium
    - id: media_cell_3
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_3.children.cell_3_media
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: square
      reaches_edges: true
      border_or_mat: none
      crop: "overhead centered plated food detail"
      color_treatment: "turquoise, gold, cream, and dark dessert tones"
      detail_level: medium
    - id: media_cell_4
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_4.children.cell_4_media
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: square
      reaches_edges: true
      border_or_mat: none
      crop: "quiet interior corner with vertical architectural lines"
      color_treatment: "pale cream and blue accents"
      detail_level: medium
    - id: media_cell_5
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_5.children.cell_5_media
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: square
      reaches_edges: true
      border_or_mat: none
      crop: "overhead sparse still life"
      color_treatment: "dark warm brown with directional highlight and shadow"
      detail_level: medium
  creative_direction:
    - id: section_visual_direction
      path: root
      description: "quiet editorial values section with print-inspired hairline grid, centered typographic hierarchy, small square imagery, and restrained dark green on warm paper palette"
    - id: photography_direction
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items
      description: "photography is intimate and tactile, alternating food and interior details, mostly square crops with subject reaching image edges and no decorative frame"
    - id: ui_direction
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      description: "CTA is compact, dark, and understated; icon is separated into a small right segment rather than floating separately"
  implementation_assumptions:
    - path: root
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: "section behaves as a full-width page block with visible canvas"
    - path: root.layers.root_canvas_grain
      assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      rationale: "subtle texture appears over otherwise flat background"
    - path: root.children.grid_panel
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: "bordered panel and dividers align to a regular grid"
    - path: root.children.grid_panel.items.*.children.*_media
      assumption: likely_raster_image
      rationale: "photographic square assets"
    - path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.children.cell_6_cta_icon_segment.children.cell_6_cta_arrow_icon
      assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
      rationale: "small crisp vector-like arrow"
    - path: root.children.grid_panel.items.*.children.*_body
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: "editable paragraph text blocks"
  components:
    - id: section_heading
      type: heading
      path: root.children.section_heading
      host_surface: warm_off_white_canvas
      text_color: dark_forest_green_text
      separation_mechanism: whitespace
    - id: editorial_grid_panel
      type: grid_panel
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      host_surface: warm_off_white_canvas
      child_surface: transparent
      border: thin_muted_green_hairlines
      separation_mechanism: bordered_grid_lines
    - id: ordinal_badge
      type: badge
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_ordinal_badge
      host_surface: transparent_on_warm_canvas
      child_surface: transparent
      border: thin_dark_green_circle
      text_color: dark_forest_green_text
    - id: media_value_card
      type: repeated_grid_cell
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1
      host_surface: transparent_on_warm_canvas
      child_surface: none
      content: "ordinal marker, square photo, centered paragraph"
