      separation_mechanism: enclosing grid cell borders
    - id: compact_primary_cta
      type: button
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      host_surface: transparent_on_warm_canvas
      child_surface: forest_green_fill
      text_icon_color: warm_off_white
      border: none_visible
      radius: small
      separation_mechanism: filled color contrast
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - id: page_warm_paper
        candidate_value: "warm off-white #f4f1eb"
        usage: "primary editorial canvas"
      - id: editorial_forest_green
        candidate_value: "dark green #24563a"
        usage: "heading, body text, CTA fill"
      - id: muted_green_hairline
        candidate_value: "soft green-gray #687869"
        usage: "borders and dividers"
    gradients: []
    patterns:
      - id: paper_grain_texture
        usage: "site-wide warm paper surface texture"
    background_systems:
      - id: warm_paper_canvas_system
        recipe: "solid warm off-white plus subtle grain/noise"
    typography:
      - id: display_condensed_serif_uppercase
        usage: "section titles"
      - id: compact_editorial_sans_body
        usage: "small centered body copy and CTAs"
      - id: tiny_ordinal_type
        usage: "sequence badges"
    spacing:
      - id: page_side_inset_large
        candidate_value_px: 51
      - id: heading_to_panel_gap
        candidate_value_px: 42
      - id: media_cell_vertical_spacing
        candidate_value_px: 24
      - id: grid_cell_size_large
        candidate_value: "3x2 equal cells, roughly 421x341 px"
    radius:
      - id: radius_none_for_media_and_grid
        candidate_value_px: 0
      - id: radius_small_button
        candidate_value_px: 3
      - id: radius_circle_badge
        candidate_value: circle
    shadow:
      - id: no_shadow_flat_editorial
        usage: "photos, grid, and button all appear flat"
    dividers:
      - id: green_hairline_divider
        candidate_value_px: 1
        usage: "grid borders and internal lines"
  likely_components:
    - id: editorial_values_grid
      description: "bordered 3-column by 2-row grid with equal cells and centered content"
    - id: value_cell_with_media
      description: "small circular ordinal, square media, compact centered copy"
    - id: value_cell_with_cta
      description: "centered ordinal, short copy, compact filled link button"
    - id: compound_icon_button
      description: "label segment plus square arrow segment with subtle divider"
    - id: circular_sequence_badge
      description: "tiny outlined circle containing a sequence number"
  likely_section_patterns:
    - id: print_editorial_grid_section
      description: "warm paper canvas, centered display heading, bordered equal-cell grid, no card elevation"
    - id: values_or_principles_overview
      description: "uses numbered cells to communicate discrete points with small supporting media"
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - id: root_canvas_recipe
      path: root
      recipe: "full viewport warm off-white with low-opacity grain; do not substitute the bordered grid as the root background"
    - id: grid_panel_recipe
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      recipe: "transparent panel over root canvas, 1px muted green outer border and internal dividers, zero radius"
    - id: primary_button_on_light_surface
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      recipe: "forest green fill, off-white small label, split arrow segment, small radius, no shadow"
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - "Section uses strong centering: heading centered to viewport, grid centered with equal side margins."
    - "Grid rhythm is geometric and rigid; content inside most cells is vertically aligned to a repeated top badge, square image, text sequence."
    - "Final CTA cell breaks the media pattern by centering a shorter message stack within the cell."
    - "No gutters between cells; separation is entirely by hairline dividers."
  link_action_mechanics:
    - "Only visible action is a compact filled CTA in the final grid cell."
    - "The CTA communicates direction with a separate right arrow icon segment divided from the label segment."
    - "Grid cells themselves do not show visible hover, underline, or click affordance in the screenshot."
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - "Thin green print-like rules on warm paper."
    - "Small circular sequence badges above each value."
    - "Square editorial photos centered inside oversized quiet cells."
    - "Dark green uppercase condensed serif section title."
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons:
      - "Use sparse single-color line icons for directional UI only; off-white on green when inside CTA."
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - "Square editorial photography with warm cinematic restaurant/interior palette, tactile close crops, natural shadows, no frame, no rounded corners."
      - "Mix high-saturation food details with quieter interior/ingredient still lifes while maintaining centered placement and restrained scale."
  do_not_generalize:
    - "Do not treat the individual visible food or room subjects as required content; preserve only the square editorial photo style and placement."
    - "Do not promote the grid interior to a separate card fill; it is transparent over the section canvas."
    - "Do not add shadows, rounded photo corners, or large CTA styling; the design is intentionally flat and restrained."
    - "Do not transcribe or reuse the exact visible paragraph or button copy from this section."
  uncertainties:
    - "Exact typefaces are not recoverable; heading appears to be a condensed editorial serif and body appears to be a compact sans-serif."
    - "Paper grain may be an image/noise texture or screenshot compression; visible evidence supports a subtle textured surface."
    - "CTA icon segment divider color is subtle and may be a border, spacing seam, or optical contrast between adjacent same-color segments."
    - "Top and bottom transitions are only partially visible in the crop; within the target crop the warm off-white canvas reaches both edges."
03-what-defines-us-values-grid.yamlruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/03-what-defines-us-values-grid.yaml
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 3
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "What Defines Us values grid"
  previous_section_label: "Hero / brand masthead"
  next_section_label: "Roma Stories image collage"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 1400
    original_y_end: 2220
    crop_y_start: 1400
    crop_y_end: 2220
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: principles_grid_section
  role: editorial_values_overview
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: editorial_values_overview
  visibility: visible
  size:
    width_px: 1366
    height_px: 820
    content_width_px: 1265
  layout:
    display: vertical_stack
    horizontal_alignment: center
    vertical_flow: heading_then_bordered_grid
    overflow: visible
  position:
    x_px: 0
    y_px: 0
  style:
    background_color: "warm off-white canvas, approx #f4f1eb"
    background_texture: "very subtle paper-like grain/speckle across full section"
    color: "dark forest green"
  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
  layers:
    - id: root_canvas_base
      kind: background_layer
      role: full_width_section_surface
      style:
        fill: "warm off-white"
        coverage: "entire crop"
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
    - id: root_canvas_grain
      kind: texture_layer
      role: subtle_material_texture
      style:
        pattern: "fine low-contrast paper grain/noise"
        opacity: low
        coverage: "entire crop, visible most in empty gutters"
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
  children:
    - id: section_heading
      kind: text
      role: section_title
      visibility: visible
      position:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 27
        alignment_reference: centered_in_viewport
      size:
        width_px: 250
        height_px: 35
      layout:
        text_alignment: center
      style:
        font_category: serif_display
        font_style_description: "tall condensed uppercase editorial serif"
        font_size_px: 31
        line_height: 1.05
        font_weight: 400
        letter_spacing: "slight positive tracking"
        text_transform: uppercase
        color: "dark forest green, approx #24563a"
      content:
        literal: not_transcribed
        role: short_section_heading
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
    - id: grid_panel
      kind: panel
      role: six_cell_editorial_grid
      visibility: visible
      position:
        x_px: 51
        y_px: 103
      size:
        width_px: 1265
        height_px: 682
      layout:
        display: grid
        columns: 3
        rows: 2
        column_width_px: 421
        row_height_px: 341
        gap_px: 0
        cell_alignment: center
        horizontal_alignment: center
      style:
        background_color: "transparent over same warm off-white canvas"
        border:
          width_px: 1
          color: "muted dark green, approx #687869"
          style: solid
        border_radius_px: 0
        box_shadow: none
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      layers:
        - id: grid_hairline_system
          kind: divider_layer
          role: outer_border_and_internal_grid_lines
          style:
            line_color: "muted dark green with slightly softened contrast"
            line_width_px: 1
            opacity: medium_high
            vertical_lines:
              - x_px: 421
              - x_px: 842
            horizontal_lines:
              - y_px: 341
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      items:
        - id: grid_cell_1
          kind: grid_cell
          role: editorial_value_card_with_media
          visibility: visible
          grid_position:
            row: 1
            column: 1
          position:
            x_px: 0
            y_px: 0
          size:
            width_px: 421
            height_px: 341
          layout:
            display: vertical_stack
            horizontal_alignment: center
            vertical_alignment: start
            padding_top_px: 26
            text_block_max_width_px: 205
          style:
            background_color: transparent
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          children:
            - id: cell_1_ordinal_badge
              kind: badge
              role: compact_ordinal_marker
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 199
                y_px: 27
              size:
                width_px: 21
                height_px: 21
              style:
                shape: circle
                background_color: transparent
                border:
                  width_px: 1
                  color: "dark forest green"
                color: "dark forest green"
                font_category: serif_or_small_editorial
                font_size_px: 10
                line_height: 1
                font_weight: 400
                text_alignment: center
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                role: sequence_number
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
            - id: cell_1_media
              kind: media
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 126
                y_px: 73
              size:
                width_px: 169
                height_px: 169
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                box_shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
              media:
                category: photography
                placement: foreground_media
                frame: square
                photo_reaches_asset_edges: true
                creative_direction: "tight warm-toned food/ingredient detail, saturated orange and deep shadow palette, shallow depth, natural editorial lighting, high crop density"
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: cell_1_body
              kind: text
              role: short_value_description
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 113
                y_px: 267
              size:
                width_px: 195
                height_px: 48
              layout:
                text_alignment: center
              style:
                font_category: sans_serif
                font_style_description: "small clean editorial grotesque"
                font_size_px: 12
                line_height: 1.05
                font_weight: 500
                letter_spacing: normal
                color: "dark forest green"
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                line_count: 4
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: grid_cell_2
          kind: grid_cell
          role: editorial_value_card_with_media
          visibility: visible
          grid_position:
            row: 1
            column: 2
          position:
            x_px: 421
            y_px: 0
          size:
            width_px: 421
            height_px: 341
          layout:
            display: vertical_stack
            horizontal_alignment: center
            vertical_alignment: start
            padding_top_px: 26
            text_block_max_width_px: 215
          style:
            background_color: transparent
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          children:
            - id: cell_2_ordinal_badge
              kind: badge
              role: compact_ordinal_marker
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 200
                y_px: 27
              size:
                width_px: 21
                height_px: 21
              style:
                shape: circle
                background_color: transparent
                border:
                  width_px: 1
                  color: "dark forest green"
                color: "dark forest green"
                font_category: serif_or_small_editorial
                font_size_px: 10
                line_height: 1
                text_alignment: center
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                role: sequence_number
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
            - id: cell_2_media
              kind: media
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 126
                y_px: 73
              size:
                width_px: 169
                height_px: 169
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                box_shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
              media:
                category: photography
                placement: foreground_media
                frame: square
                photo_reaches_asset_edges: true
                creative_direction: "warm dim interior tabletop vignette, side view crop, human hand partially visible, muted brown/olive shadows, cinematic restaurant-like lighting"
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: cell_2_body
              kind: text
              role: short_value_description
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 104
                y_px: 267
              size:
                width_px: 213
                height_px: 48
              layout:
                text_alignment: center
              style:
                font_category: sans_serif
                font_style_description: "small clean editorial grotesque"
                font_size_px: 12
                line_height: 1.05
                font_weight: 500
                letter_spacing: normal
                color: "dark forest green"
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                line_count: 4
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: grid_cell_3
          kind: grid_cell
          role: editorial_value_card_with_media
          visibility: visible
          grid_position:
            row: 1
            column: 3
          position:
            x_px: 842
            y_px: 0
          size:
            width_px: 423
            height_px: 341
          layout:
            display: vertical_stack
            horizontal_alignment: center
            vertical_alignment: start
            padding_top_px: 26
            text_block_max_width_px: 215
          style:
            background_color: transparent
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          children:
            - id: cell_3_ordinal_badge
              kind: badge
              role: compact_ordinal_marker
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 201
                y_px: 27
              size:
                width_px: 21
                height_px: 21
              style:
                shape: circle
                background_color: transparent
                border:
                  width_px: 1
                  color: "dark forest green"
                color: "dark forest green"
                font_category: serif_or_small_editorial
                font_size_px: 10
                line_height: 1
                text_alignment: center
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                role: sequence_number
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
            - id: cell_3_media
              kind: media
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 127
                y_px: 73
              size:
                width_px: 169
                height_px: 169
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                box_shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
              media:
                category: photography
                placement: foreground_media
                frame: square
                photo_reaches_asset_edges: true
                creative_direction: "overhead plated dessert/food composition, centered circular form, turquoise and gold plate colors, bright neutral table surround, simple graphic crop"
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: cell_3_body
              kind: text
              role: short_value_description
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 105
                y_px: 266
              size:
                width_px: 214
                height_px: 56
              layout:
                text_alignment: center
              style:
                font_category: sans_serif
                font_style_description: "small clean editorial grotesque"
                font_size_px: 12
                line_height: 1.05
                font_weight: 500
                letter_spacing: normal
                color: "dark forest green"
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                line_count: 5
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: grid_cell_4
          kind: grid_cell
          role: editorial_value_card_with_media
          visibility: visible
          grid_position:
            row: 2
            column: 1
          position:
            x_px: 0
            y_px: 341
          size:
            width_px: 421
            height_px: 341
          layout:
            display: vertical_stack
            horizontal_alignment: center
            vertical_alignment: start
            padding_top_px: 26
            text_block_max_width_px: 235
          style:
            background_color: transparent
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          children:
            - id: cell_4_ordinal_badge
              kind: badge
              role: compact_ordinal_marker
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 199
                y_px: 27
              size:
                width_px: 21
                height_px: 21
              style:
                shape: circle
                background_color: transparent
                border:
                  width_px: 1
                  color: "dark forest green"
                color: "dark forest green"
                font_category: serif_or_small_editorial
                font_size_px: 10
                line_height: 1
                text_alignment: center
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                role: sequence_number
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
            - id: cell_4_media
              kind: media
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 126
                y_px: 73
              size:
                width_px: 169
                height_px: 169
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                box_shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
              media:
                category: photography
                placement: foreground_media
                frame: square
                photo_reaches_asset_edges: true
                creative_direction: "quiet interior detail, pale wall and blue tile color field, vertical lines, soft daylight, low clutter, cool accent palette against warm page"
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: cell_4_body
              kind: text
              role: short_value_description
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 102
                y_px: 268
              size:
                width_px: 218
                height_px: 45
              layout:
                text_alignment: center
              style:
                font_category: sans_serif
                font_style_description: "small clean editorial grotesque"
                font_size_px: 12
                line_height: 1.05
                font_weight: 500
                letter_spacing: normal
                color: "dark forest green"
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                line_count: 4
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: grid_cell_5
          kind: grid_cell
          role: editorial_value_card_with_media
          visibility: visible
          grid_position:
            row: 2
            column: 2
          position:
            x_px: 421
            y_px: 341
          size:
            width_px: 421
            height_px: 341
          layout:
            display: vertical_stack
            horizontal_alignment: center
            vertical_alignment: start
            padding_top_px: 26
            text_block_max_width_px: 235
          style:
            background_color: transparent
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          children:
            - id: cell_5_ordinal_badge
              kind: badge
              role: compact_ordinal_marker
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 200
                y_px: 27
              size:
                width_px: 21
                height_px: 21
              style:
                shape: circle
                background_color: transparent
                border:
                  width_px: 1
                  color: "dark forest green"
                color: "dark forest green"
                font_category: serif_or_small_editorial
                font_size_px: 10
                line_height: 1
                text_alignment: center
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                role: sequence_number
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
            - id: cell_5_media
              kind: media
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 126
                y_px: 73
              size:
                width_px: 169
                height_px: 169
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                box_shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
              media:
                category: photography
                placement: foreground_media
                frame: square
                photo_reaches_asset_edges: true
                creative_direction: "overhead ingredient/food still life on dark warm brown surface, strong directional shadow, centered sculptural shape, sparse editorial composition"
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: cell_5_body
              kind: text
              role: short_value_description
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 102
                y_px: 268
              size:
                width_px: 218
                height_px: 45
              layout:
                text_alignment: center
              style:
                font_category: sans_serif
                font_style_description: "small clean editorial grotesque"
                font_size_px: 12
                line_height: 1.05
                font_weight: 500
                letter_spacing: normal
                color: "dark forest green"
              content:
                literal: not_transcribed
                line_count: 4
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: grid_cell_6
          kind: grid_cell
          role: editorial_value_card_with_cta
          visibility: visible
          grid_position:
            row: 2
            column: 3
          position:
            x_px: 842
            y_px: 341
          size:
            width_px: 423
            height_px: 341
          layout:
            display: vertical_stack
            horizontal_alignment: center
            vertical_alignment: center
            content_group_y_offset_px: 27
            gap_sequence: "ordinal marker, short text, compact button"
          style:
            background_color: transparent
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          children:
            - id: cell_6_content_stack
              kind: stack
              role: centered_cta_message_stack
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 107
                y_px: 101
              size:
                width_px: 210
                height_px: 126
              layout:
                display: vertical_stack
                horizontal_alignment: center
                vertical_alignment: center
                gap_px: 21
              style:
                background_color: transparent
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
              children:
                - id: cell_6_ordinal_badge
                  kind: badge
                  role: compact_ordinal_marker
                  visibility: visible
                  position:
                    x_px: 95
                    y_px: 0
                  size:
                    width_px: 21
                    height_px: 21
                  style:
                    shape: circle
                    background_color: transparent
                    border:
                      width_px: 1
                      color: "dark forest green"
                    color: "dark forest green"
                    font_category: serif_or_small_editorial
                    font_size_px: 10
                    line_height: 1
                    text_alignment: center
                  content:
                    literal: not_transcribed
                    role: sequence_number
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                - id: cell_6_body
                  kind: text
                  role: short_invitation_copy
                  visibility: visible
                  position:
                    x_px: 0
                    y_px: 43
                  size:
                    width_px: 210
                    height_px: 31
                  layout:
                    text_alignment: center
                  style:
                    font_category: sans_serif
                    font_style_description: "small clean editorial grotesque"
                    font_size_px: 12
                    line_height: 1.1
                    font_weight: 500
                    letter_spacing: normal
                    color: "dark forest green"
                  content:
                    literal: not_transcribed
                    line_count: 2
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                - id: cell_6_cta
                  kind: button
                  role: compact_primary_link_button
                  visibility: visible
                  position:
                    x_px: 64
                    y_px: 93
                  size:
                    width_px: 125
                    height_px: 32
                  layout:
                    display: horizontal_inline
                    horizontal_alignment: center
                    vertical_alignment: center
                    label_segment_width_px: 92
                    icon_segment_width_px: 33
                  style:
                    background_color: "forest green, approx #245b3a"
                    color: "warm off-white"
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 3
                    box_shadow: none
                    overflow: hidden
                  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                  children:
                    - id: cell_6_cta_label
                      kind: text
                      role: button_label
                      visibility: visible
                      position:
                        x_px: 0
                        y_px: 0
                      size:
                        width_px: 92
                        height_px: 32
                      layout:
                        text_alignment: center
                        vertical_alignment: center
                      style:
                        font_category: sans_serif
                        font_size_px: 11
                        line_height: 1
                        font_weight: 500
                        letter_spacing: normal
                        color: "warm off-white"
                      content:
                        literal: not_transcribed
                        role: primary_action_label
                      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                    - id: cell_6_cta_icon_segment
                      kind: icon_button_segment
                      role: directional_arrow_affordance
                      visibility: visible
                      position:
                        x_px: 92
                        y_px: 0
                      size:
                        width_px: 33
                        height_px: 32
                      style:
                        background_color: "same forest green as parent"
                        border_left:
                          width_px: 1
                          color: "slightly lighter green or translucent off-white divider"
                        color: "warm off-white"
                      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
                      children:
                        - id: cell_6_cta_arrow_icon
                          kind: icon
                          role: right_arrow
                          visibility: visible
                          position:
                            x_px: 10
                            y_px: 10
                          size:
                            width_px: 12
                            height_px: 12
                          style:
                            icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                            stroke_color: "warm off-white"
                            stroke_width_px: 1.2
                            fill: none
                            corner_language: "straight geometric line with arrow head"
                          implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: section_title_component
      path: root.children.section_heading
      role: centered_section_heading
      anatomy: "single uppercase display text line"
    - id: bordered_grid_component
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      role: six_cell_editorial_grid
      anatomy: "outer hairline border, 3 columns, 2 rows, internal hairline dividers, transparent cell backgrounds"
    - id: value_card_component
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1
      role: repeated_content_cell
      anatomy: "small circular ordinal badge, square photo, centered compact paragraph"
    - id: cta_card_component
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6
      role: text_and_action_cell
      anatomy: "centered ordinal badge, short centered copy, compact filled compound button"
    - id: compact_primary_button
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      role: primary_link_button_with_icon_segment
      anatomy: "filled label segment plus separated square arrow segment"
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - navigation
    - form_fields
    - tabs
    - carousel_controls
    - modal_or_overlay
    - video_player_controls
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: warm_off_white_canvas
      value: "approx #f4f1eb"
      usage: "full-width section root background and cell interiors"
      path: root.style.background_color
      confidence: high
    - id: dark_forest_green_text
      value: "approx #24563a"
      usage: "heading, body text, ordinal marks, button fill family"
      path: root.children.section_heading.style.color
      confidence: high
    - id: muted_green_hairline
      value: "approx #687869"
      usage: "grid outer border and internal dividers"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.layers.grid_hairline_system
      confidence: medium
    - id: button_forest_green
      value: "approx #245b3a"
      usage: "compact CTA filled background"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.style.background_color
      confidence: high
    - id: button_light_text
      value: "approx #f4f1eb"
      usage: "CTA label and arrow on green fill"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      confidence: high
  gradients: []
  patterns:
    - id: subtle_paper_grain
      type: low_contrast_noise_texture
      colors: "off-white tonal variation"
      usage: "full section canvas"
      path: root.layers.root_canvas_grain
      confidence: medium
  background_systems:
    - id: warm_paper_section_canvas
      path: root
      layers:
        - "solid warm off-white base"
        - "subtle paper-like noise/speckle overlay"
      notes: "grid cells do not introduce a new fill; they remain transparent over this canvas"
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: centered_display_heading
      path: root.children.section_heading
      font_category: serif_display
      visual_characteristics: "condensed uppercase, elegant editorial contrast, tall narrow letterforms"
      size_px: 31
      line_height: 1.05
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: slight_positive
      transform: uppercase
      alignment: center
      color: dark_forest_green_text
      confidence: high
    - id: compact_cell_body
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_body
      font_category: sans_serif
      visual_characteristics: "small clean grotesque, compact leading, dense but legible"
      size_px: 12
      line_height: 1.05
      weight: 500
      letter_spacing: normal
      transform: none
      alignment: center
      color: dark_forest_green_text
      confidence: high
    - id: compact_ordinal_badge_type
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_ordinal_badge
      font_category: serif_or_small_editorial
      visual_characteristics: "tiny sequence numerals inside thin circular outline"
      size_px: 10
      line_height: 1
      weight: 400
      alignment: center
      color: dark_forest_green_text
      confidence: medium
    - id: cta_label_type
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.children.cell_6_cta_label
      font_category: sans_serif
      visual_characteristics: "small button label, medium weight, centered"
      size_px: 11
      line_height: 1
      weight: 500
      alignment: center
      color: button_light_text
      confidence: medium
  font_characteristics:
    - id: editorial_serif_character
      description: "high-end editorial display serif with condensed proportions and refined thin/thick contrast"
      observed_in:
        - root.children.section_heading
    - id: compact_grotesque_character
      description: "neutral small sans-serif used for body copy and button copy, with tight line-height"
      observed_in:
        - root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_body
        - root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
  spacing:
    - id: section_outer_inset
      value_px: 51
      usage: "left and right inset from viewport edge to grid panel"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.position.x_px
      confidence: high
    - id: top_padding_to_heading
      value_px: 27
      usage: "top crop edge to section heading"
      path: root.children.section_heading.position.y_px
      confidence: medium
    - id: heading_to_grid_gap
      value_px: 42
      usage: "heading bottom to grid top"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.position.y_px
      confidence: medium
    - id: grid_bottom_margin
      value_px: 35
      usage: "grid bottom to crop bottom"
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      confidence: medium
    - id: badge_to_media_gap
      value_px: 25
      usage: "repeated media cells from ordinal badge bottom to photo top"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1
      confidence: medium
    - id: media_to_body_gap
      value_px: 24
      usage: "repeated media cells from photo bottom to text block"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1
      confidence: medium
    - id: cta_stack_gap
      value_px: 21
      usage: "cell 6 centered stack spacing between ordinal, copy, and button"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.layout.gap_px
      confidence: medium
  radius:
    - id: ordinal_circle_radius
      value_px: 10.5
      usage: "sequence badges"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_ordinal_badge
      confidence: high
    - id: cta_corner_radius
      value_px: 3
      usage: "compact filled CTA button"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      confidence: medium
    - id: square_photo_corners
      value_px: 0
      usage: "all visible photo media slots"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_media
      confidence: high
    - id: grid_panel_corners
      value_px: 0
      usage: "outer bordered grid"
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      confidence: high
  sizes:
    - id: grid_panel_size
      width_px: 1265
      height_px: 682
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      confidence: high
    - id: grid_cell_size
      width_px: 421
      height_px: 341
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1
      confidence: high
    - id: square_media_size
      width_px: 169
      height_px: 169
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_media
      confidence: high
    - id: ordinal_badge_size
      width_px: 21
      height_px: 21
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_ordinal_badge
      confidence: high
    - id: compact_cta_size
      width_px: 125
      height_px: 32
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      confidence: medium
  opacity:
    - id: grid_line_opacity
      value: "medium-high, softened against off-white"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.layers.grid_hairline_system
      confidence: medium
    - id: texture_opacity
      value: low
      path: root.layers.root_canvas_grain
      confidence: medium
  borders:
    - id: grid_outer_border
      width_px: 1
      color: muted_green_hairline
      radius_px: 0
      path: root.children.grid_panel.style.border
      confidence: high
    - id: grid_internal_dividers
      width_px: 1
      color: muted_green_hairline
      path: root.children.grid_panel.layers.grid_hairline_system
      confidence: high
    - id: ordinal_badge_border
      width_px: 1
      color: dark_forest_green_text
      radius: circle
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_ordinal_badge
      confidence: high
    - id: cta_icon_segment_divider
      width_px: 1
      color: "subtle lighter divider on green"
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.children.cell_6_cta_icon_segment
      confidence: medium
  shadows:
    - id: no_elevation_shadows
      value: none_observed
      path: root
      confidence: high
  effects:
    - id: editorial_hairline_grid_effect
      description: "thin green lines create a restrained print-like grid without card elevation"
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      confidence: high
    - id: paper_texture_effect
      description: "subtle texture prevents flat pure white canvas"
      path: root.layers.root_canvas_grain
      confidence: medium
  icons:
    - id: cta_right_arrow_icon
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.children.cell_6_cta_icon_segment.children.cell_6_cta_arrow_icon
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      placement: foreground_graphic
      style:
        stroke_color: "warm off-white"
        stroke_width_px: 1.2
        fill: none
        geometry: "simple right arrow with horizontal shaft and angled head"
        container_relationship: "centered inside separate square segment of filled button"
      confidence: high
  imagery_categories:
    icons:
      - id: cta_right_arrow_icon
        icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
        style_summary: "small one-color line arrow, off-white on green, no pictorial detail"
        path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.children.cell_6_cta_icon_segment.children.cell_6_cta_arrow_icon
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - id: square_editorial_photography_set
        path: root.children.grid_panel.items
        placement: foreground_media
        count_visible: 5
        style_summary: "square editorial food/interior stills, warm natural or cinematic light, high color saturation in subject areas, minimal framing, no visible border or shadow"
  media:
    - id: media_cell_1
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_media
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: square
      reaches_edges: true
      border_or_mat: none
      crop: "tight close-up"
      color_treatment: "warm saturated oranges and deep shadows"
      detail_level: medium_high
    - id: media_cell_2
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_2.children.cell_2_media
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: square
      reaches_edges: true
      border_or_mat: none
      crop: "small tabletop scene with hand detail"
      color_treatment: "muted warm brown and olive shadows"
      detail_level: medium
    - id: media_cell_3
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_3.children.cell_3_media
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: square
      reaches_edges: true
      border_or_mat: none
      crop: "overhead centered plated food detail"
      color_treatment: "turquoise, gold, cream, and dark dessert tones"
      detail_level: medium
    - id: media_cell_4
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_4.children.cell_4_media
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: square
      reaches_edges: true
      border_or_mat: none
      crop: "quiet interior corner with vertical architectural lines"
      color_treatment: "pale cream and blue accents"
      detail_level: medium
    - id: media_cell_5
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_5.children.cell_5_media
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: square
      reaches_edges: true
      border_or_mat: none
      crop: "overhead sparse still life"
      color_treatment: "dark warm brown with directional highlight and shadow"
      detail_level: medium
  creative_direction:
    - id: section_visual_direction
      path: root
      description: "quiet editorial values section with print-inspired hairline grid, centered typographic hierarchy, small square imagery, and restrained dark green on warm paper palette"
    - id: photography_direction
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items
      description: "photography is intimate and tactile, alternating food and interior details, mostly square crops with subject reaching image edges and no decorative frame"
    - id: ui_direction
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      description: "CTA is compact, dark, and understated; icon is separated into a small right segment rather than floating separately"
  implementation_assumptions:
    - path: root
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: "section behaves as a full-width page block with visible canvas"
    - path: root.layers.root_canvas_grain
      assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      rationale: "subtle texture appears over otherwise flat background"
    - path: root.children.grid_panel
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: "bordered panel and dividers align to a regular grid"
    - path: root.children.grid_panel.items.*.children.*_media
      assumption: likely_raster_image
      rationale: "photographic square assets"
    - path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta.children.cell_6_cta_icon_segment.children.cell_6_cta_arrow_icon
      assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
      rationale: "small crisp vector-like arrow"
    - path: root.children.grid_panel.items.*.children.*_body
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: "editable paragraph text blocks"
  components:
    - id: section_heading
      type: heading
      path: root.children.section_heading
      host_surface: warm_off_white_canvas
      text_color: dark_forest_green_text
      separation_mechanism: whitespace
    - id: editorial_grid_panel
      type: grid_panel
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      host_surface: warm_off_white_canvas
      child_surface: transparent
      border: thin_muted_green_hairlines
      separation_mechanism: bordered_grid_lines
    - id: ordinal_badge
      type: badge
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1.children.cell_1_ordinal_badge
      host_surface: transparent_on_warm_canvas
      child_surface: transparent
      border: thin_dark_green_circle
      text_color: dark_forest_green_text
    - id: media_value_card
      type: repeated_grid_cell
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_1
      host_surface: transparent_on_warm_canvas
      child_surface: none
      content: "ordinal marker, square photo, centered paragraph"
      separation_mechanism: enclosing grid cell borders
    - id: compact_primary_cta
      type: button
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      host_surface: transparent_on_warm_canvas
      child_surface: forest_green_fill
      text_icon_color: warm_off_white
      border: none_visible
      radius: small
      separation_mechanism: filled color contrast
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - id: page_warm_paper
        candidate_value: "warm off-white #f4f1eb"
        usage: "primary editorial canvas"
      - id: editorial_forest_green
        candidate_value: "dark green #24563a"
        usage: "heading, body text, CTA fill"
      - id: muted_green_hairline
        candidate_value: "soft green-gray #687869"
        usage: "borders and dividers"
    gradients: []
    patterns:
      - id: paper_grain_texture
        usage: "site-wide warm paper surface texture"
    background_systems:
      - id: warm_paper_canvas_system
        recipe: "solid warm off-white plus subtle grain/noise"
    typography:
      - id: display_condensed_serif_uppercase
        usage: "section titles"
      - id: compact_editorial_sans_body
        usage: "small centered body copy and CTAs"
      - id: tiny_ordinal_type
        usage: "sequence badges"
    spacing:
      - id: page_side_inset_large
        candidate_value_px: 51
      - id: heading_to_panel_gap
        candidate_value_px: 42
      - id: media_cell_vertical_spacing
        candidate_value_px: 24
      - id: grid_cell_size_large
        candidate_value: "3x2 equal cells, roughly 421x341 px"
    radius:
      - id: radius_none_for_media_and_grid
        candidate_value_px: 0
      - id: radius_small_button
        candidate_value_px: 3
      - id: radius_circle_badge
        candidate_value: circle
    shadow:
      - id: no_shadow_flat_editorial
        usage: "photos, grid, and button all appear flat"
    dividers:
      - id: green_hairline_divider
        candidate_value_px: 1
        usage: "grid borders and internal lines"
  likely_components:
    - id: editorial_values_grid
      description: "bordered 3-column by 2-row grid with equal cells and centered content"
    - id: value_cell_with_media
      description: "small circular ordinal, square media, compact centered copy"
    - id: value_cell_with_cta
      description: "centered ordinal, short copy, compact filled link button"
    - id: compound_icon_button
      description: "label segment plus square arrow segment with subtle divider"
    - id: circular_sequence_badge
      description: "tiny outlined circle containing a sequence number"
  likely_section_patterns:
    - id: print_editorial_grid_section
      description: "warm paper canvas, centered display heading, bordered equal-cell grid, no card elevation"
    - id: values_or_principles_overview
      description: "uses numbered cells to communicate discrete points with small supporting media"
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - id: root_canvas_recipe
      path: root
      recipe: "full viewport warm off-white with low-opacity grain; do not substitute the bordered grid as the root background"
    - id: grid_panel_recipe
      path: root.children.grid_panel
      recipe: "transparent panel over root canvas, 1px muted green outer border and internal dividers, zero radius"
    - id: primary_button_on_light_surface
      path: root.children.grid_panel.items.grid_cell_6.children.cell_6_content_stack.children.cell_6_cta
      recipe: "forest green fill, off-white small label, split arrow segment, small radius, no shadow"
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - "Section uses strong centering: heading centered to viewport, grid centered with equal side margins."
    - "Grid rhythm is geometric and rigid; content inside most cells is vertically aligned to a repeated top badge, square image, text sequence."
    - "Final CTA cell breaks the media pattern by centering a shorter message stack within the cell."
    - "No gutters between cells; separation is entirely by hairline dividers."
  link_action_mechanics:
    - "Only visible action is a compact filled CTA in the final grid cell."
    - "The CTA communicates direction with a separate right arrow icon segment divided from the label segment."
    - "Grid cells themselves do not show visible hover, underline, or click affordance in the screenshot."
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - "Thin green print-like rules on warm paper."
    - "Small circular sequence badges above each value."
    - "Square editorial photos centered inside oversized quiet cells."
    - "Dark green uppercase condensed serif section title."
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons:
      - "Use sparse single-color line icons for directional UI only; off-white on green when inside CTA."
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - "Square editorial photography with warm cinematic restaurant/interior palette, tactile close crops, natural shadows, no frame, no rounded corners."
      - "Mix high-saturation food details with quieter interior/ingredient still lifes while maintaining centered placement and restrained scale."
  do_not_generalize:
    - "Do not treat the individual visible food or room subjects as required content; preserve only the square editorial photo style and placement."
    - "Do not promote the grid interior to a separate card fill; it is transparent over the section canvas."
    - "Do not add shadows, rounded photo corners, or large CTA styling; the design is intentionally flat and restrained."
    - "Do not transcribe or reuse the exact visible paragraph or button copy from this section."
  uncertainties:
    - "Exact typefaces are not recoverable; heading appears to be a condensed editorial serif and body appears to be a compact sans-serif."
    - "Paper grain may be an image/noise texture or screenshot compression; visible evidence supports a subtle textured surface."
    - "CTA icon segment divider color is subtle and may be a border, spacing seam, or optical contrast between adjacent same-color segments."
    - "Top and bottom transitions are only partially visible in the crop; within the target crop the warm off-white canvas reaches both edges."
04 roma stories image collage
04-roma-stories-image-collage.pngruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/crops/04-roma-stories-image-collage.png
Section grounding outputs
04-roma-stories-image-collage.mdruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/04-roma-stories-image-collage.md
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 4
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Roma Stories image collage"
  previous_section_label: "What Defines Us values grid"
  next_section_label: "Journal section"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 2220
    original_y_end: 3950
    crop_y_start: 2220
    crop_y_end: 3950
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: staggered_media_collage_section
  role: editorial_story_gallery
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: editorial_story_gallery
  visibility: visible
  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
  size:
    width: full_crop_width
    height: tall
    estimated_observed_crop_px:
      width: 1536
      height: 1964
    content_height_behavior: fixed_or_content_driven_tall_section
  layout:
    type: full_width_canvas_with_manual_staggered_media
    primary_axis: vertical
    alignment: center_header_then_asymmetric_collage
    overflow: hidden_by_section_crop
    content_max_width: nearly_full_viewport
    negative_space: very_large
    placement_model: absolute_or_grid_manual_offsets_likely
  position:
    section_start: top_of_crop
    section_end: bottom_of_crop
  style:
    background_color: warm_off_white_ivory_approx_#f6f2ec
    background_ownership: full_width_section_host_canvas_visible_at_left_and_right_edges
    color: dark_green_for_text_approx_#24543a
    border: none_on_section_itself
    texture: subtle_paper_grain_or_noise
    edge_behavior:
      top: same_off_white_canvas_continues_to_crop_top_with_no_visible_divider
      bottom: target_content_approaches_next_bordered_section; thin_neighbor_border_sliver_visible_at_extreme_bottom
  layers:
    - id: base_canvas_fill
      role: section_background_base
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      style:
        fill: warm_off_white_ivory_approx_#f6f2ec
        coverage: full_section
        confidence: high
    - id: paper_noise_texture
      role: low_contrast_surface_texture
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      style:
        pattern: fine_irregular_speckles_and_soft_grain
        color: beige_gray_low_opacity
        opacity: very_low
        density: sparse_to_moderate
        coverage: full_section
        confidence: medium
  children:
    - id: header_stack
      kind: content_group
      role: section_intro_label_and_title
      visibility: visible
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      size:
        width: fit_content
        height_px: 80
      position:
        x: center
        y_px: 0
        top_padding_px: minimal_or_clipped_about_0_to_8
      layout:
        type: vertical_stack
        align_items: center
        gap_px: 12
      style:
        background: transparent
        text_color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
      children:
        - id: intro_micro_label
          kind: text
          role: account_style_eyebrow_label
          visibility: visible_near_top_edge
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          size:
            width: fit_content
            height_px: 14
          position:
            x: center
            y_px: 0
          typography:
            category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
            size_px: 12
            line_height_px: 14
            weight: 400
            letter_spacing: tight_to_normal
            case: uppercase_or_handle_like
            alignment: center
            color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
          style:
            background: transparent
        - id: section_title
          kind: text
          role: primary_section_heading
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          size:
            width_px: 260
            height_px: 48
          position:
            x: center
            y_px: 34
          typography:
            category: display_serif
            style_description: tall_condensed_editorial_serif_with_high_contrast_strokes
            size_px: 44
            line_height_px: 48
            weight: 400
            letter_spacing: slight_negative_or_tight
            case: uppercase
            alignment: center
            color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
          style:
            background: transparent
    - id: collage_area
      kind: layout_group
      role: staggered_square_photo_collage
      visibility: visible
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      size:
        width: full_section
        height_px: 1810
      position:
        x: 0
        y_px: 118
      layout:
        type: freeform_staggered_gallery
        item_count: 5
        align_items: manual
        item_structure: square_photo_plus_centered_microcaption
        row_logic: non_uniform; two_upper_items_then_center_item_then_two_lower_items
        columns: visually_asymmetric_not_regular_grid
        gutters: large_open_whitespace
      style:
        background: transparent
      items:
        - id: media_unit_upper_right
          kind: media_caption_unit
          role: large_square_photo_with_caption
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          position:
            left_px: 793
            top_px: 3
            center_x_percent: 66.5
            visual_order: first_prominent_photo_near_top
          size:
            width_px: 456
            height_px: 500
          layout:
            type: vertical_stack
            align_items: center
            gap_px: 18
          style:
            background: transparent
            border: none
            shadow: none
          children:
            - id: media_unit_upper_right_image
              kind: image
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
              placement: foreground_media
              size:
                width_px: 456
                height_px: 456
                aspect_ratio: "1:1"
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
                overflow_clip: hard_square_edges
              imagery:
                category: photography
                source_subject_context: close_cropped_beverage_or_glass_still_life
                framing: tight_macro_square_crop
                perspective: eye_level_to_slightly_low_closeup
                lighting: saturated_directional_light_with_deep_cool_background
                color_treatment: teal_blue_background_with_warm_citrus_and_pale_yellow_highlights
                realism: photographic
                photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
                density: medium
                detail_level: high_surface_reflections_and_transparency
            - id: media_unit_upper_right_caption
              kind: text
              role: repeated_account_style_microcaption
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
              size:
                width: fit_content
                height_px: 15
              typography:
                category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
                size_px: 12
                line_height_px: 14
                weight: 400
                case: uppercase_or_handle_like
                letter_spacing: tight
                alignment: center
                color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
              style:
                background: transparent
        - id: media_unit_upper_left
          kind: media_caption_unit
          role: smaller_square_photo_with_caption
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          position:
            left_px: 178
            top_px: 205
            center_x_percent: 22.5
            visual_order: offset_left_upper_photo
          size:
            width_px: 334
            height_px: 380
          layout:
            type: vertical_stack
            align_items: center
            gap_px: 16
          style:
            background: transparent
            border: none
            shadow: none
          children:
            - id: media_unit_upper_left_image
              kind: image
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
              placement: foreground_media
              size:
                width_px: 334
                height_px: 334
                aspect_ratio: "1:1"
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
                overflow_clip: hard_square_edges
              imagery:
                category: photography
                source_subject_context: close_cropped_baked_or_plated_food_still_life
                framing: tight_square_crop_with_subject_partially_cut_by_edges
                perspective: close_tabletop_angle
                lighting: warm_direct_light_with_deep_red_brown_shadows
                color_treatment: saturated_warm_red_gold_palette
                realism: photographic
                photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
                density: medium
                detail_level: high_texture_and_gloss
            - id: media_unit_upper_left_caption
              kind: text
              role: repeated_account_style_microcaption
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
              size:
                width: fit_content
                height_px: 15
              typography:
                category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
                size_px: 12
                line_height_px: 14
                weight: 400
                case: uppercase_or_handle_like
                letter_spacing: tight
                alignment: center
                color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
              style:
                background: transparent
        - id: media_unit_center
          kind: media_caption_unit
          role: smaller_square_photo_with_caption
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          position:
            left_px: 548
            top_px: 677
            center_x_percent: 46.6
            visual_order: central_middle_photo
          size:
            width_px: 333
            height_px: 379
          layout:
            type: vertical_stack
            align_items: center
            gap_px: 17
          style:
            background: transparent
            border: none
            shadow: none
          children:
            - id: media_unit_center_image
              kind: image
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
              placement: foreground_media
              size:
                width_px: 333
                height_px: 333
                aspect_ratio: "1:1"
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
                overflow_clip: hard_square_edges
              imagery:
                category: photography
                source_subject_context: hands_preparing_food_or_ingredient_detail
                framing: close_overhead_or_three_quarter_square_crop
                perspective: tabletop_process_view
                lighting: warm_indoor_directional_light
                color_treatment: natural_skin_tones_with_dark_greens_and_red_accents
                realism: photographic
                photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
                density: high
                detail_level: high_hand_and_ingredient_detail
            - id: media_unit_center_caption
              kind: text
              role: repeated_account_style_microcaption
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
              size:
                width: fit_content
                height_px: 15
              typography:
                category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
                size_px: 12
                line_height_px: 14
                weight: 400
                case: uppercase_or_handle_like
                letter_spacing: tight
                alignment: center
                color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
              style:
                background: transparent
        - id: media_unit_lower_left
          kind: media_caption_unit
          role: large_square_photo_with_caption
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          position:
            left_px: 56
            top_px: 1148
            center_x_percent: 18.5
            visual_order: lower_left_anchor_photo
          size:
            width_px: 455
            height_px: 503
          layout:
            type: vertical_stack
            align_items: center
            gap_px: 19
          style:
            background: transparent
            border: none
            shadow: none
          children:
            - id: media_unit_lower_left_image
              kind: image
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
              placement: foreground_media
              size:
                width_px: 455
                height_px: 455
                aspect_ratio: "1:1"
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
                overflow_clip: hard_square_edges
              imagery:
                category: photography
                source_subject_context: close_cropped_cut_fruit_or_produce_still_life
                framing: macro_square_crop_with_large_subject_entering_edges
                perspective: low_close_tabletop
                lighting: strong_warm_sunlight_with_heavy_shadow
                color_treatment: golden_cream_red_orange_palette
                realism: photographic
                photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
                density: medium
                detail_level: high_surface_texture_and_seed_detail
            - id: media_unit_lower_left_caption
              kind: text
              role: repeated_account_style_microcaption
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
              size:
                width: fit_content
                height_px: 15
              typography:
                category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
                size_px: 12
                line_height_px: 14
                weight: 400
                case: uppercase_or_handle_like
                letter_spacing: tight
                alignment: center
                color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
              style:
                background: transparent
        - id: media_unit_lower_right
          kind: media_caption_unit
          role: large_square_photo_with_caption
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          position:
            left_px: 918
            top_px: 1306
            center_x_percent: 74.7
            visual_order: lower_right_anchor_photo
          size:
            width_px: 456
            height_px: 504
          layout:
            type: vertical_stack
            align_items: center
            gap_px: 18
          style:
            background: transparent
            border: none
            shadow: none
          children:
            - id: media_unit_lower_right_image
              kind: image
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
              placement: foreground_media
              size:
                width_px: 456
                height_px: 456
                aspect_ratio: "1:1"
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
                overflow_clip: hard_square_edges
              imagery:
                category: photography
                source_subject_context: close_cropped_fruit_cluster_with_glass_or_reflection
                framing: tight_square_crop_subject_crossing_frame
                perspective: close_macro_with_diagonal_composition
                lighting: bright_backlit_sun_with_strong_contrast
                color_treatment: purple_dark_fruit_against_lime_yellow_green_background
                realism: photographic
                photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
                density: high
                detail_level: high_reflection_and_skin_texture
            - id: media_unit_lower_right_caption
              kind: text
              role: repeated_account_style_microcaption
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
              size:
                width: fit_content
                height_px: 15
              typography:
                category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
                size_px: 12
                line_height_px: 14
                weight: 400
                case: uppercase_or_handle_like
                letter_spacing: tight
                alignment: center
                color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
              style:
                background: transparent
    - id: bottom_neighbor_border_sliver
      kind: boundary_observation
      role: next_section_ingress_at_crop_bottom
      visibility: barely_visible
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      position:
        y: extreme_bottom
        left_px: 57
        right_px: 1496
      size:
        height_px: 1_to_3
      style:
        line_color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
        line_weight_px: 1
        ownership: likely_next_section_not_this_section
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: section_intro_label_and_title
      role: centered_micro_label_plus_display_heading
      host_surface: off_white_paper_canvas
      child_surface: transparent
      text_color: dark_green
      border_divider_shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: fit_content_centered
      separation_mechanism: whitespace_below_previous_content_and_above_collage
    - id: square_media_caption_unit
      role: repeated_photo_tile_without_card_chrome
      repeat_count: 5
      host_surface: off_white_paper_canvas
      child_surface: transparent_around_edge_to_edge_square_photo
      image_frame: hard_square_clip_no_radius_no_border_no_shadow
      caption: small_centered_account_style_text_below_image
      sizing_behavior: two_visual_photo_sizes_small_about_333px_and_large_about_456px
      separation_mechanism: manual_offsets_and_large_negative_space
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - primary_buttons
    - secondary_buttons
    - form_inputs
    - navigation_controls
    - tabs
    - accordions
    - cards_with_borders_or_shadows
    - icons
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: canvas_warm_ivory
      value: "#f6f2ec"
      role: full_width_section_background
      path: root
      confidence: high
      notes: warm off-white paper-like canvas visible around all media and at lateral edges
    - id: dark_green_text
      value: "#24543a"
      role: heading_caption_and_boundary_line_color
      path: root/children/header_stack
      confidence: high
      notes: same family used for title, micro labels, and visible bottom neighbor line
    - id: photo_teal_yellow_palette
      value: teal_blue_plus_pale_yellow_warm_accent
      role: image_internal_palette
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_right/children/media_unit_upper_right_image
      confidence: medium
    - id: photo_warm_red_gold_palette
      value: saturated_red_brown_gold
      role: image_internal_palette
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_left/children/media_unit_upper_left_image
      confidence: medium
    - id: photo_dark_green_red_process_palette
      value: dark_green_black_red_with_skin_tones
      role: image_internal_palette
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_center/children/media_unit_center_image
      confidence: medium
    - id: photo_lime_purple_palette
      value: lime_yellow_green_with_deep_purple
      role: image_internal_palette
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_lower_right/children/media_unit_lower_right_image
      confidence: medium
  gradients:
    - id: none_on_section_canvas
      role: root_background_gradient_observation
      path: root
      value: no_obvious_css_gradient; flat_warm_ivory_with_texture
      confidence: high
    - id: photographic_light_falloff
      role: image_internal_tonal_gradients
      path: root/children/collage_area
      value: natural_photo_lighting_gradients_only
      confidence: high
  patterns:
    - id: subtle_paper_grain
      role: full_canvas_texture
      path: root/layers/paper_noise_texture
      visual: fine_irregular_noise_speckles_low_contrast
      scale: tiny
      opacity: very_low
      confidence: medium
  background_systems:
    - id: warm_paper_canvas_system
      path: root
      layers:
        - warm_off_white_base_fill
        - subtle_low_opacity_paper_noise
      coverage: full_width_section_host
      confidence: high
      notes: media tiles do not own the section surface; they sit directly on transparent canvas
  typography:
    - id: display_section_heading_type
      path: root/children/header_stack/children/section_title
      category: display_serif
      style_description: tall_condensed_editorial_serif_with_elegant_thin_hairlines_and_stronger_verticals
      size_px: 44
      line_height_px: 48
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: tight
      case: uppercase
      alignment: center
      color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
      confidence: high
    - id: micro_account_label_type
      path: root/children/header_stack/children/intro_micro_label
      category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
      style_description: compact_all_caps_handle_like_label
      size_px: 12
      line_height_px: 14
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: tight_to_normal
      case: uppercase_or_handle_like
      alignment: center
      color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
      confidence: medium
    - id: media_caption_type
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_caption
      category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
      style_description: tiny_centered_repeated_handle_style_caption
      size_px: 12
      line_height_px: 14
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: tight
      case: uppercase_or_handle_like
      alignment: center
      color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
      confidence: high
  font_characteristics:
    - id: brand_display_serif_character
      path: root/children/header_stack/children/section_title
      characteristics:
        - narrow_letterforms
        - high_contrast_serif
        - tall_editorial_proportions
        - refined_restaurant_or_magazine_feel
      confidence: high
    - id: micro_caption_character
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_caption
      characteristics:
        - condensed
        - utilitarian
        - monospaced_or_typewriter_like
        - low_visual_weight
      confidence: medium
  spacing:
    - id: minimal_top_intro_offset
      path: root/children/header_stack
      value_px: 0_to_8
      role: top_gap_before_micro_label
      confidence: medium
    - id: intro_label_to_title_gap
      path: root/children/header_stack
      value_px: 12
