      role: vertical_stack_gap
      confidence: medium
    - id: title_to_first_media_gap
      path: root/children/header_stack_to_collage_area
      value_px: 38_to_50
      role: heading_to_upper_right_photo_gap
      confidence: medium
    - id: image_to_caption_gap
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/layout
      value_px: 16_to_19
      role: repeated_media_unit_internal_gap
      confidence: high
    - id: large_manual_vertical_gutters
      path: root/children/collage_area
      value: variable_large_gaps_between_media_units_roughly_120_to_280px
      role: collage_negative_space
      confidence: medium
    - id: lower_left_outer_gutter
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_lower_left
      value_px: 56
      role: closest_large_photo_left_margin
      confidence: medium
    - id: lower_right_outer_gutter
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_lower_right
      value_px: about_160_from_right_edge
      role: lower_right_photo_right_margin
      confidence: medium
  radius:
    - id: photo_frame_radius_none
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      value_px: 0
      confidence: high
    - id: section_radius_none
      path: root
      value_px: 0
      confidence: high
  sizes:
    - id: small_square_photo_size
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_left_and_center
      value_px: 333
      aspect_ratio: "1:1"
      role: smaller_media_tile_image_size
      confidence: high
    - id: large_square_photo_size
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_right_and_lower_items
      value_px: 455
      aspect_ratio: "1:1"
      role: larger_media_tile_image_size
      confidence: high
    - id: heading_visual_size
      path: root/children/header_stack/children/section_title
      value_px: 44
      role: primary_section_title
      confidence: medium
    - id: caption_visual_size
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_caption
      value_px: 12
      role: microcaption
      confidence: medium
  opacity:
    - id: paper_texture_opacity
      path: root/layers/paper_noise_texture
      value: very_low_approx_3_to_6_percent_visual
      confidence: low
  borders:
    - id: media_frames_no_border
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      value: none
      confidence: high
    - id: bottom_neighbor_top_border
      path: root/children/bottom_neighbor_border_sliver
      value: 1px_dark_green_line
      confidence: medium
      notes: likely belongs to following section, not the gallery section
  shadows:
    - id: no_css_shadows_on_media
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      value: none_observed
      confidence: high
    - id: natural_photo_shadows
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      value: shadows_are_inside_photography_only
      confidence: high
  effects:
    - id: hard_square_image_clipping
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      effect: edge_to_edge_square_crop_with_no_frame
      confidence: high
    - id: editorial_photo_color_grade
      path: root/children/collage_area
      effect: saturated_warm_food_editorial_grade_with_strong_contrast
      confidence: high
    - id: quiet_paper_surface
      path: root
      effect: subtle_aged_paper_noise_without_visible_repeating_tile
      confidence: medium
  icons: []
  imagery_categories:
    icons: []
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - id: staggered_square_photo_set
        path: root/children/collage_area
        placement: foreground_media
        count: 5
        realism: photographic
        style: editorial_food_and_tabletop_story_photography
        framing: square_crops_mostly_macro_or_closeup
        lighting: high_contrast_direct_sun_or_warm_directional_indoor_light
        color_treatment: saturated_warm_palette_with_occasional_teal_or_lime_contrast
        composition: asymmetrically_distributed_on_large_blank_canvas
        edge_behavior: photo_content_reaches_image_edges; no_inner_matte_or_photo_border
        density: medium_to_high_per_photo
        simplicity: simple_single_subject_or_process_moments
        detail_level: high_texture_reflections_and_natural_shadow
        confidence: high
  media:
    - id: upper_right_photo_asset
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_right/children/media_unit_upper_right_image
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      aspect_ratio: square
      frame_behavior: no_card_no_border_no_radius
      photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
      crop: tight_closeup
      dominant_visual_energy: cool_teal_background_with_warm_pale_highlights
      confidence: high
    - id: upper_left_photo_asset
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_left/children/media_unit_upper_left_image
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      aspect_ratio: square
      frame_behavior: no_card_no_border_no_radius
      photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
      crop: tight_closeup_subject_partly_cut_off
      dominant_visual_energy: warm_red_gold_glossy_texture
      confidence: high
    - id: center_photo_asset
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_center/children/media_unit_center_image
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      aspect_ratio: square
      frame_behavior: no_card_no_border_no_radius
      photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
      crop: close_process_detail
      dominant_visual_energy: hands_and_ingredients_on_dark_tabletop
      confidence: high
    - id: lower_left_photo_asset
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_lower_left/children/media_unit_lower_left_image
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      aspect_ratio: square
      frame_behavior: no_card_no_border_no_radius
      photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
      crop: macro_still_life
      dominant_visual_energy: golden_sunlit_fruit_texture
      confidence: high
    - id: lower_right_photo_asset
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_lower_right/children/media_unit_lower_right_image
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      aspect_ratio: square
      frame_behavior: no_card_no_border_no_radius
      photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
      crop: diagonal_macro_still_life
      dominant_visual_energy: purple_subject_against_lime_yellow_backlight
      confidence: high
  creative_direction:
    - id: section_gallery_direction
      path: root
      description: minimal_editorial_social_story_gallery_on_paper_canvas_with_saturated_square_photography_and_tiny_account_style_captions
      visual_intent: create_a_loose_collected_feed_feeling_with_large_breathing_room
      palette_relationship: restrained_dark_green_text_on_warm_ivory_canvas_contrasted_by_vivid_photographic_color
      composition: header_centered_then_photos_staggered_diagonally_and_asymmetrically
      density: low_page_density_high_media_detail
      confidence: high
    - id: photography_direction
      path: root/children/collage_area
      description: close_cropped_tabletop_food_and_ingredient_moments_with_strong_sun_or_warm_light_high_saturation_and_natural_texture
      avoid: adding_borders_drop_shadows_device_frames_or_inner_cards_to_photo_assets
      confidence: high
  implementation_assumptions:
    - path: root
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: medium
      notes: section canvas and child positions are likely layout elements, but exact layout method is not recoverable
    - path: root/layers/paper_noise_texture
      assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      confidence: low
      notes: texture may also be from screenshot compression or a background image
    - path: root/children/header_stack/children/section_title
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: high
    - path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      assumption: likely_raster_image
      confidence: high
    - path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_caption
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: medium
    - path: root/children/bottom_neighbor_border_sliver
      assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      confidence: medium
      notes: visible at crop edge and likely owned by next section
  components:
    - id: section_intro_stack_component
      path: root/children/header_stack
      type: title_stack
      anatomy:
        - micro_label
        - display_heading
      styling: transparent_on_paper_canvas_dark_green_text_centered
      confidence: high
    - id: media_caption_tile_component
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*
      type: repeated_media_unit
      anatomy:
        - square_edge_to_edge_photo
        - small_centered_caption
      styling: no_card_chrome_transparent_host
      variants:
        - small_square_photo_about_333px
        - large_square_photo_about_455px
      confidence: high
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - id: warm_paper_canvas
        value: "#f6f2ec"
        usage: primary_page_or_section_background
      - id: deep_heritage_green
        value: "#24543a"
        usage: section_heading_microcopy_and_fine_lines_on_light_surface
    gradients:
      - none_for_section_background
    patterns:
      - subtle_paper_noise_texture_for_light_canvas
    background_systems:
      - warm_ivory_base_plus_low_opacity_paper_grain
    typography:
      - display_condensed_serif_uppercase_for_section_titles
      - tiny_condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans_for_account_style_labels
    spacing:
      - very_large_negative_space_between_collage_items
      - small_caption_gap_about_16_to_19px
      - minimal_header_top_padding_at_section_start
    radius:
      - square_media_radius_0
    shadow:
      - no_shadow_for_gallery_images
    dividers:
      - dark_green_1px_border_belongs_to_neighbor_pattern_not_gallery_content
  likely_components:
    - centered_section_intro_with_micro_label_and_display_heading
    - square_photo_with_microcaption
    - staggered_editorial_media_collage
  likely_section_patterns:
    - open_canvas_asymmetric_gallery
    - social_feed_story_collage_with_no_cards
    - two_scale_square_media_layout_on_large_whitespace
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - id: light_paper_section_surface
      recipe: warm_off_white_full_width_fill_with_subtle_grain; dark_green_text; no_outer_container
    - id: media_on_light_canvas
      recipe: hard_square_edge_to_edge_raster_photo_directly_on_canvas; centered_microcaption_below; no_frame_or_shadow
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - header_is_centered_and_compact_then_gallery_begins_after_moderate_gap
    - collage_uses_manual_offsets_rather_than_equal_grid_spacing
    - large_images_anchor_upper_right_and_lower_corners; smaller_images_fill_upper_left_and_center
    - captions_maintain_consistent_short_gap_below_each_photo_despite_variable_outer_spacing
  link_action_mechanics:
    - no_explicit_button_or_link_affordance_inside_target_section
    - repeated_microcaptions_may_be_links_but_have_no_visible_underlines_hover_states_or_icon_affordances
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - tiny_green_account_style_captions_under_every_photo
    - unframed_square_editorial_photos_on_plain_paper_canvas
    - asymmetrical_staggering_with_large_areas_of_empty_ivory_space
    - high_saturation_food_or_tabletop_photography_contrasting_with_restrained_typography
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons: []
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - editorial_closeup_tabletop_food_and_ingredient_photography
      - square_macro_crops_with_subjects_touching_edges
      - warm_sunlit_or_directional_indoor_lighting_with_deep_shadows
      - saturated_color_accents_against_neutral_page_canvas
  do_not_generalize:
    - do_not_treat_individual_photo_subjects_as_required_content_for_other_sites
    - do_not_add_card_borders_padding_rounding_or_drop_shadows_to_media_tiles
    - do_not_promote_the_bottom_edge_line_to_a_gallery_component; it_is_likely_from_the_next_section
    - do_not_infer_interactive_social_embed_controls_from_the_account_style_captions
    - do_not_infer_a_strict_regular_grid; visual_layout_is_intentionally_manual_and_staggered
  uncertainties:
    - exact_font_family_for_display_heading_is_not_recoverable
    - exact_font_family_for_microcaptions_is_unclear_between_condensed_monospace_and_narrow_sans
    - background_texture_may_be_designed_noise_or_screenshot_artifact
    - exact_original_pixel_positions_differ_from_rendered_crop_scale
    - captions_could_be_links_but_no_click_affordance_is_visible
04-roma-stories-image-collage.yamlruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/04-roma-stories-image-collage.yaml
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 4
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Roma Stories image collage"
  previous_section_label: "What Defines Us values grid"
  next_section_label: "Journal section"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 2220
    original_y_end: 3950
    crop_y_start: 2220
    crop_y_end: 3950
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: staggered_media_collage_section
  role: editorial_story_gallery
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: editorial_story_gallery
  visibility: visible
  implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
  size:
    width: full_crop_width
    height: tall
    estimated_observed_crop_px:
      width: 1536
      height: 1964
    content_height_behavior: fixed_or_content_driven_tall_section
  layout:
    type: full_width_canvas_with_manual_staggered_media
    primary_axis: vertical
    alignment: center_header_then_asymmetric_collage
    overflow: hidden_by_section_crop
    content_max_width: nearly_full_viewport
    negative_space: very_large
    placement_model: absolute_or_grid_manual_offsets_likely
  position:
    section_start: top_of_crop
    section_end: bottom_of_crop
  style:
    background_color: warm_off_white_ivory_approx_#f6f2ec
    background_ownership: full_width_section_host_canvas_visible_at_left_and_right_edges
    color: dark_green_for_text_approx_#24543a
    border: none_on_section_itself
    texture: subtle_paper_grain_or_noise
    edge_behavior:
      top: same_off_white_canvas_continues_to_crop_top_with_no_visible_divider
      bottom: target_content_approaches_next_bordered_section; thin_neighbor_border_sliver_visible_at_extreme_bottom
  layers:
    - id: base_canvas_fill
      role: section_background_base
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      style:
        fill: warm_off_white_ivory_approx_#f6f2ec
        coverage: full_section
        confidence: high
    - id: paper_noise_texture
      role: low_contrast_surface_texture
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      style:
        pattern: fine_irregular_speckles_and_soft_grain
        color: beige_gray_low_opacity
        opacity: very_low
        density: sparse_to_moderate
        coverage: full_section
        confidence: medium
  children:
    - id: header_stack
      kind: content_group
      role: section_intro_label_and_title
      visibility: visible
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      size:
        width: fit_content
        height_px: 80
      position:
        x: center
        y_px: 0
        top_padding_px: minimal_or_clipped_about_0_to_8
      layout:
        type: vertical_stack
        align_items: center
        gap_px: 12
      style:
        background: transparent
        text_color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
      children:
        - id: intro_micro_label
          kind: text
          role: account_style_eyebrow_label
          visibility: visible_near_top_edge
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          size:
            width: fit_content
            height_px: 14
          position:
            x: center
            y_px: 0
          typography:
            category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
            size_px: 12
            line_height_px: 14
            weight: 400
            letter_spacing: tight_to_normal
            case: uppercase_or_handle_like
            alignment: center
            color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
          style:
            background: transparent
        - id: section_title
          kind: text
          role: primary_section_heading
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          size:
            width_px: 260
            height_px: 48
          position:
            x: center
            y_px: 34
          typography:
            category: display_serif
            style_description: tall_condensed_editorial_serif_with_high_contrast_strokes
            size_px: 44
            line_height_px: 48
            weight: 400
            letter_spacing: slight_negative_or_tight
            case: uppercase
            alignment: center
            color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
          style:
            background: transparent
    - id: collage_area
      kind: layout_group
      role: staggered_square_photo_collage
      visibility: visible
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      size:
        width: full_section
        height_px: 1810
      position:
        x: 0
        y_px: 118
      layout:
        type: freeform_staggered_gallery
        item_count: 5
        align_items: manual
        item_structure: square_photo_plus_centered_microcaption
        row_logic: non_uniform; two_upper_items_then_center_item_then_two_lower_items
        columns: visually_asymmetric_not_regular_grid
        gutters: large_open_whitespace
      style:
        background: transparent
      items:
        - id: media_unit_upper_right
          kind: media_caption_unit
          role: large_square_photo_with_caption
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          position:
            left_px: 793
            top_px: 3
            center_x_percent: 66.5
            visual_order: first_prominent_photo_near_top
          size:
            width_px: 456
            height_px: 500
          layout:
            type: vertical_stack
            align_items: center
            gap_px: 18
          style:
            background: transparent
            border: none
            shadow: none
          children:
            - id: media_unit_upper_right_image
              kind: image
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
              placement: foreground_media
              size:
                width_px: 456
                height_px: 456
                aspect_ratio: "1:1"
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
                overflow_clip: hard_square_edges
              imagery:
                category: photography
                source_subject_context: close_cropped_beverage_or_glass_still_life
                framing: tight_macro_square_crop
                perspective: eye_level_to_slightly_low_closeup
                lighting: saturated_directional_light_with_deep_cool_background
                color_treatment: teal_blue_background_with_warm_citrus_and_pale_yellow_highlights
                realism: photographic
                photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
                density: medium
                detail_level: high_surface_reflections_and_transparency
            - id: media_unit_upper_right_caption
              kind: text
              role: repeated_account_style_microcaption
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
              size:
                width: fit_content
                height_px: 15
              typography:
                category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
                size_px: 12
                line_height_px: 14
                weight: 400
                case: uppercase_or_handle_like
                letter_spacing: tight
                alignment: center
                color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
              style:
                background: transparent
        - id: media_unit_upper_left
          kind: media_caption_unit
          role: smaller_square_photo_with_caption
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          position:
            left_px: 178
            top_px: 205
            center_x_percent: 22.5
            visual_order: offset_left_upper_photo
          size:
            width_px: 334
            height_px: 380
          layout:
            type: vertical_stack
            align_items: center
            gap_px: 16
          style:
            background: transparent
            border: none
            shadow: none
          children:
            - id: media_unit_upper_left_image
              kind: image
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
              placement: foreground_media
              size:
                width_px: 334
                height_px: 334
                aspect_ratio: "1:1"
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
                overflow_clip: hard_square_edges
              imagery:
                category: photography
                source_subject_context: close_cropped_baked_or_plated_food_still_life
                framing: tight_square_crop_with_subject_partially_cut_by_edges
                perspective: close_tabletop_angle
                lighting: warm_direct_light_with_deep_red_brown_shadows
                color_treatment: saturated_warm_red_gold_palette
                realism: photographic
                photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
                density: medium
                detail_level: high_texture_and_gloss
            - id: media_unit_upper_left_caption
              kind: text
              role: repeated_account_style_microcaption
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
              size:
                width: fit_content
                height_px: 15
              typography:
                category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
                size_px: 12
                line_height_px: 14
                weight: 400
                case: uppercase_or_handle_like
                letter_spacing: tight
                alignment: center
                color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
              style:
                background: transparent
        - id: media_unit_center
          kind: media_caption_unit
          role: smaller_square_photo_with_caption
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          position:
            left_px: 548
            top_px: 677
            center_x_percent: 46.6
            visual_order: central_middle_photo
          size:
            width_px: 333
            height_px: 379
          layout:
            type: vertical_stack
            align_items: center
            gap_px: 17
          style:
            background: transparent
            border: none
            shadow: none
          children:
            - id: media_unit_center_image
              kind: image
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
              placement: foreground_media
              size:
                width_px: 333
                height_px: 333
                aspect_ratio: "1:1"
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
                overflow_clip: hard_square_edges
              imagery:
                category: photography
                source_subject_context: hands_preparing_food_or_ingredient_detail
                framing: close_overhead_or_three_quarter_square_crop
                perspective: tabletop_process_view
                lighting: warm_indoor_directional_light
                color_treatment: natural_skin_tones_with_dark_greens_and_red_accents
                realism: photographic
                photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
                density: high
                detail_level: high_hand_and_ingredient_detail
            - id: media_unit_center_caption
              kind: text
              role: repeated_account_style_microcaption
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
              size:
                width: fit_content
                height_px: 15
              typography:
                category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
                size_px: 12
                line_height_px: 14
                weight: 400
                case: uppercase_or_handle_like
                letter_spacing: tight
                alignment: center
                color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
              style:
                background: transparent
        - id: media_unit_lower_left
          kind: media_caption_unit
          role: large_square_photo_with_caption
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          position:
            left_px: 56
            top_px: 1148
            center_x_percent: 18.5
            visual_order: lower_left_anchor_photo
          size:
            width_px: 455
            height_px: 503
          layout:
            type: vertical_stack
            align_items: center
            gap_px: 19
          style:
            background: transparent
            border: none
            shadow: none
          children:

              kind: image
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
              placement: foreground_media
              size:
                width_px: 455
                height_px: 455
                aspect_ratio: "1:1"
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
                overflow_clip: hard_square_edges
              imagery:
                category: photography
                source_subject_context: close_cropped_cut_fruit_or_produce_still_life
                framing: macro_square_crop_with_large_subject_entering_edges
                perspective: low_close_tabletop
                lighting: strong_warm_sunlight_with_heavy_shadow
                color_treatment: golden_cream_red_orange_palette
                realism: photographic
                photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
                density: medium
                detail_level: high_surface_texture_and_seed_detail
            - id: media_unit_lower_left_caption
              kind: text
              role: repeated_account_style_microcaption
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
              size:
                width: fit_content
                height_px: 15
              typography:
                category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
                size_px: 12
                line_height_px: 14
                weight: 400
                case: uppercase_or_handle_like
                letter_spacing: tight
                alignment: center
                color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
              style:
                background: transparent
        - id: media_unit_lower_right
          kind: media_caption_unit
          role: large_square_photo_with_caption
          visibility: visible
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
          position:
            left_px: 918
            top_px: 1306
            center_x_percent: 74.7
            visual_order: lower_right_anchor_photo
          size:
            width_px: 456
            height_px: 504
          layout:
            type: vertical_stack
            align_items: center
            gap_px: 18
          style:
            background: transparent
            border: none
            shadow: none
          children:
            - id: media_unit_lower_right_image
              kind: image
              role: square_editorial_photo
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
              placement: foreground_media
              size:
                width_px: 456
                height_px: 456
                aspect_ratio: "1:1"
              style:
                border_radius_px: 0
                border: none
                shadow: none
                object_fit: cover
                overflow_clip: hard_square_edges
              imagery:
                category: photography
                source_subject_context: close_cropped_fruit_cluster_with_glass_or_reflection
                framing: tight_square_crop_subject_crossing_frame
                perspective: close_macro_with_diagonal_composition
                lighting: bright_backlit_sun_with_strong_contrast
                color_treatment: purple_dark_fruit_against_lime_yellow_green_background
                realism: photographic
                photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
                density: high
                detail_level: high_reflection_and_skin_texture
            - id: media_unit_lower_right_caption
              kind: text
              role: repeated_account_style_microcaption
              visibility: visible
              implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element

                width: fit_content
                height_px: 15
              typography:
                category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
                size_px: 12
                line_height_px: 14
                weight: 400
                case: uppercase_or_handle_like
                letter_spacing: tight
                alignment: center
                color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
              style:
                background: transparent
    - id: bottom_neighbor_border_sliver
      kind: boundary_observation
      role: next_section_ingress_at_crop_bottom
      visibility: barely_visible
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      position:
        y: extreme_bottom
        left_px: 57
        right_px: 1496
      size:
        height_px: 1_to_3
      style:
        line_color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
        line_weight_px: 1
        ownership: likely_next_section_not_this_section
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: section_intro_label_and_title
      role: centered_micro_label_plus_display_heading
      host_surface: off_white_paper_canvas
      child_surface: transparent
      text_color: dark_green
      border_divider_shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: fit_content_centered
      separation_mechanism: whitespace_below_previous_content_and_above_collage
    - id: square_media_caption_unit
      role: repeated_photo_tile_without_card_chrome
      repeat_count: 5
      host_surface: off_white_paper_canvas
      child_surface: transparent_around_edge_to_edge_square_photo
      image_frame: hard_square_clip_no_radius_no_border_no_shadow
      caption: small_centered_account_style_text_below_image
      sizing_behavior: two_visual_photo_sizes_small_about_333px_and_large_about_456px
      separation_mechanism: manual_offsets_and_large_negative_space
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - primary_buttons
    - secondary_buttons
    - form_inputs
    - navigation_controls
    - tabs
    - accordions
    - cards_with_borders_or_shadows
    - icons
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: canvas_warm_ivory
      value: "#f6f2ec"
      role: full_width_section_background
      path: root
      confidence: high
      notes: warm off-white paper-like canvas visible around all media and at lateral edges
    - id: dark_green_text
      value: "#24543a"
      role: heading_caption_and_boundary_line_color
      path: root/children/header_stack
      confidence: high
      notes: same family used for title, micro labels, and visible bottom neighbor line
    - id: photo_teal_yellow_palette
      value: teal_blue_plus_pale_yellow_warm_accent
      role: image_internal_palette
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_right/children/media_unit_upper_right_image
      confidence: medium
    - id: photo_warm_red_gold_palette
      value: saturated_red_brown_gold
      role: image_internal_palette
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_left/children/media_unit_upper_left_image
      confidence: medium
    - id: photo_dark_green_red_process_palette
      value: dark_green_black_red_with_skin_tones
      role: image_internal_palette
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_center/children/media_unit_center_image
      confidence: medium
    - id: photo_lime_purple_palette
      value: lime_yellow_green_with_deep_purple
      role: image_internal_palette
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_lower_right/children/media_unit_lower_right_image
      confidence: medium
  gradients:
    - id: none_on_section_canvas
      role: root_background_gradient_observation
      path: root
      value: no_obvious_css_gradient; flat_warm_ivory_with_texture
      confidence: high
    - id: photographic_light_falloff
      role: image_internal_tonal_gradients
      path: root/children/collage_area
      value: natural_photo_lighting_gradients_only
      confidence: high
  patterns:
    - id: subtle_paper_grain
      role: full_canvas_texture
      path: root/layers/paper_noise_texture
      visual: fine_irregular_noise_speckles_low_contrast
      scale: tiny
      opacity: very_low
      confidence: medium
  background_systems:
    - id: warm_paper_canvas_system
      path: root
      layers:
        - warm_off_white_base_fill
        - subtle_low_opacity_paper_noise
      coverage: full_width_section_host
      confidence: high
      notes: media tiles do not own the section surface; they sit directly on transparent canvas
  typography:
    - id: display_section_heading_type
      path: root/children/header_stack/children/section_title
      category: display_serif
      style_description: tall_condensed_editorial_serif_with_elegant_thin_hairlines_and_stronger_verticals
      size_px: 44
      line_height_px: 48
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: tight
      case: uppercase
      alignment: center
      color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
      confidence: high
    - id: micro_account_label_type
      path: root/children/header_stack/children/intro_micro_label
      category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
      style_description: compact_all_caps_handle_like_label
      size_px: 12
      line_height_px: 14
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: tight_to_normal
      case: uppercase_or_handle_like
      alignment: center
      color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
      confidence: medium
    - id: media_caption_type
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_caption
      category: condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans
      style_description: tiny_centered_repeated_handle_style_caption
      size_px: 12
      line_height_px: 14
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: tight
      case: uppercase_or_handle_like
      alignment: center
      color: dark_green_approx_#24543a
      confidence: high
  font_characteristics:
    - id: brand_display_serif_character
      path: root/children/header_stack/children/section_title
      characteristics:
        - narrow_letterforms
        - high_contrast_serif
        - tall_editorial_proportions
        - refined_restaurant_or_magazine_feel
      confidence: high
    - id: micro_caption_character
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_caption
      characteristics:
        - condensed
        - utilitarian
        - monospaced_or_typewriter_like
        - low_visual_weight
      confidence: medium
  spacing:
    - id: minimal_top_intro_offset
      path: root/children/header_stack
      value_px: 0_to_8
      role: top_gap_before_micro_label
      confidence: medium
    - id: intro_label_to_title_gap
      path: root/children/header_stack
      value_px: 12
      role: vertical_stack_gap
      confidence: medium
    - id: title_to_first_media_gap
      path: root/children/header_stack_to_collage_area
      value_px: 38_to_50
      role: heading_to_upper_right_photo_gap
      confidence: medium
    - id: image_to_caption_gap
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/layout
      value_px: 16_to_19
      role: repeated_media_unit_internal_gap
      confidence: high
    - id: large_manual_vertical_gutters
      path: root/children/collage_area
      value: variable_large_gaps_between_media_units_roughly_120_to_280px
      role: collage_negative_space
      confidence: medium
    - id: lower_left_outer_gutter
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_lower_left
      value_px: 56
      role: closest_large_photo_left_margin
      confidence: medium
    - id: lower_right_outer_gutter
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_lower_right
      value_px: about_160_from_right_edge
      role: lower_right_photo_right_margin
      confidence: medium
  radius:
    - id: photo_frame_radius_none
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      value_px: 0
      confidence: high
    - id: section_radius_none
      path: root
      value_px: 0
      confidence: high
  sizes:
    - id: small_square_photo_size
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_left_and_center
      value_px: 333
      aspect_ratio: "1:1"
      role: smaller_media_tile_image_size
      confidence: high
    - id: large_square_photo_size
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_right_and_lower_items
      value_px: 455
      aspect_ratio: "1:1"
      role: larger_media_tile_image_size
      confidence: high
    - id: heading_visual_size
      path: root/children/header_stack/children/section_title
      value_px: 44
      role: primary_section_title
      confidence: medium
    - id: caption_visual_size
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_caption
      value_px: 12
      role: microcaption
      confidence: medium
  opacity:
    - id: paper_texture_opacity
      path: root/layers/paper_noise_texture
      value: very_low_approx_3_to_6_percent_visual
      confidence: low
  borders:
    - id: media_frames_no_border
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      value: none
      confidence: high
    - id: bottom_neighbor_top_border
      path: root/children/bottom_neighbor_border_sliver
      value: 1px_dark_green_line
      confidence: medium
      notes: likely belongs to following section, not the gallery section
  shadows:
    - id: no_css_shadows_on_media
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      value: none_observed
      confidence: high
    - id: natural_photo_shadows
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      value: shadows_are_inside_photography_only
      confidence: high
  effects:
    - id: hard_square_image_clipping
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      effect: edge_to_edge_square_crop_with_no_frame
      confidence: high
    - id: editorial_photo_color_grade
      path: root/children/collage_area
      effect: saturated_warm_food_editorial_grade_with_strong_contrast
      confidence: high
    - id: quiet_paper_surface
      path: root
      effect: subtle_aged_paper_noise_without_visible_repeating_tile
      confidence: medium
  icons: []
  imagery_categories:
    icons: []
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - id: staggered_square_photo_set
        path: root/children/collage_area
        placement: foreground_media
        count: 5
        realism: photographic
        style: editorial_food_and_tabletop_story_photography
        framing: square_crops_mostly_macro_or_closeup
        lighting: high_contrast_direct_sun_or_warm_directional_indoor_light
        color_treatment: saturated_warm_palette_with_occasional_teal_or_lime_contrast
        composition: asymmetrically_distributed_on_large_blank_canvas
        edge_behavior: photo_content_reaches_image_edges; no_inner_matte_or_photo_border
        density: medium_to_high_per_photo
        simplicity: simple_single_subject_or_process_moments
        detail_level: high_texture_reflections_and_natural_shadow
        confidence: high
  media:
    - id: upper_right_photo_asset
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_right/children/media_unit_upper_right_image
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      aspect_ratio: square
      frame_behavior: no_card_no_border_no_radius
      photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
      crop: tight_closeup
      dominant_visual_energy: cool_teal_background_with_warm_pale_highlights
      confidence: high
    - id: upper_left_photo_asset
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_upper_left/children/media_unit_upper_left_image
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      aspect_ratio: square
      frame_behavior: no_card_no_border_no_radius
      photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
      crop: tight_closeup_subject_partly_cut_off
      dominant_visual_energy: warm_red_gold_glossy_texture
      confidence: high
    - id: center_photo_asset
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_center/children/media_unit_center_image
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      aspect_ratio: square
      frame_behavior: no_card_no_border_no_radius
      photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
      crop: close_process_detail
      dominant_visual_energy: hands_and_ingredients_on_dark_tabletop
      confidence: high
    - id: lower_left_photo_asset
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_lower_left/children/media_unit_lower_left_image
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      aspect_ratio: square
      frame_behavior: no_card_no_border_no_radius
      photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
      crop: macro_still_life
      dominant_visual_energy: golden_sunlit_fruit_texture
      confidence: high
    - id: lower_right_photo_asset
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/media_unit_lower_right/children/media_unit_lower_right_image
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      aspect_ratio: square
      frame_behavior: no_card_no_border_no_radius
      photo_content_reaches_asset_edges: true
      crop: diagonal_macro_still_life
      dominant_visual_energy: purple_subject_against_lime_yellow_backlight
      confidence: high
  creative_direction:
    - id: section_gallery_direction
      path: root
      description: minimal_editorial_social_story_gallery_on_paper_canvas_with_saturated_square_photography_and_tiny_account_style_captions
      visual_intent: create_a_loose_collected_feed_feeling_with_large_breathing_room
      palette_relationship: restrained_dark_green_text_on_warm_ivory_canvas_contrasted_by_vivid_photographic_color
      composition: header_centered_then_photos_staggered_diagonally_and_asymmetrically
      density: low_page_density_high_media_detail
      confidence: high
    - id: photography_direction
      path: root/children/collage_area
      description: close_cropped_tabletop_food_and_ingredient_moments_with_strong_sun_or_warm_light_high_saturation_and_natural_texture
      avoid: adding_borders_drop_shadows_device_frames_or_inner_cards_to_photo_assets
      confidence: high
  implementation_assumptions:
    - path: root
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: medium
      notes: section canvas and child positions are likely layout elements, but exact layout method is not recoverable
    - path: root/layers/paper_noise_texture
      assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      confidence: low
      notes: texture may also be from screenshot compression or a background image
    - path: root/children/header_stack/children/section_title
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: high
    - path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_image
      assumption: likely_raster_image
      confidence: high
    - path: root/children/collage_area/items/*/children/*_caption
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: medium
    - path: root/children/bottom_neighbor_border_sliver
      assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      confidence: medium
      notes: visible at crop edge and likely owned by next section
  components:
    - id: section_intro_stack_component
      path: root/children/header_stack
      type: title_stack
      anatomy:
        - micro_label
        - display_heading
      styling: transparent_on_paper_canvas_dark_green_text_centered
      confidence: high
    - id: media_caption_tile_component
      path: root/children/collage_area/items/*
      type: repeated_media_unit
      anatomy:
        - square_edge_to_edge_photo
        - small_centered_caption
      styling: no_card_chrome_transparent_host
      variants:
        - small_square_photo_about_333px
        - large_square_photo_about_455px
      confidence: high
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - id: warm_paper_canvas
        value: "#f6f2ec"
        usage: primary_page_or_section_background
      - id: deep_heritage_green
        value: "#24543a"
        usage: section_heading_microcopy_and_fine_lines_on_light_surface
    gradients:
      - none_for_section_background
    patterns:
      - subtle_paper_noise_texture_for_light_canvas
    background_systems:
      - warm_ivory_base_plus_low_opacity_paper_grain
    typography:
      - display_condensed_serif_uppercase_for_section_titles
      - tiny_condensed_monospace_or_narrow_sans_for_account_style_labels
    spacing:
      - very_large_negative_space_between_collage_items
      - small_caption_gap_about_16_to_19px
      - minimal_header_top_padding_at_section_start
    radius:
      - square_media_radius_0
    shadow:
      - no_shadow_for_gallery_images
    dividers:
      - dark_green_1px_border_belongs_to_neighbor_pattern_not_gallery_content
  likely_components:
    - centered_section_intro_with_micro_label_and_display_heading
    - square_photo_with_microcaption
    - staggered_editorial_media_collage
  likely_section_patterns:
    - open_canvas_asymmetric_gallery
    - social_feed_story_collage_with_no_cards
    - two_scale_square_media_layout_on_large_whitespace
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - id: light_paper_section_surface
      recipe: warm_off_white_full_width_fill_with_subtle_grain; dark_green_text; no_outer_container
    - id: media_on_light_canvas
      recipe: hard_square_edge_to_edge_raster_photo_directly_on_canvas; centered_microcaption_below; no_frame_or_shadow
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - header_is_centered_and_compact_then_gallery_begins_after_moderate_gap
    - collage_uses_manual_offsets_rather_than_equal_grid_spacing
    - large_images_anchor_upper_right_and_lower_corners; smaller_images_fill_upper_left_and_center
    - captions_maintain_consistent_short_gap_below_each_photo_despite_variable_outer_spacing
  link_action_mechanics:
    - no_explicit_button_or_link_affordance_inside_target_section
    - repeated_microcaptions_may_be_links_but_have_no_visible_underlines_hover_states_or_icon_affordances
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - tiny_green_account_style_captions_under_every_photo
    - unframed_square_editorial_photos_on_plain_paper_canvas
    - asymmetrical_staggering_with_large_areas_of_empty_ivory_space
    - high_saturation_food_or_tabletop_photography_contrasting_with_restrained_typography
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons: []
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - editorial_closeup_tabletop_food_and_ingredient_photography
      - square_macro_crops_with_subjects_touching_edges
      - warm_sunlit_or_directional_indoor_lighting_with_deep_shadows
      - saturated_color_accents_against_neutral_page_canvas
  do_not_generalize:
    - do_not_treat_individual_photo_subjects_as_required_content_for_other_sites
    - do_not_add_card_borders_padding_rounding_or_drop_shadows_to_media_tiles
    - do_not_promote_the_bottom_edge_line_to_a_gallery_component; it_is_likely_from_the_next_section
    - do_not_infer_interactive_social_embed_controls_from_the_account_style_captions
    - do_not_infer_a_strict_regular_grid; visual_layout_is_intentionally_manual_and_staggered
  uncertainties:
    - exact_font_family_for_display_heading_is_not_recoverable
    - exact_font_family_for_microcaptions_is_unclear_between_condensed_monospace_and_narrow_sans
    - background_texture_may_be_designed_noise_or_screenshot_artifact
    - exact_original_pixel_positions_differ_from_rendered_crop_scale
    - captions_could_be_links_but_no_click_affordance_is_visible
05 journal section
05-journal-section.pngruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/crops/05-journal-section.png
Section grounding outputs
05-journal-section.mdruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/05-journal-section.md
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 5
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Journal section"
  previous_section_label: "Roma Stories image collage"
  next_section_label: "Full-width food image feature"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 3950
    original_y_end: 4750
    crop_y_start: 3950
    crop_y_end: 4750
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: editorial_card_carousel_section
  role: editorial_index_section_with_three_feature_cards
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: editorial_index_section_with_three_feature_cards
  visibility: visible
  size:
    width_px: 1365
    height_px: 800
    content_outer_width_px: 1265
    content_inset_left_px: 50
    content_inset_right_px: 50
  layout:
    type: vertical_stack_with_absolute_edge_controls
    alignment: stretch
    primary_flow: framed_content_panel_above_loose_carousel_controls
    root_canvas_extent: full_width
    overflow_behavior: crop_clips_top_and_bottom_edges
  position:
    coordinate_origin: crop_top_left
    x_px: 0
    y_px: 0
  style:
    background_color: warm_ivory_off_white
    background_confidence: high
    background_texture: very_subtle_paper_grain_or_speckle
    color_theme: dark_green_on_warm_light
  edge_behavior:
    top: same_light_canvas_continues_into_crop; framed_panel_vertical_edges_begin_at_crop_top; top_border_is_clipped_or_not_visible
    bottom: light_canvas_continues_behind_controls_until_near_bottom; very_thin_next_media_color_reset_visible_at_extreme_bottom_edge
  layers:
    - id: root_base_fill
      role: full_width_section_canvas
      layer_type: solid_fill
      color: warm_ivory_off_white
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
    - id: root_paper_texture
      role: low_contrast_surface_texture
      layer_type: subtle_noise_pattern
      opacity: very_low
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
  children:
    - id: framed_content_panel
      kind: panel
      role: bordered_editorial_carousel_frame
      visibility: visible
      size:
        x_px: 50
        y_px: 0
        width_px: 1265
        height_px: 687
      layout:
        type: vertical_stack
        rows:
          - header_bar
          - card_grid
      position:
        x_px: 50
        y_px: 0
      style:
        background_color: same_as_root_warm_ivory
        border: 1px_solid_muted_green
        border_top: unclear_or_clipped_at_crop_top
        border_radius_px: 0
        box_shadow: none
      layers:
        - id: panel_outline
          role: enclosing_hairline_border
          layer_type: border
          color: muted_green_hairline
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: grid_divider_system
          role: internal_hairline_dividers
          layer_type: horizontal_and_vertical_borders
          color: muted_green_hairline
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      children:
        - id: section_header_bar
          kind: header
          role: panel_header_with_title_and_action
          visibility: visible
          size:
            x_px: 50
            y_px: 0
            width_px: 1265
            height_px: 104
          layout:
            type: horizontal_distribution
            vertical_alignment: start
            title_position: left
            action_group_position: top_right
            padding_left_px: 32
            padding_right_px: 31
            padding_top_px: 28
          position:
            x_px: 50
            y_px: 0
          style:
            background_color: transparent_over_panel_fill
            border_bottom: 1px_solid_muted_green
          children:
            - id: section_display_heading
              kind: text
              role: single_word_section_heading
              visibility: visible
              size:
                width_px: 120
                height_px: 44
              position:
                x_px: 83
                y_px: 29
              text:
                literal_included: false
                content_role: section_label
                line_count: 1
              style:
                typography_role: large_condensed_display_heading
                font_category: serif_display
                font_style_description: tall_narrow_high_contrast_serif
                size_px: 38
                line_height_px: 42
                weight: regular
                letter_spacing: slightly_tight
                transform: uppercase
                color: dark_forest_green
                alignment: left
            - id: header_action_group
              kind: control_group
              role: compact_primary_action_with_adjacent_icon_button
              visibility: visible
              size:
                x_px: 1172
                y_px: 30
                width_px: 111
                height_px: 32
              layout:
                type: horizontal_pair
                gap_px: 2
                alignment: center
              position:
                x_px: 1172
                y_px: 30
              style:
                background_color: transparent
              children:
                - id: header_text_action
                  kind: button
                  role: compact_primary_text_button
                  visibility: visible
                  size:
                    width_px: 78
                    height_px: 32
                  style:
                    background_color: dark_forest_green
                    text_color: warm_ivory_off_white
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 2
                    box_shadow: none
                  text:
                    literal_included: false
                    content_role: short_action_label
                    line_count: 1
                    typography_role: micro_button_label
                    font_category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 11
                    line_height_px: 14
                    weight: medium
                    letter_spacing: normal
                    transform: none
                    alignment: center
                - id: header_icon_action
                  kind: icon_button
                  role: adjacent_forward_arrow_button
                  visibility: visible
                  size:
                    width_px: 32
                    height_px: 32
                  style:
                    background_color: dark_forest_green
                    icon_color: warm_ivory_off_white
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 2
                    box_shadow: none
                  icon:
                    category: icons
                    icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                    glyph: right_arrow
                    stroke_weight: thin
                    corner_language: sharp_to_slightly_rounded
                    implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
        - id: article_grid
          kind: card_grid
          role: three_column_feature_card_grid
          visibility: visible
          size:
            x_px: 50
            y_px: 104
            width_px: 1265
            height_px: 583
          layout:
            type: grid
            columns: 3
            rows: 1
            column_width_px: 421
            row_height_px: 583
            vertical_dividers: true
            horizontal_divider_above: true
            item_padding_left_px: 26
            item_padding_right_px: 25
            item_padding_top_px: 27
            item_padding_bottom_px: 31
          position:
            x_px: 50
            y_px: 104
          style:
            background_color: same_as_root_warm_ivory
            divider_color: muted_green_hairline
            divider_width_px: 1
          items:
            - id: feature_card_1
              kind: link_card
              role: editorial_feature_card
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 50
                y_px: 104
              size:
                width_px: 421
                height_px: 583
              layout:
                type: vertical_card
                title_row_height_px: 29
                media_below_title: true
                internal_padding_x_px: 26
                internal_padding_top_px: 27
                media_top_gap_px: 18
              style:
                background_color: transparent_over_panel_fill
                border_right: 1px_solid_muted_green
                border_radius_px: 0
                box_shadow: none
              children:
                - id: card_title_1
                  kind: text
                  role: feature_card_title
                  text:
                    literal_included: false
                    content_role: article_title
                    line_count: 1
                  position:
                    x_px: 76
                    y_px: 133
                  size:
                    width_px: 250
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    typography_role: small_card_title
                    font_category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    line_height_px: 14
                    weight: medium
                    letter_spacing: normal
                    transform: none
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    alignment: left
                - id: card_corner_icon_1
                  kind: icon
                  role: external_link_or_diagonal_arrow_affordance
                  position:
                    x_px: 432
                    y_px: 128
                  size:
                    width_px: 14
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    stroke_width_px: 1.2
                  icon:
                    category: icons
                    icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                    glyph: north_east_arrow
                    stroke_weight: thin
                    corner_language: sharp
                    container: none
                    implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
                - id: card_media_1
                  kind: media_frame
                  role: feature_image
                  position:
                    x_px: 76
                    y_px: 160
                  size:
                    width_px: 371
                    height_px: 495
                  style:
                    background_color: image_content
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 0
                    overflow: hidden
                    box_shadow: none
                  media:
                    category: photography
                    placement: foreground_media
                    content_reaches_frame_edges: true
                    crop: portrait_rectangle
                    framing: close_flat_lay_or_top_down_detail
                    perspective: mostly_overhead
                    realism: photographic
                    lighting: high_contrast_directional_light_with_dark_background
                    color_treatment: warm_cream_and_ochre_against_near_black
                    composition: sparse_organic_shapes_floating_across_dark_field
                    detail_level: medium_high
                    implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: feature_card_2
              kind: link_card
              role: editorial_feature_card
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 471
                y_px: 104
              size:
                width_px: 422
                height_px: 583
              layout:
                type: vertical_card
                title_row_height_px: 29
                media_below_title: true
                internal_padding_x_px: 27
                internal_padding_top_px: 27
                media_top_gap_px: 18
              style:
                background_color: transparent_over_panel_fill
                border_right: 1px_solid_muted_green
                border_radius_px: 0
                box_shadow: none
              children:
                - id: card_title_2
                  kind: text
                  role: feature_card_title
                  text:
                    literal_included: false
                    content_role: article_title
                    line_count: 1
                  position:
                    x_px: 498
                    y_px: 133
                  size:
                    width_px: 270
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    typography_role: small_card_title
                    font_category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    line_height_px: 14
                    weight: medium
                    letter_spacing: normal
                    transform: none
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    alignment: left
                - id: card_corner_icon_2
                  kind: icon
                  role: external_link_or_diagonal_arrow_affordance
                  position:
                    x_px: 854
                    y_px: 128
                  size:
                    width_px: 14
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    stroke_width_px: 1.2
                  icon:
                    category: icons
                    icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                    glyph: north_east_arrow
                    stroke_weight: thin
                    corner_language: sharp
                    container: none
                    implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
                - id: card_media_2
                  kind: media_frame
                  role: feature_image
                  position:
                    x_px: 498
                    y_px: 160
                  size:
                    width_px: 371
                    height_px: 495
                  style:
                    background_color: image_content
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 0
                    overflow: hidden
                    box_shadow: none
                  media:
                    category: photography
                    placement: foreground_media
                    content_reaches_frame_edges: true
                    crop: portrait_rectangle
                    framing: sunlit_lifestyle_still_life_closeup
                    perspective: oblique_overhead
                    realism: photographic
                    lighting: bright_direct_sun_with_crisp_shadows
                    color_treatment: warm_yellow_green_ivory_and_peach_tones
                    composition: diagonal_textile_forms_with_small_props_and_grass_texture
                    detail_level: medium_high
                    implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: feature_card_3
              kind: link_card
              role: editorial_feature_card
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 893
                y_px: 104
              size:
                width_px: 422
                height_px: 583
              layout:
                type: vertical_card
                title_row_height_px: 29
                media_below_title: true
                internal_padding_x_px: 27
                internal_padding_top_px: 27
                media_top_gap_px: 18
              style:
                background_color: transparent_over_panel_fill
                border_right: none_at_panel_edge
                border_radius_px: 0
                box_shadow: none
              children:
                - id: card_title_3
                  kind: text
                  role: feature_card_title
                  text:
                    literal_included: false
                    content_role: article_title
                    line_count: 1
                  position:
                    x_px: 920
                    y_px: 133
                  size:
                    width_px: 120
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    typography_role: small_card_title
                    font_category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    line_height_px: 14
                    weight: medium
                    letter_spacing: normal
                    transform: none
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    alignment: left
                - id: card_corner_icon_3
                  kind: icon
                  role: external_link_or_diagonal_arrow_affordance
                  position:
                    x_px: 1276
                    y_px: 128
                  size:
                    width_px: 14
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    stroke_width_px: 1.2
                  icon:
                    category: icons
                    icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                    glyph: north_east_arrow
                    stroke_weight: thin
                    corner_language: sharp
                    container: none
                    implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
                - id: card_media_3
                  kind: media_frame
                  role: feature_image
                  position:
                    x_px: 920
                    y_px: 160
                  size:
                    width_px: 370
                    height_px: 495
                  style:
                    background_color: image_content
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 0
                    overflow: hidden
                    box_shadow: none
                  media:
                    category: photography
                    placement: foreground_media
                    content_reaches_frame_edges: true
                    crop: portrait_rectangle
                    framing: close_food_preparation_scene_with_hands
                    perspective: overhead_to_oblique
                    realism: photographic
                    lighting: warm_hard_directional_light_with_deep_shadows
                    color_treatment: saturated_red_blue_green_accents_on_brown_and_black
                    composition: hands_and_tool_enter_from_top_over_centered_round_object
                    detail_level: high
                    implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
    - id: lower_carousel_controls
      kind: navigation_controls
      role: previous_next_carousel_controls_below_panel
      visibility: visible
      size:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 687
        width_px: 1365
        height_px: 108
      layout:
        type: horizontally_opposed_icon_buttons
        left_control_x_px: 66
        right_control_x_px: 1268
        control_y_px: 725
      position:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 687
      style:
        background_color: transparent_over_root_canvas
      children:
        - id: carousel_previous_button
          kind: icon_button
          role: previous_item_control
          visibility: visible
          position:
            x_px: 66
            y_px: 725
          size:
            width_px: 32
            height_px: 32
          style:
            background_color: transparent
            border: 1px_solid_dark_green
            border_radius_px: 16
            icon_color: dark_forest_green
            box_shadow: none
          icon:
            category: icons
            icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
            glyph: left_arrow
            stroke_weight: thin
            corner_language: slightly_rounded
            container: circular_outline_button
            implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
        - id: carousel_next_button
          kind: icon_button
          role: next_item_control
          visibility: visible
          position:
            x_px: 1268
            y_px: 725
          size:
            width_px: 32
            height_px: 32
          style:
            background_color: transparent
            border: 1px_solid_dark_green
            border_radius_px: 16
            icon_color: dark_forest_green
            box_shadow: none
          icon:
            category: icons
            icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
            glyph: right_arrow
            stroke_weight: thin
            corner_language: slightly_rounded
            container: circular_outline_button
            implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: framed_content_panel
      role: bordered editorial carousel frame containing header and three feature cards
      host_surface: warm_ivory_section_canvas
      separation_mechanism: muted_green_hairline_outer_border_and_internal_grid_dividers
    - id: section_display_heading
      role: large section label
      host_surface: light_panel_header
      typography: tall_condensed_dark_green_display_serif
    - id: header_action_group
      role: compact call-to-action pair in top-right
      host_surface: light_panel_header
      child_surface: dark_green_filled_buttons
      separation_mechanism: fill_contrast
    - id: feature_card_pattern
      role: repeated article/feature link card
      count: 3
      host_surface: light_grid_cells
      child_elements: small_title_text, diagonal_arrow_affordance, large_photo_frame
      separation_mechanism: grid_dividers_and_photo_scale
    - id: lower_carousel_controls
      role: previous/next carousel controls below framed panel
      host_surface: root_light_canvas
      child_surface: transparent_circle_buttons_with_outline
      separation_mechanism: dark_green_hairline_circle_on_light_canvas
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - form_inputs
    - tabs
    - accordions
    - video_controls
    - modal_or_overlay
    - pricing_or_data_tables
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: warm_ivory_off_white
      value: "#F6F3ED"
      role: full_width_section_canvas_and_panel_fill
      path: root.style.background_color
      confidence: high
    - id: dark_forest_green
      value: "#174D34"
      role: primary_text_icons_and_button_fill
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      confidence: high
    - id: muted_green_hairline
      value: "#6F8076"
      role: panel_border_and_grid_dividers
      path: root/framed_content_panel.layers/panel_outline
      confidence: medium
    - id: warm_ivory_on_green
      value: "#F8F5EE"
      role: inverse_button_text_and_icon
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group
      confidence: high
    - id: near_black_photo_tone
      value: "#08100D"
      role: dark_tone_inside_first_photo_only
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[0]/card_media_1
      confidence: medium
    - id: warm_food_photo_gold
      value: "#C98F3D"
      role: recurring_warm_photo_highlight_tone
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid
      confidence: medium
  gradients: []
  patterns:
    - id: subtle_paper_grain
      role: low_contrast_texture_on_light_canvas
      path: root.layers/root_paper_texture
      appearance: faint_speckles_and_irregular_warm_paper_noise
      scale: fine
      opacity: very_low
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
  background_systems:
    - id: root_light_paper_canvas_system
      path: root
      layers:
        - warm_ivory_solid_fill
        - very_low_opacity_paper_grain
      extent: full_crop_width
      confidence: high
    - id: framed_panel_light_surface_system
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      layers:
        - same_warm_ivory_fill
        - muted_green_hairline_outer_border
        - muted_green_internal_grid_dividers
      extent: inset_1265px_wide_panel
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: large_condensed_display_heading
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/section_display_heading
      font_category: serif_display
      style_description: tall_condensed_high_contrast_serif_with_thin_hairlines
      size_px: 38
      line_height_px: 42
      weight: regular
      letter_spacing: slightly_tight
      transform: uppercase
      alignment: left
      color: dark_forest_green
      confidence: high
    - id: small_card_title
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_title
      font_category: sans_serif
      style_description: compact_clean_sans_for_micro_editorial_labels
      size_px: 12
      line_height_px: 14
      weight: medium
      letter_spacing: normal
      transform: none
      alignment: left
      color: dark_forest_green
      confidence: high
    - id: micro_button_label
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group/header_text_action
      font_category: sans_serif
      style_description: tiny_centered_action_label
      size_px: 11
      line_height_px: 14
      weight: medium
      letter_spacing: normal
      transform: none
      alignment: center
      color: warm_ivory_on_green
      confidence: medium
  font_characteristics:
    - id: display_serif_character
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/section_display_heading
      observations:
        - narrow_letterforms
        - strong_vertical_stem_contrast
        - elegant_editorial_masthead_feel
        - uppercase_wordmark_like_section_label
    - id: supporting_sans_character
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_title
      observations:
        - very_small_x_height
        - simple_modern_shapes
        - low_contrast_strokes
        - used_for_titles_and_controls
  spacing:
    - id: section_side_inset
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      value_px: 50
      role: inset_between_viewport_edge_and_framed_panel
    - id: panel_header_height
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar
      value_px: 104
      role: generous_header_band_before_grid
    - id: header_title_offset
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/section_display_heading
      value: approx_32px_left_and_29px_top_inside_panel
      role: title_positioning
    - id: card_cell_horizontal_padding
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]
      value_px: 26
      role: gutter_between_cell_border_and_photo
    - id: card_title_to_media_gap
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]
      value_px: 18
      role: vertical_gap_between_small_title_row_and_photo
    - id: media_bottom_gutter
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_media
      value_px: 31
      role: space_between_photo_bottom_and_panel_bottom
    - id: panel_to_controls_gap
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      value_px: 38
      role: vertical_gap_from_panel_bottom_to_circle_control_top
    - id: lower_controls_side_offsets
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      value: left_control_66px_from_viewport_left_right_control_65px_from_viewport_right
      role: controls_anchor_near_outer_edges
  radius:
    - id: square_panel_and_media_radius
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      value_px: 0
      applies_to:
        - panel
        - article_media_frames
        - grid_cells
    - id: small_filled_button_radius
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group
      value_px: 2
      applies_to:
        - top_right_action_buttons
    - id: circular_control_radius
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      value_px: 16
      applies_to:
        - previous_next_outline_buttons
  sizes:
    - id: crop_size
      path: root
      value: 1365x800px
    - id: framed_panel_size
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      value: 1265x687px
    - id: article_media_size
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_media
      value: approx_371x495px
    - id: article_cell_size
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]
      value: approx_421x583px
    - id: top_action_group_size
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group
      value: approx_111x32px
    - id: carousel_circle_button_size
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      value: 32x32px
  opacity:
    - id: paper_texture_opacity
      path: root.layers/root_paper_texture
      value: very_low
      estimated_percent: 2
  borders:
    - id: panel_outer_border
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      style: 1px_solid_muted_green
      radius_px: 0
      confidence: high
    - id: header_bottom_divider
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar
      style: 1px_solid_muted_green
      confidence: high
    - id: grid_vertical_dividers
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid
      style: 1px_solid_muted_green_between_columns
      confidence: high
    - id: carousel_control_outline
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      style: 1px_solid_dark_green_circle
      confidence: high
  shadows:
    - id: no_elevation_shadow
      path: root
      value: none_observed_on_panel_buttons_cards_or_media
  effects:
    - id: crisp_hairline_grid_effect
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      description: thin_muted_green_lines_create_architectural_editorial_grid
