      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
    - id: photo_contrast_effect
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_media
      description: strong_sunlit_photography_contrasts_with_flat_quiet_page_surface
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
  icons:
    - id: top_right_forward_arrow_icon
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group/header_icon_action
      category: icons
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      color: warm_ivory_on_green
      stroke_or_fill: thin_stroke
      container_relationship: inside_dark_green_square_button
      size_px: 14
    - id: card_diagonal_arrow_icons
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_corner_icon
      category: icons
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      color: dark_forest_green
      stroke_or_fill: thin_stroke
      container_relationship: uncontained_at_top_right_of_each_card_cell
      count: 3
      size_px: 14
    - id: carousel_outline_arrow_icons
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      category: icons
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      color: dark_forest_green
      stroke_or_fill: thin_stroke
      container_relationship: centered_inside_transparent_circular_outline_button
      count: 2
      size_px: 15
  imagery_categories:
    icons:
      - id: navigation_and_link_arrow_icon_set
        placement: foreground_graphic
        icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
        style: thin_line_arrows_dark_green_or_ivory
        density: sparse
        simplicity: very_simple
        paths:
          - root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group/header_icon_action
          - root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_corner_icon
          - root/lower_carousel_controls
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - id: three_editorial_feature_photos
        placement: foreground_media
        count: 3
        style: warm_editorial_lifestyle_food_or_still_life_photography
        crop: portrait_rectangles
        framing: closeup_flat_lay_or_overhead_detail
        realism: photographic
        lighting: direct_sunlight_or_high_contrast_shadow
        color_treatment: warm_natural_tones_with_deep_greens_and_blacks
        edge_behavior: photo_content_reaches_frame_edges
        paths:
          - root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[0]/card_media_1
          - root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[1]/card_media_2
          - root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[2]/card_media_3
  media:
    - id: media_slot_1
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[0]/card_media_1
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: rectangular_portrait
      dimensions_px: 371x495
      subject_context: organic_food_or_still_life_detail
      content_reaches_frame_edges: true
      creative_notes: dark_background_flat_lay_with_pale_organic_forms_and_warm_orange_accent
    - id: media_slot_2
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[1]/card_media_2
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: rectangular_portrait
      dimensions_px: 371x495
      subject_context: sunny_lifestyle_still_life_with_textile_and_small_props
      content_reaches_frame_edges: true
      creative_notes: bright_outdoor_sunlight_diagonal_soft_fabric_grass_texture_and_warm_citrus_color
    - id: media_slot_3
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[2]/card_media_3
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: rectangular_portrait
      dimensions_px: 370x495
      subject_context: hands_preparing_or_cutting_decorated_food
      content_reaches_frame_edges: true
      creative_notes: warm_high_contrast_overhead_scene_with_hands_tool_round_center_subject_and_saturated_garnish_colors
  creative_direction:
    - id: overall_section_direction
      path: root
      description: restrained_editorial_grid_on_warm_paper_canvas_with_large_serif_label_small_utilitarian_sans_text_hairline_green_borders_and_saturated_sunlit_photography
    - id: photography_direction
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_media
      description: close_cropped_analog_feeling_food_lifestyle_photos_using_natural_light_hard_shadows_warm_palette_and_tactile_materials
    - id: control_direction
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group
      description: minimal_dark_green_micro_controls_with_thin_arrow_icons_and_tiny_sans_label
  implementation_assumptions:
    - id: root_canvas_fill
      path: root
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: high
    - id: subtle_canvas_texture
      path: root.layers/root_paper_texture
      assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      confidence: medium
    - id: bordered_panel_and_grid
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: high
    - id: feature_cards_as_links
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: medium
    - id: editorial_images
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_media
      assumption: likely_raster_image
      confidence: high
    - id: arrow_icons
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group/header_icon_action
      assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
      confidence: high
  components:
    - id: editorial_carousel_panel_component
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      component_type: framed_section_panel
      anatomy: header_bar, action_group, three_column_card_grid
      visual_state: default
    - id: feature_card_component
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]
      component_type: image_link_card
      anatomy: title, corner_arrow_icon, photo_media_frame
      count: 3
      visual_state: default
    - id: compact_action_button_group
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group
      component_type: primary_button_plus_icon_button
      visual_state: default
    - id: circular_carousel_control
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      component_type: outline_icon_button
      count: 2
      visual_state: default
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - warm_ivory_canvas: root full-width background and panel fill
      - forest_green_primary: heading, small text, icons, filled button backgrounds
      - muted_green_hairline: borders and dividers
      - ivory_on_inverse: text and icon color on dark green buttons
    gradients: []
    patterns:
      - subtle_paper_grain_on_light_surfaces
    background_systems:
      - warm_paper_canvas_with_low_opacity_noise
      - inset_light_panel_with_hairline_green_grid
    typography:
      - condensed_display_serif_uppercase_section_heading
      - compact_sans_micro_card_title
      - tiny_sans_button_label
    spacing:
      - viewport_to_panel_inset_50px
      - tall_panel_header_band_104px
      - three_column_card_gutter_26px
      - title_to_media_gap_18px
      - panel_to_remote_controls_gap_about_38px
    radius:
      - square_panel_and_media_corners
      - tiny_radius_filled_header_buttons
      - circular_32px_outline_icon_button
    shadow:
      - no_shadow_flat_editorial_surface
    dividers:
      - one_pixel_muted_green_hairline_grid
  likely_components:
    - framed_editorial_index_carousel
    - editorial_feature_image_card
    - compact_primary_action_with_arrow_square
    - circular_outline_carousel_arrow_button
    - hairline_three_column_grid
  likely_section_patterns:
    - inset_framed_panel_on_full_width_paper_canvas
    - oversized_section_label_in_header_bar_with_action_group_opposite
    - three_equal_columns_each_with_micro_title_corner_arrow_and_large_portrait_photo
    - carousel_controls_positioned_outside_panel_near_lower_viewport_edges
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - light_surface_hairline_grid: warm_ivory_fill plus muted_green_1px_borders with no shadow or radius
    - primary_button_on_light_surface: dark_forest_green_fill, ivory_label, minimal_radius, no_shadow
    - transparent_icon_control_on_light_surface: circular_dark_green_outline, transparent_fill, dark_green_thin_arrow
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - strong_outer_panel_inset_creates_margin_from_viewport_edges
    - header_is_much_taller_than_text_to_create_air_above_grid
    - card_titles_are_small_and_close_to_top_while_images_dominate_each_cell
    - large_media_frames_align_baselines_and_share_identical_sizes_for_rigid_editorial_order
    - lower_controls_are_detached_from_panel_and_use_extreme_left_right_alignment
  link_action_mechanics:
    - feature_cards_signal_clickability_with_uncontained_north_east_arrow_in_each_cell
    - top_right_action_uses_text_button_followed_by_separate_square_arrow_button
    - carousel_navigation_uses outline circular buttons rather than pagination dots
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - dark_green_hairline_architectural_grid
    - warm_paper_background_with_subtle_texture
    - high_contrast_sunlit_food_lifestyle_photography
    - tall_condensed_serif_section_label
    - very_small_microcopy_against_generous_empty_space
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons:
      - minimal_single_color_thin_stroke_arrows_dark_green_or_ivory
      - uncontained_diagonal_link_arrows_for_card_affordance
      - circular_outline_arrow_buttons_for_carousel_navigation
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - close_cropped_editorial_still_life_photography_with_warm_natural_light
      - portrait_ratio_images_that_fill_their_frames_without_internal_padding
      - tactile_food_lifestyle_scenes_with_hard_sun_shadows_and_deep_shadow_contrast
  do_not_generalize:
    - do_not_treat_photo_subjects_or_article_titles_as_required_content
    - do_not_promote_nested_panel_grid_fill_as_a_distinct_root_background; root_canvas_is_the_full_width_warm_ivory_surface
    - do_not_add_shadows_or_rounded_media_corners_not_visible_here
    - do_not_treat_tiny_bottom_next_section_strip_as_part_of_this_section_content
    - do_not_transcribe_visible_article_titles_or_button_copy_as reusable content
  uncertainties:
    - exact_top_border_of_framed_panel_is_clipped_or_too_close_to_crop_top_to_confirm
    - exact_font_family_names_are_not_recoverable_from_screenshot
    - exact_texture_source_is_unclear; could be image_noise_or_rendering_artifact
    - action_group_may_be_one_combined_control_or_two_adjacent_buttons; visually_reads_as_two_connected_controls
    - carousel_controls_functionality_is_inferred_from_arrow_positions_and styling but not verifiable from screenshot
05-journal-section.yamlruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/05-journal-section.yaml
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 5
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Journal section"
  previous_section_label: "Roma Stories image collage"
  next_section_label: "Full-width food image feature"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 3950
    original_y_end: 4750
    crop_y_start: 3950
    crop_y_end: 4750
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: editorial_card_carousel_section
  role: editorial_index_section_with_three_feature_cards
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: editorial_index_section_with_three_feature_cards
  visibility: visible
  size:
    width_px: 1365
    height_px: 800
    content_outer_width_px: 1265
    content_inset_left_px: 50
    content_inset_right_px: 50
  layout:
    type: vertical_stack_with_absolute_edge_controls
    alignment: stretch
    primary_flow: framed_content_panel_above_loose_carousel_controls
    root_canvas_extent: full_width
    overflow_behavior: crop_clips_top_and_bottom_edges
  position:
    coordinate_origin: crop_top_left
    x_px: 0
    y_px: 0
  style:
    background_color: warm_ivory_off_white
    background_confidence: high
    background_texture: very_subtle_paper_grain_or_speckle
    color_theme: dark_green_on_warm_light
  edge_behavior:
    top: same_light_canvas_continues_into_crop; framed_panel_vertical_edges_begin_at_crop_top; top_border_is_clipped_or_not_visible
    bottom: light_canvas_continues_behind_controls_until_near_bottom; very_thin_next_media_color_reset_visible_at_extreme_bottom_edge
  layers:
    - id: root_base_fill
      role: full_width_section_canvas
      layer_type: solid_fill
      color: warm_ivory_off_white
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
    - id: root_paper_texture
      role: low_contrast_surface_texture
      layer_type: subtle_noise_pattern
      opacity: very_low
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
  children:
    - id: framed_content_panel
      kind: panel
      role: bordered_editorial_carousel_frame
      visibility: visible
      size:
        x_px: 50
        y_px: 0
        width_px: 1265
        height_px: 687
      layout:
        type: vertical_stack
        rows:
          - header_bar
          - card_grid
      position:
        x_px: 50
        y_px: 0
      style:
        background_color: same_as_root_warm_ivory
        border: 1px_solid_muted_green
        border_top: unclear_or_clipped_at_crop_top
        border_radius_px: 0
        box_shadow: none
      layers:
        - id: panel_outline
          role: enclosing_hairline_border
          layer_type: border
          color: muted_green_hairline
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
        - id: grid_divider_system
          role: internal_hairline_dividers
          layer_type: horizontal_and_vertical_borders
          color: muted_green_hairline
          implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      children:
        - id: section_header_bar
          kind: header
          role: panel_header_with_title_and_action
          visibility: visible
          size:
            x_px: 50
            y_px: 0
            width_px: 1265
            height_px: 104
          layout:
            type: horizontal_distribution
            vertical_alignment: start
            title_position: left
            action_group_position: top_right
            padding_left_px: 32
            padding_right_px: 31
            padding_top_px: 28
          position:
            x_px: 50
            y_px: 0
          style:
            background_color: transparent_over_panel_fill
            border_bottom: 1px_solid_muted_green
          children:
            - id: section_display_heading
              kind: text
              role: single_word_section_heading
              visibility: visible
              size:
                width_px: 120
                height_px: 44
              position:
                x_px: 83
                y_px: 29
              text:
                literal_included: false
                content_role: section_label
                line_count: 1
              style:
                typography_role: large_condensed_display_heading
                font_category: serif_display
                font_style_description: tall_narrow_high_contrast_serif
                size_px: 38
                line_height_px: 42
                weight: regular
                letter_spacing: slightly_tight
                transform: uppercase
                color: dark_forest_green
                alignment: left
            - id: header_action_group
              kind: control_group
              role: compact_primary_action_with_adjacent_icon_button
              visibility: visible
              size:
                x_px: 1172
                y_px: 30
                width_px: 111
                height_px: 32
              layout:
                type: horizontal_pair
                gap_px: 2
                alignment: center
              position:
                x_px: 1172
                y_px: 30
              style:
                background_color: transparent
              children:
                - id: header_text_action
                  kind: button
                  role: compact_primary_text_button
                  visibility: visible
                  size:
                    width_px: 78
                    height_px: 32
                  style:
                    background_color: dark_forest_green
                    text_color: warm_ivory_off_white
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 2
                    box_shadow: none
                  text:
                    literal_included: false
                    content_role: short_action_label
                    line_count: 1
                    typography_role: micro_button_label
                    font_category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 11
                    line_height_px: 14
                    weight: medium
                    letter_spacing: normal
                    transform: none
                    alignment: center
                - id: header_icon_action
                  kind: icon_button
                  role: adjacent_forward_arrow_button
                  visibility: visible
                  size:
                    width_px: 32
                    height_px: 32
                  style:
                    background_color: dark_forest_green
                    icon_color: warm_ivory_off_white
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 2
                    box_shadow: none
                  icon:
                    category: icons
                    icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                    glyph: right_arrow
                    stroke_weight: thin
                    corner_language: sharp_to_slightly_rounded
                    implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
        - id: article_grid
          kind: card_grid
          role: three_column_feature_card_grid
          visibility: visible
          size:
            x_px: 50
            y_px: 104
            width_px: 1265
            height_px: 583
          layout:
            type: grid
            columns: 3
            rows: 1
            column_width_px: 421
            row_height_px: 583
            vertical_dividers: true
            horizontal_divider_above: true
            item_padding_left_px: 26
            item_padding_right_px: 25
            item_padding_top_px: 27
            item_padding_bottom_px: 31
          position:
            x_px: 50
            y_px: 104
          style:
            background_color: same_as_root_warm_ivory
            divider_color: muted_green_hairline
            divider_width_px: 1
          items:
            - id: feature_card_1
              kind: link_card
              role: editorial_feature_card
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 50
                y_px: 104
              size:
                width_px: 421
                height_px: 583
              layout:
                type: vertical_card
                title_row_height_px: 29
                media_below_title: true
                internal_padding_x_px: 26
                internal_padding_top_px: 27
                media_top_gap_px: 18
              style:
                background_color: transparent_over_panel_fill
                border_right: 1px_solid_muted_green
                border_radius_px: 0
                box_shadow: none
              children:
                - id: card_title_1
                  kind: text
                  role: feature_card_title
                  text:
                    literal_included: false
                    content_role: article_title
                    line_count: 1
                  position:
                    x_px: 76
                    y_px: 133
                  size:
                    width_px: 250
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    typography_role: small_card_title
                    font_category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    line_height_px: 14
                    weight: medium
                    letter_spacing: normal
                    transform: none
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    alignment: left
                - id: card_corner_icon_1
                  kind: icon
                  role: external_link_or_diagonal_arrow_affordance
                  position:
                    x_px: 432
                    y_px: 128
                  size:
                    width_px: 14
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    stroke_width_px: 1.2
                  icon:
                    category: icons
                    icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                    glyph: north_east_arrow
                    stroke_weight: thin
                    corner_language: sharp
                    container: none
                    implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
                - id: card_media_1
                  kind: media_frame
                  role: feature_image
                  position:
                    x_px: 76
                    y_px: 160
                  size:
                    width_px: 371
                    height_px: 495
                  style:
                    background_color: image_content
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 0
                    overflow: hidden
                    box_shadow: none
                  media:
                    category: photography
                    placement: foreground_media
                    content_reaches_frame_edges: true
                    crop: portrait_rectangle
                    framing: close_flat_lay_or_top_down_detail
                    perspective: mostly_overhead
                    realism: photographic
                    lighting: high_contrast_directional_light_with_dark_background
                    color_treatment: warm_cream_and_ochre_against_near_black
                    composition: sparse_organic_shapes_floating_across_dark_field
                    detail_level: medium_high
                    implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: feature_card_2
              kind: link_card
              role: editorial_feature_card
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 471
                y_px: 104
              size:
                width_px: 422
                height_px: 583
              layout:
                type: vertical_card
                title_row_height_px: 29
                media_below_title: true
                internal_padding_x_px: 27
                internal_padding_top_px: 27
                media_top_gap_px: 18
              style:
                background_color: transparent_over_panel_fill
                border_right: 1px_solid_muted_green
                border_radius_px: 0
                box_shadow: none
              children:
                - id: card_title_2
                  kind: text
                  role: feature_card_title
                  text:
                    literal_included: false
                    content_role: article_title
                    line_count: 1
                  position:
                    x_px: 498
                    y_px: 133
                  size:
                    width_px: 270
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    typography_role: small_card_title
                    font_category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    line_height_px: 14
                    weight: medium
                    letter_spacing: normal
                    transform: none
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    alignment: left
                - id: card_corner_icon_2
                  kind: icon
                  role: external_link_or_diagonal_arrow_affordance
                  position:
                    x_px: 854
                    y_px: 128
                  size:
                    width_px: 14
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    stroke_width_px: 1.2
                  icon:
                    category: icons
                    icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                    glyph: north_east_arrow
                    stroke_weight: thin
                    corner_language: sharp
                    container: none
                    implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
                - id: card_media_2
                  kind: media_frame
                  role: feature_image
                  position:
                    x_px: 498
                    y_px: 160
                  size:
                    width_px: 371
                    height_px: 495
                  style:
                    background_color: image_content
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 0
                    overflow: hidden
                    box_shadow: none
                  media:
                    category: photography
                    placement: foreground_media
                    content_reaches_frame_edges: true
                    crop: portrait_rectangle
                    framing: sunlit_lifestyle_still_life_closeup
                    perspective: oblique_overhead
                    realism: photographic
                    lighting: bright_direct_sun_with_crisp_shadows
                    color_treatment: warm_yellow_green_ivory_and_peach_tones
                    composition: diagonal_textile_forms_with_small_props_and_grass_texture
                    detail_level: medium_high
                    implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
            - id: feature_card_3
              kind: link_card
              role: editorial_feature_card
              visibility: visible
              position:
                x_px: 893
                y_px: 104
              size:
                width_px: 422
                height_px: 583
              layout:
                type: vertical_card
                title_row_height_px: 29
                media_below_title: true
                internal_padding_x_px: 27
                internal_padding_top_px: 27
                media_top_gap_px: 18
              style:
                background_color: transparent_over_panel_fill
                border_right: none_at_panel_edge
                border_radius_px: 0
                box_shadow: none
              children:
                - id: card_title_3
                  kind: text
                  role: feature_card_title
                  text:
                    literal_included: false
                    content_role: article_title
                    line_count: 1
                  position:
                    x_px: 920
                    y_px: 133
                  size:
                    width_px: 120
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    typography_role: small_card_title
                    font_category: sans_serif
                    size_px: 12
                    line_height_px: 14
                    weight: medium
                    letter_spacing: normal
                    transform: none
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    alignment: left
                - id: card_corner_icon_3
                  kind: icon
                  role: external_link_or_diagonal_arrow_affordance
                  position:
                    x_px: 1276
                    y_px: 128
                  size:
                    width_px: 14
                    height_px: 14
                  style:
                    color: dark_forest_green
                    stroke_width_px: 1.2
                  icon:
                    category: icons
                    icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
                    glyph: north_east_arrow
                    stroke_weight: thin
                    corner_language: sharp
                    container: none
                    implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
                - id: card_media_3
                  kind: media_frame
                  role: feature_image
                  position:
                    x_px: 920
                    y_px: 160
                  size:
                    width_px: 370
                    height_px: 495
                  style:
                    background_color: image_content
                    border: none_visible
                    border_radius_px: 0
                    overflow: hidden
                    box_shadow: none
                  media:
                    category: photography
                    placement: foreground_media
                    content_reaches_frame_edges: true
                    crop: portrait_rectangle
                    framing: close_food_preparation_scene_with_hands
                    perspective: overhead_to_oblique
                    realism: photographic
                    lighting: warm_hard_directional_light_with_deep_shadows
                    color_treatment: saturated_red_blue_green_accents_on_brown_and_black
                    composition: hands_and_tool_enter_from_top_over_centered_round_object
                    detail_level: high
                    implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
    - id: lower_carousel_controls
      kind: navigation_controls
      role: previous_next_carousel_controls_below_panel
      visibility: visible
      size:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 687
        width_px: 1365
        height_px: 108
      layout:
        type: horizontally_opposed_icon_buttons
        left_control_x_px: 66
        right_control_x_px: 1268
        control_y_px: 725
      position:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 687
      style:
        background_color: transparent_over_root_canvas
      children:
        - id: carousel_previous_button
          kind: icon_button
          role: previous_item_control
          visibility: visible
          position:
            x_px: 66
            y_px: 725
          size:
            width_px: 32
            height_px: 32
          style:
            background_color: transparent
            border: 1px_solid_dark_green
            border_radius_px: 16
            icon_color: dark_forest_green
            box_shadow: none
          icon:
            category: icons
            icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
            glyph: left_arrow
            stroke_weight: thin
            corner_language: slightly_rounded
            container: circular_outline_button
            implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
        - id: carousel_next_button
          kind: icon_button
          role: next_item_control
          visibility: visible
          position:
            x_px: 1268
            y_px: 725
          size:
            width_px: 32
            height_px: 32
          style:
            background_color: transparent
            border: 1px_solid_dark_green
            border_radius_px: 16
            icon_color: dark_forest_green
            box_shadow: none
          icon:
            category: icons
            icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
            glyph: right_arrow
            stroke_weight: thin
            corner_language: slightly_rounded
            container: circular_outline_button
            implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: framed_content_panel
      role: bordered editorial carousel frame containing header and three feature cards
      host_surface: warm_ivory_section_canvas
      separation_mechanism: muted_green_hairline_outer_border_and_internal_grid_dividers
    - id: section_display_heading
      role: large section label
      host_surface: light_panel_header
      typography: tall_condensed_dark_green_display_serif
    - id: header_action_group
      role: compact call-to-action pair in top-right
      host_surface: light_panel_header
      child_surface: dark_green_filled_buttons
      separation_mechanism: fill_contrast
    - id: feature_card_pattern
      role: repeated article/feature link card
      count: 3
      host_surface: light_grid_cells
      child_elements: small_title_text, diagonal_arrow_affordance, large_photo_frame
      separation_mechanism: grid_dividers_and_photo_scale
    - id: lower_carousel_controls
      role: previous/next carousel controls below framed panel
      host_surface: root_light_canvas
      child_surface: transparent_circle_buttons_with_outline
      separation_mechanism: dark_green_hairline_circle_on_light_canvas
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - form_inputs
    - tabs
    - accordions
    - video_controls
    - modal_or_overlay
    - pricing_or_data_tables
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: warm_ivory_off_white
      value: "#F6F3ED"
      role: full_width_section_canvas_and_panel_fill
      path: root.style.background_color
      confidence: high
    - id: dark_forest_green
      value: "#174D34"
      role: primary_text_icons_and_button_fill
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      confidence: high
    - id: muted_green_hairline
      value: "#6F8076"
      role: panel_border_and_grid_dividers
      path: root/framed_content_panel.layers/panel_outline
      confidence: medium
    - id: warm_ivory_on_green
      value: "#F8F5EE"
      role: inverse_button_text_and_icon
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group
      confidence: high
    - id: near_black_photo_tone
      value: "#08100D"
      role: dark_tone_inside_first_photo_only
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[0]/card_media_1
      confidence: medium
    - id: warm_food_photo_gold
      value: "#C98F3D"
      role: recurring_warm_photo_highlight_tone
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid
      confidence: medium
  gradients: []
  patterns:
    - id: subtle_paper_grain
      role: low_contrast_texture_on_light_canvas
      path: root.layers/root_paper_texture
      appearance: faint_speckles_and_irregular_warm_paper_noise
      scale: fine
      opacity: very_low
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
  background_systems:
    - id: root_light_paper_canvas_system
      path: root
      layers:
        - warm_ivory_solid_fill
        - very_low_opacity_paper_grain
      extent: full_crop_width
      confidence: high
    - id: framed_panel_light_surface_system
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      layers:
        - same_warm_ivory_fill
        - muted_green_hairline_outer_border
        - muted_green_internal_grid_dividers
      extent: inset_1265px_wide_panel
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: large_condensed_display_heading
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/section_display_heading
      font_category: serif_display
      style_description: tall_condensed_high_contrast_serif_with_thin_hairlines
      size_px: 38
      line_height_px: 42
      weight: regular
      letter_spacing: slightly_tight
      transform: uppercase
      alignment: left
      color: dark_forest_green
      confidence: high
    - id: small_card_title
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_title
      font_category: sans_serif
      style_description: compact_clean_sans_for_micro_editorial_labels
      size_px: 12
      line_height_px: 14
      weight: medium
      letter_spacing: normal
      transform: none
      alignment: left
      color: dark_forest_green
      confidence: high
    - id: micro_button_label
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group/header_text_action
      font_category: sans_serif
      style_description: tiny_centered_action_label
      size_px: 11
      line_height_px: 14
      weight: medium
      letter_spacing: normal
      transform: none
      alignment: center
      color: warm_ivory_on_green
      confidence: medium
  font_characteristics:
    - id: display_serif_character
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/section_display_heading
      observations:
        - narrow_letterforms
        - strong_vertical_stem_contrast
        - elegant_editorial_masthead_feel
        - uppercase_wordmark_like_section_label
    - id: supporting_sans_character
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_title
      observations:
        - very_small_x_height
        - simple_modern_shapes
        - low_contrast_strokes
        - used_for_titles_and_controls
  spacing:
    - id: section_side_inset
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      value_px: 50
      role: inset_between_viewport_edge_and_framed_panel
    - id: panel_header_height
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar
      value_px: 104
      role: generous_header_band_before_grid
    - id: header_title_offset
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/section_display_heading
      value: approx_32px_left_and_29px_top_inside_panel
      role: title_positioning
    - id: card_cell_horizontal_padding
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]
      value_px: 26
      role: gutter_between_cell_border_and_photo
    - id: card_title_to_media_gap
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]
      value_px: 18
      role: vertical_gap_between_small_title_row_and_photo
    - id: media_bottom_gutter
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_media
      value_px: 31
      role: space_between_photo_bottom_and_panel_bottom
    - id: panel_to_controls_gap
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      value_px: 38
      role: vertical_gap_from_panel_bottom_to_circle_control_top
    - id: lower_controls_side_offsets
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      value: left_control_66px_from_viewport_left_right_control_65px_from_viewport_right
      role: controls_anchor_near_outer_edges
  radius:
    - id: square_panel_and_media_radius
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      value_px: 0
      applies_to:
        - panel
        - article_media_frames
        - grid_cells
    - id: small_filled_button_radius
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group
      value_px: 2
      applies_to:
        - top_right_action_buttons
    - id: circular_control_radius
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      value_px: 16
      applies_to:
        - previous_next_outline_buttons
  sizes:
    - id: crop_size
      path: root
      value: 1365x800px
    - id: framed_panel_size
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      value: 1265x687px
    - id: article_media_size
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_media
      value: approx_371x495px
    - id: article_cell_size
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]
      value: approx_421x583px
    - id: top_action_group_size
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group
      value: approx_111x32px
    - id: carousel_circle_button_size
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      value: 32x32px
  opacity:
    - id: paper_texture_opacity
      path: root.layers/root_paper_texture
      value: very_low
      estimated_percent: 2
  borders:
    - id: panel_outer_border
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      style: 1px_solid_muted_green
      radius_px: 0
      confidence: high
    - id: header_bottom_divider
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar
      style: 1px_solid_muted_green
      confidence: high
    - id: grid_vertical_dividers
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid
      style: 1px_solid_muted_green_between_columns
      confidence: high
    - id: carousel_control_outline
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      style: 1px_solid_dark_green_circle
      confidence: high
  shadows:
    - id: no_elevation_shadow
      path: root
      value: none_observed_on_panel_buttons_cards_or_media
  effects:
    - id: crisp_hairline_grid_effect
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      description: thin_muted_green_lines_create_architectural_editorial_grid
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
    - id: photo_contrast_effect
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_media
      description: strong_sunlit_photography_contrasts_with_flat_quiet_page_surface
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
  icons:
    - id: top_right_forward_arrow_icon
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group/header_icon_action
      category: icons
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      color: warm_ivory_on_green
      stroke_or_fill: thin_stroke
      container_relationship: inside_dark_green_square_button
      size_px: 14
    - id: card_diagonal_arrow_icons
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_corner_icon
      category: icons
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      color: dark_forest_green
      stroke_or_fill: thin_stroke
      container_relationship: uncontained_at_top_right_of_each_card_cell
      count: 3
      size_px: 14
    - id: carousel_outline_arrow_icons
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      category: icons
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      color: dark_forest_green
      stroke_or_fill: thin_stroke
      container_relationship: centered_inside_transparent_circular_outline_button
      count: 2
      size_px: 15
  imagery_categories:
    icons:
      - id: navigation_and_link_arrow_icon_set
        placement: foreground_graphic
        icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
        style: thin_line_arrows_dark_green_or_ivory
        density: sparse
        simplicity: very_simple
        paths:
          - root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group/header_icon_action
          - root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_corner_icon
          - root/lower_carousel_controls
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - id: three_editorial_feature_photos
        placement: foreground_media
        count: 3
        style: warm_editorial_lifestyle_food_or_still_life_photography
        crop: portrait_rectangles
        framing: closeup_flat_lay_or_overhead_detail
        realism: photographic
        lighting: direct_sunlight_or_high_contrast_shadow
        color_treatment: warm_natural_tones_with_deep_greens_and_blacks
        edge_behavior: photo_content_reaches_frame_edges
        paths:
          - root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[0]/card_media_1
          - root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[1]/card_media_2
          - root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[2]/card_media_3
  media:
    - id: media_slot_1
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[0]/card_media_1
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: rectangular_portrait
      dimensions_px: 371x495
      subject_context: organic_food_or_still_life_detail
      content_reaches_frame_edges: true
      creative_notes: dark_background_flat_lay_with_pale_organic_forms_and_warm_orange_accent
    - id: media_slot_2
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[1]/card_media_2
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: rectangular_portrait
      dimensions_px: 371x495
      subject_context: sunny_lifestyle_still_life_with_textile_and_small_props
      content_reaches_frame_edges: true
      creative_notes: bright_outdoor_sunlight_diagonal_soft_fabric_grass_texture_and_warm_citrus_color
    - id: media_slot_3
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[2]/card_media_3
      category: photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame_shape: rectangular_portrait
      dimensions_px: 370x495
      subject_context: hands_preparing_or_cutting_decorated_food
      content_reaches_frame_edges: true
      creative_notes: warm_high_contrast_overhead_scene_with_hands_tool_round_center_subject_and_saturated_garnish_colors
  creative_direction:
    - id: overall_section_direction
      path: root
      description: restrained_editorial_grid_on_warm_paper_canvas_with_large_serif_label_small_utilitarian_sans_text_hairline_green_borders_and_saturated_sunlit_photography
    - id: photography_direction
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_media
      description: close_cropped_analog_feeling_food_lifestyle_photos_using_natural_light_hard_shadows_warm_palette_and_tactile_materials
    - id: control_direction
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group
      description: minimal_dark_green_micro_controls_with_thin_arrow_icons_and_tiny_sans_label
  implementation_assumptions:
    - id: root_canvas_fill
      path: root
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: high
    - id: subtle_canvas_texture
      path: root.layers/root_paper_texture
      assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      confidence: medium
    - id: bordered_panel_and_grid
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: high
    - id: feature_cards_as_links
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]
      assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: medium
    - id: editorial_images
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]/card_media
      assumption: likely_raster_image
      confidence: high
    - id: arrow_icons
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group/header_icon_action
      assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
      confidence: high
  components:
    - id: editorial_carousel_panel_component
      path: root/framed_content_panel
      component_type: framed_section_panel
      anatomy: header_bar, action_group, three_column_card_grid
      visual_state: default
    - id: feature_card_component
      path: root/framed_content_panel/article_grid/items[]
      component_type: image_link_card
      anatomy: title, corner_arrow_icon, photo_media_frame
      count: 3
      visual_state: default
    - id: compact_action_button_group
      path: root/framed_content_panel/section_header_bar/header_action_group
      component_type: primary_button_plus_icon_button
      visual_state: default
    - id: circular_carousel_control
      path: root/lower_carousel_controls
      component_type: outline_icon_button
      count: 2
      visual_state: default
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - warm_ivory_canvas: root full-width background and panel fill
      - forest_green_primary: heading, small text, icons, filled button backgrounds
      - muted_green_hairline: borders and dividers
      - ivory_on_inverse: text and icon color on dark green buttons
    gradients: []
    patterns:
      - subtle_paper_grain_on_light_surfaces
    background_systems:
      - warm_paper_canvas_with_low_opacity_noise
      - inset_light_panel_with_hairline_green_grid
    typography:
      - condensed_display_serif_uppercase_section_heading
      - compact_sans_micro_card_title
      - tiny_sans_button_label
    spacing:
      - viewport_to_panel_inset_50px
      - tall_panel_header_band_104px
      - three_column_card_gutter_26px
      - title_to_media_gap_18px
      - panel_to_remote_controls_gap_about_38px
    radius:
      - square_panel_and_media_corners
      - tiny_radius_filled_header_buttons
      - circular_32px_outline_icon_button
    shadow:
      - no_shadow_flat_editorial_surface
    dividers:
      - one_pixel_muted_green_hairline_grid
  likely_components:
    - framed_editorial_index_carousel
    - editorial_feature_image_card
    - compact_primary_action_with_arrow_square
    - circular_outline_carousel_arrow_button
    - hairline_three_column_grid
  likely_section_patterns:
    - inset_framed_panel_on_full_width_paper_canvas
    - oversized_section_label_in_header_bar_with_action_group_opposite
    - three_equal_columns_each_with_micro_title_corner_arrow_and_large_portrait_photo
    - carousel_controls_positioned_outside_panel_near_lower_viewport_edges
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - light_surface_hairline_grid: warm_ivory_fill plus muted_green_1px_borders with no shadow or radius
    - primary_button_on_light_surface: dark_forest_green_fill, ivory_label, minimal_radius, no_shadow
    - transparent_icon_control_on_light_surface: circular_dark_green_outline, transparent_fill, dark_green_thin_arrow
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - strong_outer_panel_inset_creates_margin_from_viewport_edges
    - header_is_much_taller_than_text_to_create_air_above_grid
    - card_titles_are_small_and_close_to_top_while_images_dominate_each_cell
    - large_media_frames_align_baselines_and_share_identical_sizes_for_rigid_editorial_order
    - lower_controls_are_detached_from_panel_and_use_extreme_left_right_alignment
  link_action_mechanics:
    - feature_cards_signal_clickability_with_uncontained_north_east_arrow_in_each_cell
    - top_right_action_uses_text_button_followed_by_separate_square_arrow_button
    - carousel_navigation_uses outline circular buttons rather than pagination dots
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - dark_green_hairline_architectural_grid
    - warm_paper_background_with_subtle_texture
    - high_contrast_sunlit_food_lifestyle_photography
    - tall_condensed_serif_section_label
    - very_small_microcopy_against_generous_empty_space
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons:
      - minimal_single_color_thin_stroke_arrows_dark_green_or_ivory
      - uncontained_diagonal_link_arrows_for_card_affordance
      - circular_outline_arrow_buttons_for_carousel_navigation
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - close_cropped_editorial_still_life_photography_with_warm_natural_light
      - portrait_ratio_images_that_fill_their_frames_without_internal_padding
      - tactile_food_lifestyle_scenes_with_hard_sun_shadows_and_deep_shadow_contrast
  do_not_generalize:
    - do_not_treat_photo_subjects_or_article_titles_as_required_content
    - do_not_promote_nested_panel_grid_fill_as_a_distinct_root_background; root_canvas_is_the_full_width_warm_ivory_surface
    - do_not_add_shadows_or_rounded_media_corners_not_visible_here
    - do_not_treat_tiny_bottom_next_section_strip_as_part_of_this_section_content
    - do_not_transcribe_visible_article_titles_or_button_copy_as reusable content
  uncertainties:
    - exact_top_border_of_framed_panel_is_clipped_or_too_close_to_crop_top_to_confirm
    - exact_font_family_names_are_not_recoverable_from_screenshot
    - exact_texture_source_is_unclear; could be image_noise_or_rendering_artifact
    - action_group_may_be_one_combined_control_or_two_adjacent_buttons; visually_reads_as_two_connected_controls
    - carousel_controls_functionality_is_inferred_from_arrow_positions_and styling but not verifiable from screenshot
06 full width food image feature
06-full-width-food-image-feature.pngruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/crops/06-full-width-food-image-feature.png
Section grounding outputs
06-full-width-food-image-feature.mdruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/06-full-width-food-image-feature.md
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 6
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Full-width food image feature"
  previous_section_label: "Journal section"
  next_section_label: "Footer"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 4750
    original_y_end: 5520
    crop_y_start: 4750
    crop_y_end: 5520
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: section_visual_media_interlude
  role: full_width_photographic_feature
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: full_width_photographic_feature
  visibility: visible
  size:
    approximate_crop_width_px: 1366
    approximate_crop_height_px: 768
    width_behavior: full_viewport_bleed
    height_behavior: large_fixed_or_aspect_ratio_media_band
  layout:
    arrangement: single_dominant_media_region
    padding: none_visible
    margin: none_visible
    gap: none_visible
    content_alignment: no_text_or_controls_present
    overflow_behavior: clipped_to_section_bounds
  position:
    section_sequence_position: after_editorial_card_grid_before_footer
    crop_top_y_px: 0
    crop_bottom_y_px: 768
  style:
    background_color:
      value: unclear
      confidence: low
      note: The host canvas is almost entirely covered by a full-bleed photograph; only a thin warm off-white strip is visible at the bottom edge, and it may belong to the following section rather than the media section itself.
    border: none_visible
    border_radius: 0
    box_shadow: none_visible
  layers:
    - id: layer_full_bleed_photo
      kind: media_layer
      role: dominant_section_visual
      visibility: visible
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      visual_placement: foreground_media
      bounds:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 0
        width_px: 1366
        height_px: 752
        confidence: medium
      edge_behavior:
        top: reaches_crop_edge
        left: reaches_crop_edge
        right: reaches_crop_edge
        bottom: hard_horizontal_cut_to_pale_band
      style:
        opacity: 1
        border: none
        border_radius: 0
        shadow: none
    - id: layer_bottom_pale_edge_band
      kind: surface_layer
      role: boundary_sliver
      visibility: visible
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      bounds:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 752
        width_px: 1366
        height_px: 16
        confidence: low
      style:
        background_color: "#f3eee7"
        border: none_visible
        note: Thin flat band at the bottom edge; likely immediate footer canvas or a crop-boundary continuation, not safe to treat as the dominant section background.
  children:
    - id: media_region
      kind: media_frame
      role: full_bleed_photographic_feature
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width_behavior: full_viewport_bleed
        approximate_width_px: 1366
        approximate_height_px: 752
        approximate_aspect_ratio: 1.82
      layout:
        padding: none
        internal_content: raster_photo_only
        clipping: rectangular
      position:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 0
        z_index_role: primary_content
      style:
        background_color: not_applicable_image_pixels
        border: none
        border_radius: 0
        box_shadow: none
        overflow: hidden
      media:
        id: photo_asset
        category: photography
        visual_placement: foreground_media
        implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
        photo_reaches_edges:
          top: true
          left: true
          right: true
          bottom: mostly_true_but_ends_before_thin_pale_band
        source_subject_context: Close-up tabletop still life with a plated arrangement, granular bed texture, dark organic shapes, reflective metal utensil, partial secondary plate, and warm cloth surface.
        framing:
          orientation: landscape
          crop: tight_close_up
          perspective: oblique_overhead_tabletop_view
          main_visual_mass: centered_slightly_right
          secondary_visual_mass: partial_round_dish_cropped_at_upper_left
          diagonal_energy: reflective_tool_runs_from_lower_right_toward_center_right
          negative_space: warm_table_surface_visible_around_plate_and_upper_right
          edge_cropping: secondary_object_cut_off_at_left_and_top; main_plate_nearly_complete_but_large
        realism:
          level: photographic_realism
          detail_level: high
          texture_emphasis: ceramic_glaze, fabric_table_cover, granular_food_texture, rough_dark_round_surfaces, brushed_reflective_metal
        lighting:
          mood: warm_dim_interior
          direction: upper_right_or_right_side_highlight
          contrast: medium_high_with_deep_shadows_and_bright_specular_reflections
          shadow_quality: soft_to_moderate
        color_treatment:
          palette: golden_amber_yellow_brown_with_cream_and_deep_shadow_accents
          grading: warm_cinematic_restaurant_like
          saturation: moderate
          white_balance: intentionally_warm
        composition_density: medium
        simplicity: simple_single_photo_without_overlay
    - id: bottom_boundary_surface
      kind: surface_band
      role: lower_edge_transition_sliver
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width_behavior: full_viewport_bleed
        approximate_height_px: 16
      layout:
        padding: none_visible
      position:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 752
        relationship_to_media: immediately_after_photo_with_hard_horizontal_edge
      style:
        background_color: "#f3eee7"
        border: none_visible
        border_radius: 0
        box_shadow: none_visible
      notes:
        - Low confidence as part of this target section; visually matches the pale footer/background surface below the image in context.
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: full_bleed_media_frame_component
      type: media_frame
      path: root.children.media_region
      host_surface: section_host_unclear_due_to_full_bleed_photo
      child_surface_or_fill: photographic_raster
      text_or_icon_color: none
      border_divider_shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: spans_full_viewport_width_with_large_landscape_crop
      separation_mechanism: image_edges_define_section; hard_cut_to_adjacent_surfaces
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - text_overlay
    - heading
    - paragraph
    - button
    - link
    - badge_or_chip
    - card
    - form_input
    - navigation
    - icon_button
    - carousel_control
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: root_canvas_color_unresolved
      value: unclear
      path: root.style.background_color
      confidence: low
      note: Dominant visible area is image pixels, not a solid section canvas.
    - id: bottom_edge_warm_off_white
      value: "#f3eee7"
      path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface.style.background_color
      confidence: medium
      role: thin_boundary_or_neighbor_surface
    - id: photo_overall_warm_amber_grade
      value: "#b68435"
      path: root.children.media_region.media.color_treatment
      confidence: medium
      role: dominant_photographic_tint
    - id: photo_table_surface_ochre
      value: "#c49750"
      path: root.children.media_region.media
      confidence: medium
      role: warm_tabletop_or_cloth_pixel_family
    - id: photo_plate_cream
      value: "#d8ca8a"
      path: root.children.media_region.media
      confidence: medium
      role: light_ceramic_surface_pixel_family
    - id: photo_deep_shadow_brown_black
      value: "#171109"
      path: root.children.media_region.media
      confidence: medium
      role: dark_shadow_and_dark_object_pixel_family
    - id: photo_metal_specular_highlight
      value: "#f3e6bd"
      path: root.children.media_region.media
      confidence: medium
      role: bright_reflective_highlight_pixel_family
    - id: photo_muted_olive_rim_shadow
      value: "#566034"
      path: root.children.media_region.media
      confidence: low
      role: thin_rim_and_shadow_accent_pixel_family
  gradients:
    - id: natural_photographic_vignette_and_light_falloff
      path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      description: Natural photo luminance shift from bright reflective highlights on the right and center toward deeper warm shadows at the left and upper areas.
      css_gradient_candidate: false
      confidence: high
  patterns:
    - id: photographic_fabric_texture
      path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      description: Fine warm woven or matte cloth-like surface texture visible across the tabletop areas.
      reusable_pattern_candidate: low
    - id: photographic_granular_texture
      path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      description: Dense small pale oval granules forming a textured bed inside the main plate.
      reusable_pattern_candidate: low
    - id: photographic_brushed_metal_texture
      path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      description: Scratched reflective metal surface with strong directional highlights.
      reusable_pattern_candidate: low
    - id: partial_plate_decorative_motif
      path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      description: Small floral-like decoration appears on a cropped secondary dish at the upper-left edge.
      reusable_pattern_candidate: very_low
  background_systems:
    - id: full_bleed_photo_band_system
      path: root
      layers:
        - full_width_raster_photography_covering_nearly_entire_section
        - no_overlay_scrim_or_text_layer
        - optional_thin_pale_boundary_band_at_bottom
      visual_result: Warm cinematic image break between content sections.
      confidence: high
    - id: bottom_boundary_flat_surface_system
      path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface
      layers:
        - flat_warm_off_white_fill
      visual_result: Thin horizontal pale strip below the image.
      confidence: low
      note: May be footer start rather than a designed sublayer of this section.
  typography: []
  font_characteristics: []
  spacing:
    - id: full_bleed_horizontal_spacing
      path: root.children.media_region
      value: 0px_left_right_padding
      confidence: high
      note: Photograph touches both viewport edges.
    - id: top_spacing
      path: root.children.media_region
      value: 0px_top_padding_visible
      confidence: high
      note: Crop begins directly with image pixels.
    - id: bottom_boundary_band_height
      path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface
      value: approximately_16px
      confidence: low
      note: Pale band visible below photo; ownership unclear.
    - id: overlay_content_spacing
      path: root
      value: none_observed
      confidence: high
  radius:
    - id: media_frame_radius
      path: root.children.media_region.style.border_radius
      value: 0px
      confidence: high
    - id: boundary_band_radius
      path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface.style.border_radius
      value: 0px
      confidence: high
  sizes:
    - id: crop_size
      path: root.size
      value:
        width_px: 1366
        height_px: 768
      confidence: high
    - id: visible_photo_size
      path: root.children.media_region.size
      value:
        width_px: 1366
        height_px: 752
      confidence: medium
    - id: pale_edge_band_size
      path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface.size
      value:
        width_px: 1366
        height_px: 16
      confidence: low
  opacity:
    - id: photo_opacity
      path: root.children.media_region
      value: fully_opaque
      confidence: high
    - id: overlays_opacity
      path: root
      value: no_overlay_observed
      confidence: high
  borders:
    - id: media_border
      path: root.children.media_region.style.border
      value: none_visible
      confidence: high
    - id: section_divider_border
      path: root
      value: none_visible_as_stroke
      confidence: high
      note: Separation is by hard edge between image pixels and pale surface, not by a drawn line.
  shadows:
    - id: component_shadow
      path: root.children.media_region.style.box_shadow
      value: none_visible
      confidence: high
    - id: photographic_internal_shadows
      path: root.children.media_region.media.lighting
      value: natural_photo_shadows_only
      confidence: high
  effects:
    - id: warm_photo_color_grade
      path: root.children.media_region.media.color_treatment
      type: photographic_color_treatment
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      description: Strong warm yellow-amber cast over entire image.
      confidence: high
    - id: specular_reflection_effect
      path: root.children.media_region.media.lighting
      type: photographic_lighting
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      description: Bright reflective highlights on metal utensil, not a page-level CSS effect.
      confidence: high
  icons: []
  imagery_categories:
    icons: []
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - id: full_bleed_editorial_photo
        path: root.children.media_region
        visual_placement: foreground_media
        implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
        imagery_category: photography
        photo_content_reaches_image_edges: true
        framing: close_up_oblique_overhead_landscape
        crop_behavior: fills_viewport_width; subject cropped by frame at left/top only for secondary object; main plate centered_right
        realism_level: high_photographic
        lighting: warm_low_interior_with_bright_specular_highlights
        material_texture: ceramic, fabric, granular, rough_organic, reflective_metal
        palette_relationship: warm_amber_image_contrasts_with_pale_site_canvas_seen_below
        density: medium
        simplicity: single_uninterrupted_photo_no_text
  media:
    - id: full_bleed_photo_asset
      path: root.children.media_region
      type: raster_photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame: none
      border_radius: 0
      bleed: viewport_width
      crop: landscape_close_up
      edge_behavior: touches_top_left_right_edges_and_stops_at_bottom_edge_before_pale_band
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
  creative_direction:
    - id: editorial_warm_still_life_photography_direction
      applies_to: root.children.media_region
      category: photography
      direction: Warm cinematic tabletop still-life photography, close and tactile, with rich amber grading, cream and brown tonal range, realistic material texture, a prominent circular form, a diagonal reflective element, and no typography or overlay.
      composition_principles:
        - large_main_object_group_centered_slightly_right
        - small_partial_secondary_object_cropped_at_upper_left_for_depth
        - diagonal_reflective_shape_adds_movement
        - warm_surface_area_provides_breathing_room
      rendering_complexity: photographic_high_detail
      reuse_guidance: Keep style, warmth, close framing, and tactile material emphasis; subject matter can vary in later generated sites.
  implementation_assumptions:
    - path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      confidence: high
      reason: Continuous natural photographic detail, lighting, and texture across entire width.
    - path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: low
      reason: Flat color band at crop bottom resembles adjacent section canvas, but ownership is uncertain.
    - path: root.layers.layer_full_bleed_photo
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      confidence: high
    - path: root.layers.layer_bottom_pale_edge_band
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: low
  components:
    - id: full_bleed_media_frame
      path: root.children.media_region
      component_type: media_frame
      role: full_width_visual_break
      host_surface: root_canvas_unresolved
      fill: photographic_raster
      border: none
      radius: 0
      shadow: none
      padding: 0
      sizing_behavior: viewport_width_with_cropped_fixed_height
      page_ui_interactivity: none_observed
      separation_mechanism: hard_image_edge_against_neighbor_surfaces
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - id: warm_off_white_page_canvas_candidate
        value: "#f3eee7"
        confidence: low
        note: Seen only as bottom sliver in this crop; should be confirmed in footer or broader sections before tokenizing from this section.
      - id: warm_amber_photo_grade_reference
        value: "#b68435"
        confidence: medium
        note: Image-specific color direction rather than a UI surface token.
      - id: deep_warm_shadow_photo_reference
        value: "#171109"
        confidence: medium
        note: Useful only for image mood, not page UI.
    gradients:
      - natural_photo_light_falloff_not_css_gradient
    patterns:
      - photographic_fabric_texture_not_reusable_page_pattern
      - photographic_granular_texture_not_reusable_page_pattern
      - photographic_brushed_metal_texture_not_reusable_page_pattern
    background_systems:
      - full_bleed_raster_photo_as_section_visual_break
      - optional_hard_cut_to_pale_page_canvas_below
    typography: []
    spacing:
      - zero_bleed_media_padding
      - large_media_band_height_about_55_percent_of_viewport_width_in_this_capture
      - no_internal_content_spacing
    radius:
      - square_media_corners
    shadow:
      - no_component_shadow
    dividers:
      - hard_surface_cut_between_photo_and_next_pale_area
  likely_components:
    - full_bleed_media_frame
    - editorial_photo_interlude_section
  likely_section_patterns:
    - full_width_photographic_break_between_content_heavy_sections
    - image_only_section_without_overlay_or_call_to_action
    - cinematic_still_life_band_followed_by_minimal_footer_canvas
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - name: full_bleed_photo_on_unresolved_canvas
      recipe: Use a raster photograph clipped to a square-corner rectangular frame that spans the viewport width, with no visible border, radius, drop shadow, overlay, text, or controls.
    - name: warm_editorial_photo_feature
      recipe: Choose a warm amber-toned close-up photograph with tactile materials, realistic depth, and a simple centered composition; let the photo itself provide color and texture rather than adding decorative UI layers.
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - Media begins at the crop top with no visible top padding or inset.
    - Media touches both horizontal viewport edges with no gutters.
    - Section rhythm is created by a large uninterrupted image height rather than by stacked text or cards.
    - Bottom transition appears as a hard horizontal cut into a pale flat surface; ownership of the pale strip is uncertain.
  link_action_mechanics:
    - none_observed
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - warm_cinematic_editorial_photography
    - tactile_tabletop_materials
    - circular_main_form_with_diagonal_reflective_accent
    - full_bleed_image_as_visual_pause
    - no_overlay_content_on_photography
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons: []
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - warm_amber_close_up_still_life
      - oblique_overhead_tabletop_view
      - realistic_high_texture_material_detail
      - medium_density_single_scene_without_collage
      - natural_shadows_and_specular_highlights
      - photo_can_bleed_to_edges_without_inner_matte_or_card_frame
  do_not_generalize:
    - Do not treat the exact plated subject, granular contents, dark round objects, utensil type, or floral plate motif as required reusable content.
    - Do not infer any hidden text overlay, CTA, carousel, or interactive control from neighboring sections.
    - Do not promote photographic texture details into site-wide CSS patterns.
    - Do not treat the thin bottom off-white strip as the section root background without confirmation; it may be the following footer surface.
    - Do not infer rounded corners or card framing; the image is square and full-bleed.
  uncertainties:
    - Exact ownership of the bottom pale band is unclear from the crop.
    - The root section canvas color is not observable because the image covers nearly all of the area.
    - Exact media height may differ slightly due to screenshot scaling and crop boundary.
    - Responsive behavior is not visible; full-width bleed is observed only at this screenshot width.
06-full-width-food-image-feature.yamlruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/06-full-width-food-image-feature.yaml
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 6
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Full-width food image feature"
  previous_section_label: "Journal section"
  next_section_label: "Footer"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 4750
    original_y_end: 5520
    crop_y_start: 4750
    crop_y_end: 5520
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: section_visual_media_interlude
  role: full_width_photographic_feature
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: full_width_photographic_feature
  visibility: visible
  size:
    approximate_crop_width_px: 1366
    approximate_crop_height_px: 768
    width_behavior: full_viewport_bleed
    height_behavior: large_fixed_or_aspect_ratio_media_band
  layout:
    arrangement: single_dominant_media_region
    padding: none_visible
    margin: none_visible
    gap: none_visible
    content_alignment: no_text_or_controls_present
    overflow_behavior: clipped_to_section_bounds
  position:
    section_sequence_position: after_editorial_card_grid_before_footer
    crop_top_y_px: 0
    crop_bottom_y_px: 768
  style:
    background_color:
      value: unclear
      confidence: low
      note: The host canvas is almost entirely covered by a full-bleed photograph; only a thin warm off-white strip is visible at the bottom edge, and it may belong to the following section rather than the media section itself.
    border: none_visible
    border_radius: 0
    box_shadow: none_visible
  layers:
    - id: layer_full_bleed_photo
      kind: media_layer
      role: dominant_section_visual
      visibility: visible
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      visual_placement: foreground_media
      bounds:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 0
        width_px: 1366
        height_px: 752
        confidence: medium
      edge_behavior:
        top: reaches_crop_edge
        left: reaches_crop_edge
        right: reaches_crop_edge
        bottom: hard_horizontal_cut_to_pale_band
      style:
        opacity: 1
        border: none
        border_radius: 0
        shadow: none
    - id: layer_bottom_pale_edge_band
      kind: surface_layer
      role: boundary_sliver
      visibility: visible
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      bounds:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 752
        width_px: 1366
        height_px: 16
        confidence: low
      style:
        background_color: "#f3eee7"
        border: none_visible
        note: Thin flat band at the bottom edge; likely immediate footer canvas or a crop-boundary continuation, not safe to treat as the dominant section background.
  children:
    - id: media_region
      kind: media_frame
      role: full_bleed_photographic_feature
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width_behavior: full_viewport_bleed
        approximate_width_px: 1366
        approximate_height_px: 752
        approximate_aspect_ratio: 1.82
      layout:
        padding: none
        internal_content: raster_photo_only
        clipping: rectangular
      position:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 0
        z_index_role: primary_content
      style:
        background_color: not_applicable_image_pixels
        border: none
        border_radius: 0
        box_shadow: none
        overflow: hidden
      media:
        id: photo_asset
        category: photography
        visual_placement: foreground_media
        implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
        photo_reaches_edges:
          top: true
          left: true
          right: true
          bottom: mostly_true_but_ends_before_thin_pale_band
        source_subject_context: Close-up tabletop still life with a plated arrangement, granular bed texture, dark organic shapes, reflective metal utensil, partial secondary plate, and warm cloth surface.
        framing:
          orientation: landscape
          crop: tight_close_up
          perspective: oblique_overhead_tabletop_view
          main_visual_mass: centered_slightly_right
          secondary_visual_mass: partial_round_dish_cropped_at_upper_left
          diagonal_energy: reflective_tool_runs_from_lower_right_toward_center_right
          negative_space: warm_table_surface_visible_around_plate_and_upper_right
          edge_cropping: secondary_object_cut_off_at_left_and_top; main_plate_nearly_complete_but_large
        realism:
          level: photographic_realism
          detail_level: high
          texture_emphasis: ceramic_glaze, fabric_table_cover, granular_food_texture, rough_dark_round_surfaces, brushed_reflective_metal
        lighting:
          mood: warm_dim_interior
          direction: upper_right_or_right_side_highlight
          contrast: medium_high_with_deep_shadows_and_bright_specular_reflections
          shadow_quality: soft_to_moderate
        color_treatment:
          palette: golden_amber_yellow_brown_with_cream_and_deep_shadow_accents
          grading: warm_cinematic_restaurant_like
          saturation: moderate
          white_balance: intentionally_warm
        composition_density: medium
        simplicity: simple_single_photo_without_overlay
    - id: bottom_boundary_surface
      kind: surface_band
      role: lower_edge_transition_sliver
      visibility: visible
      size:
        width_behavior: full_viewport_bleed
        approximate_height_px: 16
      layout:
        padding: none_visible
      position:
        x_px: 0
        y_px: 752
        relationship_to_media: immediately_after_photo_with_hard_horizontal_edge
      style:
        background_color: "#f3eee7"
        border: none_visible
        border_radius: 0
        box_shadow: none_visible
      notes:
        - Low confidence as part of this target section; visually matches the pale footer/background surface below the image in context.
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: full_bleed_media_frame_component
      type: media_frame
      path: root.children.media_region
      host_surface: section_host_unclear_due_to_full_bleed_photo
      child_surface_or_fill: photographic_raster
      text_or_icon_color: none
      border_divider_shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: spans_full_viewport_width_with_large_landscape_crop
      separation_mechanism: image_edges_define_section; hard_cut_to_adjacent_surfaces
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - text_overlay
    - heading
    - paragraph
    - button
    - link
    - badge_or_chip
    - card
    - form_input
    - navigation
    - icon_button
    - carousel_control
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: root_canvas_color_unresolved
      value: unclear
      path: root.style.background_color
      confidence: low
      note: Dominant visible area is image pixels, not a solid section canvas.
    - id: bottom_edge_warm_off_white
      value: "#f3eee7"
      path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface.style.background_color
      confidence: medium
