      role: thin_boundary_or_neighbor_surface
    - id: photo_overall_warm_amber_grade
      value: "#b68435"
      path: root.children.media_region.media.color_treatment
      confidence: medium
      role: dominant_photographic_tint
    - id: photo_table_surface_ochre
      value: "#c49750"
      path: root.children.media_region.media
      confidence: medium
      role: warm_tabletop_or_cloth_pixel_family
    - id: photo_plate_cream
      value: "#d8ca8a"
      path: root.children.media_region.media
      confidence: medium
      role: light_ceramic_surface_pixel_family
    - id: photo_deep_shadow_brown_black
      value: "#171109"
      path: root.children.media_region.media
      confidence: medium
      role: dark_shadow_and_dark_object_pixel_family
    - id: photo_metal_specular_highlight
      value: "#f3e6bd"
      path: root.children.media_region.media
      confidence: medium
      role: bright_reflective_highlight_pixel_family
    - id: photo_muted_olive_rim_shadow
      value: "#566034"
      path: root.children.media_region.media
      confidence: low
      role: thin_rim_and_shadow_accent_pixel_family
  gradients:
    - id: natural_photographic_vignette_and_light_falloff
      path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      description: Natural photo luminance shift from bright reflective highlights on the right and center toward deeper warm shadows at the left and upper areas.
      css_gradient_candidate: false
      confidence: high
  patterns:
    - id: photographic_fabric_texture
      path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      description: Fine warm woven or matte cloth-like surface texture visible across the tabletop areas.
      reusable_pattern_candidate: low
    - id: photographic_granular_texture
      path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      description: Dense small pale oval granules forming a textured bed inside the main plate.
      reusable_pattern_candidate: low
    - id: photographic_brushed_metal_texture
      path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      description: Scratched reflective metal surface with strong directional highlights.
      reusable_pattern_candidate: low
    - id: partial_plate_decorative_motif
      path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      description: Small floral-like decoration appears on a cropped secondary dish at the upper-left edge.
      reusable_pattern_candidate: very_low
  background_systems:
    - id: full_bleed_photo_band_system
      path: root
      layers:
        - full_width_raster_photography_covering_nearly_entire_section
        - no_overlay_scrim_or_text_layer
        - optional_thin_pale_boundary_band_at_bottom
      visual_result: Warm cinematic image break between content sections.
      confidence: high
    - id: bottom_boundary_flat_surface_system
      path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface
      layers:
        - flat_warm_off_white_fill
      visual_result: Thin horizontal pale strip below the image.
      confidence: low
      note: May be footer start rather than a designed sublayer of this section.
  typography: []
  font_characteristics: []
  spacing:
    - id: full_bleed_horizontal_spacing
      path: root.children.media_region
      value: 0px_left_right_padding
      confidence: high
      note: Photograph touches both viewport edges.
    - id: top_spacing
      path: root.children.media_region
      value: 0px_top_padding_visible
      confidence: high
      note: Crop begins directly with image pixels.
    - id: bottom_boundary_band_height
      path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface
      value: approximately_16px
      confidence: low
      note: Pale band visible below photo; ownership unclear.
    - id: overlay_content_spacing
      path: root
      value: none_observed
      confidence: high
  radius:
    - id: media_frame_radius
      path: root.children.media_region.style.border_radius
      value: 0px
      confidence: high
    - id: boundary_band_radius
      path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface.style.border_radius
      value: 0px
      confidence: high
  sizes:
    - id: crop_size
      path: root.size
      value:
        width_px: 1366
        height_px: 768
      confidence: high
    - id: visible_photo_size
      path: root.children.media_region.size
      value:
        width_px: 1366
        height_px: 752
      confidence: medium
    - id: pale_edge_band_size
      path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface.size
      value:
        width_px: 1366
        height_px: 16
      confidence: low
  opacity:
    - id: photo_opacity
      path: root.children.media_region
      value: fully_opaque
      confidence: high
    - id: overlays_opacity
      path: root
      value: no_overlay_observed
      confidence: high
  borders:
    - id: media_border
      path: root.children.media_region.style.border
      value: none_visible
      confidence: high
    - id: section_divider_border
      path: root
      value: none_visible_as_stroke
      confidence: high
      note: Separation is by hard edge between image pixels and pale surface, not by a drawn line.
  shadows:
    - id: component_shadow
      path: root.children.media_region.style.box_shadow
      value: none_visible
      confidence: high
    - id: photographic_internal_shadows
      path: root.children.media_region.media.lighting
      value: natural_photo_shadows_only
      confidence: high
  effects:
    - id: warm_photo_color_grade
      path: root.children.media_region.media.color_treatment
      type: photographic_color_treatment
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      description: Strong warm yellow-amber cast over entire image.
      confidence: high
    - id: specular_reflection_effect
      path: root.children.media_region.media.lighting
      type: photographic_lighting
      implementation_assumption: visual_sublayer_only
      description: Bright reflective highlights on metal utensil, not a page-level CSS effect.
      confidence: high
  icons: []
  imagery_categories:
    icons: []
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - id: full_bleed_editorial_photo
        path: root.children.media_region
        visual_placement: foreground_media
        implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
        imagery_category: photography
        photo_content_reaches_image_edges: true
        framing: close_up_oblique_overhead_landscape
        crop_behavior: fills_viewport_width; subject cropped by frame at left/top only for secondary object; main plate centered_right
        realism_level: high_photographic
        lighting: warm_low_interior_with_bright_specular_highlights
        material_texture: ceramic, fabric, granular, rough_organic, reflective_metal
        palette_relationship: warm_amber_image_contrasts_with_pale_site_canvas_seen_below
        density: medium
        simplicity: single_uninterrupted_photo_no_text
  media:
    - id: full_bleed_photo_asset
      path: root.children.media_region
      type: raster_photography
      placement: foreground_media
      frame: none
      border_radius: 0
      bleed: viewport_width
      crop: landscape_close_up
      edge_behavior: touches_top_left_right_edges_and_stops_at_bottom_edge_before_pale_band
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
  creative_direction:
    - id: editorial_warm_still_life_photography_direction
      applies_to: root.children.media_region
      category: photography
      direction: Warm cinematic tabletop still-life photography, close and tactile, with rich amber grading, cream and brown tonal range, realistic material texture, a prominent circular form, a diagonal reflective element, and no typography or overlay.
      composition_principles:
        - large_main_object_group_centered_slightly_right
        - small_partial_secondary_object_cropped_at_upper_left_for_depth
        - diagonal_reflective_shape_adds_movement
        - warm_surface_area_provides_breathing_room
      rendering_complexity: photographic_high_detail
      reuse_guidance: Keep style, warmth, close framing, and tactile material emphasis; subject matter can vary in later generated sites.
  implementation_assumptions:
    - path: root.children.media_region
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      confidence: high
      reason: Continuous natural photographic detail, lighting, and texture across entire width.
    - path: root.children.bottom_boundary_surface
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: low
      reason: Flat color band at crop bottom resembles adjacent section canvas, but ownership is uncertain.
    - path: root.layers.layer_full_bleed_photo
      implementation_assumption: likely_raster_image
      confidence: high
    - path: root.layers.layer_bottom_pale_edge_band
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      confidence: low
  components:
    - id: full_bleed_media_frame
      path: root.children.media_region
      component_type: media_frame
      role: full_width_visual_break
      host_surface: root_canvas_unresolved
      fill: photographic_raster
      border: none
      radius: 0
      shadow: none
      padding: 0
      sizing_behavior: viewport_width_with_cropped_fixed_height
      page_ui_interactivity: none_observed
      separation_mechanism: hard_image_edge_against_neighbor_surfaces
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - id: warm_off_white_page_canvas_candidate
        value: "#f3eee7"
        confidence: low
        note: Seen only as bottom sliver in this crop; should be confirmed in footer or broader sections before tokenizing from this section.
      - id: warm_amber_photo_grade_reference
        value: "#b68435"
        confidence: medium
        note: Image-specific color direction rather than a UI surface token.
      - id: deep_warm_shadow_photo_reference
        value: "#171109"
        confidence: medium
        note: Useful only for image mood, not page UI.
    gradients:
      - natural_photo_light_falloff_not_css_gradient
    patterns:
      - photographic_fabric_texture_not_reusable_page_pattern
      - photographic_granular_texture_not_reusable_page_pattern
      - photographic_brushed_metal_texture_not_reusable_page_pattern
    background_systems:
      - full_bleed_raster_photo_as_section_visual_break
      - optional_hard_cut_to_pale_page_canvas_below
    typography: []
    spacing:
      - zero_bleed_media_padding
      - large_media_band_height_about_55_percent_of_viewport_width_in_this_capture
      - no_internal_content_spacing
    radius:
      - square_media_corners
    shadow:
      - no_component_shadow
    dividers:
      - hard_surface_cut_between_photo_and_next_pale_area
  likely_components:
    - full_bleed_media_frame
    - editorial_photo_interlude_section
  likely_section_patterns:
    - full_width_photographic_break_between_content_heavy_sections
    - image_only_section_without_overlay_or_call_to_action
    - cinematic_still_life_band_followed_by_minimal_footer_canvas
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - name: full_bleed_photo_on_unresolved_canvas
      recipe: Use a raster photograph clipped to a square-corner rectangular frame that spans the viewport width, with no visible border, radius, drop shadow, overlay, text, or controls.
    - name: warm_editorial_photo_feature
      recipe: Choose a warm amber-toned close-up photograph with tactile materials, realistic depth, and a simple centered composition; let the photo itself provide color and texture rather than adding decorative UI layers.
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - Media begins at the crop top with no visible top padding or inset.
    - Media touches both horizontal viewport edges with no gutters.
    - Section rhythm is created by a large uninterrupted image height rather than by stacked text or cards.
    - Bottom transition appears as a hard horizontal cut into a pale flat surface; ownership of the pale strip is uncertain.
  link_action_mechanics:
    - none_observed
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - warm_cinematic_editorial_photography
    - tactile_tabletop_materials
    - circular_main_form_with_diagonal_reflective_accent
    - full_bleed_image_as_visual_pause
    - no_overlay_content_on_photography
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons: []
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography:
      - warm_amber_close_up_still_life
      - oblique_overhead_tabletop_view
      - realistic_high_texture_material_detail
      - medium_density_single_scene_without_collage
      - natural_shadows_and_specular_highlights
      - photo_can_bleed_to_edges_without_inner_matte_or_card_frame
  do_not_generalize:
    - Do not treat the exact plated subject, granular contents, dark round objects, utensil type, or floral plate motif as required reusable content.
    - Do not infer any hidden text overlay, CTA, carousel, or interactive control from neighboring sections.
    - Do not promote photographic texture details into site-wide CSS patterns.
    - Do not treat the thin bottom off-white strip as the section root background without confirmation; it may be the following footer surface.
    - Do not infer rounded corners or card framing; the image is square and full-bleed.
  uncertainties:
    - Exact ownership of the bottom pale band is unclear from the crop.
    - The root section canvas color is not observable because the image covers nearly all of the area.
    - Exact media height may differ slightly due to screenshot scaling and crop boundary.
    - Responsive behavior is not visible; full-width bleed is observed only at this screenshot width.
07 footer
07-footer.pngruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/crops/07-footer.png
Section grounding outputs
07-footer.mdruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/07-footer.md
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 7
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Footer"
  previous_section_label: "Full-width food image feature"
  next_section_label: "N/A"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 5520
    original_y_end: 6305
    crop_y_start: 5520
    crop_y_end: 6305
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: footer_contact_navigation_brand_closure
  role: site_footer
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: site_footer
  visibility: visible
  size:
    approx_width_px: 1366
    approx_height_px: 785
    width_behavior: full_viewport
    height_behavior: content_defined_final_page_block
  layout:
    display: block
    major_regions:
      - top_metadata_row
      - secondary_links_and_mark_row
      - oversized_wordmark_region
    horizontal_padding_px: 50
    vertical_padding_top_px: 68
    vertical_padding_bottom_px: 70
    alignment: full_width_canvas_with_inset_content_columns
  position:
    flow_position: final_section_after_full_width_media
    top_transition: hard_reset_from_previous_photo_to_footer_canvas_no_visible_divider
    bottom_transition: final_page_edge_same_canvas_no_visible_divider
  style:
    background_color: warm_ivory_paper
    background_color_estimate: "#f4f0eb"
    color: deep_forest_green
    color_estimate: "#164b31"
    texture: subtle_paper_grain_and_faint_smudging
    overflow: visible
  layers:
    - id: base_canvas_fill
      role: root_surface
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      style:
        fill: warm_ivory
        reaches_viewport_edges: true
    - id: paper_texture_overlay
      role: subtle_surface_texture
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      style:
        color_variation: very_low_contrast_beige_speckles_and_faint_vertical_marks
        opacity: low
        blend: over_base_canvas
  children:
    - id: top_metadata_row
      kind: layout_region
      role: footer_metadata_grid
      visibility: visible
      size:
        approx_width_px: 1265
        approx_height_px: 85
      position:
        x_px: 50
        y_px: 69
      layout:
        display: grid_like_four_column_row
        columns: 4
        column_distribution: wide_even_spread_across_viewport
        align_items: start
        gap_behavior: large_horizontal_air
      style:
        background: transparent
      items:
        - id: metadata_column_1
          kind: text_stack
          role: contact_method_block
          position:
            approx_x_px: 50
            approx_y_px: 69
          size:
            approx_width_px: 180
            approx_height_px: 60
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            gap_px: 24
            align: left
          children:
            - id: metadata_label
              kind: text
              role: small_uppercase_label
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_label
                color_ref: footer_text_green
            - id: metadata_value
              kind: text
              role: single_line_contact_value
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_value
                color_ref: footer_text_green
        - id: metadata_column_2
          kind: text_stack
          role: phone_contact_block
          position:
            approx_x_px: 460
            approx_y_px: 69
          size:
            approx_width_px: 160
            approx_height_px: 60
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            gap_px: 24
            align: left
          children:
            - id: metadata_label
              kind: text
              role: small_uppercase_label
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_label
                color_ref: footer_text_green
            - id: metadata_value
              kind: text
              role: single_line_contact_value
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_value
                color_ref: footer_text_green
        - id: metadata_column_3
          kind: text_stack
          role: social_links_block
          position:
            approx_x_px: 830
            approx_y_px: 69
          size:
            approx_width_px: 150
            approx_height_px: 74
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            gap_px: 22
            align: left
          children:
            - id: metadata_label
              kind: text
              role: small_uppercase_label
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_label
                color_ref: footer_text_green
            - id: social_link_list
              kind: link_list
              role: social_text_links
              layout:
                direction: vertical
                item_count: 2
                line_gap_px: 4
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_link
                color_ref: footer_text_green
                text_decoration: none_visible
                background: transparent
        - id: metadata_column_4
          kind: text_stack
          role: location_block
          position:
            approx_x_px: 1200
            approx_y_px: 69
          size:
            approx_width_px: 135
            approx_height_px: 82
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            gap_px: 23
            align: left
          children:
            - id: metadata_label
              kind: text
              role: small_uppercase_label
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_label
                color_ref: footer_text_green
            - id: metadata_value
              kind: text
              role: two_line_location_value
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_value
                color_ref: footer_text_green
                line_height_px: 22
    - id: secondary_links_and_mark_row
      kind: layout_region
      role: footer_navigation_and_brand_mark_row
      visibility: visible
      size:
        approx_width_px: 1265
        approx_height_px: 70
      position:
        x_px: 50
        y_px: 244
      layout:
        display: distributed_slots
        align_items: start
        slot_positions: left_links_under_first_column_small_mark_under_second_column_center_links_under_third_column_legal_under_fourth_column
      style:
        background: transparent
      children:
        - id: primary_footer_link_stack
          kind: link_list
          role: footer_primary_navigation_links
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 51
            approx_y_px: 245
          size:
            approx_width_px: 90
            approx_height_px: 58
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            item_count: 3
            line_gap_px: 4
            align: left
          style:
            typography_ref: footer_micro_link
            color_ref: footer_text_green
            text_decoration: none_visible
            background: transparent
        - id: small_brand_emblem
          kind: graphic
          role: compact_brand_mark
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 451
            approx_y_px: 247
          size:
            approx_width_px: 64
            approx_height_px: 40
          layout:
            alignment_context: centered_near_second_column
          style:
            fill_color: deep_forest_green
            background: transparent
          imagery:
            category: icons
            icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
            visual_placement: foreground_graphic
            creative_direction: small_organic_emblem_with_dark_green_fill_and_light_negative_detail
            edge_behavior: floats_on_canvas_without_container
          implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
        - id: secondary_footer_link_stack
          kind: link_list
          role: footer_secondary_navigation_links
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 836
            approx_y_px: 245
          size:
            approx_width_px: 85
            approx_height_px: 58
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            item_count: 3
            line_gap_px: 4
            align: left
          style:
            typography_ref: footer_micro_link
            color_ref: footer_text_green
            text_decoration: none_visible
            background: transparent
        - id: legal_link_stack
          kind: link_list
          role: footer_legal_links
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 1236
            approx_y_px: 245
          size:
            approx_width_px: 100
            approx_height_px: 38
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            item_count: 2
            line_gap_px: 4
            align: left
          style:
            typography_ref: footer_micro_link
            color_ref: footer_text_green
            text_decoration: none_visible
            background: transparent
    - id: oversized_wordmark_region
      kind: graphic_text_region
      role: oversized_split_brand_wordmark
      visibility: visible
      size:
        approx_width_px: 1270
        approx_height_px: 310
      position:
        x_px: 62
        y_px: 405
      layout:
        display: two_large_wordmark_groups
        horizontal_distribution: left_group_and_right_group_with_large_center_gap
        align_items: baseline
      style:
        background: transparent
        color_ref: footer_wordmark_green
      children:
        - id: wordmark_group_left
          kind: text_graphic
          role: oversized_serif_wordmark_segment
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 62
            approx_y_px: 405
          size:
            approx_width_px: 390
            approx_height_px: 303
          style:
            typography_ref: footer_oversized_serif_wordmark
            color_ref: footer_wordmark_green
            background: transparent
            text_rendering: vector_or_font_text
        - id: wordmark_group_right
          kind: text_graphic
          role: oversized_serif_wordmark_segment
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 803
            approx_y_px: 405
          size:
            approx_width_px: 475
            approx_height_px: 303
          style:
            typography_ref: footer_oversized_serif_wordmark
            color_ref: footer_wordmark_green
            background: transparent
            text_rendering: vector_or_font_text
    - id: non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      kind: overlay_widget
      role: external_capture_overlay_badges
      visibility: visible
      ownership: not_section_owned_low_confidence_external_platform_ui
      size:
        approx_width_px: 110
        approx_height_px: 63
      position:
        approx_x_px: 1239
        approx_y_px: 704
        placement: fixed_bottom_right_viewport_overlay
      layout:
        direction: vertical
        item_count: 2
        gap_px: 8
        align: right
      style:
        background: transparent
        z_index_behavior: above_page_content
      items:
        - id: overlay_pill_top
          kind: badge_button
          role: external_builder_action_badge
          size:
            approx_width_px: 108
            approx_height_px: 29
          style:
            background_color: white
            text_color: near_black
            border_radius_px: 7
            box_shadow: soft_low_elevation
            typography_ref: overlay_badge_text
            icon: small_black_single_color_mark_at_right
        - id: overlay_pill_bottom
          kind: badge_button
          role: external_builder_attribution_badge
          size:
            approx_width_px: 108
            approx_height_px: 29
          style:
            background_color: white
            text_color: near_black
            border_radius_px: 7
            box_shadow: soft_low_elevation
            typography_ref: overlay_badge_text
            icon: small_black_single_color_mark_at_left
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: footer_metadata_grid
      role: four_distributed_contact_and_social_metadata_columns
      notes: small uppercase labels with compact values, no containing cards or dividers
    - id: footer_text_link_stacks
      role: multiple_vertical_navigation_link_lists
      notes: text-only footer navigation, legal, and social links on transparent canvas
    - id: compact_brand_mark
      role: small_standalone_brand_emblem
      notes: dark green organic logo-like mark, no container
    - id: oversized_split_wordmark
      role: dominant_footer_brand_closure_graphic
      notes: high-contrast serif display wordmark split into two large groups
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - newsletter_form
    - primary_cta_button
    - input_field
    - card_grid
    - accordion
    - visible_divider_lines
    - photographic_media
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: footer_canvas_warm_ivory
      path: root
      value_estimate: "#f4f0eb"
      role: full_width_section_background
      confidence: high
    - id: footer_text_green
      path: root/top_metadata_row and root/secondary_links_and_mark_row
      value_estimate: "#244b38"
      role: small_footer_text_and_link_color
      confidence: high
    - id: footer_wordmark_green
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      value_estimate: "#164b31"
      role: oversized_brand_wordmark_color
      confidence: high
    - id: external_overlay_white
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      value_estimate: "#ffffff"
      role: non_section_overlay_pill_fill
      confidence: high
    - id: external_overlay_black
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      value_estimate: "#111111"
      role: non_section_overlay_text_and_icon
      confidence: high
  gradients: []
  patterns:
    - id: subtle_paper_surface_noise
      path: root/paper_texture_overlay
      type: low_contrast_noise_texture
      colors: warm_ivory_to_slightly_darker_beige
      scale: fine
      density: sparse_to_moderate
      confidence: medium
  background_systems:
    - id: footer_paper_canvas_system
      path: root
      layers:
        - warm_ivory_base_fill_reaching_viewport_edges
        - subtle_paper_grain_and_faint_smudge_overlay
      edge_behavior: continuous_full_width_canvas
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: footer_micro_label
      path: root/top_metadata_row/*/metadata_label
      font_category: condensed_sans_or_narrow_display_sans
      visual_characteristics: tall_narrow_uppercase_characters_with_slightly_irregular_editorial_feel
      size_px: 13
      line_height_px: 16
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: slight_positive
      transform: uppercase
      alignment: left
      color: deep_muted_green
      confidence: medium
    - id: footer_micro_value
      path: root/top_metadata_row/*/metadata_value
      font_category: condensed_sans_or_narrow_display_sans
      visual_characteristics: narrow_strokes_compact_readable_footer_text
      size_px: 13
      line_height_px: 20
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: slight_positive
      transform: mostly_uppercase_or_mixed_case_depending_content
      alignment: left
      color: deep_muted_green
      confidence: medium
    - id: footer_micro_link
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/*_link_stack
      font_category: condensed_sans_or_narrow_display_sans
      visual_characteristics: all_caps_narrow_link_text_with_no_underline
      size_px: 13
      line_height_px: 18
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: slight_positive
      transform: uppercase
      alignment: left
      color: deep_muted_green
      confidence: medium
    - id: footer_oversized_serif_wordmark
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      font_category: high_contrast_serif_display
      visual_characteristics: elegant_editorial_serif_with_very_thin_hairlines_broad_vertical_stems_and_sharp_bracketed_serifs
      size_px: 405
      line_height_px: 300
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: moderate_positive_between_wordmark_letters
      transform: uppercase_wordmark
      alignment: split_left_and_right
      color: deep_forest_green
      confidence: high
    - id: overlay_badge_text
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      font_category: sans_serif
      visual_characteristics: small_bold_platform_badge_text
      size_px: 11
      line_height_px: 14
      weight: 700
      letter_spacing: normal
      transform: title_or_sentence_case
      alignment: centered_inline_with_icon
      color: near_black
      confidence: medium
  font_characteristics:
    - id: narrow_footer_microtype_character
      path: root/top_metadata_row and root/secondary_links_and_mark_row
      description: compact_condensed_letters_used_for_labels_values_and_links_creating_archival_menu_like_footer_texture
    - id: high_contrast_brand_display_character
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      description: large_luxury_editorial_serif_with_extreme_scale_contrast_against_micro_footer_text
  spacing:
    - id: footer_outer_inset
      path: root
      value_px: 50
      axis: horizontal
      role: section_content_side_padding
      confidence: high
    - id: footer_top_padding
      path: root
      value_px: 69
      axis: vertical
      role: top_space_before_metadata_row
      confidence: high
    - id: metadata_to_secondary_row_gap
      path: root/top_metadata_row to root/secondary_links_and_mark_row
      value_px: 95
      axis: vertical
      role: open_air_between_footer_info_rows
      confidence: medium
    - id: secondary_row_to_wordmark_gap
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row to root/oversized_wordmark_region
      value_px: 105
      axis: vertical
      role: large_breathing_space_before_dominant_brand_graphic
      confidence: medium
    - id: wordmark_bottom_margin
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region to root bottom
      value_px: 75
      axis: vertical
      role: final_canvas_breathing_room_below_wordmark
      confidence: medium
    - id: micro_stack_label_value_gap
      path: root/top_metadata_row/* text_stack
      value_px: 23
      axis: vertical
      role: separation_between_label_and_value
      confidence: medium
    - id: link_stack_line_gap
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/*_link_stack
      value_px: 4
      axis: vertical
      role: tight_footer_link_list_rhythm
      confidence: medium
    - id: large_column_gap
      path: root/top_metadata_row
      value_px: 280
      axis: horizontal
      role: wide_distributed_footer_column_spacing
      confidence: low
  radius:
    - id: external_overlay_pill_radius
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      value_px: 7
      role: non_section_badge_corner_radius
      confidence: medium
  sizes:
    - id: footer_section_height
      path: root
      value_px: 785
      role: visible_footer_crop_height
      confidence: high
    - id: compact_brand_mark_size
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      value_px: "64x40"
      role: small_logo_footprint
      confidence: medium
    - id: wordmark_left_segment_size
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region/wordmark_group_left
      value_px: "390x303"
      role: oversized_brand_segment_footprint
      confidence: medium
    - id: wordmark_right_segment_size
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region/wordmark_group_right
      value_px: "475x303"
      role: oversized_brand_segment_footprint
      confidence: medium
  opacity:
    - id: paper_texture_opacity
      path: root/paper_texture_overlay
      value: low
      role: subtle_background_texture_opacity
      confidence: low
  borders:
    - id: no_footer_internal_borders
      path: root
      style: none_observed
      role: footer_content_separation_by_whitespace_only
      confidence: high
  shadows:
    - id: external_overlay_soft_shadow
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      value: soft_low_elevation_drop_shadow
      role: non_section_fixed_badge_depth
      confidence: medium
  effects:
    - id: paper_grain_effect
      path: root
      type: subtle_texture_overlay
      description: faint_speckling_and_smudging_prevents_flat_white_canvas
      confidence: medium
    - id: typographic_scale_contrast_effect
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      type: scale_hierarchy
      description: oversized_serif_wordmark_dominates_lower_half_after_tiny_metadata_and_links
      confidence: high
  icons:
    - id: footer_compact_brand_mark_icon
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
      visual_style: dark_green_organic_emblem_with_internal_negative_line_detail
      stroke_or_fill: mostly_filled_single_color_with_light_cutouts
      container_relationship: no_container_floats_directly_on_ivory_canvas
      confidence: medium
    - id: external_overlay_small_glyphs
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      visual_style: tiny_black_platform_glyphs_inside_white_pills
      stroke_or_fill: solid_black_simple_shapes
      container_relationship: inside_external_rounded_badges_not_section_owned
      confidence: medium
  imagery_categories:
    icons:
      - id: compact_brand_emblem
        path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
        icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
        placement: foreground_graphic
        rendering: flat_vector_like_dark_green_mark_with_small_negative_highlights
        palette_relationship: same_dark_green_family_as_footer_text_and_wordmark
        detail_level: low_to_medium_due_small_size
        edge_behavior: transparent_background_no_frame
      - id: external_overlay_glyphs
        path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
        icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
        placement: foreground_graphic
        rendering: black_micro_glyphs_in_white_badges
        palette_relationship: external_neutral_palette_unrelated_to_section
        detail_level: low
        edge_behavior: contained_inside_badge_pills
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography: []
  media:
    - id: compact_brand_mark_media
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      category: icons
      role: standalone_brand_mark
      visual_placement: foreground_graphic
      implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
      creative_direction: small_dark_green_logo_like_organic_shape_on_plain_ivory_field
    - id: oversized_wordmark_media
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      category: icons
      role: typographic_logo_wordmark
      visual_placement: foreground_graphic
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      creative_direction: extremely_large_split_high_contrast_serif_brand_closure_with_luxury_editorial_tone
  creative_direction:
    - id: footer_surface_direction
      path: root
      category: surface
      description: warm_off_white_paper_canvas_with_minimal_texture_supporting_dark_green_editorial_typography
    - id: footer_typographic_direction
      path: root
      category: typography
      description: dramatic_scale_contrast_between_micro_condensed_footer_copy_and_giant_refined_serif_wordmark
    - id: footer_graphic_direction
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      category: icons
      description: understated_monochrome_brand_emblem_placed_as_a_small_pause_between_link_columns
  implementation_assumptions:
    - path: root
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: full_width_footer_block_with simple background and positioned text groups
    - path: root/paper_texture_overlay
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      rationale: subtle repeated paper grain appears over entire canvas
    - path: root/top_metadata_row
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: text content arranged in columns
    - path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/*_link_stack
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: visible text links aligned as footer navigation lists
    - path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
      rationale: compact scalable monochrome logo-like graphic
    - path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: could be live text with display font or vector text; visual evidence favors typography-driven graphic
    - path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      implementation_assumption: unknown
      rationale: appears as fixed external platform overlay above page rather than footer-owned content
  components:
    - id: metadata_column_component
      path: root/top_metadata_row/items
      type: text_stack
      host_surface: warm_ivory_canvas
      child_surface: none_transparent
      text_color: deep_muted_green
      border: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: compact_width_content_driven
      separation_mechanism: label_value_gap_and_wide_column_spacing
    - id: footer_link_stack_component
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/*_link_stack
      type: text_link_list
      host_surface: warm_ivory_canvas
      child_surface: none_transparent
      text_color: deep_muted_green
      border: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: content_width
      separation_mechanism: vertical_line_rhythm_only
    - id: brand_mark_component
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      type: standalone_logo_mark
      host_surface: warm_ivory_canvas
      child_surface: transparent
      color: deep_forest_green
      border: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: fixed_small_graphic
      separation_mechanism: whitespace
    - id: split_wordmark_component
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      type: oversized_typographic_logo_lockup
      host_surface: warm_ivory_canvas
      child_surface: transparent
      text_color: deep_forest_green
      border: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: viewport_scale_large_display
      separation_mechanism: large_center_gap_and_lower_section_placement
    - id: external_badge_component
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      type: fixed_overlay_badges
      host_surface: not_section_owned
      child_surface: white_rounded_pills
      text_icon_color: near_black
      border: none_visible
      shadow: soft_drop_shadow
      sizing_behavior: fixed_small_pills
      separation_mechanism: overlay_z_index_and_shadow
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - name: warm_ivory_paper_canvas
        value_estimate: "#f4f0eb"
        usage: footer_and_possible_site_background_surface
      - name: deep_forest_green
        value_estimate: "#164b31"
        usage: brand_wordmark_and_primary_dark_typography
      - name: muted_footer_green
        value_estimate: "#244b38"
        usage: micro_labels_values_and_links
    gradients: []
    patterns:
      - name: subtle_paper_grain
        usage: low_contrast_ivory_background_texture
    background_systems:
      - name: warm_paper_canvas
        layers: ivory_fill_plus_subtle_grain
    typography:
      - name: footer_micro_condensed
        usage: uppercase footer labels values and links
      - name: oversized_editorial_serif_wordmark
        usage: large split footer brand closure
    spacing:
      - name: footer_outer_padding
        value_estimate: 50px_horizontal
      - name: footer_top_padding
        value_estimate: 69px
      - name: footer_major_vertical_air
        value_estimate: 95_to_105px_between_rows
      - name: footer_tight_link_leading
        value_estimate: 18px_line_height_with_small_gap
    radius:
      - name: external_overlay_pill_radius_not_site_token
        value_estimate: 7px
    shadow:
      - name: external_overlay_soft_shadow_not_site_token
        usage: visible_only_on_third_party_badges
    dividers:
      - none_observed_internal_footer_dividers
  likely_components:
    - footer_metadata_column
    - footer_text_link_stack
    - compact_brand_mark
    - oversized_split_wordmark_lockup
    - full_width_paper_footer_section
  likely_section_patterns:
    - final_footer_with_sparse_top_metadata_distributed_across_width
    - navigation_row_with_small_center_brand_emblem_and_legal_links
    - lower_half_dominated_by_oversized_split_serif_wordmark
    - separation_by_whitespace_not_lines_or_cards
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - name: dark_green_text_on_warm_ivory_paper
      recipe: transparent_text_and_graphics_directly_on_warm_paper_canvas_no_cards_no_borders
    - name: oversized_wordmark_on_light_surface
      recipe: high_contrast_serif_large_scale_dark_green_type_with_generous_air_around_it
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - wide_four_column_distribution_uses_viewport_width_rather_than_centered_narrow_container
    - microcopy_stacks_use_large_label_to_value_gap_relative_to_text_size
    - lower_navigation_row_mirrors_top_column_positions_for_visual_order
    - wordmark_region_begins_after_large_open_gap_and_sets_the_footer_closing_weight
  link_action_mechanics:
    - footer_links_are_plain_text_on_canvas_with_no_visible_underline_or_button_container
    - social_and_legal_actions_share_same_microtype_as_navigation_links
    - no_hover_state_visible_in_static_capture
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - giant_split_high_contrast_serif_wordmark_in_dark_green
    - small_monochrome_organic_brand_emblem_between_link_columns
    - archival_paper_canvas_with_condensed_green_microtypography
    - strong_scale_contrast_and_asymmetric_empty_space
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons:
      - monochrome_dark_green_logo_like_emblem_with_organic_contours_and_negative_detail
      - tiny_single_color_glyphs_only_in_external_overlay_not_site_system
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography: []
  do_not_generalize:
    - external_bottom_right_badge_overlay_appears_platform_or_template_related_and_should_not_be_treated_as_site_footer_design
    - exact_visible_brand_wordmark_letters_should_not_be_reused_as_generic_copy
    - exact_contact_details_addresses_social_platform_names_and_legal_text_are_content_specific_and_not_transcribed
    - external_overlay_white_pills_black_text_shadow_should_not_be_promoted_to_site_component_tokens
  uncertainties:
    - whether_oversized_wordmark_is_live_text_or_svg_vector_is_not_recoverable_from_screenshot
    - exact_microtype_font_family_unclear_but_visual_character_is_condensed_narrow_editorial_sans
    - paper_texture_may_be_from_compression_or_real_surface_texture_but_low_contrast_grain_is_visible
    - compact_brand_mark_subject_is_unclear; treat_as_logo_wordmark_asset_not_general_illustration
07-footer.yamlruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/section-groundings/07-footer.yaml
schema_version: raw_section_yaml.v1
type: raw_section_capture
source:
  type: screenshot
  section_scope: single_website_section
  section_index: 7
  total_sections: 7
  detected_label: "Footer"
  previous_section_label: "Full-width food image feature"
  next_section_label: "N/A"
  bounds:
    original_y_start: 5520
    original_y_end: 6305
    crop_y_start: 5520
    crop_y_end: 6305
  fidelity: visually_approximated_from_screenshot
  literal_text_included: false
section:
  id: footer_contact_navigation_brand_closure
  role: site_footer
  confidence: high
tree:
  id: root
  kind: section
  role: site_footer
  visibility: visible
  size:
    approx_width_px: 1366
    approx_height_px: 785
    width_behavior: full_viewport
    height_behavior: content_defined_final_page_block
  layout:
    display: block
    major_regions:
      - top_metadata_row
      - secondary_links_and_mark_row
      - oversized_wordmark_region
    horizontal_padding_px: 50
    vertical_padding_top_px: 68
    vertical_padding_bottom_px: 70
    alignment: full_width_canvas_with_inset_content_columns
  position:
    flow_position: final_section_after_full_width_media
    top_transition: hard_reset_from_previous_photo_to_footer_canvas_no_visible_divider
    bottom_transition: final_page_edge_same_canvas_no_visible_divider
  style:
    background_color: warm_ivory_paper
    background_color_estimate: "#f4f0eb"
    color: deep_forest_green
    color_estimate: "#164b31"
    texture: subtle_paper_grain_and_faint_smudging
    overflow: visible
  layers:
    - id: base_canvas_fill
      role: root_surface
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      style:
        fill: warm_ivory
        reaches_viewport_edges: true
    - id: paper_texture_overlay
      role: subtle_surface_texture
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      style:
        color_variation: very_low_contrast_beige_speckles_and_faint_vertical_marks
        opacity: low
        blend: over_base_canvas
  children:
    - id: top_metadata_row
      kind: layout_region
      role: footer_metadata_grid
      visibility: visible
      size:
        approx_width_px: 1265
        approx_height_px: 85
      position:
        x_px: 50
        y_px: 69
      layout:
        display: grid_like_four_column_row
        columns: 4
        column_distribution: wide_even_spread_across_viewport
        align_items: start
        gap_behavior: large_horizontal_air
      style:
        background: transparent
      items:
        - id: metadata_column_1
          kind: text_stack
          role: contact_method_block
          position:
            approx_x_px: 50
            approx_y_px: 69
          size:
            approx_width_px: 180
            approx_height_px: 60
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            gap_px: 24
            align: left
          children:
            - id: metadata_label
              kind: text
              role: small_uppercase_label
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_label
                color_ref: footer_text_green
            - id: metadata_value
              kind: text
              role: single_line_contact_value
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_value
                color_ref: footer_text_green
        - id: metadata_column_2
          kind: text_stack
          role: phone_contact_block
          position:
            approx_x_px: 460
            approx_y_px: 69
          size:
            approx_width_px: 160
            approx_height_px: 60
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            gap_px: 24
            align: left
          children:
            - id: metadata_label
              kind: text
              role: small_uppercase_label
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_label
                color_ref: footer_text_green
            - id: metadata_value
              kind: text
              role: single_line_contact_value
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_value
                color_ref: footer_text_green
        - id: metadata_column_3
          kind: text_stack
          role: social_links_block
          position:
            approx_x_px: 830
            approx_y_px: 69
          size:
            approx_width_px: 150
            approx_height_px: 74
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            gap_px: 22
            align: left
          children:
            - id: metadata_label
              kind: text
              role: small_uppercase_label
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_label
                color_ref: footer_text_green
            - id: social_link_list
              kind: link_list
              role: social_text_links
              layout:
                direction: vertical
                item_count: 2
                line_gap_px: 4
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_link
                color_ref: footer_text_green
                text_decoration: none_visible
                background: transparent
        - id: metadata_column_4
          kind: text_stack
          role: location_block
          position:
            approx_x_px: 1200
            approx_y_px: 69
          size:
            approx_width_px: 135
            approx_height_px: 82
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            gap_px: 23
            align: left
          children:
            - id: metadata_label
              kind: text
              role: small_uppercase_label
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_label
                color_ref: footer_text_green
            - id: metadata_value
              kind: text
              role: two_line_location_value
              style:
                typography_ref: footer_micro_value
                color_ref: footer_text_green
                line_height_px: 22
    - id: secondary_links_and_mark_row
      kind: layout_region
      role: footer_navigation_and_brand_mark_row
      visibility: visible
      size:
        approx_width_px: 1265
        approx_height_px: 70
      position:
        x_px: 50
        y_px: 244
      layout:
        display: distributed_slots
        align_items: start
        slot_positions: left_links_under_first_column_small_mark_under_second_column_center_links_under_third_column_legal_under_fourth_column
      style:
        background: transparent
      children:
        - id: primary_footer_link_stack
          kind: link_list
          role: footer_primary_navigation_links
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 51
            approx_y_px: 245
          size:
            approx_width_px: 90
            approx_height_px: 58
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            item_count: 3
            line_gap_px: 4
            align: left
          style:
            typography_ref: footer_micro_link
            color_ref: footer_text_green
            text_decoration: none_visible
            background: transparent
        - id: small_brand_emblem
          kind: graphic
          role: compact_brand_mark
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 451
            approx_y_px: 247
          size:
            approx_width_px: 64
            approx_height_px: 40
          layout:
            alignment_context: centered_near_second_column
          style:
            fill_color: deep_forest_green
            background: transparent
          imagery:
            category: icons
            icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
            visual_placement: foreground_graphic
            creative_direction: small_organic_emblem_with_dark_green_fill_and_light_negative_detail
            edge_behavior: floats_on_canvas_without_container
          implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
        - id: secondary_footer_link_stack
          kind: link_list
          role: footer_secondary_navigation_links
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 836
            approx_y_px: 245
          size:
            approx_width_px: 85
            approx_height_px: 58
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            item_count: 3
            line_gap_px: 4
            align: left
          style:
            typography_ref: footer_micro_link
            color_ref: footer_text_green
            text_decoration: none_visible
            background: transparent
        - id: legal_link_stack
          kind: link_list
          role: footer_legal_links
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 1236
            approx_y_px: 245
          size:
            approx_width_px: 100
            approx_height_px: 38
          layout:
            direction: vertical
            item_count: 2
            line_gap_px: 4
            align: left
          style:
            typography_ref: footer_micro_link
            color_ref: footer_text_green
            text_decoration: none_visible
            background: transparent
    - id: oversized_wordmark_region
      kind: graphic_text_region
      role: oversized_split_brand_wordmark
      visibility: visible
      size:
        approx_width_px: 1270
        approx_height_px: 310
      position:
        x_px: 62
        y_px: 405
      layout:
        display: two_large_wordmark_groups
        horizontal_distribution: left_group_and_right_group_with_large_center_gap
        align_items: baseline
      style:
        background: transparent
        color_ref: footer_wordmark_green
      children:
        - id: wordmark_group_left
          kind: text_graphic
          role: oversized_serif_wordmark_segment
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 62
            approx_y_px: 405
          size:
            approx_width_px: 390
            approx_height_px: 303
          style:
            typography_ref: footer_oversized_serif_wordmark
            color_ref: footer_wordmark_green
            background: transparent
            text_rendering: vector_or_font_text
        - id: wordmark_group_right
          kind: text_graphic
          role: oversized_serif_wordmark_segment
          visibility: visible
          position:
            approx_x_px: 803
            approx_y_px: 405
          size:
            approx_width_px: 475
            approx_height_px: 303
          style:
            typography_ref: footer_oversized_serif_wordmark
            color_ref: footer_wordmark_green
            background: transparent
            text_rendering: vector_or_font_text
    - id: non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      kind: overlay_widget
      role: external_capture_overlay_badges
      visibility: visible
      ownership: not_section_owned_low_confidence_external_platform_ui
      size:
        approx_width_px: 110
        approx_height_px: 63
      position:
        approx_x_px: 1239
        approx_y_px: 704
        placement: fixed_bottom_right_viewport_overlay
      layout:
        direction: vertical
        item_count: 2
        gap_px: 8
        align: right
      style:
        background: transparent
        z_index_behavior: above_page_content
      items:
        - id: overlay_pill_top
          kind: badge_button
          role: external_builder_action_badge
          size:
            approx_width_px: 108
            approx_height_px: 29
          style:
            background_color: white
            text_color: near_black
            border_radius_px: 7
            box_shadow: soft_low_elevation
            typography_ref: overlay_badge_text
            icon: small_black_single_color_mark_at_right
        - id: overlay_pill_bottom
          kind: badge_button
          role: external_builder_attribution_badge
          size:
            approx_width_px: 108
            approx_height_px: 29
          style:
            background_color: white
            text_color: near_black
            border_radius_px: 7
            box_shadow: soft_low_elevation
            typography_ref: overlay_badge_text
            icon: small_black_single_color_mark_at_left
component_anatomy:
  actual_page_ui_components:
    - id: footer_metadata_grid
      role: four_distributed_contact_and_social_metadata_columns
      notes: small uppercase labels with compact values, no containing cards or dividers
    - id: footer_text_link_stacks
      role: multiple_vertical_navigation_link_lists
      notes: text-only footer navigation, legal, and social links on transparent canvas
    - id: compact_brand_mark
      role: small_standalone_brand_emblem
      notes: dark green organic logo-like mark, no container
    - id: oversized_split_wordmark
      role: dominant_footer_brand_closure_graphic
      notes: high-contrast serif display wordmark split into two large groups
  embedded_or_showcase_only_ui: []
  absent_common_components:
    - newsletter_form
    - primary_cta_button
    - input_field
    - card_grid
    - accordion
    - visible_divider_lines
    - photographic_media
observed_values:
  colors:
    - id: footer_canvas_warm_ivory
      path: root
      value_estimate: "#f4f0eb"
      role: full_width_section_background
      confidence: high
    - id: footer_text_green
      path: root/top_metadata_row and root/secondary_links_and_mark_row
      value_estimate: "#244b38"
      role: small_footer_text_and_link_color
      confidence: high
    - id: footer_wordmark_green
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      value_estimate: "#164b31"
      role: oversized_brand_wordmark_color
      confidence: high
    - id: external_overlay_white
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      value_estimate: "#ffffff"
      role: non_section_overlay_pill_fill
      confidence: high
    - id: external_overlay_black
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      value_estimate: "#111111"
      role: non_section_overlay_text_and_icon
      confidence: high
  gradients: []
  patterns:
    - id: subtle_paper_surface_noise
      path: root/paper_texture_overlay
      type: low_contrast_noise_texture
      colors: warm_ivory_to_slightly_darker_beige
      scale: fine
      density: sparse_to_moderate
      confidence: medium
  background_systems:
    - id: footer_paper_canvas_system
      path: root
      layers:
        - warm_ivory_base_fill_reaching_viewport_edges
        - subtle_paper_grain_and_faint_smudge_overlay
      edge_behavior: continuous_full_width_canvas
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: footer_micro_label
      path: root/top_metadata_row/*/metadata_label
      font_category: condensed_sans_or_narrow_display_sans
      visual_characteristics: tall_narrow_uppercase_characters_with_slightly_irregular_editorial_feel
      size_px: 13
      line_height_px: 16
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: slight_positive
      transform: uppercase
      alignment: left
      color: deep_muted_green
      confidence: medium
    - id: footer_micro_value
      path: root/top_metadata_row/*/metadata_value
      font_category: condensed_sans_or_narrow_display_sans
      visual_characteristics: narrow_strokes_compact_readable_footer_text
      size_px: 13
      line_height_px: 20
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: slight_positive
      transform: mostly_uppercase_or_mixed_case_depending_content
      alignment: left
      color: deep_muted_green
      confidence: medium
    - id: footer_micro_link
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/*_link_stack
      font_category: condensed_sans_or_narrow_display_sans
      visual_characteristics: all_caps_narrow_link_text_with_no_underline
      size_px: 13
      line_height_px: 18
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: slight_positive
      transform: uppercase
      alignment: left
      color: deep_muted_green
      confidence: medium
    - id: footer_oversized_serif_wordmark
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      font_category: high_contrast_serif_display
      visual_characteristics: elegant_editorial_serif_with_very_thin_hairlines_broad_vertical_stems_and_sharp_bracketed_serifs
      size_px: 405
      line_height_px: 300
      weight: 400
      letter_spacing: moderate_positive_between_wordmark_letters
      transform: uppercase_wordmark
      alignment: split_left_and_right
      color: deep_forest_green
      confidence: high
    - id: overlay_badge_text
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      font_category: sans_serif
      visual_characteristics: small_bold_platform_badge_text
      size_px: 11
      line_height_px: 14
      weight: 700
      letter_spacing: normal
      transform: title_or_sentence_case
      alignment: centered_inline_with_icon
      color: near_black
      confidence: medium
  font_characteristics:
    - id: narrow_footer_microtype_character
      path: root/top_metadata_row and root/secondary_links_and_mark_row
      description: compact_condensed_letters_used_for_labels_values_and_links_creating_archival_menu_like_footer_texture
    - id: high_contrast_brand_display_character
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      description: large_luxury_editorial_serif_with_extreme_scale_contrast_against_micro_footer_text
  spacing:
    - id: footer_outer_inset
      path: root
      value_px: 50
      axis: horizontal
      role: section_content_side_padding
      confidence: high
    - id: footer_top_padding
      path: root
      value_px: 69
      axis: vertical
      role: top_space_before_metadata_row
      confidence: high
    - id: metadata_to_secondary_row_gap
      path: root/top_metadata_row to root/secondary_links_and_mark_row
      value_px: 95
      axis: vertical
      role: open_air_between_footer_info_rows
      confidence: medium
    - id: secondary_row_to_wordmark_gap
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row to root/oversized_wordmark_region
      value_px: 105
      axis: vertical
      role: large_breathing_space_before_dominant_brand_graphic
      confidence: medium
    - id: wordmark_bottom_margin
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region to root bottom
      value_px: 75
      axis: vertical
      role: final_canvas_breathing_room_below_wordmark
      confidence: medium
    - id: micro_stack_label_value_gap
      path: root/top_metadata_row/* text_stack
      value_px: 23
      axis: vertical
      role: separation_between_label_and_value
      confidence: medium
    - id: link_stack_line_gap
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/*_link_stack
      value_px: 4
      axis: vertical
      role: tight_footer_link_list_rhythm
      confidence: medium
    - id: large_column_gap
      path: root/top_metadata_row
      value_px: 280
      axis: horizontal
      role: wide_distributed_footer_column_spacing
      confidence: low
  radius:
    - id: external_overlay_pill_radius
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      value_px: 7
      role: non_section_badge_corner_radius
      confidence: medium
  sizes:
    - id: footer_section_height
      path: root
      value_px: 785
      role: visible_footer_crop_height
      confidence: high
    - id: compact_brand_mark_size
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      value_px: "64x40"
      role: small_logo_footprint
      confidence: medium
    - id: wordmark_left_segment_size
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region/wordmark_group_left
      value_px: "390x303"
      role: oversized_brand_segment_footprint
      confidence: medium
    - id: wordmark_right_segment_size
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region/wordmark_group_right
      value_px: "475x303"
      role: oversized_brand_segment_footprint
      confidence: medium
  opacity:
    - id: paper_texture_opacity
      path: root/paper_texture_overlay
      value: low
      role: subtle_background_texture_opacity
      confidence: low
  borders:
    - id: no_footer_internal_borders
      path: root
      style: none_observed
      role: footer_content_separation_by_whitespace_only
      confidence: high
  shadows:
    - id: external_overlay_soft_shadow
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      value: soft_low_elevation_drop_shadow
      role: non_section_fixed_badge_depth
      confidence: medium
  effects:
    - id: paper_grain_effect
      path: root
      type: subtle_texture_overlay
      description: faint_speckling_and_smudging_prevents_flat_white_canvas
      confidence: medium
    - id: typographic_scale_contrast_effect
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      type: scale_hierarchy
      description: oversized_serif_wordmark_dominates_lower_half_after_tiny_metadata_and_links
      confidence: high
  icons:
    - id: footer_compact_brand_mark_icon
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
      visual_style: dark_green_organic_emblem_with_internal_negative_line_detail
      stroke_or_fill: mostly_filled_single_color_with_light_cutouts
      container_relationship: no_container_floats_directly_on_ivory_canvas
      confidence: medium
    - id: external_overlay_small_glyphs
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
      visual_style: tiny_black_platform_glyphs_inside_white_pills
      stroke_or_fill: solid_black_simple_shapes
      container_relationship: inside_external_rounded_badges_not_section_owned
      confidence: medium
  imagery_categories:
    icons:
      - id: compact_brand_emblem
        path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
        icon_asset_class: logo/wordmark
        placement: foreground_graphic
        rendering: flat_vector_like_dark_green_mark_with_small_negative_highlights
        palette_relationship: same_dark_green_family_as_footer_text_and_wordmark
        detail_level: low_to_medium_due_small_size
        edge_behavior: transparent_background_no_frame
      - id: external_overlay_glyphs
        path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
        icon_asset_class: single-color-icon
        placement: foreground_graphic
        rendering: black_micro_glyphs_in_white_badges
        palette_relationship: external_neutral_palette_unrelated_to_section
        detail_level: low
        edge_behavior: contained_inside_badge_pills
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography: []
  media:
    - id: compact_brand_mark_media
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      category: icons
      role: standalone_brand_mark
      visual_placement: foreground_graphic
      implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
      creative_direction: small_dark_green_logo_like_organic_shape_on_plain_ivory_field
    - id: oversized_wordmark_media
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      category: icons
      role: typographic_logo_wordmark
      visual_placement: foreground_graphic
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      creative_direction: extremely_large_split_high_contrast_serif_brand_closure_with_luxury_editorial_tone
  creative_direction:
    - id: footer_surface_direction
      path: root
      category: surface
      description: warm_off_white_paper_canvas_with_minimal_texture_supporting_dark_green_editorial_typography
    - id: footer_typographic_direction
      path: root
      category: typography
      description: dramatic_scale_contrast_between_micro_condensed_footer_copy_and_giant_refined_serif_wordmark
    - id: footer_graphic_direction
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      category: icons
      description: understated_monochrome_brand_emblem_placed_as_a_small_pause_between_link_columns
  implementation_assumptions:
    - path: root
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: full_width_footer_block_with simple background and positioned text groups
    - path: root/paper_texture_overlay
      implementation_assumption: likely_css_or_svg_texture
      rationale: subtle repeated paper grain appears over entire canvas
    - path: root/top_metadata_row
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: text content arranged in columns
    - path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/*_link_stack
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: visible text links aligned as footer navigation lists
    - path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      implementation_assumption: likely_svg_or_canvas_graphic
      rationale: compact scalable monochrome logo-like graphic
    - path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      implementation_assumption: likely_dom_or_layout_element
      rationale: could be live text with display font or vector text; visual evidence favors typography-driven graphic
    - path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      implementation_assumption: unknown
      rationale: appears as fixed external platform overlay above page rather than footer-owned content
  components:
    - id: metadata_column_component
      path: root/top_metadata_row/items
      type: text_stack
      host_surface: warm_ivory_canvas
      child_surface: none_transparent
      text_color: deep_muted_green
      border: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: compact_width_content_driven
      separation_mechanism: label_value_gap_and_wide_column_spacing
    - id: footer_link_stack_component
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/*_link_stack
      type: text_link_list
      host_surface: warm_ivory_canvas
      child_surface: none_transparent
      text_color: deep_muted_green
      border: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: content_width
      separation_mechanism: vertical_line_rhythm_only
    - id: brand_mark_component
      path: root/secondary_links_and_mark_row/small_brand_emblem
      type: standalone_logo_mark
      host_surface: warm_ivory_canvas
      child_surface: transparent
      color: deep_forest_green
      border: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: fixed_small_graphic
      separation_mechanism: whitespace
    - id: split_wordmark_component
      path: root/oversized_wordmark_region
      type: oversized_typographic_logo_lockup
      host_surface: warm_ivory_canvas
      child_surface: transparent
      text_color: deep_forest_green
      border: none
      shadow: none
      sizing_behavior: viewport_scale_large_display
      separation_mechanism: large_center_gap_and_lower_section_placement
    - id: external_badge_component
      path: root/non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
      type: fixed_overlay_badges
      host_surface: not_section_owned
      child_surface: white_rounded_pills
      text_icon_color: near_black
      border: none_visible
      shadow: soft_drop_shadow
      sizing_behavior: fixed_small_pills
      separation_mechanism: overlay_z_index_and_shadow
consolidation_notes:
  likely_tokens:
    colors:
      - name: warm_ivory_paper_canvas
        value_estimate: "#f4f0eb"
        usage: footer_and_possible_site_background_surface
      - name: deep_forest_green
        value_estimate: "#164b31"
        usage: brand_wordmark_and_primary_dark_typography
      - name: muted_footer_green
        value_estimate: "#244b38"
        usage: micro_labels_values_and_links
    gradients: []
    patterns:
      - name: subtle_paper_grain
        usage: low_contrast_ivory_background_texture
    background_systems:
      - name: warm_paper_canvas
        layers: ivory_fill_plus_subtle_grain
    typography:
      - name: footer_micro_condensed
        usage: uppercase footer labels values and links
      - name: oversized_editorial_serif_wordmark
        usage: large split footer brand closure
    spacing:
      - name: footer_outer_padding
        value_estimate: 50px_horizontal
      - name: footer_top_padding
        value_estimate: 69px
      - name: footer_major_vertical_air
        value_estimate: 95_to_105px_between_rows
      - name: footer_tight_link_leading
        value_estimate: 18px_line_height_with_small_gap
    radius:
      - name: external_overlay_pill_radius_not_site_token
        value_estimate: 7px
    shadow:
      - name: external_overlay_soft_shadow_not_site_token
        usage: visible_only_on_third_party_badges
    dividers:
      - none_observed_internal_footer_dividers
  likely_components:
    - footer_metadata_column
    - footer_text_link_stack
    - compact_brand_mark
    - oversized_split_wordmark_lockup
    - full_width_paper_footer_section
  likely_section_patterns:
    - final_footer_with_sparse_top_metadata_distributed_across_width
    - navigation_row_with_small_center_brand_emblem_and_legal_links
    - lower_half_dominated_by_oversized_split_serif_wordmark
    - separation_by_whitespace_not_lines_or_cards
  surface_specific_recipes:
    - name: dark_green_text_on_warm_ivory_paper
      recipe: transparent_text_and_graphics_directly_on_warm_paper_canvas_no_cards_no_borders
    - name: oversized_wordmark_on_light_surface
      recipe: high_contrast_serif_large_scale_dark_green_type_with_generous_air_around_it
  spacing_and_rhythm_mechanics:
    - wide_four_column_distribution_uses_viewport_width_rather_than_centered_narrow_container
    - microcopy_stacks_use_large_label_to_value_gap_relative_to_text_size
    - lower_navigation_row_mirrors_top_column_positions_for_visual_order
    - wordmark_region_begins_after_large_open_gap_and_sets_the_footer_closing_weight
  link_action_mechanics:
    - footer_links_are_plain_text_on_canvas_with_no_visible_underline_or_button_container
    - social_and_legal_actions_share_same_microtype_as_navigation_links
    - no_hover_state_visible_in_static_capture
  distinct_visual_motifs:
    - giant_split_high_contrast_serif_wordmark_in_dark_green
    - small_monochrome_organic_brand_emblem_between_link_columns
    - archival_paper_canvas_with_condensed_green_microtypography
    - strong_scale_contrast_and_asymmetric_empty_space
  imagery_direction_candidates:
    icons:
      - monochrome_dark_green_logo_like_emblem_with_organic_contours_and_negative_detail
      - tiny_single_color_glyphs_only_in_external_overlay_not_site_system
    illustrations: []
    interfaces: []
    photography: []
  do_not_generalize:
    - external_bottom_right_badge_overlay_appears_platform_or_template_related_and_should_not_be_treated_as_site_footer_design
    - exact_visible_brand_wordmark_letters_should_not_be_reused_as_generic_copy
    - exact_contact_details_addresses_social_platform_names_and_legal_text_are_content_specific_and_not_transcribed
    - external_overlay_white_pills_black_text_shadow_should_not_be_promoted_to_site_component_tokens
  uncertainties:
    - whether_oversized_wordmark_is_live_text_or_svg_vector_is_not_recoverable_from_screenshot
    - exact_microtype_font_family_unclear_but_visual_character_is_condensed_narrow_editorial_sans
    - paper_texture_may_be_from_compression_or_real_surface_texture_but_low_contrast_grain_is_visible
    - compact_brand_mark_subject_is_unclear; treat_as_logo_wordmark_asset_not_general_illustration

Step 6

Pre-sync merged grounding. This stage stitches the individual section analyses back into one full-page grounding draft before any source-CSS correction is applied.

Sections
  • Review + merge token summary
  • Grounding merge prompt
  • Full-page review prompt
  • Global site grounding prompt
  • Global site grounding YAML
  • Pre-sync merged grounding
  • Source layouts artifact
Review + merge token summary
Calls3
Input tokens273,693
Output tokens41,853
Grounding merge promptruns/v177/grounding-merge-prompt.md
You are a schema normalization compiler. Convert multiple raw section capture YAML documents for the same webpage into one normalized site-level AST YAML document.

Your job is the middle layer of this pipeline:

```yaml
Raw section capture
  -> Normalized section AST
  -> Design-system YAML
```

The inputs may include a full-page section inventory, detected section bounds, full-page review overrides, source/style notes, and many raw `section.yaml` captures. Treat the raw section YAML files as the highest-detail grounding. Use the inventory and detected section list for order and bounds.

## Purpose

Normalize many instance-specific section captures into comparable primitives. Preserve provenance so final design-system synthesis can trace each abstraction back to section-level evidence.

The normalized AST should answer:

- Across all sections, what kinds of nodes appear?
- Which structures repeat?
- Which colors, type styles, spacings, radii, shadows, dividers, and background systems recur?
- Which section patterns are similar?
- Which values are likely aliases of the same token role?
- Which component anatomies appear more than once?
- Which surface/component pairings must not be generalized?

## Core Rules

- Return YAML only. Do not wrap it in markdown fences.
- Set `schema_version: normalized_site_ast.v1` and `type: normalized_site_ast`.
- Keep the complete YAML under roughly 14,000 output tokens. Completeness matters more than exhaustive node dumps.
- For each section, include 3-6 highest-signal `normalized_nodes` only: wrapper/background, primary container/scaffold, main content stack, one representative repeated item/card/control family, and one important media/graphic layer when present.
- Do not expand every raw tree child. Preserve detailed raw section information through provenance and summarized observations rather than copying the raw tree.
- Keep arrays compact: prefer one-line scalar summaries and short occurrence lists over long prose.
- Do not produce the final design system. Use suggested token/component names only as candidates.
- Keep IDs generic and reusable. Do not name nodes, tokens, components, or patterns after content, business, brand, industry, product, or section copy.
- Normalize exact observed section IDs into generic roles while preserving raw provenance.
- Preserve raw path provenance using `provenance.raw_file` and `provenance.raw_path` wherever possible.
- Preserve approximate values from raw files, but group likely aliases into shared observations with confidence.
- Surface relationships are primary evidence. Keep host surface, child surface, text, border, divider, shadow/glow, and control fill pairings together.
- Preserve surface ownership separately from surface color.
