global_observations:
  colors:
    - value: "#f4f2ec / #f4f1eb / #f6f2ec / #f4f0eb"
      normalized_role: light_brand_editorial_canvas
      observed_roles: ["opening canvas", "shared editorial canvas", "footer canvas"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_01_navigation, path: root, raw_value_role: section_host_surface}
        - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: root, raw_value_role: full_width_section_surface}
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: root, raw_value_role: root_surface}
      suggested_token: colors.surface.lightWarm
      confidence: high
    - value: "#164b31 / #174c2f / #24543a / #24563a"
      normalized_role: primary_ink_deep_green
      observed_roles: ["text", "wordmark", "icon", "button fill"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: identity_wordmark, raw_value_role: letterform_color}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair, raw_value_role: button_fill}
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: top_metadata_row, raw_value_role: footer_text_green}
      suggested_token: colors.ink.primaryGreen
      confidence: high
    - value: "#f4f2ec / #f4f0eb"
      normalized_role: inverse_on_dark_control
      observed_roles: ["nav text", "nav divider", "button text", "button icon"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel, raw_value_role: text_and_divider}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair, raw_value_role: button_text}
      suggested_token: colors.ink.onPrimaryGreen
      confidence: high
    - value: "#687869 / muted_green_hairline"
      normalized_role: muted_green_hairline
      observed_roles: ["grid border", "panel outline", "internal dividers"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: bordered_grid_panel, raw_value_role: outer_border_and_internal_grid_lines}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: framed_content_panel, raw_value_role: panel_outline_and_dividers}
      suggested_token: colors.border.mutedGreen
      confidence: high
    - value: "transparent"
      normalized_role: transparent_module_fill
      observed_roles: ["cards on light canvas", "grid cells", "link stacks", "panel header"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: representative_grid_item, raw_value_role: cell_background}
        - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: collage_area, raw_value_role: background}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: representative_feature_card, raw_value_role: card_background}
      suggested_token: colors.surface.transparent
      confidence: high
    - value: "photo_dark_olive_black"
      normalized_role: photographic_dark_shadow
      observed_roles: ["hero photo shadows", "feature photo dark objects/shadows"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: full_bleed_media_band, raw_value_role: raster_photo_shadow}
        - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region, raw_value_role: raster_photo_shadow}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: medium
    - value: "photo_warm_gold_amber"
      normalized_role: photographic_warm_dominant
      observed_roles: ["hero photo highlights", "feature food photo", "grid/collage media"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: full_bleed_media_band, raw_value_role: raster_photo_warm_highlight}
        - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region, raw_value_role: raster_photo_grade}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: medium
    - value: "photo_teal_blue / red_gold accents"
      normalized_role: photographic_accent_pixels
      observed_roles: ["collage media variation", "food/table imagery accent"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: representative_media_caption_unit, raw_value_role: raster_photo_color_treatment}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: low
    - value: "#ffffff"
      normalized_role: external_overlay_surface
      observed_roles: ["non-section fixed badge fill"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: non_section_overlay_badge, raw_value_role: external_badge_fill}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: low
  gradients:
    - id: raster_photographic_luminance_falloff
      normalized_role: image_content_lighting_not_css_gradient
      observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      values: ["dark green/black to olive/gold", "amber highlights to deep warm shadows"]
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: high
    - id: no_global_css_gradient
      normalized_role: absent_gradient_system
      observed_in: [full_page_grounding]
      values: ["flat cream surfaces", "hard photo cuts"]
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: high
  background_systems:
    - id: light_brand_editorial_canvas
      role: flat_warm_ivory_paper_canvas
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index, section_07_footer]
      mechanics: "full-width warm off-white surface, deep green foreground, subtle paper/noise possible, no gradients"
      confidence: high
    - id: opening_brand_surface_run
      role: continuous_header_masthead_canvas
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro]
      mechanics: "header controls and masthead wordmark share same canvas; no nav bar boundary"
      confidence: high
    - id: shared_light_editorial_run
      role: continuous_midpage_canvas
      observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index]
      mechanics: "values grid, collage, and journal module sit on same canvas; layout changes do not imply background reset"
      confidence: high
    - id: inset_hairline_module_system
      role: same-fill_bordered_foreground_modules
      observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index]
      mechanics: "wide inset rectangles with transparent/same canvas fill, 1px muted green outlines and internal dividers"
      confidence: high
    - id: full_bleed_photo_reset
      role: raster_image_owns_viewport_band
      observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      mechanics: "photo reaches viewport edges, no matte/border/padding, hard horizontal edges"
      confidence: high
    - id: closing_brand_surface_run
      role: footer_light_canvas_after_photo
      observed_in: [section_07_footer]
      mechanics: "hard cut from photo to flat cream footer with sparse microcopy and huge wordmark"
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: oversized_identity_display
      normalized_role: brand_scale_serif_wordmark
      signature: "extremely large high-contrast serif, deep green, custom loose tracking/split clusters"
      occurrences: [{section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: identity_wordmark}, {section: section_07_footer, path: oversized_wordmark_region}]
      suggested_token: typography.display.identityHuge
      confidence: high
    - id: large_condensed_display_heading
      normalized_role: section_or_panel_heading
      signature: "tall condensed uppercase display, deep green, slight tight/normal tracking"
      occurrences: [{section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: header_stack}, {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: panel_header_action}]
      suggested_token: typography.display.condensedSection
      confidence: high
    - id: section_heading_condensed_uppercase
      normalized_role: centered_section_heading
      signature: "centered uppercase/near-uppercase heading, deep green, moderate size"
      occurrences: [{section: section_03_values_grid, path: section_heading}]
      suggested_token: typography.heading.sectionCentered
      confidence: medium
    - id: micro_uppercase_nav_label
      normalized_role: compact_navigation_label
      signature: "small sans/neutral uppercase or near-uppercase, ivory on green"
      occurrences: [{section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel}]
      suggested_token: typography.label.navMicro
      confidence: high
    - id: micro_button_label
      normalized_role: compact_control_label
      signature: "small action label, compact, likely uppercase/short text"
      occurrences: [{section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair}]
      suggested_token: typography.label.buttonMicro
      confidence: high
    - id: micro_caption
      normalized_role: editorial_caption
      signature: "tiny caption/link-like text, deep green, tight letter spacing"
      occurrences: [{section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: representative_media_caption_unit}]
      suggested_token: typography.caption.micro
      confidence: high
    - id: small_card_title
      normalized_role: editorial_card_title
      signature: "small deep green title text inside card, normal tracking"
      occurrences: [{section: section_05_editorial_index, path: representative_feature_card}]
      suggested_token: typography.card.titleSmall
      confidence: high
    - id: footer_micro_text
      normalized_role: footer_label_value_link
      signature: "compact uppercase labels/values/links, deep green, sparse columns"
      occurrences: [{section: section_07_footer, path: top_metadata_row}, {section: section_07_footer, path: footer_link_rows}]
      suggested_token: typography.footer.micro
      confidence: high
  spacing:
    - id: edge_inset_small
      normalized_role: header_control_inset
      observed_values: ["small top/side inset"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_01_navigation, path: brand_mark_link}, {section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel}]
      suggested_token: spacing.inset.header
      confidence: medium
    - id: wide_inset_rail
      normalized_role: primary_content_module_rail
      observed_values: ["wide left/right inset for grid and journal panel"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_03_values_grid, path: bordered_grid_panel}, {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: framed_content_panel}]
      suggested_token: layout.rail.wide
      confidence: high
    - id: generous_section_air
      normalized_role: editorial_vertical_whitespace
      observed_values: ["large top/bottom breathing room on cream canvas"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_03_values_grid, path: section_canvas}, {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: section_canvas}]
      suggested_token: spacing.section.generous
      confidence: high
    - id: compact_control_padding
      normalized_role: compact_control_internal_padding
      observed_values: ["tight labels and icon controls"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel}, {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair}]
      suggested_token: spacing.control.compact
      confidence: high
    - id: cell_padding_regular
      normalized_role: bordered_grid_cell_padding
      observed_values: ["regular inset inside divided cells"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_03_values_grid, path: representative_grid_item}]
      suggested_token: spacing.grid.cell
      confidence: medium
    - id: large_irregular_collage_gaps
      normalized_role: asymmetrical_collage_negative_space
      observed_values: ["large manual gaps and offsets"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: collage_area}]
      suggested_token: spacing.collage.loose
      confidence: high
    - id: caption_gap_small
      normalized_role: media_caption_gap
      observed_values: ["small gap between photo and caption"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: representative_media_caption_unit}]
      suggested_token: spacing.media.captionGap
      confidence: high
    - id: large_bottom_wordmark_region
      normalized_role: footer_brand_closure_space
      observed_values: ["large region reserved for oversized bottom wordmark"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_07_footer, path: oversized_wordmark_region}]
      suggested_token: spacing.footer.brandRegion
      confidence: high
  radius:
    - value: "0px"
      normalized_role: square_module_and_media_corners
      observed_roles: ["grid panels", "journal panel", "media frames", "photo bands", "nav panel"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: bordered_grid_panel}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: framed_content_panel}
        - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region}
      suggested_token: radius.none
      confidence: high
    - value: "2px"
      normalized_role: compact_button_radius
      observed_roles: ["journal compact text button", "adjacent icon button"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair}
      suggested_token: radius.control.small
      confidence: medium
    - value: "7px"
      normalized_role: external_overlay_badge_radius
      observed_roles: ["non-section fixed badge"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: non_section_overlay_badge}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: low
  shadows:
    - value: "none"
      normalized_role: flat_page_ui_no_elevation
      observed_roles: ["panels", "cards", "buttons", "media frames", "nav"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: framed_content_panel}
        - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region}
      suggested_token: shadow.none
      confidence: high
    - value: "soft_low_elevation"
      normalized_role: external_overlay_only
      observed_roles: ["non-section fixed badge"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: non_section_overlay_badge}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: low
  dividers:
    - id: muted_green_hairline
      normalized_role: light_canvas_module_linework
      value: "1px muted green"
      observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index]
      uses: ["outer borders", "internal grid lines", "panel header divider", "card vertical dividers"]
      suggested_token: borders.hairline.mutedGreen
      confidence: high
    - id: ivory_inverse_hairline
      normalized_role: inverse_control_segmentation
      value: "1px warm ivory"
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation]
      uses: ["nav panel separators", "menu button divider"]
      suggested_token: borders.hairline.onPrimaryGreen
      confidence: high
    - id: hard_photo_edge
      normalized_role: photo_surface_reset_boundary
      value: "hard horizontal cut, no rule"
      observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      uses: ["canvas to photo", "photo to canvas"]
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: high
  layout_signatures:
    - id: full_width_canvas_with_inset_foreground_modules
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index, section_07_footer]
      mechanics: "viewport canvas reaches edges while content/components sit on rails or fixed positions"
      confidence: high
    - id: huge_brand_then_small_ui_contrast
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_07_footer]
      mechanics: "oversized identity typography contrasted with compact microcopy/control systems"
      confidence: high
    - id: bordered_grid_or_panel_with_internal_hairlines
      observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index]
      mechanics: "same-fill transparent modules separated by thin green linework rather than elevated cards"
      confidence: high
    - id: unframed_media_on_light_canvas
      observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index]
      mechanics: "raster photos sit edge-to-edge in their own media bounds without matte, radius, shadow, or card frame"
      confidence: high
    - id: full_bleed_media_band_reset
      observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      mechanics: "photo ignores inset rail and spans viewport, creating hard surface interruption"
      confidence: high
  surface_relationships:
    - id: opening_surface_run
      sections: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro]
      parent_surface: light_brand_canvas
      child_surfaces: ["transparent brand mark/text", "inverse nav controls", "full-bleed hero photo reset"]
      boundary_behavior: "no header bar or divider; run exits via hard cut into hero photo"
      confidence: high
    - id: midpage_shared_light_canvas
      sections: [section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index]
      parent_surface: light_editorial_canvas
      child_surfaces: ["transparent bordered grid", "asymmetrical media collage", "inset bordered journal panel"]
      boundary_behavior: "content/layout changes only; page edge color and gutters stay continuous"
      confidence: high
    - id: inset_panel_run
      sections: [section_05_editorial_index]
      parent_surface: light_editorial_canvas
      child_surfaces: ["same-fill bordered panel", "internal dividers", "transparent cards", "dark compact controls"]
      boundary_behavior: "panel is inset from viewport; not a section background"
      confidence: high
    - id: full_bleed_photo_surface_run
      sections: [section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      parent_surface: raster_photo
      child_surfaces: []
      boundary_behavior: "photo reaches left/right edges; hard reset between journal and footer"
      confidence: high
    - id: closing_light_canvas_run
      sections: [section_07_footer]
      parent_surface: closing_light_canvas
      child_surfaces: ["transparent microcopy", "brand mark", "oversized wordmark"]
      boundary_behavior: "hard cut from photo; flat cream to page bottom"
      confidence: high
    - id: bookend_brand_surface_style
      sections: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_07_footer]
      parent_surface: light_brand_canvas
      child_surfaces: ["oversized deep-green wordmark", "small brand mark", "sparse micro text/controls"]
      boundary_behavior: "repeated style, not one continuous layer"
      confidence: high
  image_graphic_systems:
    - id: single_color_brand_and_ui_graphics
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_05_editorial_index, section_07_footer]
      mechanics: "thin currentColor SVG-like marks; deep green on cream or ivory on green"
      confidence: high
    - id: warm_editorial_photography
      observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      mechanics: "documentary/editorial food and hospitality imagery, warm natural light, no generated frames/mattes"
      confidence: high
  imagery_creative_directions:
    icons:
      observed: true
      icon_asset_classes: ["single-color-icon", "logo/wordmark"]
      generation_strategy: mixed
      style: "Minimal currentColor line/filled SVG-style affordances for menu, arrows, small badges; brand marks/wordmarks are fixed logo/type placeholders, not generated-image assets."
      density: sparse
      simplicity: simple
      rendering: line
      palette_relationship: "Deep green on cream or warm ivory on deep green inverse controls."
      surface_relationship: "Icons sit directly on transparent canvas, dark control fills, or same-fill cards; no icon containers except compact buttons/nav segments."
      avoid: ["multi-color pictograms", "detailed illustrative icons", "deriving icons from food photos", "treating wordmark/logo as generated art"]
      evidence:
        - {section: section_01_navigation, path: brand_mark_link}
        - {section: section_01_navigation, path: menu_icon_button}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair}
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: footer_link_rows}
    illustrations:
      observed: false
      style: "No reusable decorative illustration system observed."
      density: sparse
      simplicity: minimal
      rendering: unclear
      palette_relationship: "N/A"
      surface_relationship: "N/A"
      avoid: ["adding character/vector/3D scenes", "turning brand mark into illustration system"]
      evidence: []
    interfaces:
      observed: false
      style: "No product/interface imagery observed; navigation/buttons/cards are live page UI."
      density: sparse
      simplicity: minimal
      rendering: unclear
      palette_relationship: "N/A"
      surface_relationship: "N/A"
      avoid: ["promoting live UI components into screenshot-style interface illustrations"]
      evidence: []
    photography:
      observed: true
      style: "Warm editorial/documentary culinary and hospitality photography with natural texture, directional light, shadow, organic imperfection, and cinematic close crops."
      density: moderate
      simplicity: moderate
      rendering: editorial
      palette_relationship: "Warm amber, cream, olive, dark green, deep shadow, and occasional red/teal accents harmonize with cream/green page system."
      surface_relationship: "Photos are either full-bleed viewport bands or unframed media inside cells/collage/cards; photo pixels reach the media frame edges."
      edge_behavior: edge_to_edge_photo_content
      avoid: ["stock-like clean isolation", "inner photo padding", "poster borders", "external mattes", "rounded photo corners unless newly evidenced"]
      evidence:
        - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: full_bleed_media_band}
        - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: representative_item_media}
        - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: representative_media_caption_unit}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: representative_feature_card}
        - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region}

component_candidates:
  - name: segmented_navigation_panel
    kind: other
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["dark inverse rectangular panel", "segmented link row", "menu icon segment", "thin ivory dividers", "compact labels"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: content_hugging
      typography_signature: micro_uppercase_nav_label
      radius_signature: square_corners
      spacing_signature: compact_control_padding
    surface_variants:
      - name: segmented_navigation_panel_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: light_brand_canvas
        fill: "#174c2f"
        text: "#f4f2ec"
        border: "1px #f4f2ec internal dividers"
        divider: "#f4f2ec"
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_01_navigation, path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster}
    do_not_generalize: ["Do not make the header a full-width dark bar."]
  - name: icon_button
    kind: icon_button
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_05_editorial_index]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["compact or square hit area", "single-color SVG-like icon", "no shadow", "small or no radius depending context"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: icon_only
      typography_signature: none
      radius_signature: context_dependent_0_to_2px
      spacing_signature: compact_control_padding
    surface_variants:
      - name: icon_button_inverse_segment
        host_surface: inverse_control_surface
        fill: "#174c2f"
        text: "#f4f2ec icon"
        border: "ivory segment divider"
        divider: "#f4f2ec"
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_01_navigation, path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button}
      - name: icon_button_dark_action
        host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
        fill: "#164b31"
        text: "#f4f0eb icon"
        border: none
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: root.children.framed_content_panel.children.panel_header.children.action_cluster}
    do_not_generalize: ["Single-color UI icons only; no multi-color generated icon system."]
  - name: compact_text_button
    kind: button
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_05_editorial_index, section_03_values_grid]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["short label", "compact padding", "deep green fill or outline/transparent variant", "small label typography"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: content_hugging
      typography_signature: micro_button_label
      radius_signature: small_or_square
      spacing_signature: compact_control_padding
    surface_variants:
      - name: compact_text_button_dark_on_light
        host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
        fill: "#164b31"
        text: "#f4f0eb"
        border: none
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: root.children.framed_content_panel.children.panel_header.children.action_cluster}
      - name: compact_text_button_outline_or_transparent_on_light
        host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
        fill: transparent_or_same_surface
        text: "#24563a"
        border: "dark green or muted green"
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: medium
        provenance:
          - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: root.children.grid_panel.children.cell_action_button_if_present}
    do_not_generalize: []
  - name: inset_bordered_panel
    kind: panel
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_05_editorial_index]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["large same-fill inset rectangle", "1px muted green outline", "internal header/card dividers", "square corners", "no shadow"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: parent_stretched
      typography_signature: mixed_panel_heading_and_card_text
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: wide_inset_rail
    surface_variants:
      - name: inset_bordered_panel_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
        fill: "same as host warm ivory"
        text: "#164b31"
        border: "1px muted_green_hairline"
        divider: "1px muted_green_hairline"
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: root.children.framed_content_panel}
    do_not_generalize: ["Do not treat this panel as a full-width section background."]
  - name: bordered_content_grid
    kind: card
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["wide inset grid", "outer border", "internal cell dividers", "transparent/same surface cells", "small media/text/icon content"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: parent_stretched
      typography_signature: small_card_body
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: cell_padding_regular
    surface_variants:
      - name: bordered_content_grid_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
        fill: transparent
        text: "#24563a"
        border: "1px muted_green_hairline"
        divider: "1px muted_green_hairline"
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: root.children.grid_panel}
    do_not_generalize: ["Cells are not elevated cards and should not get shadows or separate fills by default."]
  - name: editorial_grid_item
    kind: card
    confidence: medium
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["transparent cell", "small icon/label or media", "short text", "inherited dividers"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: parent_stretched
      typography_signature: small_card_body
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: cell_padding_regular
    surface_variants:
      - name: editorial_grid_item_on_bordered_grid
        host_surface: transparent_inset_module_on_light_canvas
        fill: transparent
        text: "#24563a"
        border: "inherited grid dividers"
        divider: "muted_green_hairline"
        shadow: none
        confidence: medium
        provenance:
          - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: root.children.grid_panel.children.cell_1}
    do_not_generalize: []
  - name: editorial_feature_card
    kind: card
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_05_editorial_index]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["vertical link card", "title", "corner arrow icon", "unframed photo", "transparent fill", "inherited divider"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: parent_stretched
      typography_signature: small_card_title
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: card_padding_regular_with_media_gap
    surface_variants:
      - name: editorial_feature_card_in_divided_panel
        host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
        fill: transparent
        text: "#164b31"
        border: "inherited 1px muted green vertical dividers"
        divider: "muted_green_hairline"
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: root.children.framed_content_panel.children.card_grid.children.feature_card_1}
    do_not_generalize: ["Do not add card background, radius, or shadow."]
  - name: media_caption_unit
    kind: media_frame
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_04_editorial_collage]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["unframed photo", "small caption below", "transparent host", "manual staggered placement"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: intrinsic_media
      typography_signature: micro_caption
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: caption_gap_small
    surface_variants:
      - name: media_caption_unit_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
        fill: raster_photo
        text: "#24543a"
        border: none
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: root.children.collage_area.children.media_unit_upper_right}
    do_not_generalize: ["Do not regularize the collage into an equal card grid."]
  - name: full_bleed_media_band
    kind: media_frame
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["viewport-width raster photo", "cover fit", "no external frame", "hard horizontal boundaries"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: full_width
      typography_signature: none
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: no_padding_no_gutter
    surface_variants:
      - name: full_bleed_media_band_between_light_canvases
        host_surface: viewport
        fill: raster_photo
        text: none
        border: none
        divider: hard_edge_only
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: root.children.full_width_media_band}
          - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: root.children.media_region}
    do_not_generalize: ["Do not add matte, border, radius, gradient overlay, or padding."]
  - name: footer_link_stack
    kind: link
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_07_footer]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["small text links", "vertical stacks", "transparent background", "deep green"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: content_hugging
      typography_signature: footer_micro_link
      radius_signature: none
      spacing_signature: vertical_link_stack_gap
    surface_variants:
      - name: footer_link_stack_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: closing_light_canvas
        fill: transparent
        text: "#164b31"
        border: none
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_07_footer, path: root.children.secondary_links_and_mark_row}
    do_not_generalize: []
  - name: oversized_wordmark
    kind: other
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_07_footer]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["huge serif wordmark/text graphic", "deep green", "transparent fill", "spans width"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: full_width
      typography_signature: oversized_identity_display
      radius_signature: none
      spacing_signature: large_brand_region
    surface_variants:
      - name: oversized_wordmark_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: light_brand_canvas
        fill: transparent
        text: "#164b31"
        border: none
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: root.children.identity_plate.children.masthead_identity_wordmark}
          - {section: section_07_footer, path: root.children.oversized_wordmark_region}
    do_not_generalize: ["Treat as logo/wordmark/live type asset, not generated image."]

section_pattern_candidates:
  - id: opening_brand_surface_run
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro]
    summary: "Continuous cream opening canvas with compact foreground navigation and oversized deep-green identity display before hard photo reset."
  - id: shared_light_editorial_run
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index]
    summary: "Multiple content modules share one flat warm light canvas; boundaries are layout/spacing changes, not color changes."
  - id: bookend_brand_surface_style
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_07_footer]
    summary: "Opening and closing areas reuse cream canvas, deep green sparse text, small brand mark, and huge wordmark."
  - id: hard_photo_reset
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
    summary: "Full-bleed photography interrupts light canvas with hard horizontal cuts and no frame."
  - id: hairline_bordered_module
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index]
    summary: "Same-surface inset modules rely on 1px muted green linework and square corners rather than elevated cards."

repeated_layout_patterns:
  - id: viewport_canvas_with_inset_rail_modules
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index, section_07_footer]
    mechanics: "Full-width cream canvas persists to page edges; foreground modules/content align to broad inset rails."
  - id: thin_linework_structures
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index]
    mechanics: "Component boundaries are defined by 1px dividers/borders, with no shadows and square or near-square corners."
  - id: unframed_media_pixels_to_edges
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
    mechanics: "Photos fill their media boxes edge-to-edge; page modules provide any outer structure."
  - id: oversized_brand_plus_microcopy_hierarchy
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_07_footer]
    mechanics: "Very large serif identity elements paired with compact uppercase navigation/footer text."
  - id: centered_intro_then_content_module
    confidence: medium
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage]
    mechanics: "Centered label/heading stack introduces either structured grid or loose media arrangement."
  - id: light_canvas_to_photo_hard_reset
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
    mechanics: "No gradient, overlay, divider rule, or gutter; image begins/ends at a hard horizontal boundary."

source_layout_artifact_guidance:
  exact_section_order_belongs_in_layouts_yaml: true
  design_system_should_use_only_repeated_layout_patterns: true

critical_pairings:
  - host_surface: light_brand_canvas
    element_role: heading
    values: {background_or_fill: "#f4f2ec", text: "#164b31", border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: identity_wordmark}
      - {section: section_07_footer, path: oversized_wordmark_region}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: light_brand_canvas
    element_role: button
    values: {background_or_fill: "#174c2f", text: "#f4f2ec", border_or_shadow: "1px #f4f2ec internal dividers"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: inverse_control_surface
    element_role: icon
    values: {background_or_fill: "#174c2f", text: "#f4f2ec", border_or_shadow: "ivory divider"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_01_navigation, path: menu_icon_button}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
    element_role: heading
    values: {background_or_fill: transparent, text: "#24563a / #24543a", border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: section_heading}
      - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: header_stack}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
    element_role: card
    values: {background_or_fill: transparent, text: "#24563a", border_or_shadow: "1px muted_green_hairline"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: bordered_grid_panel}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
    element_role: divider
    values: {background_or_fill: null, text: null, border_or_shadow: "1px #687869 / muted green"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: bordered_grid_panel}
      - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: framed_content_panel}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
    element_role: image_graphic
    values: {background_or_fill: raster_photo, text: null, border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: representative_item_media}
      - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: representative_media_caption_unit}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
    element_role: button
    values: {background_or_fill: "#164b31", text: "#f4f0eb", border_or_shadow: "none, radius about 2px"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
    element_role: card
    values: {background_or_fill: transparent, text: "#164b31", border_or_shadow: "inherited muted green dividers"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: representative_feature_card}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
    element_role: image_graphic
    values: {background_or_fill: raster_photo, text: null, border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: representative_feature_card}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: full_bleed_photo_surface
    element_role: image_graphic
    values: {background_or_fill: raster_photo, text: none, border_or_shadow: "none; hard edge"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: full_bleed_media_band}
      - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: closing_light_canvas
    element_role: body
    values: {background_or_fill: "#f4f0eb", text: "#164b31", border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_07_footer, path: top_metadata_row}
      - {section: section_07_footer, path: footer_link_rows}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: closing_light_canvas
    element_role: icon
    values: {background_or_fill: transparent, text: "#164b31", border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_07_footer, path: footer_link_rows}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: external_overlay_surface
    element_role: other
    values: {background_or_fill: "#ffffff", text: near_black, border_or_shadow: "7px radius, soft shadow"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_07_footer, path: non_section_overlay_badge}
    confidence: low

do_not_generalize:
  - "Do not give the header its own full-width bar or background; it is foreground navigation on the opening cream canvas."
  - "Do not alternate section background colors between values, collage, and journal; they share one light editorial canvas."
  - "Do not promote journal or grid panel fills to full-section backgrounds; they are inset/same-surface modules."
  - "Do not add gradients, tint washes, dark overlays, or atmospheric layers to flat cream surfaces or photo transitions."
  - "Do not add frames, mattes, padding, radius, or shadows to photographs; photo pixels reach media bounds."
  - "Do not normalize the editorial collage into an evenly spaced card grid; its asymmetrical placement is intentional."
  - "Do not treat logo, brand mark, or oversized wordmark as generated illustration assets."
  - "Do not infer a reusable multi-color icon system; observed UI icons are single-color currentColor-style marks."
  - "Do not promote the fixed white footer overlay badge into the site design system."
  - "Do not use photo pixel palettes as UI color tokens except as imagery direction evidence."

open_questions:
  - "Exact font family names are not available; typography is normalized by scale, casing, serif/condensed character, and tracking."
  - "Subtle paper texture may be deliberate CSS/SVG or screenshot/compression noise; keep as low-impact optional surface texture."
  - "Section 3 compact CTA details are partially truncated in raw capture; outline/transparent variant confidence is medium."
  - "Precise spacing measurements are approximate from visual grounding and should be resolved in layout extraction, not token synthesis."
Source layouts artifactruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/layouts.yaml
schema_version: source_layouts.v1
type: source_layouts
source: normalized_site_ast
purpose: Source-specific section order and component positioning. Keep this separate
  from reusable design-system patterns.
sections:
- id: section_01_navigation
  section_index: 1
  role: navigation_header_on_shared_opening_canvas
  bounds:
    y_start: 0
    y_end: 100
  layout_nodes:
  - id: section_canvas
    kind: section
    role: shared_opening_light_canvas_segment
    layout_signature: full_width_flat_canvas_foreground_nav
    surface_role: light_brand_canvas
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: ''
    pattern_candidate: opening_brand_surface_run
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-01.yaml
      raw_path: tree
  - id: brand_mark_link
    kind: graphic
    role: small_brand_mark_link
    layout_signature: small_foreground_mark_top_left
    surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
    width_behavior: fixed_size
    placement: foreground_graphic
    component_candidate: brand_mark
    pattern_candidate: bookend_brand_mark
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-01.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.brand_mark_link
  - id: segmented_nav_panel
    kind: panel
    role: compact_inverse_navigation_cluster
    layout_signature: top_right_two_zone_segmented_panel
    surface_role: inverse_control_surface
    width_behavior: content_hugging
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: segmented_navigation_panel
    pattern_candidate: compact_inverse_control_cluster
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-01.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.right_navigation_cluster
  - id: menu_icon_button
    kind: icon_button
    role: menu_control
    layout_signature: square_segment_with_centered_line_icon
    surface_role: inverse_control_surface
    width_behavior: icon_only
    placement: foreground_graphic
    component_candidate: icon_button
    pattern_candidate: compact_inverse_control_cluster
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-01.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button
  pattern_candidates:
  - opening_brand_surface_run
  - compact_inverse_control_cluster
- id: section_02_masthead_media_intro
  section_index: 2
  role: masthead_with_full_bleed_media_reset
  bounds:
    y_start: 100
    y_end: 1400
  layout_nodes:
  - id: section_canvas
    kind: section
    role: opening_light_canvas_continuation_then_media_reset
    layout_signature: oversized_identity_plate_above_full_bleed_media
    surface_role: light_brand_canvas
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: ''
    pattern_candidate: opening_brand_surface_run
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-02.yaml
      raw_path: tree
  - id: identity_wordmark
    kind: text
    role: oversized_split_wordmark
    layout_signature: viewport_spanning_display_text
    surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: foreground_graphic
    component_candidate: oversized_wordmark
    pattern_candidate: bookend_oversized_wordmark
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-02.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.identity_plate.children.masthead_identity_wordmark
  - id: full_bleed_media_band
    kind: media
    role: immersive_photo_band
    layout_signature: viewport_width_raster_band_cover_fit
    surface_role: full_bleed_photo_surface
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: foreground_media
    component_candidate: full_bleed_media_band
    pattern_candidate: hard_photo_reset
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-02.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.full_width_media_band
  pattern_candidates:
  - bookend_oversized_wordmark
  - hard_photo_reset
- id: section_03_values_grid
  section_index: 3
  role: informational_bordered_grid_on_shared_light_canvas
  bounds:
    y_start: 1400
    y_end: 2220
  layout_nodes:
  - id: section_canvas
    kind: section
    role: shared_light_editorial_canvas_segment
    layout_signature: centered_heading_above_wide_inset_grid
    surface_role: light_editorial_canvas
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: ''
    pattern_candidate: shared_light_editorial_run
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-03.yaml
      raw_path: tree
  - id: section_heading
    kind: text
    role: centered_section_heading
    layout_signature: centered_single_heading_above_module
    surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
    width_behavior: content_hugging
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: section_heading
    pattern_candidate: centered_intro_heading
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-03.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.section_heading
  - id: bordered_grid_panel
    kind: grid
    role: bordered_multi_cell_content_grid
    layout_signature: wide_inset_grid_with_outer_border_and_internal_lines
    surface_role: transparent_inset_module_on_light_canvas
    width_behavior: parent_stretched
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: bordered_content_grid
    pattern_candidate: hairline_bordered_grid_module
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-03.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.grid_panel
  - id: representative_grid_item
    kind: card
    role: transparent_editorial_value_item
    layout_signature: small_icon_or_media_text_cell_in_divided_grid
    surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
    width_behavior: parent_stretched
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: editorial_grid_item
    pattern_candidate: hairline_bordered_grid_module
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-03.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.grid_panel.children.cell_1
  - id: representative_item_media
    kind: media
    role: small_editorial_photo
    layout_signature: unframed_rectangular_media_inside_grid_cell
    surface_role: raster_photo
    width_behavior: intrinsic_media
    placement: foreground_media
    component_candidate: media_frame
    pattern_candidate: unframed_editorial_media_on_light_canvas
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-03.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.grid_panel.children.cell_1.children.cell_1_media
  pattern_candidates:
  - hairline_bordered_grid_module
  - centered_intro_heading
- id: section_04_editorial_collage
  section_index: 4
  role: staggered_media_collage_on_shared_light_canvas
  bounds:
    y_start: 2220
    y_end: 3950
  layout_nodes:
  - id: section_canvas
    kind: section
    role: shared_light_editorial_canvas_segment
    layout_signature: centered_intro_above_asymmetrical_staggered_media
    surface_role: light_editorial_canvas
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: ''
    pattern_candidate: shared_light_editorial_run
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-04.yaml
      raw_path: tree
  - id: header_stack
    kind: group
    role: centered_intro_label_and_title
    layout_signature: centered_micro_label_over_condensed_display_title
    surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
    width_behavior: content_hugging
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: section_intro_stack
    pattern_candidate: centered_intro_heading
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-04.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.header_stack
  - id: collage_area
    kind: group
    role: spacious_asymmetrical_media_collage
    layout_signature: manual_staggered_media_units_with_large_negative_space
    surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
    width_behavior: parent_stretched
    placement: offset
    component_candidate: media_caption_collage
    pattern_candidate: asymmetrical_editorial_media_collage
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-04.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.collage_area
  - id: representative_media_caption_unit
    kind: item
    role: media_with_micro_caption
    layout_signature: unframed_photo_with_caption_below
    surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
    width_behavior: intrinsic_media
    placement: foreground_media
    component_candidate: media_caption_unit
    pattern_candidate: unframed_editorial_media_on_light_canvas
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-04.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.collage_area.children.media_unit_upper_right
  pattern_candidates:
  - asymmetrical_editorial_media_collage
  - media_caption_unit
- id: section_05_editorial_index
  section_index: 5
  role: inset_bordered_editorial_index_module
  bounds:
    y_start: 3950
    y_end: 4750
  layout_nodes:
  - id: section_canvas
    kind: section
    role: shared_light_editorial_canvas_segment_with_inset_panel
    layout_signature: wide_inset_framed_panel_above_loose_controls
    surface_role: light_editorial_canvas
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: ''
    pattern_candidate: shared_light_editorial_run
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-05.yaml
      raw_path: tree
  - id: framed_content_panel
    kind: panel
    role: inset_bordered_editorial_panel
    layout_signature: large_rectangular_panel_with_header_row_and_card_grid
    surface_role: inset_bordered_panel_surface
    width_behavior: parent_stretched
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: inset_bordered_panel
    pattern_candidate: hairline_bordered_panel_module
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-05.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.framed_content_panel
  - id: panel_header_action
    kind: group
    role: panel_header_with_title_and_compact_action
    layout_signature: title_left_action_right_inside_bordered_header
    surface_role: inset_bordered_panel_surface
    width_behavior: parent_stretched
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: panel_header_action_row
    pattern_candidate: bordered_panel_header_action
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-05.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.framed_content_panel.children.panel_header
  - id: compact_action_pair
    kind: group
    role: compact_text_button_adjacent_icon_button
    layout_signature: small_label_button_plus_square_icon_button
    surface_role: compact_dark_button_fill
    width_behavior: content_hugging
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: compact_action_pair
    pattern_candidate: compact_dark_action_controls
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-05.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.framed_content_panel.children.panel_header.children.action_cluster
  - id: representative_feature_card
    kind: card
    role: editorial_feature_card
    layout_signature: vertical_link_card_title_icon_media_inside_divided_grid
    surface_role: transparent_on_inset_panel
    width_behavior: parent_stretched
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: editorial_feature_card
    pattern_candidate: divided_editorial_card_grid
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-05.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.framed_content_panel.children.card_grid.children.feature_card_1
  pattern_candidates:
  - hairline_bordered_panel_module
  - divided_editorial_card_grid
  - compact_dark_action_controls
- id: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature
  section_index: 6
  role: full_width_photographic_interlude
  bounds:
    y_start: 4750
    y_end: 5520
  layout_nodes:
  - id: section_media_surface
    kind: section
    role: full_bleed_photo_surface_reset
    layout_signature: single_dominant_viewport_width_media_band
    surface_role: full_bleed_photo_surface
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: foreground_media
    component_candidate: full_bleed_media_band
    pattern_candidate: hard_photo_reset
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-06.yaml
      raw_path: tree
  - id: media_region
    kind: media
    role: full_bleed_photographic_feature
    layout_signature: large_aspect_ratio_photo_covering_viewport_width
    surface_role: raster_photo
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: foreground_media
    component_candidate: full_bleed_media_band
    pattern_candidate: hard_photo_reset
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-06.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.media_region
  - id: bottom_boundary_neighbor
    kind: background
    role: probable_neighbor_light_canvas_edge
    layout_signature: thin_pale_band_at_bottom_hard_cut
    surface_role: closing_light_canvas
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: background_contained
    component_candidate: ''
    pattern_candidate: photo_to_light_canvas_reset
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-06.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.bottom_boundary_surface
  pattern_candidates:
  - hard_photo_reset
  - full_bleed_media_band
- id: section_07_footer
  section_index: 7
  role: footer_brand_closure_on_light_canvas
  bounds:
    y_start: 5520
    y_end: 6305
  layout_nodes:
  - id: section_canvas
    kind: section
    role: closing_light_brand_canvas
    layout_signature: sparse_footer_metadata_above_oversized_wordmark
    surface_role: closing_light_canvas
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: ''
    pattern_candidate: bookend_brand_surface_style
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-07.yaml
      raw_path: tree
  - id: top_metadata_row
    kind: grid
    role: footer_metadata_grid
    layout_signature: sparse_multi_column_microcopy_blocks
    surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
    width_behavior: parent_stretched
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: metadata_grid
    pattern_candidate: sparse_footer_microcopy_grid
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-07.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.top_metadata_row
  - id: footer_link_rows
    kind: group
    role: footer_link_stacks_and_brand_mark
    layout_signature: small_link_stacks_distributed_across_columns_with_center_mark
    surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
    width_behavior: parent_stretched
    placement: on_grid
    component_candidate: footer_link_stack
    pattern_candidate: sparse_footer_microcopy_grid
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-07.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.secondary_links_and_mark_row
  - id: oversized_wordmark_region
    kind: graphic
    role: oversized_split_wordmark_closure
    layout_signature: massive_bottom_display_wordmark_spanning_width
    surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
    width_behavior: full_width
    placement: foreground_graphic
    component_candidate: oversized_wordmark
    pattern_candidate: bookend_oversized_wordmark
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-07.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.oversized_wordmark_region
  - id: non_section_overlay_badge
    kind: unknown
    role: external_fixed_badge_overlay
    layout_signature: floating_third_party_badge_like_overlay
    surface_role: external_overlay_surface
    width_behavior: content_hugging
    placement: overlapping
    component_candidate: ''
    pattern_candidate: ''
    provenance:
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-07.yaml
      raw_path: tree.children.non_section_fixed_badge_overlay
  pattern_candidates:
  - bookend_brand_surface_style
  - sparse_footer_microcopy_grid
global_layout_signatures:
- id: full_width_canvas_with_inset_foreground_modules
  observed_in:
  - section_01_navigation
  - section_03_values_grid
  - section_05_editorial_index
  - section_07_footer
  mechanics: viewport canvas reaches edges while content/components sit on rails or
    fixed positions
  confidence: high
- id: huge_brand_then_small_ui_contrast
  observed_in:
  - section_01_navigation
  - section_02_masthead_media_intro
  - section_07_footer
  mechanics: oversized identity typography contrasted with compact microcopy/control
    systems
  confidence: high
- id: bordered_grid_or_panel_with_internal_hairlines
  observed_in:
  - section_03_values_grid
  - section_05_editorial_index
  mechanics: same-fill transparent modules separated by thin green linework rather
    than elevated cards
  confidence: high
- id: unframed_media_on_light_canvas
  observed_in:
  - section_03_values_grid
  - section_04_editorial_collage
  - section_05_editorial_index
  mechanics: raster photos sit edge-to-edge in their own media bounds without matte,
    radius, shadow, or card frame
  confidence: high
- id: full_bleed_media_band_reset
  observed_in:
  - section_02_masthead_media_intro
  - section_06_full_bleed_media_feature
  mechanics: photo ignores inset rail and spans viewport, creating hard surface interruption
  confidence: high
surface_relationships:
- id: opening_surface_run
  sections:
  - section_01_navigation
  - section_02_masthead_media_intro
  parent_surface: light_brand_canvas
  child_surfaces:
  - transparent brand mark/text
  - inverse nav controls
  - full-bleed hero photo reset
  boundary_behavior: no header bar or divider; run exits via hard cut into hero photo
  confidence: high
- id: midpage_shared_light_canvas
  sections:
  - section_03_values_grid
  - section_04_editorial_collage
  - section_05_editorial_index
  parent_surface: light_editorial_canvas
  child_surfaces:
  - transparent bordered grid
  - asymmetrical media collage
  - inset bordered journal panel
  boundary_behavior: content/layout changes only; page edge color and gutters stay
    continuous
  confidence: high
- id: inset_panel_run
  sections:
  - section_05_editorial_index
  parent_surface: light_editorial_canvas
  child_surfaces:
  - same-fill bordered panel
  - internal dividers
  - transparent cards
  - dark compact controls
  boundary_behavior: panel is inset from viewport; not a section background
  confidence: high
- id: full_bleed_photo_surface_run
  sections:
  - section_06_full_bleed_media_feature
  parent_surface: raster_photo
  child_surfaces: []
  boundary_behavior: photo reaches left/right edges; hard reset between journal and
    footer
  confidence: high
- id: closing_light_canvas_run
  sections:
  - section_07_footer
  parent_surface: closing_light_canvas
  child_surfaces:
  - transparent microcopy
  - brand mark
  - oversized wordmark
  boundary_behavior: hard cut from photo; flat cream to page bottom
  confidence: high
- id: bookend_brand_surface_style
  sections:
  - section_01_navigation
  - section_02_masthead_media_intro
  - section_07_footer
  parent_surface: light_brand_canvas
  child_surfaces:
  - oversized deep-green wordmark
  - small brand mark
  - sparse micro text/controls
  boundary_behavior: repeated style, not one continuous layer
  confidence: high
do_not_use_as_design_system:
- Do not copy this exact section list, section order, or one-off component positions
  into design-system tokens.
- Use design-system patterns for reusable generation; use this file only when exact
  source reconstruction is explicitly requested.

Step 7

Grounding sync with source CSS. This stage refines the merged grounding using extracted source styles so colors, typography, and other implementation-visible details become more explicit and consistent.

Sections
  • Sync token usage
  • Grounding sync prompt
  • Final structural grounding
Sync token usage
Calls0
Input tokens0
Output tokens0
Grounding sync promptruns/v177/grounding-sync-prompt.md
You are correcting a structural grounding markdown file using a source-of-truth CSS style report extracted from the original HTML.

## Goal

The grounding file should remain a faithful text-based copy of the screenshot, not a design system rewrite. Correct and upgrade the parts that should be sourced from the HTML/CSS: explicit colors, gradients, and explicit typography values.

## Rules

- Preserve the exact document structure, section order, headings, bullets, and general wording as closely as possible.
- Use the source CSS style report as authoritative for:
  - exact color values
  - exact gradient values
  - exact font family names
  - exact font sizes
  - exact font weights
  - exact line heights
  - exact letter spacing values
- When the grounding file contains approximate explicit color values, replace them with source-supported values when a clear match exists.
- When the grounding file contains approximate explicit typography values, replace them with source-supported values when a clear match exists.
- When a background, border style, divider style, or typography style line is written only in vague descriptive language but the source CSS clearly supports a more explicit exact value, rewrite that line to include the exact source-backed value while preserving the grounded observation.
- Prefer explicit source-backed hex / rgba / gradient values over vague phrases like "light green" or "dark gray" when the source report makes the value clear.
- Prefer explicit source-backed font family, size, weight, line-height, and letter-spacing values over vague phrases like "sans-serif" or "medium size" when the source report makes the value clear.
- Do not return numeric ranges for CSS-like values. If the input contains a range such as `33-38px`, `33–38px`, `0.25–0.35`, `221-227`, `14-16px`, or `96-98%`, replace it with the closest exact source-supported value when available.
- If the source report does not support a precise replacement for a numeric range, collapse it to one representative approximate value or use semantic wording. Never leave a hyphen/en-dash numeric range in font-size, font-weight, line-height, letter-spacing, width, height, spacing, radius, opacity, shadow, percentage, or ratio text.
- If the source report does not support an exact explicit value, prefer semantic wording instead of invented precision.
- Do not invent colors or typography values that do not appear in the source report.
- Do not remove grounded structural observations like layout, grouping, transitions, spacing, graphics direction, or depth/elevation.
- Return the full corrected grounding markdown document.
Final structural groundingruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/structural-analysis.md
schema_version: normalized_site_ast.v1
type: normalized_site_ast
site:
  id: webpage
  source_files:
    - full_page_section_inventory
    - global_site_grounding.v1
    - section-groundings/section-01.yaml
    - section-groundings/section-02.yaml
    - section-groundings/section-03.yaml
    - section-groundings/section-04.yaml
    - section-groundings/section-05.yaml
    - section-groundings/section-06.yaml
    - section-groundings/section-07.yaml
  section_count: 7
  normalization_notes:
    - "Full-page grounding is authoritative for shared parent runs: header+masthead share opening cream canvas; sections 3-5 share one light editorial canvas; journal is an inset module; photo bands are hard resets."
    - "Raw section root background conflicts caused by inset panels or full-bleed photos were normalized as parent canvas plus child media/panel surfaces."
    - "Photography colors and gradients are treated as raster image characteristics, not global CSS color/gradient tokens."
sections:
  - id: section_01_navigation
    source:
      section_index: 1
      detected_label: "Navigation / header"
      bounds: {y_start: 0, y_end: 100}
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-01.yaml
    role: navigation_header_on_shared_opening_canvas
    confidence: high
    normalized_nodes:
      - id: section_canvas
        path: root
        kind: section
        role: shared_opening_light_canvas_segment
        state: default
        visibility: visible
        layout_signature: full_width_flat_canvas_foreground_nav
        style_signature: warm_ivory_surface_subtle_grain_deep_green_foreground
        surface_role: light_brand_canvas
        component_candidate: null
        pattern_candidate: opening_brand_surface_run
        values:
          colors: ["rgb(249,247,239)", "rgb(38,78,51)"]
          typography: []
          spacing: ["top_edge_continuity", "sparse_center"]
          radius: []
          shadows: []
          borders: []
          effects: ["possible_subtle_paper_texture"]
        relationships:
          parent_surface: viewport
          child_surface: light_brand_canvas
          separation: none
          width_behavior: full_width
          placement: on_grid
        provenance: {raw_file: section-groundings/section-01.yaml, raw_path: tree}
      - id: brand_mark_link
        path: root.children.brand_mark_link
        kind: graphic
        role: small_brand_mark_link
        state: default
        visibility: visible
        layout_signature: small_foreground_mark_top_left
        style_signature: single_color_deep_green_mark_on_light_canvas
        surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
        component_candidate: brand_mark
        pattern_candidate: bookend_brand_mark
        values:
          colors: ["rgb(38,78,51)", "rgb(249,247,239)"]
          typography: []
          spacing: ["edge_inset_small"]
          radius: []
          shadows: ["none"]
          borders: ["none"]
          effects: []
        relationships:
          parent_surface: light_brand_canvas
          child_surface: transparent_graphic
          separation: none
          width_behavior: fixed_size
          placement: foreground_graphic
        provenance: {raw_file: section-groundings/section-01.yaml, raw_path: tree.children.brand_mark_link}
      - id: segmented_nav_panel
        path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster
        kind: panel
        role: compact_inverse_navigation_cluster
        state: default
        visibility: visible
        layout_signature: top_right_two_zone_segmented_panel
        style_signature: dark_green_fill_ivory_hairline_dividers_square_corners
        surface_role: inverse_control_surface
        component_candidate: segmented_navigation_panel
        pattern_candidate: compact_inverse_control_cluster
        values:
          colors: ["rgb(38,78,51)", "rgb(249,247,239)"]
          typography: ["micro_uppercase_nav_label"]
          spacing: ["compact_control_padding"]
          radius: ["0"]
          shadows: ["none"]
          borders: ["1px warm_ivory"]
          effects: []
        relationships:
          parent_surface: light_brand_canvas
          child_surface: inverse_control_surface
          separation: fill_contrast
          width_behavior: content_hugging
          placement: on_grid
        provenance: {raw_file: section-groundings/section-01.yaml, raw_path: tree.children.right_navigation_cluster}
      - id: menu_icon_button
        path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button
        kind: icon_button
        role: menu_control
        state: default
        visibility: visible
        layout_signature: square_segment_with_centered_line_icon
        style_signature: ivory_single_color_icon_on_dark_green
        surface_role: inverse_control_surface
        component_candidate: icon_button
        pattern_candidate: compact_inverse_control_cluster
        values:
          colors: ["rgb(38,78,51)", "rgb(249,247,239)"]
          typography: []
          spacing: ["compact_control_padding"]
          radius: ["0"]
          shadows: ["none"]
          borders: ["1px warm_ivory left divider"]
          effects: []
        relationships:
          parent_surface: inverse_control_surface
          child_surface: inverse_control_surface
          separation: same_surface_border
          width_behavior: icon_only
          placement: foreground_graphic
        provenance: {raw_file: section-groundings/section-01.yaml, raw_path: tree.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button}
    observed_values:
      colors: ["warm ivory rgb(249,247,239)", "dark forest green rgb(38,78,51)", "warm ivory text/divider on inverse controls"]
      typography: ["compact nav labels, small sans/neutral, uppercase or near-uppercase"]
      spacing: ["small top/side inset", "large empty center"]
      radius: ["square panel corners"]
      shadows: ["none"]
      dividers: ["thin ivory segmentation lines"]
      background_systems: ["opening light brand canvas with foreground inverse nav"]
      media: ["single-color logo/mark SVG-like asset"]
    pattern_candidates: ["opening_brand_surface_run", "compact_inverse_control_cluster"]

  - id: section_02_masthead_media_intro
    source:
      section_index: 2
      detected_label: "Hero / brand masthead"
      bounds: {y_start: 100, y_end: 1400}
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-02.yaml
    role: masthead_with_full_bleed_media_reset
    confidence: high
    normalized_nodes:
      - id: section_canvas
        path: root
        kind: section
        role: opening_light_canvas_continuation_then_media_reset
        state: default
        visibility: visible
        layout_signature: oversized_identity_plate_above_full_bleed_media
        style_signature: warm_ivory_canvas_deep_green_display_hard_cut_to_photo
        surface_role: light_brand_canvas
        component_candidate: null
        pattern_candidate: opening_brand_surface_run
        values:
          colors: ["rgb(249,247,239)", "rgb(38,78,51)"]
          typography: ["oversized_identity_display"]
          spacing: ["very_large_vertical_brand_plate", "hard_media_adjacency"]
          radius: ["0"]
          shadows: ["none"]
          borders: ["none"]
          effects: ["possible_subtle_paper_texture"]
        relationships:
          parent_surface: light_brand_canvas
          child_surface: full_bleed_photo_surface
          separation: fill_contrast
          width_behavior: full_width
          placement: on_grid
        provenance: {raw_file: section-groundings/section-02.yaml, raw_path: tree}
      - id: identity_wordmark
        path: root.children.identity_plate.children.masthead_identity_wordmark
        kind: text
        role: oversized_split_wordmark
        state: default
        visibility: visible
        layout_signature: viewport_spanning_display_text
        style_signature: deep_green_high_contrast_serif_custom_tracking
        surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
        component_candidate: oversized_wordmark
        pattern_candidate: bookend_oversized_wordmark
        values:
          colors: ["rgb(38,78,51)"]
          typography: ["oversized_identity_display", "display_serif_character"]
          spacing: ["loose_custom_tracking", "large_plate_padding"]
          radius: []
          shadows: ["none"]
          borders: ["none"]
          effects: []
        relationships:
          parent_surface: light_brand_canvas
          child_surface: transparent_text
          separation: none
          width_behavior: full_width
          placement: foreground_graphic
        provenance: {raw_file: section-groundings/section-02.yaml, raw_path: tree.children.identity_plate.children.masthead_identity_wordmark}
      - id: full_bleed_media_band
        path: root.children.full_width_media_band
        kind: media
        role: immersive_photo_band
        state: default
        visibility: visible
        layout_signature: viewport_width_raster_band_cover_fit
        style_signature: edge_to_edge_warm_cinematic_photo_no_frame
        surface_role: full_bleed_photo_surface
        component_candidate: full_bleed_media_band
        pattern_candidate: hard_photo_reset
        values:
          colors: ["photo_dark_olive_black", "photo_olive_gold", "photo_warm_yellow", "photo_warm_skin_brown"]
          typography: []
          spacing: ["no_external_padding", "photo_reaches_edges"]
          radius: ["0"]
          shadows: ["photographic_shadow_only"]
          borders: ["none"]
          effects: ["photographic_bokeh", "natural_luminance_falloff"]
        relationships:
          parent_surface: light_brand_canvas
          child_surface: raster_photo
          separation: fill_contrast
          width_behavior: full_width
          placement: foreground_media
        provenance: {raw_file: section-groundings/section-02.yaml, raw_path: tree.children.full_width_media_band}
    observed_values:
      colors: ["warm off-white canvas", "deep botanical green ink", "photo dark olive/black", "photo olive-gold", "photo warm yellow"]
      typography: ["huge serif identity display with loose custom tracking"]
      spacing: ["sparse masthead plate", "full-width media directly after identity"]
      radius: ["none"]
      shadows: ["none outside raster image"]
      dividers: ["none"]
      background_systems: ["opening brand canvas", "full-bleed hero photo reset"]
      media: ["editorial culinary/lifestyle photography, edge-to-edge within viewport"]
    pattern_candidates: ["bookend_oversized_wordmark", "hard_photo_reset"]

  - id: section_03_values_grid
    source:
      section_index: 3
      detected_label: "What Defines Us values grid"
      bounds: {y_start: 1400, y_end: 2220}
      raw_file: section-groundings/section-03.yaml
    role: informational_bordered_grid_on_shared_light_canvas
    confidence: high
    normalized_nodes:
      - id: section_canvas
        path: root
        kind: section
        role: shared_light_editorial_canvas_segment
        state: default
        visibility: visible
        layout_signature: centered_heading_above_wide_inset_grid
        style_signature: warm_ivory_canvas_deep_green_text_muted_green_hairlines
        surface_role: light_editorial_canvas
        component_candidate: null
        pattern_candidate: shared_light_editorial_run
        values:
          colors: ["rgb(249,247,239)", "rgb(38,78,51)", "rgb(38,78,51)"]
          typography: ["section_heading_condensed_uppercase"]
          spacing: ["wide_inset_rail", "generous_section_air"]
          radius: ["0"]
          shadows: ["none"]
          borders: []
          effects: ["subtle_paper_grain"]
        relationships:
          parent_surface: light_editorial_canvas
          child_surface: transparent_grid_panel
          separation: whitespace
          width_behavior: full_width
          placement: on_grid
        provenance: {raw_file: section-groundings/section-03.yaml, raw_path: tree}
      - id: section_heading
        path: root.children.section_heading
        kind: text
        role: centered_section_heading
        state: default
        visibility: visible
        layout_signature: centered_single_heading_above_module
        style_signature: condensed_uppercase_deep_green
        surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
        component_candidate: section_heading
        pattern_candidate: centered_intro_heading
        values:
          colors: ["rgb(38,78,51)"]
          typography: ["section_heading_condensed_uppercase"]
          spacing: ["heading_to_module_gap"]
          radius: []
          shadows: []
          borders: []
          effects: []
        relationships:
          parent_surface: light_editorial_canvas
          child_surface: transparent_text
          separation: whitespace
          width_behavior: content_hugging
          placement: on_grid
        provenance: {raw_file: section-groundings/section-03.yaml, raw_path: tree.children.section_heading}
      - id: bordered_grid_panel
        path: root.children.grid_panel
        kind: grid
        role: bordered_multi_cell_content_grid
        state: default
        visibility: visible
        layout_signature: wide_inset_grid_with_outer_border_and_internal_lines
        style_signature: transparent_fill_muted_green_1px_linework_square_corners
        surface_role: transparent_inset_module_on_light_canvas
        component_candidate: bordered_content_grid
        pattern_candidate: hairline_bordered_grid_module
        values:
          colors: ["rgb(249,247,239)", "rgb(38,78,51)", "rgb(38,78,51)"]
          typography: ["small_card_body"]
          spacing: ["wide_inset_rail", "cell_padding_regular"]
          radius: ["0"]
          shadows: ["none"]
          borders: ["1px muted_green outer/internal"]
          effects: []
        relationships:
          parent_surface: light_editorial_canvas
          child_surface: transparent_inset_module_on_light_canvas
          separation: same_surface_border
          width_behavior: parent_stretched
          placement: on_grid
        provenance: {raw_file: section-groundings/section-03.yaml, raw_path: tree.children.grid_panel}
      - id: representative_grid_item
        path: root.children.grid_panel.children.cell_1
        kind: card
        role: transparent_editorial_value_item
        state: default
        visibility: visible
        layout_signature: small_icon_or_media_text_cell_in_divided_grid
        style_signature: no_card_fill_deep_green_text_unframed_photo
        surface_role: transparent_on_light_canvas
        component_candidate: editorial_grid_item
        pattern_candidate: hairline_bordered_grid_module
        values:
          colors: ["rgb(38,78,51)"]
