global_observations:
  colors:
    - value: "rgb(249,247,239) / rgb(249,247,239) / rgb(249,247,239) / rgb(249,247,239)"
      normalized_role: light_brand_editorial_canvas
      observed_roles: ["opening canvas", "shared editorial canvas", "footer canvas"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_01_navigation, path: root, raw_value_role: section_host_surface}
        - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: root, raw_value_role: full_width_section_surface}
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: root, raw_value_role: root_surface}
      suggested_token: colors.surface.lightWarm
      confidence: high
    - value: "rgb(38,78,51) / rgb(38,78,51) / rgb(38,78,51) / rgb(38,78,51)"
      normalized_role: primary_ink_deep_green
      observed_roles: ["text", "wordmark", "icon", "button fill"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: identity_wordmark, raw_value_role: letterform_color}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair, raw_value_role: button_fill}
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: top_metadata_row, raw_value_role: footer_text_green}
      suggested_token: colors.ink.primaryGreen
      confidence: high
    - value: "rgb(249,247,239) / rgb(249,247,239)"
      normalized_role: inverse_on_dark_control
      observed_roles: ["nav text", "nav divider", "button text", "button icon"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel, raw_value_role: text_and_divider}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair, raw_value_role: button_text}
      suggested_token: colors.ink.onPrimaryGreen
      confidence: high
    - value: "rgb(38,78,51) / muted_green_hairline"
      normalized_role: muted_green_hairline
      observed_roles: ["grid border", "panel outline", "internal dividers"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: bordered_grid_panel, raw_value_role: outer_border_and_internal_grid_lines}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: framed_content_panel, raw_value_role: panel_outline_and_dividers}
      suggested_token: colors.border.mutedGreen
      confidence: high
    - value: "transparent"
      normalized_role: transparent_module_fill
      observed_roles: ["cards on light canvas", "grid cells", "link stacks", "panel header"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: representative_grid_item, raw_value_role: cell_background}
        - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: collage_area, raw_value_role: background}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: representative_feature_card, raw_value_role: card_background}
      suggested_token: colors.surface.transparent
      confidence: high
    - value: "photo_dark_olive_black"
      normalized_role: photographic_dark_shadow
      observed_roles: ["hero photo shadows", "feature photo dark objects/shadows"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: full_bleed_media_band, raw_value_role: raster_photo_shadow}
        - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region, raw_value_role: raster_photo_shadow}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: medium
    - value: "photo_warm_gold_amber"
      normalized_role: photographic_warm_dominant
      observed_roles: ["hero photo highlights", "feature food photo", "grid/collage media"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: full_bleed_media_band, raw_value_role: raster_photo_warm_highlight}
        - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region, raw_value_role: raster_photo_grade}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: medium
    - value: "photo_teal_blue / red_gold accents"
      normalized_role: photographic_accent_pixels
      observed_roles: ["collage media variation", "food/table imagery accent"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: representative_media_caption_unit, raw_value_role: raster_photo_color_treatment}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: low
    - value: "rgb(255,255,255)"
      normalized_role: external_overlay_surface
      observed_roles: ["non-section fixed badge fill"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: non_section_overlay_badge, raw_value_role: external_badge_fill}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: low
  gradients:
    - id: raster_photographic_luminance_falloff
      normalized_role: image_content_lighting_not_css_gradient
      observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      values: ["dark green/black to olive/gold", "amber highlights to deep warm shadows"]
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: high
    - id: no_global_css_gradient
      normalized_role: absent_gradient_system
      observed_in: [full_page_grounding]
      values: ["flat cream surfaces", "hard photo cuts"]
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: high
  background_systems:
    - id: light_brand_editorial_canvas
      role: flat_warm_ivory_paper_canvas
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index, section_07_footer]
      mechanics: "full-width warm off-white surface, deep green foreground, subtle paper/noise possible, no gradients"
      confidence: high
    - id: opening_brand_surface_run
      role: continuous_header_masthead_canvas
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro]
      mechanics: "header controls and masthead wordmark share same canvas; no nav bar boundary"
      confidence: high
    - id: shared_light_editorial_run
      role: continuous_midpage_canvas
      observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index]
      mechanics: "values grid, collage, and journal module sit on same canvas; layout changes do not imply background reset"
      confidence: high
    - id: inset_hairline_module_system
      role: same-fill_bordered_foreground_modules
      observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index]
      mechanics: "wide inset rectangles with transparent/same canvas fill, 1px muted green outlines and internal dividers"
      confidence: high
    - id: full_bleed_photo_reset
      role: raster_image_owns_viewport_band
      observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      mechanics: "photo reaches viewport edges, no matte/border/padding, hard horizontal edges"
      confidence: high
    - id: closing_brand_surface_run
      role: footer_light_canvas_after_photo
      observed_in: [section_07_footer]
      mechanics: "hard cut from photo to flat cream footer with sparse microcopy and huge wordmark"
      confidence: high
  typography:
    - id: oversized_identity_display
      normalized_role: brand_scale_serif_wordmark
      signature: "extremely large high-contrast serif, deep green, custom loose tracking/split clusters"
      occurrences: [{section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: identity_wordmark}, {section: section_07_footer, path: oversized_wordmark_region}]
      suggested_token: typography.display.identityHuge
      confidence: high
    - id: large_condensed_display_heading
      normalized_role: section_or_panel_heading
      signature: "tall condensed uppercase display, deep green, slight tight/normal tracking"
      occurrences: [{section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: header_stack}, {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: panel_header_action}]
      suggested_token: typography.display.condensedSection
      confidence: high
    - id: section_heading_condensed_uppercase
      normalized_role: centered_section_heading
      signature: "centered uppercase/near-uppercase heading, deep green, moderate size"
      occurrences: [{section: section_03_values_grid, path: section_heading}]
      suggested_token: typography.heading.sectionCentered
      confidence: medium
    - id: micro_uppercase_nav_label
      normalized_role: compact_navigation_label
      signature: "small sans/neutral uppercase or near-uppercase, ivory on green"
      occurrences: [{section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel}]
      suggested_token: typography.label.navMicro
      confidence: high
    - id: micro_button_label
      normalized_role: compact_control_label
      signature: "small action label, compact, likely uppercase/short text"
      occurrences: [{section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair}]
      suggested_token: typography.label.buttonMicro
      confidence: high
    - id: micro_caption
      normalized_role: editorial_caption
      signature: "tiny caption/link-like text, deep green, tight letter spacing"
      occurrences: [{section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: representative_media_caption_unit}]
      suggested_token: typography.caption.micro
      confidence: high
    - id: small_card_title
      normalized_role: editorial_card_title
      signature: "small deep green title text inside card, normal tracking"
      occurrences: [{section: section_05_editorial_index, path: representative_feature_card}]
      suggested_token: typography.card.titleSmall
      confidence: high
    - id: footer_micro_text
      normalized_role: footer_label_value_link
      signature: "compact uppercase labels/values/links, deep green, sparse columns"
      occurrences: [{section: section_07_footer, path: top_metadata_row}, {section: section_07_footer, path: footer_link_rows}]
      suggested_token: typography.footer.micro
      confidence: high
  spacing:
    - id: edge_inset_small
      normalized_role: header_control_inset
      observed_values: ["small top/side inset"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_01_navigation, path: brand_mark_link}, {section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel}]
      suggested_token: spacing.inset.header
      confidence: medium
    - id: wide_inset_rail
      normalized_role: primary_content_module_rail
      observed_values: ["wide left/right inset for grid and journal panel"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_03_values_grid, path: bordered_grid_panel}, {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: framed_content_panel}]
      suggested_token: layout.rail.wide
      confidence: high
    - id: generous_section_air
      normalized_role: editorial_vertical_whitespace
      observed_values: ["large top/bottom breathing room on cream canvas"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_03_values_grid, path: section_canvas}, {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: section_canvas}]
      suggested_token: spacing.section.generous
      confidence: high
    - id: compact_control_padding
      normalized_role: compact_control_internal_padding
      observed_values: ["tight labels and icon controls"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel}, {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair}]
      suggested_token: spacing.control.compact
      confidence: high
    - id: cell_padding_regular
      normalized_role: bordered_grid_cell_padding
      observed_values: ["regular inset inside divided cells"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_03_values_grid, path: representative_grid_item}]
      suggested_token: spacing.grid.cell
      confidence: medium
    - id: large_irregular_collage_gaps
      normalized_role: asymmetrical_collage_negative_space
      observed_values: ["large manual gaps and offsets"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: collage_area}]
      suggested_token: spacing.collage.loose
      confidence: high
    - id: caption_gap_small
      normalized_role: media_caption_gap
      observed_values: ["small gap between photo and caption"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: representative_media_caption_unit}]
      suggested_token: spacing.media.captionGap
      confidence: high
    - id: large_bottom_wordmark_region
      normalized_role: footer_brand_closure_space
      observed_values: ["large region reserved for oversized bottom wordmark"]
      occurrences: [{section: section_07_footer, path: oversized_wordmark_region}]
      suggested_token: spacing.footer.brandRegion
      confidence: high
  radius:
    - value: "0px"
      normalized_role: square_module_and_media_corners
      observed_roles: ["grid panels", "journal panel", "media frames", "photo bands", "nav panel"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: bordered_grid_panel}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: framed_content_panel}
        - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region}
      suggested_token: radius.none
      confidence: high
    - value: "2px"
      normalized_role: compact_button_radius
      observed_roles: ["journal compact text button", "adjacent icon button"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair}
      suggested_token: radius.control.small
      confidence: medium
    - value: "7px"
      normalized_role: external_overlay_badge_radius
      observed_roles: ["non-section fixed badge"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: non_section_overlay_badge}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: low
  shadows:
    - value: "none"
      normalized_role: flat_page_ui_no_elevation
      observed_roles: ["panels", "cards", "buttons", "media frames", "nav"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: framed_content_panel}
        - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region}
      suggested_token: shadow.none
      confidence: high
    - value: "soft_low_elevation"
      normalized_role: external_overlay_only
      observed_roles: ["non-section fixed badge"]
      occurrences:
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: non_section_overlay_badge}
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: low
  dividers:
    - id: muted_green_hairline
      normalized_role: light_canvas_module_linework
      value: "1px muted green"
      observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index]
      uses: ["outer borders", "internal grid lines", "panel header divider", "card vertical dividers"]
      suggested_token: borders.hairline.mutedGreen
      confidence: high
    - id: ivory_inverse_hairline
      normalized_role: inverse_control_segmentation
      value: "1px warm ivory"
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation]
      uses: ["nav panel separators", "menu button divider"]
      suggested_token: borders.hairline.onPrimaryGreen
      confidence: high
    - id: hard_photo_edge
      normalized_role: photo_surface_reset_boundary
      value: "hard horizontal cut, no rule"
      observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      uses: ["canvas to photo", "photo to canvas"]
      suggested_token: null
      confidence: high
  layout_signatures:
    - id: full_width_canvas_with_inset_foreground_modules
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index, section_07_footer]
      mechanics: "viewport canvas reaches edges while content/components sit on rails or fixed positions"
      confidence: high
    - id: huge_brand_then_small_ui_contrast
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_07_footer]
      mechanics: "oversized identity typography contrasted with compact microcopy/control systems"
      confidence: high
    - id: bordered_grid_or_panel_with_internal_hairlines
      observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index]
      mechanics: "same-fill transparent modules separated by thin green linework rather than elevated cards"
      confidence: high
    - id: unframed_media_on_light_canvas
      observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index]
      mechanics: "raster photos sit edge-to-edge in their own media bounds without matte, radius, shadow, or card frame"
      confidence: high
    - id: full_bleed_media_band_reset
      observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      mechanics: "photo ignores inset rail and spans viewport, creating hard surface interruption"
      confidence: high
  surface_relationships:
    - id: opening_surface_run
      sections: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro]
      parent_surface: light_brand_canvas
      child_surfaces: ["transparent brand mark/text", "inverse nav controls", "full-bleed hero photo reset"]
      boundary_behavior: "no header bar or divider; run exits via hard cut into hero photo"
      confidence: high
    - id: midpage_shared_light_canvas
      sections: [section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index]
      parent_surface: light_editorial_canvas
      child_surfaces: ["transparent bordered grid", "asymmetrical media collage", "inset bordered journal panel"]
      boundary_behavior: "content/layout changes only; page edge color and gutters stay continuous"
      confidence: high
    - id: inset_panel_run
      sections: [section_05_editorial_index]
      parent_surface: light_editorial_canvas
      child_surfaces: ["same-fill bordered panel", "internal dividers", "transparent cards", "dark compact controls"]
      boundary_behavior: "panel is inset from viewport; not a section background"
      confidence: high
    - id: full_bleed_photo_surface_run
      sections: [section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      parent_surface: raster_photo
      child_surfaces: []
      boundary_behavior: "photo reaches left/right edges; hard reset between journal and footer"
      confidence: high
    - id: closing_light_canvas_run
      sections: [section_07_footer]
      parent_surface: closing_light_canvas
      child_surfaces: ["transparent microcopy", "brand mark", "oversized wordmark"]
      boundary_behavior: "hard cut from photo; flat cream to page bottom"
      confidence: high
    - id: bookend_brand_surface_style
      sections: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_07_footer]
      parent_surface: light_brand_canvas
      child_surfaces: ["oversized deep-green wordmark", "small brand mark", "sparse micro text/controls"]
      boundary_behavior: "repeated style, not one continuous layer"
      confidence: high
  image_graphic_systems:
    - id: single_color_brand_and_ui_graphics
      observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_05_editorial_index, section_07_footer]
      mechanics: "thin currentColor SVG-like marks; deep green on cream or ivory on green"
      confidence: high
    - id: warm_editorial_photography
      observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
      mechanics: "documentary/editorial food and hospitality imagery, warm natural light, no generated frames/mattes"
      confidence: high
  imagery_creative_directions:
    icons:
      observed: true
      icon_asset_classes: ["single-color-icon", "logo/wordmark"]
      generation_strategy: mixed
      style: "Minimal currentColor line/filled SVG-style affordances for menu, arrows, small badges; brand marks/wordmarks are fixed logo/type placeholders, not generated-image assets."
      density: sparse
      simplicity: simple
      rendering: line
      palette_relationship: "Deep green on cream or warm ivory on deep green inverse controls."
      surface_relationship: "Icons sit directly on transparent canvas, dark control fills, or same-fill cards; no icon containers except compact buttons/nav segments."
      avoid: ["multi-color pictograms", "detailed illustrative icons", "deriving icons from food photos", "treating wordmark/logo as generated art"]
      evidence:
        - {section: section_01_navigation, path: brand_mark_link}
        - {section: section_01_navigation, path: menu_icon_button}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair}
        - {section: section_07_footer, path: footer_link_rows}
    illustrations:
      observed: false
      style: "No reusable decorative illustration system observed."
      density: sparse
      simplicity: minimal
      rendering: unclear
      palette_relationship: "N/A"
      surface_relationship: "N/A"
      avoid: ["adding character/vector/3D scenes", "turning brand mark into illustration system"]
      evidence: []
    interfaces:
      observed: false
      style: "No product/interface imagery observed; navigation/buttons/cards are live page UI."
      density: sparse
      simplicity: minimal
      rendering: unclear
      palette_relationship: "N/A"
      surface_relationship: "N/A"
      avoid: ["promoting live UI components into screenshot-style interface illustrations"]
      evidence: []
    photography:
      observed: true
      style: "Warm editorial/documentary culinary and hospitality photography with natural texture, directional light, shadow, organic imperfection, and cinematic close crops."
      density: moderate
      simplicity: moderate
      rendering: editorial
      palette_relationship: "Warm amber, cream, olive, dark green, deep shadow, and occasional red/teal accents harmonize with cream/green page system."
      surface_relationship: "Photos are either full-bleed viewport bands or unframed media inside cells/collage/cards; photo pixels reach the media frame edges."
      edge_behavior: edge_to_edge_photo_content
      avoid: ["stock-like clean isolation", "inner photo padding", "poster borders", "external mattes", "rounded photo corners unless newly evidenced"]
      evidence:
        - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: full_bleed_media_band}
        - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: representative_item_media}
        - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: representative_media_caption_unit}
        - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: representative_feature_card}
        - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region}

component_candidates:
  - name: segmented_navigation_panel
    kind: other
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["dark inverse rectangular panel", "segmented link row", "menu icon segment", "thin ivory dividers", "compact labels"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: content_hugging
      typography_signature: micro_uppercase_nav_label
      radius_signature: square_corners
      spacing_signature: compact_control_padding
    surface_variants:
      - name: segmented_navigation_panel_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: light_brand_canvas
        fill: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        text: "rgb(249,247,239)"
        border: "1px rgb(249,247,239) internal dividers"
        divider: "rgb(249,247,239)"
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_01_navigation, path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster}
    do_not_generalize: ["Do not make the header a full-width dark bar."]
  - name: icon_button
    kind: icon_button
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_05_editorial_index]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["compact or square hit area", "single-color SVG-like icon", "no shadow", "small or no radius depending context"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: icon_only
      typography_signature: none
      radius_signature: context_dependent_0_to_2px
      spacing_signature: compact_control_padding
    surface_variants:
      - name: icon_button_inverse_segment
        host_surface: inverse_control_surface
        fill: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        text: "rgb(249,247,239) icon"
        border: "ivory segment divider"
        divider: "rgb(249,247,239)"
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_01_navigation, path: root.children.right_navigation_cluster.children.menu_icon_button}
      - name: icon_button_dark_action
        host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
        fill: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        text: "rgb(249,247,239) icon"
        border: none
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: root.children.framed_content_panel.children.panel_header.children.action_cluster}
    do_not_generalize: ["Single-color UI icons only; no multi-color generated icon system."]
  - name: compact_text_button
    kind: button
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_05_editorial_index, section_03_values_grid]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["short label", "compact padding", "deep green fill or outline/transparent variant", "small label typography"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: content_hugging
      typography_signature: micro_button_label
      radius_signature: small_or_square
      spacing_signature: compact_control_padding
    surface_variants:
      - name: compact_text_button_dark_on_light
        host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
        fill: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        text: "rgb(249,247,239)"
        border: none
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: root.children.framed_content_panel.children.panel_header.children.action_cluster}
      - name: compact_text_button_outline_or_transparent_on_light
        host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
        fill: transparent_or_same_surface
        text: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        border: "dark green or muted green"
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: medium
        provenance:
          - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: root.children.grid_panel.children.cell_action_button_if_present}
    do_not_generalize: []
  - name: inset_bordered_panel
    kind: panel
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_05_editorial_index]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["large same-fill inset rectangle", "1px muted green outline", "internal header/card dividers", "square corners", "no shadow"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: parent_stretched
      typography_signature: mixed_panel_heading_and_card_text
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: wide_inset_rail
    surface_variants:
      - name: inset_bordered_panel_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
        fill: "same as host warm ivory"
        text: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        border: "1px muted_green_hairline"
        divider: "1px muted_green_hairline"
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: root.children.framed_content_panel}
    do_not_generalize: ["Do not treat this panel as a full-width section background."]
  - name: bordered_content_grid
    kind: card
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["wide inset grid", "outer border", "internal cell dividers", "transparent/same surface cells", "small media/text/icon content"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: parent_stretched
      typography_signature: small_card_body
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: cell_padding_regular
    surface_variants:
      - name: bordered_content_grid_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
        fill: transparent
        text: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        border: "1px muted_green_hairline"
        divider: "1px muted_green_hairline"
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: root.children.grid_panel}
    do_not_generalize: ["Cells are not elevated cards and should not get shadows or separate fills by default."]
  - name: editorial_grid_item
    kind: card
    confidence: medium
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["transparent cell", "small icon/label or media", "short text", "inherited dividers"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: parent_stretched
      typography_signature: small_card_body
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: cell_padding_regular
    surface_variants:
      - name: editorial_grid_item_on_bordered_grid
        host_surface: transparent_inset_module_on_light_canvas
        fill: transparent
        text: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        border: "inherited grid dividers"
        divider: "muted_green_hairline"
        shadow: none
        confidence: medium
        provenance:
          - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: root.children.grid_panel.children.cell_1}
    do_not_generalize: []
  - name: editorial_feature_card
    kind: card
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_05_editorial_index]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["vertical link card", "title", "corner arrow icon", "unframed photo", "transparent fill", "inherited divider"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: parent_stretched
      typography_signature: small_card_title
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: card_padding_regular_with_media_gap
    surface_variants:
      - name: editorial_feature_card_in_divided_panel
        host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
        fill: transparent
        text: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        border: "inherited 1px muted green vertical dividers"
        divider: "muted_green_hairline"
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: root.children.framed_content_panel.children.card_grid.children.feature_card_1}
    do_not_generalize: ["Do not add card background, radius, or shadow."]
  - name: media_caption_unit
    kind: media_frame
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_04_editorial_collage]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["unframed photo", "small caption below", "transparent host", "manual staggered placement"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: intrinsic_media
      typography_signature: micro_caption
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: caption_gap_small
    surface_variants:
      - name: media_caption_unit_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
        fill: raster_photo
        text: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        border: none
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: root.children.collage_area.children.media_unit_upper_right}
    do_not_generalize: ["Do not regularize the collage into an equal card grid."]
  - name: full_bleed_media_band
    kind: media_frame
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["viewport-width raster photo", "cover fit", "no external frame", "hard horizontal boundaries"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: full_width
      typography_signature: none
      radius_signature: radius.none
      spacing_signature: no_padding_no_gutter
    surface_variants:
      - name: full_bleed_media_band_between_light_canvases
        host_surface: viewport
        fill: raster_photo
        text: none
        border: none
        divider: hard_edge_only
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: root.children.full_width_media_band}
          - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: root.children.media_region}
    do_not_generalize: ["Do not add matte, border, radius, gradient overlay, or padding."]
  - name: footer_link_stack
    kind: link
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_07_footer]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["small text links", "vertical stacks", "transparent background", "deep green"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: content_hugging
      typography_signature: footer_micro_link
      radius_signature: none
      spacing_signature: vertical_link_stack_gap
    surface_variants:
      - name: footer_link_stack_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: closing_light_canvas
        fill: transparent
        text: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        border: none
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_07_footer, path: root.children.secondary_links_and_mark_row}
    do_not_generalize: []
  - name: oversized_wordmark
    kind: other
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_07_footer]
    actual_page_ui: true
    common_anatomy: ["huge serif wordmark/text graphic", "deep green", "transparent fill", "spans width"]
    base_behavior:
      width_behavior: full_width
      typography_signature: oversized_identity_display
      radius_signature: none
      spacing_signature: large_brand_region
    surface_variants:
      - name: oversized_wordmark_on_light_canvas
        host_surface: light_brand_canvas
        fill: transparent
        text: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        border: none
        divider: none
        shadow: none
        confidence: high
        provenance:
          - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: root.children.identity_plate.children.masthead_identity_wordmark}
          - {section: section_07_footer, path: root.children.oversized_wordmark_region}
    do_not_generalize: ["Treat as logo/wordmark/live type asset, not generated image."]

section_pattern_candidates:
  - id: opening_brand_surface_run
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro]
    summary: "Continuous cream opening canvas with compact foreground navigation and oversized deep-green identity display before hard photo reset."
  - id: shared_light_editorial_run
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index]
    summary: "Multiple content modules share one flat warm light canvas; boundaries are layout/spacing changes, not color changes."
  - id: bookend_brand_surface_style
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_07_footer]
    summary: "Opening and closing areas reuse cream canvas, deep green sparse text, small brand mark, and huge wordmark."
  - id: hard_photo_reset
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
    summary: "Full-bleed photography interrupts light canvas with hard horizontal cuts and no frame."
  - id: hairline_bordered_module
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index]
    summary: "Same-surface inset modules rely on 1px muted green linework and square corners rather than elevated cards."

repeated_layout_patterns:
  - id: viewport_canvas_with_inset_rail_modules
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index, section_07_footer]
    mechanics: "Full-width cream canvas persists to page edges; foreground modules/content align to broad inset rails."
  - id: thin_linework_structures
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_03_values_grid, section_05_editorial_index]
    mechanics: "Component boundaries are defined by 1px dividers/borders, with no shadows and square or near-square corners."
  - id: unframed_media_pixels_to_edges
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage, section_05_editorial_index, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
    mechanics: "Photos fill their media boxes edge-to-edge; page modules provide any outer structure."
  - id: oversized_brand_plus_microcopy_hierarchy
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_01_navigation, section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_07_footer]
    mechanics: "Very large serif identity elements paired with compact uppercase navigation/footer text."
  - id: centered_intro_then_content_module
    confidence: medium
    observed_in: [section_03_values_grid, section_04_editorial_collage]
    mechanics: "Centered label/heading stack introduces either structured grid or loose media arrangement."
  - id: light_canvas_to_photo_hard_reset
    confidence: high
    observed_in: [section_02_masthead_media_intro, section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
    mechanics: "No gradient, overlay, divider rule, or gutter; image begins/ends at a hard horizontal boundary."

source_layout_artifact_guidance:
  exact_section_order_belongs_in_layouts_yaml: true
  design_system_should_use_only_repeated_layout_patterns: true

critical_pairings:
  - host_surface: light_brand_canvas
    element_role: heading
    values: {background_or_fill: "rgb(249,247,239)", text: "rgb(38,78,51)", border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: identity_wordmark}
      - {section: section_07_footer, path: oversized_wordmark_region}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: light_brand_canvas
    element_role: button
    values: {background_or_fill: "rgb(38,78,51)", text: "rgb(249,247,239)", border_or_shadow: "1px rgb(249,247,239) internal dividers"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_01_navigation, path: segmented_nav_panel}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: inverse_control_surface
    element_role: icon
    values: {background_or_fill: "rgb(38,78,51)", text: "rgb(249,247,239)", border_or_shadow: "ivory divider"}

      - {section: section_01_navigation, path: menu_icon_button}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
    element_role: heading
    values: {background_or_fill: transparent, text: "rgb(38,78,51) / rgb(38,78,51)", border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: section_heading}
      - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: header_stack}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
    element_role: card
    values: {background_or_fill: transparent, text: "rgb(38,78,51)", border_or_shadow: "1px muted_green_hairline"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: bordered_grid_panel}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
    element_role: divider
    values: {background_or_fill: null, text: null, border_or_shadow: "1px rgb(38,78,51) / muted green"}

      - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: framed_content_panel}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: light_editorial_canvas
    element_role: image_graphic
    values: {background_or_fill: raster_photo, text: null, border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_03_values_grid, path: representative_item_media}
      - {section: section_04_editorial_collage, path: representative_media_caption_unit}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
    element_role: button
    values: {background_or_fill: "rgb(38,78,51)", text: "rgb(249,247,239)", border_or_shadow: "none, radius about 2px"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: compact_action_pair}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
    element_role: card
    values: {background_or_fill: transparent, text: "rgb(38,78,51)", border_or_shadow: "inherited muted green dividers"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: representative_feature_card}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: inset_bordered_panel_surface
    element_role: image_graphic
    values: {background_or_fill: raster_photo, text: null, border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_05_editorial_index, path: representative_feature_card}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: full_bleed_photo_surface
    element_role: image_graphic
    values: {background_or_fill: raster_photo, text: none, border_or_shadow: "none; hard edge"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_02_masthead_media_intro, path: full_bleed_media_band}
      - {section: section_06_full_bleed_media_feature, path: media_region}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: closing_light_canvas
    element_role: body
    values: {background_or_fill: "rgb(249,247,239)", text: "rgb(38,78,51)", border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_07_footer, path: top_metadata_row}
      - {section: section_07_footer, path: footer_link_rows}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: closing_light_canvas
    element_role: icon
    values: {background_or_fill: transparent, text: "rgb(38,78,51)", border_or_shadow: none}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_07_footer, path: footer_link_rows}
    confidence: high
  - host_surface: external_overlay_surface
    element_role: other
    values: {background_or_fill: "rgb(255,255,255)", text: near_black, border_or_shadow: "7px radius, soft shadow"}
    evidence:
      - {section: section_07_footer, path: non_section_overlay_badge}
    confidence: low

do_not_generalize:
  - "Do not give the header its own full-width bar or background; it is foreground navigation on the opening cream canvas."
  - "Do not alternate section background colors between values, collage, and journal; they share one light editorial canvas."
  - "Do not promote journal or grid panel fills to full-section backgrounds; they are inset/same-surface modules."
  - "Do not add gradients, tint washes, dark overlays, or atmospheric layers to flat cream surfaces or photo transitions."
  - "Do not add frames, mattes, padding, radius, or shadows to photographs; photo pixels reach media bounds."
  - "Do not normalize the editorial collage into an evenly spaced card grid; its asymmetrical placement is intentional."
  - "Do not treat logo, brand mark, or oversized wordmark as generated illustration assets."
  - "Do not infer a reusable multi-color icon system; observed UI icons are single-color currentColor-style marks."
  - "Do not promote the fixed white footer overlay badge into the site design system."
  - "Do not use photo pixel palettes as UI color tokens except as imagery direction evidence."

open_questions:
  - "Exact font family names are not available; typography is normalized by scale, casing, serif/condensed character, and tracking."
  - "Subtle paper texture may be deliberate CSS/SVG or screenshot/compression noise; keep as low-impact optional surface texture."
  - "Section 3 compact CTA details are partially truncated in raw capture; outline/transparent variant confidence is medium."
  - "Precise spacing measurements are approximate from visual grounding and should be resolved in layout extraction, not token synthesis."

Step 8

Surface/component map. This stage normalizes the grounding into reusable host-surface and nested-component relationships before design-system conversion, preserving facts such as component color pairings, typography casing, and surface-specific exceptions.

Sections
  • Surface-component map prompt
  • Surface-map token summary
  • Deterministic draft
  • Final surface-component map
Surface-component map promptruns/v177/surface-component-map-prompt.md
You are a senior design-system grounding compiler. Convert the merged grounding, detailed section grounding, deterministic parsed draft, and source CSS report into a factual surface-component map.

For v159, the merged grounding may be a `normalized_site_ast` YAML document and the detailed section grounding may be raw `section.yaml` captures. Read those YAML structures directly: preserve `sections`, `normalized_nodes`, `global_observations`, `component_candidates`, `critical_pairings`, provenance, and raw tree paths when they clarify host-surface or child-component relationships.

Your output is an intermediate implementation reference. It is not a final design system and it is not a prose summary. It must make host surface -> child component relationships unambiguous enough that a later design-system step can preserve colors, typography, borders, depth, graphics, and casing without re-reading the screenshot.

## Core Rules

- Use only grounded evidence and visually close source CSS values.
- The detailed section grounding is the source of truth. Use the deterministic draft only as an extraction aid; correct its taxonomy mistakes and remove repetition.
- Preserve parent/child relationships first: section wrapper, inset shell, child card/panel/tray, controls, labels, text, dividers, media, and decorative graphics must stay attached to their actual host surface.
- Keep host colors pure. `hostSurface.background` must describe only the parent/wrapper surface, not text colors, button fills, adjacent-section resets, logo colors, or child fills.
- Put nested fills, borders, shadows, glows, and graphics in their child recipes.
- Do not call a transparent stack/row/grid a card or panel. Use `layout` for transparent grouping and reserve `cardPanel` for actual filled, bordered, clipped, elevated, or otherwise surfaced children.
- Reserve `control` for visible actions or interactive affordances. Badges/eyebrows/chips/tags may be `labelControl` when they have a visible host/fill; pure text labels are `labelText`.
- Put logos, ornaments, ribbons, background meshes, mockups, photos, and screenshot internals under `graphicMedia`, not card/control/text recipes unless they are real page UI.
- Model visually important dividers, rules, underlines, strokes, and grid lines as `edgeDivider` children when they structure content.
- Every visible heading/body/label role on a host surface must appear in the map with color, casing, approximate size/weight when grounded, and host relationship.
- Preserve explicit casing. If grounding says all caps or uppercase, write `textTransform: uppercase`; if title/sentence/lowercase, record that too.
- Preserve full-heading color by host surface. Do not reduce a full colored heading to only an accent-span rule.
- Preserve body text color by host surface, especially muted body colors that differ from headings or accents.
- Preserve critical color pairings for host surface, heading text, body text, primary/secondary buttons, labels/eyebrows, cards, borders, shadows, dividers, and graphics.
- Preserve imagery creative direction separately for `icons`, `illustrations`, `interfaces`, and `photography`. For each observed category, capture rendering medium, density, simplicity/detail level, palette relationship, host-surface relationship, edge/framing behavior, and avoid-rules. Keep category style separate from local subject matter.
- Inside the `icons` imagery category, preserve `single-color-icon`, `multi-color-icon`, and `logo/wordmark` routing. Single-color icons must be described as simple library/currentColor SVG candidates, multi-color icons as eligible generated-image candidates when needed, and logos/wordmarks as non-generated footprint/color slots.
- Do not let logo art, customer marks, payment marks, or wordmarks define reusable icon or illustration generation style. Put them in `doNotGeneralize` and describe their slot footprint with a simple text/rectangle fallback.
- For photography, separate asset edge behavior from page frame behavior. If the page places a photo inside a card, media frame, or rounded clip, describe that as an external page container; the photo asset itself should normally be edge-to-edge within the image bounds unless visible source pixels show an internal matte/padding.
- If a section has repeated cards/modules, include heading and body text pairings inside the card recipe, not only in a summary.
- Mark embedded/showcase UI, logo art, decorative graphics, and one-off motifs in `doNotGeneralize`.
- Be concise. Prefer one canonical recipe per host/component over repeated quote dumps.
- Do not merge distinct source sections into one broad host, even when they share a similar color. Create a section-local host entry first, then use `sharedRole` to note a reusable pattern.
- Adjacent same-color bands may share a reusable role only if their child relationships, edge behavior, and graphics are also the same. If one band is a logo strip and another is a stats/editorial section, keep separate host entries.
- For repeated modules, group sibling instances into one repeated child role, but keep that role inside the section-local host where it appears.
- Keep output below 30,000 characters. Omit nonessential exact pixel dimensions and subject-matter description before omitting surface, color, type, border, depth, or graphic relationships.
- Include no more than 10 child roles per host. Choose the roles that matter most for design-system synthesis: heading, body, controls, card/panel variants, dividers, media/graphics, and labels.
- Never name exact font families unless the source CSS report explicitly proves that family for the role. Prefer visual descriptors such as `ultra-condensed sans`, `regular sans`, `high-contrast serif`, or `mono-like label`.
- If a prior review says a tile, column, or grid cell reads as same-surface, do not type it as `cardPanel`; use `layout`, `text`, `graphicMedia`, or `sameSurfaceCell` wording inside `layout`.
- If a fill is only marginal, obscured, or low confidence, write `fill: same-surface or low-confidence tonal shift`, not a confident panel fill.
- Do not invent warmer/cooler hue families when the grounding gives a precise accent family. Preserve secondary/support colors as source-backed or `groundedApprox`.
- When a prior review names a specific faulty component or section, correct that exact item explicitly in the new map.
- If the prior review score was already high and describes only minor issues, preserve the previous map structure and make surgical edits only. Do not re-abstract, rename, or reorganize strong host entries unless the review explicitly asks for it.
- Prefer fixing the review's highest-impact complaint first. If the review says the map is already strong, target only the listed blockers such as over-bundled modules, false precision, or confidence labeling.
- If one screenshot section contains multiple full-width host bands with different backgrounds, create sub-host records under separate headings such as `[section] / announcement strip`, `[section] / outer field`, and `[section] / inset tray`. Do not leave them as one composite host.
- For repeated rows/modules with stable anatomy, expose the anatomy as child roles in the host matrix: eyebrow/icon label, heading, body, action, media/panel, and divider/rule should be separate when they have different colors, fills, borders, or behavior.
- A parent layout row may summarize placement, but it must not be the only place where heading/body/button/media pairings appear.
- For high-scoring maps, it is acceptable for the map to become slightly longer if the added length directly splits review-identified bundled children into explicit typed roles.
- For faint shadows, barely visible strokes, subtle lifts, and soft edge separation, prefer qualitative labels such as `subtle edge`, `minimal lift`, or `low-confidence shadow` unless the grounding gives a concrete value.
- Decorative motifs must be named by observed visual identity and role. Do not rename ghost-like cutouts, quote marks, logo marks, ribbons, or oval punctuation into more abstract motifs unless the grounding does so.
- Typography entries should include casing, approximate line-height/leading behavior, and any section-local emphasis behavior when grounded. Avoid generic casing labels if the role is not visibly distinctive.
- When the grounding distinguishes a container from repeated items inside it, preserve both levels: one layout/container child plus one repeated item recipe.
- Do not mention exact CSS/font-report provenance inside component recipes. Use source CSS only to choose close values; keep provenance in `Ambiguities` if needed.
- Same-surface text tiles must be `kind: text` or `kind: layout`, not `cardPanel`. Decorative typography or slogan text should be `kind: text` with `graphicTreatment: decorative type`, not `graphicMedia`.
- Background line art, meshes, ornaments, and faint diagrams are `graphicMedia`; only lines/rules that divide content, frame modules, or structure rows are `edgeDivider`.
- If a section has visibly different item variants in a grid, split only the variants that differ in anatomy or host relationship. Keep repeated siblings grouped when they are truly the same.
- If evidence comes from screenshot observation but is not explicit in compacted grounding, mark `evidence: screenshot-observed` or note `confidence: medium`; do not present it as fully grounded.
- Before returning, silently self-audit against these criteria and fix the map if any answer is no:
  1. Does every actual host surface have a pure parent background and edge/depth recipe?
  2. Are all visible child roles with different fill/text/border behavior explicit children, not buried in layout prose?
  3. Are critical colors tied to host + child role, with confidence marked for inferred values?
  4. Are typography roles separated by heading/body/label/control with casing and leading only when grounded?
  5. Are graphics/depth/edge treatments classified by behavior, not by vague names?
  6. Is the artifact concise enough that downstream synthesis can extract one canonical recipe per host/component?
- If the prior review score is 90 or higher, do not rewrite the map. Preserve the prior structure and make only the named corrections from the review.
- For high-scoring Elegant-style article grids, split lead, top/supporting, and lower-grid article variants only when the review calls out a hierarchy difference.
- For high-scoring Minimal-style intro stacks, split visible heading/body/button children when the review says they are bundled.
- Replace precision-looking inferred media tones, exact radii, and typography flavor labels with broader grounded descriptors unless the section grounding explicitly states the exact value.
- Add `confidence: medium` to any screenshot-observed later-section value that the review says is less traceable; do not remove the value if it is visually important.

## Required Output

Return markdown only, with this exact top-level structure:

# Surface Component Map

## Host Surface Matrix

For each source section host surface first, write:

### [section number/name] — [generic reusable surface role]
- `frequency`: dominant | common | occasional | rare | one-off
- `evidenceSections`: [section names/numbers]
- `sharedRole`: [generic reusable surface role if this resembles another section, otherwise `none`]
- `hostSurface`: { role, background, gradient, edgeTransition, border, depth }
- `defaultText`: { heading, body, labelText }
- `children`:
  - `{child-role}`: { kind: layout | text | control | labelControl | cardPanel | edgeDivider | graphicMedia, host, fill, text, border, shadow, radius, widthBehavior, graphicTreatment, evidence }
- `doNotGeneralize`: [facts that must stay local or decorative/showcase-only]

## Critical Color Pairings

List concise factual pairings:
- `[host surface]` -> `[child role]`: host `[value]`, fill `[value/none]`, text `[value/none]`, border/shadow `[value/none]`, evidence `[section/component]`

## Typography And Casing Pairings

List visible type roles:
- `[host surface]` -> `[role]`: color `[value]`, size/weight `[grounded approximation]`, `textTransform: [uppercase | lowercase | title-case | sentence-case | none]`, evidence `[section/component]`

## Graphics Depth And Edge Recipes

List implementation-critical non-text treatments:
- `[host surface]` -> `[graphic/divider/depth role]`: treatment `[specific grounded behavior]`, values `[colors/opacity/radius/shadow when available]`, evidence `[section/component]`

## Imagery Creative Directions

Use exactly these subsections, even when a category is absent:

### Icons
- `observed`: true | false
- `iconAssetClasses`: [single-color-icon | multi-color-icon | logo/wordmark | unclear]
- `generationStrategy`: [phosphor_currentColor_svg | gpt-image-2 | no_generated_asset | mixed | unclear]
- `style`: [line/filled/flat/dimensional/etc.]
- `densityAndSimplicity`: [sparse/moderate/dense plus simple/moderate/complex]
- `paletteAndSurface`: [how icons use color and sit on host surfaces]
- `edgeAndScale`: [intrinsic sizing, stroke/fill scale, container relationship]
- `subjectHandling`: style comes from this direction; subject matter remains local to the component slot
- `avoid`: [overcomplexity or off-style pitfalls]
- `evidence`: [section/source references]

### Illustrations
- `observed`: true | false
- `style`: [flat vector/line art/soft 3D/collage/abstract/etc.]
- `densityAndSimplicity`: [sparse/moderate/dense plus simple/moderate/complex]
- `paletteAndSurface`: [color treatment and parent/child surface relationship]
- `edgeAndScale`: [framing, crop, transparency, background blending]
- `subjectHandling`: style comes from this direction; subject matter remains local to the component slot
- `avoid`: [overcomplexity or off-style pitfalls]
- `evidence`: [section/source references]

### Interfaces
- `observed`: true | false
- `style`: [literal UI/stylized UI/device mockup/abstracted panels/etc.]
- `densityAndSimplicity`: [sparse/moderate/dense plus simple/moderate/complex]
- `paletteAndSurface`: [control/frame color behavior and host surface relationship]
- `edgeAndScale`: [framing, perspective, crop, shadow/depth]
- `subjectHandling`: style comes from this direction; subject matter remains local to the component slot
- `avoid`: [overcomplexity or off-style pitfalls, including not promoting embedded UI into real page UI]
- `evidence`: [section/source references]

### Photography
- `observed`: true | false
- `style`: [documentary/editorial/studio/product/environmental/etc.]
- `densityAndSimplicity`: [sparse/moderate/dense plus simple/moderate/complex]
- `paletteAndSurface`: [lighting, color grade, contrast, and host surface relationship]
- `edgeAndScale`: [crop, framing, mask, radius, blending]
- `assetEdgeBehavior`: [edge_to_edge_photo_content | externally_framed_by_page | internally_padded_photo | unclear]
- `subjectHandling`: style comes from this direction; subject matter remains local to the component slot
- `avoid`: [overcomplexity or off-style pitfalls]
- `evidence`: [section/source references]

## Repeated Layout Patterns

- List only recurring or page-grammar layout patterns that should enter the design system.
- Record exact source section order, one-off arrangements, and component positions as `layouts.yaml` material, not design-system rules.
- For each repeated pattern include: `scaffold`, `internalArrangement`, `surfaceNesting`, `alignmentWidthBehavior`, `density`, `frequency`, and `evidence`.

## Ambiguities

- [only real conflicts or low-confidence facts]

## v172 Source-Order Leak Closure

- This map may keep source-local facts for conversion, but it must not make exact top-to-bottom page order look like reusable guidance.
- Use source section numbers only as evidence trace, never as reusable role names, shared roles, layout pattern names, or section-pattern names.
- In `Repeated Layout Patterns`, group by reusable scaffold and frequency, not by source section order.
- Do not write a source-page module sequence or run order. If adjacent source sections share a parent surface, describe the generic ownership rule and boundary behavior without turning the adjacency into a generation recipe.
- Explicitly mark one-off source adjacencies as `layouts.yaml only` or `doNotGeneralize`.
Surface-map token summary
Calls0
Input tokens0
Output tokens0

## Surface Inventory

- This deterministic map normalizes the section grounding into host surfaces and their actual nested components.
- Section-local names are evidence labels only; design-system synthesis must translate them into generic reusable surface roles.
- Empty component categories mean no visible instance was grounded in that section.

Final surface-component mapruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/surface-component-map.md
# Surface Component Map

## Host Surface Matrix

### 01 Navigation / header — sparse opening brand canvas with inverse navigation cluster
- `frequency`: one-off
- `evidenceSections`: [section_01_navigation]
- `sharedRole`: bookend light brand canvas
- `hostSurface`: { role: full-width opening light canvas, background: `rgb(249,247,239)` / screenshot warm ivory, gradient: none, edgeTransition: continues into masthead with no header bar divider, border: none, depth: none }
- `defaultText`: { heading: none, body: none, labelText: deep green or inverse ivory depending child host }
- `children`:
  - `brand_mark_link`: { kind: graphicMedia, host: light canvas, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)` mark with tiny light negative details, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: small fixed graphic, graphicTreatment: logo/wordmark slot; flat monochrome organic emblem, evidence: `section_01_navigation root.children.brand_mark_link` }
  - `inverse_segmented_navigation_panel`: { kind: control, host: light canvas, fill: `rgb(38,78,51)` dark forest green, text: warm ivory `rgb(249,247,239)`, border: thin warm-ivory internal linework; outer edge low confidence, shadow: none, radius: square or low-confidence tiny corner detail, widthBehavior: compact top-right content-hugging panel, graphicTreatment: two-zone dark rectangular control cluster, evidence: `section_01_navigation root.children.right_navigation_cluster` }
  - `segmented_nav_labels`: { kind: control, host: inverse segmented navigation panel, fill: same dark green, text: warm ivory small sans labels, border: inherited 1px ivory top/vertical dividers, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: three equal compact bottom tabs, graphicTreatment: text links separated only by rules, evidence: `section_01_navigation ...bottom_segmented_nav_row.items` }
  - `menu_icon_button`: { kind: control, host: inverse segmented navigation panel, fill: same dark green, text: warm ivory hamburger icon, border: 1px ivory left divider, shadow: none, radius: follows panel, widthBehavior: square-like icon-only segment, graphicTreatment: centered simple three-stroke currentColor icon, evidence: `section_01_navigation ...menu_icon_button` }
  - `inverse_panel_dividers`: { kind: edgeDivider, host: inverse segmented navigation panel, fill: none, text: none, border: `1px rgb(249,247,239)` vertical and horizontal segmentation, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: internal structure, graphicTreatment: crisp flat rule grid, evidence: `section_01_navigation ...panel_dividers` }
- `doNotGeneralize`: [do not make header a full-width dark bar, do not generalize logo artwork as illustration style, possible nav corner notches are low-confidence]

### 02 Hero / brand masthead — oversized identity plate on light brand canvas
- `frequency`: one-off
- `evidenceSections`: [section_02_masthead_media_intro]
- `sharedRole`: bookend light brand canvas
- `hostSurface`: { role: full-width warm identity plate, background: `rgb(249,247,239)` / screenshot warm off-white, gradient: none, edgeTransition: hard horizontal cut into photo band, border: none, depth: none }
- `defaultText`: { heading: `rgb(38,78,51)` oversized identity display, body: none, labelText: none }
- `children`:
  - `oversized_split_wordmark`: { kind: graphicMedia, host: light brand canvas, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: nearly full viewport width, graphicTreatment: logo/wordmark or live-type asset; extreme high-contrast serif uppercase lockup split into two clusters with large center gap, evidence: `section_02_masthead_media_intro root.children.identity_plate.children.oversized_split_wordmark` }
- `doNotGeneralize`: [do not recreate literal logo letters, treat wordmark as identity slot not reusable illustration, no buttons or intro copy observed]

### 02 Hero / brand masthead — full-bleed hero photography reset
- `frequency`: common
- `evidenceSections`: [section_02_masthead_media_intro]
- `sharedRole`: full-bleed photographic reset
- `hostSurface`: { role: raster image owns surface, background: photographic pixels not CSS surface, gradient: natural photo luminance falloff only, edgeTransition: hard cut from light plate to image and to lower light sliver, border: none, depth: photographic shadow only }
- `defaultText`: { heading: none, body: none, labelText: none }
- `children`:
  - `hero_photo_band`: { kind: graphicMedia, host: full-bleed photo surface, fill: raster photo, text: none, border: none, shadow: none outside image, radius: 0, widthBehavior: viewport-width cover crop, graphicTreatment: warm cinematic close-up photography; dark olive/black shadows, olive-gold and warm yellow highlights; no matte or overlay, evidence: `section_02_masthead_media_intro root.children.full_width_media_band` }
- `doNotGeneralize`: [do not treat photo dark tones as page background, do not add overlay, border, padding, radius, or shadow]

### 03 What Defines Us values grid — shared light editorial canvas
- `frequency`: common
- `evidenceSections`: [section_03_values_grid]
- `sharedRole`: shared light editorial canvas
- `hostSurface`: { role: warm paper editorial canvas, background: `rgb(249,247,239)`, gradient: none, edgeTransition: continuous with adjacent editorial sections, border: none, depth: none }
- `defaultText`: { heading: `rgb(38,78,51)` condensed uppercase display, body: `rgb(38,78,51)` small sans, labelText: `rgb(38,78,51)` }
- `children`:
  - `centered_section_heading`: { kind: text, host: light editorial canvas, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`; uppercase condensed editorial serif, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: content-hugging centered, graphicTreatment: none, evidence: `section_03_values_grid root.children.section_heading` }
  - `bordered_values_grid_module`: { kind: layout, host: light editorial canvas, fill: transparent / same warm surface, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: 1px muted green outer and internal grid lines, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: wide inset parent-stretched module, graphicTreatment: print-like hairline grid; cells remain same-surface, evidence: `section_03_values_grid root.children.grid_panel` }
- `doNotGeneralize`: [do not give grid cells card fills or elevation, do not alternate this section background away from shared editorial canvas]

### 03 What Defines Us values grid — bordered same-surface values grid module
- `frequency`: one-off
- `evidenceSections`: [section_03_values_grid]
- `sharedRole`: hairline bordered same-surface module
- `hostSurface`: { role: inset bordered grid panel, background: transparent / same `rgb(249,247,239)` as parent, gradient: none, edgeTransition: separated by hairline border and whitespace, border: `1px` muted green, depth: none }
- `defaultText`: { heading: none, body: `rgb(38,78,51)` small centered sans, labelText: `rgb(38,78,51)` tiny ordinal }
- `children`:
  - `grid_linework`: { kind: edgeDivider, host: values grid module, fill: none, text: none, border: `1px` muted green outer border plus internal 3x2 dividers, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: spans module, graphicTreatment: structural linework, evidence: `section_03_values_grid root.children.grid_panel.layers.grid_hairline_system` }
  - `repeated_media_value_cell`: { kind: layout, host: values grid module, fill: transparent same-surface cell, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: inherited grid dividers only, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: equal grid cell, graphicTreatment: sameSurfaceCell with ordinal, square photo, centered body; not a card, evidence: `section_03_values_grid grid_cell_1..5` }
  - `ordinal_badge`: { kind: labelControl, host: repeated value cell, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)` tiny numeral, border: `1px` dark green circular outline, shadow: none, radius: circle, widthBehavior: small fixed badge, graphicTreatment: sequence marker, evidence: `section_03_values_grid *_ordinal_badge` }
  - `value_body_text`: { kind: text, host: repeated value cell, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)` small centered sans, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: narrow centered block, graphicTreatment: compact 4–5 line body copy, evidence: `section_03_values_grid *_body` }
  - `square_value_photos`: { kind: graphicMedia, host: repeated value cell, fill: raster photo, text: none, border: none, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: fixed square media, graphicTreatment: unframed editorial photos; pixels reach square edges, evidence: `section_03_values_grid *_media` }
  - `cta_message_cell`: { kind: layout, host: values grid module, fill: transparent same-surface cell, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: inherited grid dividers, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: equal grid cell, graphicTreatment: centered stack replacing media with message and action, evidence: `section_03_values_grid grid_cell_6` }
  - `compact_compound_cta`: { kind: control, host: cta message cell, fill: `rgb(38,78,51)` / dark forest green, text: `rgb(249,247,239)`, border: subtle internal icon-segment divider, shadow: none, radius: about 3px, widthBehavior: compact label plus square arrow segment, graphicTreatment: filled primary link with single-color arrow, evidence: `section_03_values_grid cell_6_cta` }
- `doNotGeneralize`: [same-surface cells are not cards, no shadows or rounded photo corners, CTA segment divider color is medium-confidence]

### 04 Roma Stories image collage — open light editorial gallery canvas
- `frequency`: one-off
- `evidenceSections`: [section_04_editorial_collage]
- `sharedRole`: shared light editorial canvas
- `hostSurface`: { role: warm paper editorial canvas, background: `rgb(249,247,239)` / screenshot warm ivory, gradient: none, edgeTransition: same light field continues; bottom border sliver belongs to next section, border: none, depth: none }
- `defaultText`: { heading: `rgb(38,78,51)` large condensed uppercase display, body: none, labelText: `rgb(38,78,51)` micro account-style labels/captions }
- `children`:
  - `intro_micro_label`: { kind: text, host: light editorial canvas, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: content-hugging centered, graphicTreatment: tiny uppercase/handle-like label, evidence: `section_04_editorial_collage root.children.header_stack.children.intro_micro_label` }
  - `section_title`: { kind: text, host: light editorial canvas, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: centered compact title, graphicTreatment: uppercase high-contrast condensed serif display, evidence: `section_04_editorial_collage root.children.header_stack.children.section_title` }
  - `staggered_collage_layout`: { kind: layout, host: light editorial canvas, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)` captions, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: full-section manual placement, graphicTreatment: asymmetrical gallery with large negative space; not a grid of cards, evidence: `section_04_editorial_collage root.children.collage_area` }
  - `repeated_square_photo_units`: { kind: layout, host: collage layout, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)` caption, border: none, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: two observed square photo sizes, graphicTreatment: photo plus centered microcaption; no card chrome, evidence: `section_04_editorial_collage collage_area.items.*` }
  - `collage_square_photos`: { kind: graphicMedia, host: repeated square photo unit, fill: raster photo, text: none, border: none, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: fixed square media, graphicTreatment: edge-to-edge square editorial food/tabletop photos with saturated warm accents and occasional teal/lime, evidence: `section_04_editorial_collage *_image` }
  - `media_microcaptions`: { kind: text, host: repeated square photo unit, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)` tiny condensed mono-like/narrow sans, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: content-hugging centered, graphicTreatment: uppercase or handle-like captions with tight spacing, evidence: `section_04_editorial_collage *_caption` }
- `doNotGeneralize`: [do not regularize collage into equal grid, do not add cards/borders/shadows to media units, bottom line is likely next section ingress]

### 05 Journal section — shared light editorial canvas with inset module and detached controls
- `frequency`: one-off
- `evidenceSections`: [section_05_editorial_index]
- `sharedRole`: shared light editorial canvas
- `hostSurface`: { role: warm paper editorial canvas, background: `rgb(249,247,239)`, gradient: none, edgeTransition: continuous light canvas before hard reset to photo, border: none, depth: none }
- `defaultText`: { heading: `rgb(38,78,51)`, body: `rgb(38,78,51)`, labelText: `rgb(38,78,51)` }
- `children`:
  - `inset_journal_panel`: { kind: cardPanel, host: light editorial canvas, fill: same warm ivory as host, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: `1px` muted green outer border and internal dividers, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: wide inset parent-stretched panel, graphicTreatment: same-fill bordered editorial module, evidence: `section_05_editorial_index root.children.framed_content_panel` }
  - `detached_carousel_controls`: { kind: control, host: light editorial canvas below panel, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)` arrows, border: `1px` dark green circular outline, shadow: none, radius: circle, widthBehavior: two 32px icon buttons positioned near outer edges, graphicTreatment: previous/next outline arrow buttons, evidence: `section_05_editorial_index root.children.lower_carousel_controls` }
- `doNotGeneralize`: [do not treat inset panel fill as full section background, bottom media strip belongs to next reset]

### 05 Journal section — inset same-fill bordered editorial panel
- `frequency`: one-off
- `evidenceSections`: [section_05_editorial_index]
- `sharedRole`: hairline bordered same-surface module
- `hostSurface`: { role: inset panel surface, background: same `rgb(249,247,239)` as parent, gradient: none, edgeTransition: separated by muted green hairline, border: `1px` muted green, depth: none }
- `defaultText`: { heading: `rgb(38,78,51)` large uppercase condensed serif, body: none, labelText: `rgb(38,78,51)` small article title }
- `children`:
  - `panel_display_heading`: { kind: text, host: panel header, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: left-aligned in header bar, graphicTreatment: tall condensed uppercase serif section label, evidence: `section_05_editorial_index section_display_heading` }
  - `header_action_pair`: { kind: control, host: panel header, fill: `rgb(38,78,51)`, text: `rgb(249,247,239)`, border: none, shadow: none, radius: about 2px, widthBehavior: compact text button plus adjacent square icon button, graphicTreatment: dark primary micro controls with arrow, evidence: `section_05_editorial_index header_action_group` }
  - `panel_header_divider`: { kind: edgeDivider, host: inset panel, fill: none, text: none, border: `1px` muted green horizontal rule below header, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: full panel width, graphicTreatment: structural header separator, evidence: `section_05_editorial_index section_header_bar` }
  - `article_grid_layout`: { kind: layout, host: inset panel, fill: same warm ivory, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: inherited vertical muted green dividers, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: three equal columns, graphicTreatment: same-surface link cells, not filled cards, evidence: `section_05_editorial_index article_grid` }
  - `repeated_feature_link_cell`: { kind: layout, host: article grid, fill: transparent same-surface cell, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: inherited `1px` muted green vertical dividers, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: equal column, graphicTreatment: small article title + uncontained diagonal arrow + large portrait photo, evidence: `section_05_editorial_index feature_card_1..3` }
  - `feature_card_title`: { kind: text, host: repeated feature link cell, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)` small sans, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: left-aligned line, graphicTreatment: compact article title, evidence: `section_05_editorial_index card_title_1..3` }
  - `feature_link_arrow`: { kind: graphicMedia, host: repeated feature link cell, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)` thin NE arrow, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: small uncontained icon, graphicTreatment: single-color currentColor link affordance, evidence: `section_05_editorial_index card_corner_icon_1..3` }
  - `feature_portrait_photos`: { kind: graphicMedia, host: repeated feature link cell, fill: raster photo, text: none, border: none, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: large portrait rectangle, graphicTreatment: warm editorial photos; pixels reach edges, no frame, evidence: `section_05_editorial_index card_media_1..3` }
  - `grid_vertical_dividers`: { kind: edgeDivider, host: article grid, fill: none, text: none, border: `1px` muted green between columns, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: full grid height, graphicTreatment: structural cell separators, evidence: `section_05_editorial_index article_grid` }
- `doNotGeneralize`: [transparent link cells are not elevated cards, no photo rounding, action pair may be two adjacent controls but visually connected]

- `frequency`: common
- `evidenceSections`: [section_06_full_bleed_media_feature]
- `sharedRole`: full-bleed photographic reset
- `hostSurface`: { role: raster image visual break, background: photographic pixels; root solid surface not observable, gradient: natural photo vignette/light falloff only, edgeTransition: hard horizontal cut to adjacent light canvas, border: none, depth: photographic shadow only }
- `defaultText`: { heading: none, body: none, labelText: none }
- `children`:
  - `full_bleed_still_life_photo`: { kind: graphicMedia, host: photo-owned surface, fill: raster photo, text: none, border: none, shadow: none outside image, radius: 0, widthBehavior: viewport-width landscape crop, graphicTreatment: warm amber close tabletop still-life photography with cream, ochre, deep brown-black, metal highlights; no overlay, evidence: `section_06_full_bleed_media_feature root.children.media_region` }
  - `bottom_light_boundary_sliver`: { kind: edgeDivider, host: photo-owned surface / probable next canvas, fill: warm ivory band, text: none, border: none, shadow: none, radius: 0, widthBehavior: full-width thin boundary, graphicTreatment: low-confidence neighboring footer canvas, evidence: `section_06_full_bleed_media_feature root.children.bottom_boundary_surface` }
- `doNotGeneralize`: [do not infer text overlay or controls, do not tokenize photo textures as CSS patterns, bottom pale strip ownership is uncertain]
