- `evidenceSections`: [section_07_footer]
- `sharedRole`: bookend light brand canvas
- `hostSurface`: { role: closing warm paper canvas, background: `rgb(249,247,239)` / screenshot warm ivory, gradient: none, edgeTransition: hard reset from prior photo; final page edge same canvas, border: none, depth: none }
- `defaultText`: { heading: `rgb(38,78,51)` oversized wordmark, body: `rgb(38,78,51)` footer values, labelText: `rgb(38,78,51)` uppercase micro labels/links }
- `children`:
  - `footer_metadata_grid`: { kind: layout, host: closing light canvas, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: wide four-column distribution, graphicTreatment: label/value text stacks separated by whitespace, evidence: `section_07_footer root.children.top_metadata_row` }

  - `metadata_values`: { kind: text, host: metadata grid, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: content-width, graphicTreatment: compact footer values, mostly uppercase or mixed case by content, evidence: `section_07_footer metadata_value` }

  - `footer_link_text`: { kind: text, host: footer link stacks, fill: transparent, text: `rgb(38,78,51)`, border: none, shadow: none, radius: none, widthBehavior: content-width, graphicTreatment: uppercase narrow micro links, evidence: `section_07_footer *_link_stack` }

- `doNotGeneralize`: [fixed white/black overlay badge is external, do not reuse literal contact details or logo letters, footer has no internal dividers/cards/forms]

## Critical Color Pairings

- `opening light header canvas` -> `brand mark`: host `rgb(249,247,239)`, fill `none`, text `rgb(38,78,51)`, border/shadow `none`, evidence `section_01 brand_mark_link`
- `opening light header canvas` -> `inverse navigation panel`: host `rgb(249,247,239)`, fill `rgb(38,78,51)`, text `rgb(249,247,239)`, border/shadow `1px warm ivory dividers / no shadow`, evidence `section_01 right_navigation_cluster`
- `inverse navigation panel` -> `menu icon`: host `rgb(38,78,51)`, fill `same`, text `rgb(249,247,239)`, border/shadow `1px warm ivory divider / none`, evidence `section_01 menu_icon_button`
- `masthead light plate` -> `oversized wordmark`: host `rgb(249,247,239)`, fill `none`, text `rgb(38,78,51)`, border/shadow `none`, evidence `section_02 oversized_split_wordmark`
- `full-bleed photo reset` -> `photo band`: host `raster photo`, fill `photo pixels`, text `none`, border/shadow `none; hard edge`, evidence `section_02 full_width_media_band; section_06 media_region`
- `light editorial canvas` -> `section headings`: host `rgb(249,247,239)`, fill `none`, text `rgb(38,78,51)`, border/shadow `none`, evidence `section_03 section_heading; section_04 section_title`
- `values grid module` -> `linework`: host `same warm ivory`, fill `none`, text `none`, border/shadow `1px muted green`, evidence `section_03 grid_panel`
- `values grid cell` -> `ordinal badge`: host `transparent cell`, fill `transparent`, text `rgb(38,78,51)`, border/shadow `1px dark green circle`, evidence `section_03 ordinal_badges`
- `values grid cell` -> `compact CTA`: host `transparent cell`, fill `rgb(38,78,51)`, text `rgb(249,247,239)`, border/shadow `subtle internal segment divider; none`, evidence `section_03 cell_6_cta`
- `collage light canvas` -> `photos and captions`: host `rgb(249,247,239)`, fill `raster photo for media / none for captions`, text `rgb(38,78,51)` captions, border/shadow `none`, evidence `section_04 media_caption_units`
- `journal light canvas` -> `inset panel`: host `rgb(249,247,239)`, fill `same warm ivory`, text `rgb(38,78,51)`, border/shadow `1px muted green / none`, evidence `section_05 framed_content_panel`
- `journal panel header` -> `action buttons`: host `same warm ivory`, fill `rgb(38,78,51)`, text `rgb(249,247,239)`, border/shadow `none; about 2px radius`, evidence `section_05 header_action_group`
- `journal article cell` -> `feature media`: host `same warm ivory transparent cell`, fill `raster photo`, text `none`, border/shadow `none`, evidence `section_05 card_media`
- `light canvas below journal panel` -> `carousel arrows`: host `rgb(249,247,239)`, fill `transparent`, text `rgb(38,78,51)`, border/shadow `1px dark green circular outline / none`, evidence `section_05 lower_carousel_controls`
- `footer light canvas` -> `microcopy and wordmark`: host `rgb(249,247,239)`, fill `none`, text `rgb(38,78,51)`, border/shadow `none`, evidence `section_07 metadata/link/wordmark`
- `external overlay` -> `fixed badge`: host `viewport overlay`, fill `rgb(255,255,255)`, text `near black`, border/shadow `7px radius; soft low shadow`, evidence `section_07 non_section_fixed_badge_overlay; doNotGeneralize`

## Typography And Casing Pairings

- `inverse navigation panel` -> `nav tab label`: color `rgb(249,247,239)`, size/weight `~12px regular small sans, tight leading`, `textTransform: title-case or mixed-case`, evidence `section_01 nav_tab_items`
- `masthead light plate` -> `identity wordmark`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `extreme display scale, high-contrast serif, regular, very tight single-line leading`, `textTransform: uppercase`, evidence `section_02 oversized_split_wordmark`
- `values light canvas` -> `centered section heading`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `~31px condensed editorial serif, 400, line-height ~1.05`, `textTransform: uppercase`, evidence `section_03 section_heading`
- `values grid cell` -> `ordinal badge`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `~10px tiny editorial numeral, regular, line-height 1`, `textTransform: none`, evidence `section_03 ordinal_badges`
- `values grid cell` -> `body copy`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `~12px compact sans, medium, tight 1.05–1.1 leading`, `textTransform: none`, evidence `section_03 cell_body`
- `values CTA` -> `button label`: color `rgb(249,247,239)`, size/weight `~11px compact sans, medium, line-height 1`, `textTransform: none`, evidence `section_03 cta_label`
- `collage light canvas` -> `intro micro label`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `~12px condensed mono-like/narrow sans, regular, 14px leading`, `textTransform: uppercase or handle-like`, evidence `section_04 intro_micro_label`
- `collage light canvas` -> `section title`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `~44px condensed high-contrast serif, regular, tight leading`, `textTransform: uppercase`, evidence `section_04 section_title`
- `collage media unit` -> `microcaption`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `~12px condensed mono-like/narrow sans, regular, tight leading`, `textTransform: uppercase or handle-like`, evidence `section_04 media captions`
- `journal panel` -> `panel heading`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `~38px tall condensed high-contrast serif, regular, ~42px leading`, `textTransform: uppercase`, evidence `section_05 section_display_heading`
- `journal panel` -> `article title`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `~12px compact sans, medium, 14px leading`, `textTransform: none`, evidence `section_05 card_title`
- `journal action button` -> `button label`: color `rgb(249,247,239)`, size/weight `~11px tiny centered sans, medium, 14px leading`, `textTransform: none`, evidence `section_05 header_text_action`
- `footer canvas` -> `metadata label`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `~13px narrow/condensed sans, regular, 16px leading`, `textTransform: uppercase`, evidence `section_07 metadata_label`
- `footer canvas` -> `metadata value`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `~13px narrow/condensed sans, regular, 20–22px leading`, `textTransform: mostly uppercase or mixed-case depending content`, evidence `section_07 metadata_value`
- `footer canvas` -> `footer links`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `~13px narrow/condensed sans, regular, ~18px leading`, `textTransform: uppercase`, evidence `section_07 link stacks`
- `footer canvas` -> `oversized wordmark`: color `rgb(38,78,51)`, size/weight `extreme display scale, high-contrast serif, regular, tight leading`, `textTransform: uppercase`, evidence `section_07 oversized_wordmark_region`

## Graphics Depth And Edge Recipes

- `light brand/editorial/footer canvases` -> `paper surface`: treatment `flat warm ivory with possible subtle low-contrast paper grain/noise`, values `rgb(249,247,239); texture confidence medium`, evidence `sections 01,03,04,05,07`
- `inverse navigation panel` -> `segmentation`: treatment `dark green block structured by warm ivory hairlines`, values `fill rgb(38,78,51); 1px rgb(249,247,239) lines; no shadow`, evidence `section_01 right_navigation_cluster`
- `values grid module` -> `print hairline grid`: treatment `outer border and internal dividers define equal same-surface cells`, values `1px muted green, square corners, no elevation`, evidence `section_03 grid_panel`
- `values ordinal badge` -> `circular sequence marker`: treatment `transparent circle outline with centered tiny numeral`, values `1px dark green, 21px footprint, circle radius`, evidence `section_03 ordinal_badges`
- `compound CTA buttons` -> `split label/icon control`: treatment `filled dark green compact button with right icon segment divider`, values `rgb(38,78,51) fill, warm ivory text/icon, ~2–3px radius, no shadow`, evidence `section_03 cta; section_05 header action`
- `collage media` -> `hard square photo clipping`: treatment `photos clip to square with no card, border, radius, or shadow; caption below`, values `0 radius; 16–19px caption gap`, evidence `section_04 media units`
- `journal panel` -> `same-fill framed module`: treatment `inset panel uses same ivory fill and green architectural linework`, values `1px muted green outer border, header divider, vertical card dividers, no shadow`, evidence `section_05 framed_content_panel`
- `journal article media` -> `portrait photo frame`: treatment `large raster image fills rectangular portrait bounds edge-to-edge`, values `0 radius, no border, no shadow`, evidence `section_05 card_media`
- `full-bleed photo bands` -> `hard reset edge`: treatment `raster image begins/ends at hard horizontal boundary with no CSS rule, matte, scrim, or overlay`, values `0 padding, 0 radius, viewport width`, evidence `section_02 full_width_media_band; section_06 media_region`
- `footer` -> `whitespace-only separation`: treatment `microcopy/link groups and logo marks sit directly on canvas; no rules/cards`, values `no internal border, no shadow`, evidence `section_07 footer`
- `external overlay` -> `non-site badge`: treatment `white rounded pills with black text and soft shadow`, values `~7px radius; soft low elevation`, evidence `section_07 non_section_fixed_badge_overlay; doNotGeneralize`

## Imagery Creative Directions

### Icons
- `observed`: true
- `iconAssetClasses`: [single-color-icon, logo/wordmark]
- `generationStrategy`: mixed
- `style`: single-color UI icons are minimal thin-line/currentColor SVG candidates; logo/wordmark assets are fixed footprint/color slots, not generated illustration assets.
- `densityAndSimplicity`: sparse and simple for UI icons; moderate detail only inside small brand logo marks.
- `paletteAndSurface`: dark green `rgb(38,78,51)` on warm ivory, or warm ivory `rgb(249,247,239)` on dark green controls; no multi-color reusable icon system observed.
- `edgeAndScale`: icons are small, flat, unshadowed; either uncontained link arrows, centered inside compact/square buttons, inside circular outline carousel controls, or placed as logo/wordmark graphics directly on canvas.
- `subjectHandling`: style comes from minimal line-arrow/menu/currentColor behavior; subject matter remains local to menu, arrow, logo slots. Brand marks/wordmarks should use simple text/rectangle/logo placeholders if exact asset is unavailable.
- `avoid`: [multi-color pictograms, detailed illustrative icons, deriving icon style from photography, treating logo/wordmark art as generated icons, promoting external overlay glyphs]
- `evidence`: [section_01 brand_mark_link/menu_icon_button, section_03 cta_arrow_icon, section_05 header/card/carousel arrows, section_07 brand mark/wordmark]

### Illustrations
- `observed`: false
- `style`: no reusable illustration system observed.
- `densityAndSimplicity`: none observed.
- `paletteAndSurface`: N/A.
- `edgeAndScale`: N/A.
- `subjectHandling`: do not convert logos, photos, or decorative wordmarks into illustration direction.
- `avoid`: [adding character scenes, 3D scenes, abstract vector decoration, treating brand mark as illustration system]
- `evidence`: []

### Interfaces
- `observed`: false
- `style`: no product/interface imagery observed; navigation, buttons, grids, and cards are live page UI.
- `densityAndSimplicity`: none observed.
- `paletteAndSurface`: N/A.
- `edgeAndScale`: N/A.
- `subjectHandling`: live UI components remain real components, not screenshot-style interface illustrations.
- `avoid`: [promoting page UI into embedded mockups, adding device frames, adding dashboard panels]
- `evidence`: []

### Photography
- `observed`: true
- `style`: warm editorial/documentary culinary, hospitality, interior, and tabletop photography with natural texture, directional light, high shadow contrast, shallow depth or close crop, and analog/cinematic warmth.
- `densityAndSimplicity`: moderate density overall; simple single-scene or single-subject compositions, with high tactile detail inside each photo.
- `paletteAndSurface`: warm amber, cream, ochre, olive, dark green/black, deep brown shadows, and occasional teal/red/lime accents harmonize with the ivory/green UI; photo colors are imagery direction, not UI tokens.
- `edgeAndScale`: photos either span viewport as full-bleed bands or sit unframed inside square/portrait media bounds; page containers provide placement, not internal mattes.
- `assetEdgeBehavior`: edge_to_edge_photo_content
- `subjectHandling`: preserve lighting, crop, texture, warmth, and edge behavior; exact food, hands, plates, rooms, utensils, or fruit subjects remain local content.
- `avoid`: [stock-like clean isolation, internal image padding, poster borders, photo shadows as CSS elevation, rounded corners unless newly evidenced, overlay scrims on observed photo bands]
- `evidence`: [section_02 hero_photo, section_03 square value photos, section_04 collage photos, section_05 journal feature photos, section_06 full-bleed still-life]

## Repeated Layout Patterns

- `full-width warm canvas with inset foreground modules`: scaffold `viewport-wide warm ivory paper surface`, internalArrangement `content/components align to broad rails or sparse fixed positions`, surfaceNesting `transparent or same-fill children on parent canvas`, alignmentWidthBehavior `full canvas with inset modules`, density `low to moderate`, frequency `common`, evidence `[section_01, section_03, section_05, section_07]`
- `hairline structured same-surface modules`: scaffold `same-fill inset grid/panel`, internalArrangement `outer 1px border plus internal dividers; children remain transparent`, surfaceNesting `linework creates structure instead of card fills`, alignmentWidthBehavior `wide inset parent-stretched modules`, density `moderate`, frequency `common`, evidence `[section_03, section_05]`
- `compact inverse controls on light canvas`: scaffold `small dark green filled control cluster`, internalArrangement `micro text labels and/or icon segments divided by hairlines`, surfaceNesting `dark control sits on light canvas or light panel`, alignmentWidthBehavior `content-hugging`, density `compact`, frequency `occasional`, evidence `[section_01, section_03, section_05]`
- `unframed media pixels-to-edges`: scaffold `photo media frame without chrome`, internalArrangement `image fills square, portrait, or full-bleed rectangle`, surfaceNesting `photo is child media, not parent canvas except full-bleed resets`, alignmentWidthBehavior `fixed media sizes or viewport-wide`, density `varies by photo`, frequency `dominant`, evidence `[section_02, section_03, section_04, section_05, section_06]`
- `oversized identity plus microcopy contrast`: scaffold `extreme serif brand typography paired with tiny utilitarian labels/links`, internalArrangement `large wordmark regions separated from compact controls or footer copy by whitespace`, surfaceNesting `transparent text/graphics on light canvas`, alignmentWidthBehavior `viewport-scale wordmark plus content-width microcopy`, density `sparse`, frequency `common`, evidence `[section_01, section_02, section_07]`
- `centered intro above content field`: scaffold `small centered label or heading above a larger module/gallery`, internalArrangement `compact text stack then grid or collage`, surfaceNesting `transparent text on light canvas`, alignmentWidthBehavior `centered heading; content may be wide or freeform`, density `low`, frequency `occasional`, evidence `[section_03, section_04]`
- `full-bleed photo reset`: scaffold `raster photo interrupts light canvas`, internalArrangement `no text, no overlay, no padding`, surfaceNesting `photo owns the visible band`, alignmentWidthBehavior `viewport-wide hard-edged image`, density `single dominant media`, frequency `common`, evidence `[section_02, section_06]`

## Ambiguities

- Exact font family assignment by role is not fully recoverable from screenshot; use visual classes: high-contrast serif display, condensed/narrow micro sans, compact sans.
- Subtle paper texture may be real CSS/SVG/background image or screenshot/compression noise; keep as optional low-contrast surface effect.
- Navigation panel outer corner detail/notches are low-confidence; internal ivory dividers are high-confidence.
- Values-grid CTA icon-segment divider is subtle and medium-confidence.
- Section 05 panel top border is partly clipped at crop top, but panel outline/internal dividers are otherwise high-confidence.
- Section 06 bottom warm ivory band likely belongs to the footer or adjacent canvas; do not treat it as the photo section’s host background.
- External bottom-right footer overlay is not site-owned despite being visible.

## v172 Source-Order Leak Closure

- Source section numbers are used only as evidence traces, not as reusable pattern names or required page order.
- The repeated patterns above are grouped by reusable scaffold and frequency, not by the top-to-bottom page sequence.
- The opening, midpage, and closing light canvases may share a warm ivory/green role, but they are not one reusable run requirement; adjacency belongs to layouts.yaml.
- Full-bleed photo bands are a reusable reset behavior, not an instruction that every generated page must place photo bands in the observed source positions.
- The exact adjacency of journal panel → full-bleed photo → footer is source-layout material only.
- One-off assets and adjacencies marked `doNotGeneralize` include the literal logo/wordmark artwork, exact collage arrangement, external overlay badge, and uncertain bottom boundary slivers.

Step 9

Design-system synthesis. This stage converts the grounded page description into a reusable schema-based design system and then syncs explicit values back to the source CSS where possible.

Sections
  • Design-system prompt
  • Color sync prompt
  • Design-system token usage
  • Design-system token breakdown
  • Pre-color-sync design system
  • Final design system
Design-system promptruns/v177/system-prompt.md
You are an expert design-system architect. Convert a normalized site AST YAML document, raw section YAML grounding, source CSS/style reports, and optional review guidance into one final design-system YAML document.

This is the final stage of the pipeline:

```yaml
Raw section capture
  -> Normalized section AST
  -> Design-system YAML
```

## Purpose

Produce a coherent, reusable design-system YAML file that captures canonical tokens, components, variants, section patterns, repeated layout rules, four-category imagery direction, motion/interaction constraints, provenance, confidence, and open questions.

The output should be compressed and reusable, not a raw dump. It should preserve distinctive visual mechanics without naming tokens after content, brand, business, product, industry, or one-off section copy.

## Core Rules

- Return YAML only. Do not wrap it in markdown fences. Do not add markdown prose.
- Set `schema_version: design_system_yaml.v1` and `type: design_system`.
- Treat the normalized site AST as the primary abstraction layer. Use raw section YAML only to restore detail or resolve ambiguity.
- If a source CSS/style report is provided, use exact values from it only when they preserve the normalized/grounded role. Do not let global source frequency override local host-surface/component pairings.
- Use generic role names. Exact source values may map into generic roles, but names and rules must make sense for a completely different source site.
- Never create section-specific, content-specific, brand-specific, hero-specific, footer-specific, CTA-specific, promo-specific, or industry-specific token names.
- Section-aware rules are allowed in `patterns` or `rules` for opening bookend, closing bookend, and one-off generic section behavior. Those rules must not become section-specific token names.
- Preserve host-surface relationships. A button, label, card, divider, icon, input, tab, or text recipe observed on one host surface must not become the default for another host surface without evidence.
- If a component family has stable anatomy but different colors by surface, define one base component plus surface variants or separate generic surface-role variants.
- Preserve small icon-only action controls as real reusable components when grounded. If a card, tile, footer, nav, or carousel uses a circular or square arrow/icon control, define the icon-button recipe with fixed dimensions, radius, fill, icon color, host surface, and optional/required usage. Do not collapse it into a loose text arrow, inline glyph, or generic link just because it is secondary or appears only on some repeated items.
- Keep compact-control sizing explicit. Buttons, CTA pills, eyebrows, badges, chips, tags, compact labels, icon buttons, and links must state content-hugging/fixed/icon-only/full-width/parent-stretched behavior and implementation constraints.
- Implement content-hugging controls with non-stretch sizing guidance: `display: inline-flex`, `width: max-content` or `fit-content`, `max-width: 100%`, `white-space: nowrap`, and `flex: 0 0 auto`.
- Do not bake positional alignment such as `align-self:flex-start` or `align-self:center` into a base compact label/button/chip recipe unless every grounded instance uses the same alignment context. Base component recipes should describe intrinsic sizing and anatomy; alignment belongs to parent layout patterns, section stack rules, or clearly named contextual variants.
- When a compact label appears in both centered intros/CTAs and left-aligned card/content stacks, keep one content-hugging base recipe and add contextual alignment guidance such as "center inside centered stacks; start inside left-aligned stacks" under layout rules or variants.
- Do not output `width: auto` as the only sizing hint for content-hugging controls.
- Do not promote UI observed only inside embedded screenshots, thumbnails, device mockups, product previews, or illustrations into actual page UI components.
- Treat structural scaffolds as patterns, not components. Section shells, grids, columns, rows, matrices, bands, wrappers, logo/proof rows, metrics rows, footer strips, divider-only layouts, and tile fields belong in `patterns` or `rules`, not `components`, unless they are true portable card/panel/media components.
- Preserve borders as conditional separation evidence. Do not add default borders to high-contrast cards unless grounded. Same-surface or near-same-surface cards may need borders/dividers when grounded.
- Preserve typography casing as implementation behavior. Include `textTransform` or `caseBehavior` on typography and component recipes when grounded.
- Determine heading hierarchy by comparing all sections. The common readable section heading becomes the default heading token; oversized opening/closing/display, decorative words, date numerals, or logo-like marks become contextual display tokens.
- Enforce the Typography Normalization Contract before returning. Body and paragraph typography tokens must have `fontSize` between `14px` and `16px`, inclusive; do not create body, paragraph, muted-body, card-body, footer-body, or supporting-body tokens outside this range.
- Subhead, lead, intro, and supporting-heading text must not exceed `1.5x` the canonical body text size. If a large text treatment is visually more than `1.5x` body, classify it as a heading, display, quote, or contextual display role instead of a subhead/supporting role.
- Text-bearing controls and text links, including buttons, nav links, footer links, tabs, text buttons, and inline links, must use the canonical body text size. Icon-only controls may define icon dimensions separately, but must not use a smaller text typography token unless no text is rendered.
- Semantic `h1`, `h2`, and `h3` heading tokens must share the same `fontFamily` and `fontWeight`; hierarchy should vary by size, line-height, spacing, placement, or context. Decorative/display emphasis spans may use separate contextual display or decorative tokens, but those tokens must not replace the semantic `h1`/`h2`/`h3` family/weight contract.
- Source CSS typography values are evidence, not an override, when they conflict with the Typography Normalization Contract. Source font files and families may be used, but body-size bounds, text-link/control sizing, subhead scaling, and semantic heading consistency remain normative.
- Preserve grouped section runs, surface continuity, tonal fades, gradient-to-solid transitions, and hard resets as first-class layout grammar.
- Preserve entry/exit behavior separately from the settled section surface. When global grounding says a run enters via a white/near-white-to-tint wash but a later crop is flat tint, model both facts: the entry gradient starts from the previous parent canvas color, then settles into the run color. Do not let a local footer crop with `gradient:none_visible` erase the full-page entry wash.
- Classify image/graphic placement and edge behavior: background blended, background contained, foreground graphic, foreground media, embedded showcase, clipped/framed, softly masked, seamless, or unclear.
- Split imagery direction into exactly four reusable categories: `icons`, `illustrations`, `interfaces`, and `photography`. Each category must describe style, density, simplicity/detail level, rendering medium, palette relationship, surface relationship, edge/framing behavior, and avoid-rules.
- Within `imagery.icons`, preserve icon asset routing with `iconAssetClasses` and `generationStrategy`. Use `single-color-icon` for simple one-color UI/support glyphs that should be implemented as inline Phosphor-style SVGs using `currentColor`; use `multi-color-icon` only for pictorial icons that visibly require multiple colors or generated rendering; use `logo/wordmark` for brand marks and set their strategy to no generated asset.
- Logos, wordmarks, payment marks, customer marks, and brand emblems must not become generated image assets or reusable illustration styles. Record their footprint/color relationship only, and prefer a simple text or rectangle fallback in the current surface/body color.
- Within `imagery.photography`, preserve whether generated photo pixels should fill the asset edge-to-edge. External page cards, rounded masks, clipping frames, or media wells belong to components/patterns, not inside the generated photo itself.
- Keep imagery style separate from subject matter. The design system supplies category creative direction; generated image subjects should come from the component or slot where the asset is used.
- Do not let illustration generation become more complex than the source category supports. If source illustrations are sparse/simple, say so directly in both `imagery.illustrations` and `rules.imagery_graphics`.
- Include motion rules only when useful for downstream generation. Motion can be inferred from established web affordances and active site-generation skills, but must respect grounded visual mechanics and avoid inventing ungrounded components.
- Include confidence and provenance for important tokens, components, patterns, and rules.

## Required Output Shape

```yaml
schema_version: design_system_yaml.v1
type: design_system
metadata:
  name: short_generic_system_name
  description: "One sentence about the overall aesthetic direction without content/industry names."
  source: normalized_site_ast
  generated_from: []
  confidence: high | medium | low
tokens:
  color:
    surface: {}
    text: {}
    border: {}
    accent: {}
    graphic: {}
  typography: {}
  spacing: {}
  radius: {}
  shadow: {}
  divider: {}
  motion: {}
surfaces:
  surface_role:
    value: ""
    role: page_canvas | section_run | inset_panel | card | control | media_host | inverse_run | other
    text:
      default: ""
      muted: ""
      accent: ""
    border: ""
    shadow: ""
    gradient: ""
    usage: []
    confidence: high
typography:
  token_name:
    fontFamily: ""
    fontFamilyCategory: sans_serif | serif | slab | monospaced | display | handwritten | unknown
    visualCharacteristics: []
    fontSize: ""
    fontWeight: ""
    lineHeight: ""
    letterSpacing: ""
    textTransform: none | uppercase | lowercase | capitalize | preserve_authored_case | unclear
    role: ""
    confidence: high
components:
  component_name:
    kind: button | compact_label | card | panel | input | link | icon_button | media_frame | nav_item | other
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy: []
    base:
      typography: "{typography.token_name}"
      padding: ""
      radius: ""
      display: inline-flex | flex | grid | block | inline | other
      widthBehavior: content_hugging | fixed_size | icon_only | full_width | parent_stretched | intrinsic_media | unclear
      cssSizingHint: ""
      textTransform: none | uppercase | preserve_authored_case | unclear
    variants:
      variant_name:
        surface: surface_role
        backgroundColor: ""
        textColor: ""
        borderColor: ""
        dividerColor: ""
        iconColor: ""
        shadow: ""
        contrastSource: fill_contrast | same_surface_border | divider | shadow | whitespace | none | unclear
    doNotUseFor: []
patterns:
  layout: []
  page_moments: []
  content_composition: []
  adjacency_principles: []
  background_systems: []
  image_graphics: []
  responsive: []
imagery:
  icons:
    observed: true | false
    iconAssetClasses: []
    generationStrategy: phosphor_currentColor_svg | gpt-image-2 | no_generated_asset | mixed | unclear
    creativeDirection: ""
    density: sparse | moderate | dense | unclear
    simplicity: minimal | simple | moderate | complex | unclear
    rendering: line | filled | flat | dimensional | mixed | none_observed | unclear
    paletteRelationship: ""
    surfaceRelationship: ""
    edgeAndScale: ""
    implementationRule: ""
    subjectPolicy: "style from design system; subject from local component slot"
    avoid: []
  illustrations:
    observed: true | false
    creativeDirection: ""
    density: sparse | moderate | dense | unclear
    simplicity: minimal | simple | moderate | complex | unclear
    rendering: flat_vector | line_art | soft_3d | collage | abstract | mixed | none_observed | unclear
    paletteRelationship: ""
    surfaceRelationship: ""
    edgeAndScale: ""
    subjectPolicy: "style from design system; subject from local component slot"
    avoid: []
  interfaces:
    observed: true | false
    creativeDirection: ""
    density: sparse | moderate | dense | unclear
    simplicity: minimal | simple | moderate | complex | unclear
    rendering: literal_ui | stylized_ui | device_mockup | abstracted_panels | mixed | none_observed | unclear
    paletteRelationship: ""
    surfaceRelationship: ""
    edgeAndScale: ""
    subjectPolicy: "style from design system; subject from local component slot"
    avoid: []
  photography:
    observed: true | false
    creativeDirection: ""
    density: sparse | moderate | dense | unclear
    simplicity: minimal | simple | moderate | complex | unclear
    rendering: documentary | editorial | studio | product | environmental | mixed | none_observed | unclear
    paletteRelationship: ""
    surfaceRelationship: ""
    edgeAndScale: ""
    assetEdgeBehavior: edge_to_edge_photo_content | externally_framed_by_page | internally_padded_photo | unclear
    subjectPolicy: "style from design system; subject from local component slot"
    avoid: []
rules:
  color: []
  typography: []
  spacing: []
  containers: []
  components: []
  cards: []
  links_actions: []
  imagery_graphics: []
  motion_animation: []
  accessibility: []
do_not_generalize: []
embedded_showcase_only: []
open_questions: []
```

## Token Guidance

- Color token names should be semantic and role-based: `primary`, `secondary`, `tertiary`, `accent`, `accentSoft`, `highlight`, `inverse`, `inverseStrong`, `onPrimary`, `onPrimaryMuted`, `onSecondary`, `onInverse`, `borderOnPrimary`, `borderOnInverse`, and similar generic roles.
- Do not create top-level color tokens that merely duplicate one component recipe. Keep component-only colors inside component variants unless they become shared surface/text/border roles.
- Spacing tokens should be a compact reusable scale. Also include named implementation roles when useful, such as section padding tiers, grid gutters, text-stack gaps, and component padding.
- Components may reference tokens with `{tokens.color.surface.primary}` or direct values when a source-backed value is clearer. Keep references stable and generic.
- Every component variant mentioned in rules must exist under `components`, unless the rule explicitly says the treatment is not reusable and should not be generated.

## Pattern Guidance

- `patterns.layout` should define containers, width tiers, grid/split/scaffold rules, and nesting relationships.
- `patterns.layout` must contain repeated layout grammar only: recurring scaffolds, recurring internal arrangements, recurring surface nesting, recurring alignment/width behavior, density, and frequency. Exact per-section order and one-off positions belong only in `layouts.yaml`.
- `patterns.layout` and `patterns.page_moments` should describe reusable tendencies in ordinary web terms: centered intro above wider module, left-aligned intro beside controls, two-column split, repeated wide rail, card row, tile grid, same-surface divided item grid, media field, shallow overlay band, opening bookend behavior, closing bookend behavior, or other generic structures.
- Do not make the design system a source-page blueprint. Do not store the exact source section list, exact section order, or one-off per-section component positions in the design system. Exact source layouts belong in the separate `layouts.yaml` artifact; the design system should capture aggregate tendencies, repeated scaffolds, alignment frequencies, and reusable surface grammar.
- `patterns.adjacency_principles` should describe unordered parent/child ownership and boundary behavior: parent canvases come from edge/gutter/neighbor continuity, while card/panel/tray/media fills stay child/inset surfaces unless they visibly form a full-width reset.
- `patterns.image_graphics` should summarize how the four `imagery` categories are placed, framed, masked, blended, and selected as asset-generation candidates.
- `patterns.image_graphics` must state that single-color icons are not image-generation candidates, multi-color icons may be `gpt-image-2` candidates, and logos/wordmarks are not image-generation candidates.
- `imagery.icons`, `imagery.illustrations`, `imagery.interfaces`, and `imagery.photography` are normative for downstream image generation style. They must not prescribe subject matter beyond generic slot roles.
- `rules.motion_animation` should guide generated sites to use restrained, system-native motion, shader/canvas or GSAP accents only where the source visual language supports it, and no motion that breaks grounded layout or surface grammar.

## Final Audit Before Returning

- Check that every major token/component/pattern has evidence or an explicit low-confidence note.
- Check that all body/paragraph tokens are `14px-16px`, all subhead/lead/intro/supporting-heading tokens are at most `1.5x` canonical body size, all text-bearing controls and text links use canonical body size, and semantic `h1`/`h2`/`h3` tokens share one font family and one font weight.
- Check that compact controls are not parent-stretched unless grounded.
- Check that compact control base recipes do not contain a global positional `align-self` that would misalign the same component in centered and left-aligned contexts.
- Check that grounded icon-only/circular arrow controls are represented as icon-button recipes and not lost inside card or link prose.
- Check that single-color icons are routed to Phosphor/currentColor inline SVGs, multi-color icons are the only icon class eligible for image generation, and logos/wordmarks are marked as non-generated.
- Check that one-off section visuals are represented as generic constraints, optional patterns, or open questions, not global defaults.
- Check that the design system does not read as a sequential section inventory. Use `layouts.yaml` for exact source ordering and positioning.
- Check that `patterns.layout` contains repeated layout patterns, not a renamed section-by-section source layout list.
- Check that all four imagery categories exist under `imagery`, with `observed:false` and `rendering:none_observed` when absent.
- Check that surface-specific component recipes did not collapse into one broad accent/default recipe.
- Check that embedded showcase-only UI is separated from actual page UI.


## Experiment v169 Design-System Emphasis

Use the global full-site grounding and normalized AST section groups to define reusable parent layer behavior, unordered adjacency principles, and broad layout grammar. Do not name tokens after sections or content. Preserve global layer continuity when defining surfaces and patterns.

Favor a compact, high-confidence design system with fewer role tokens and stronger do_not_generalize constraints. Avoid long exact section inventories.

## Layout Artifact Separation

- Do not put the exact source section list, exact section order, or exact one-off component positions into the design system.
- Store exact source layouts separately in `layouts.yaml`; the design system should keep only reusable layout tendencies, broad scaffolds, adjacency principles, and special opening/closing surface grammar.
- If a source layout appears once, translate only its reusable mechanic into the design system and leave the source-specific arrangement to `layouts.yaml`.

## v172 Unordered Design-System Contract

- The final design system must read as an unordered reusable library, not as a source-page walkthrough.
- Do not emit `derived_from`, `evidenceSections`, `run_order`, `source_order`, `page_sequence`, `section_sequence`, `surface_runs`, `section_01`, `section_02`, `sections_03_to_08`, or any source-section identifier in the final design-system YAML or prose.
- Do not include a `patterns.sections` list that can be read as the source page's top-to-bottom module list. If section-aware guidance is needed, express it as reusable page-moment archetypes such as opening bookend behavior, closing bookend behavior, inset child-panel behavior, foreground media rail behavior, or utility band behavior.
- Do not include `patterns.surface_runs`. If adjacency guidance is needed, express it as unordered reusable adjacency principles and parent/child ownership rules rather than a named run list.
- If a source relationship appears once, record only the reusable mechanic and a `do_not_generalize` constraint. Do not promote one-off source adjacency into generation guidance.
- Before returning, self-audit the document: a generator should be unable to reconstruct the original section sequence from token names, pattern names, source evidence labels, or surface-run descriptions.
Color sync promptruns/v177/color-sync-prompt.md
You are correcting explicit color values in a design-system markdown file using a source-of-truth CSS color report extracted from the original HTML plus screenshot grounding when provided.

## Rules

- Preserve the existing section order, headings, bullets, and non-color wording as closely as possible.
- Preserve local component-on-surface color pairings from the screenshot grounding. A component recipe on a specific host surface must not be remapped to a global accent just because that accent appears more often in source CSS.
- Treat any `## Critical Color Pairings` inventory and detailed section-grounding component recipes as high-priority evidence for host surface, heading text, body/support text, primary/secondary buttons, cards/panels, borders/dividers, and shadows/glows.
- Use the source CSS color report as authoritative for exact hex, rgba, and gradient values when it contains a visually close match for the grounded color role.
- If the source CSS report does not contain a visually close match for a grounded component color, keep or restore the screenshot-grounded color value instead of forcing a distant source color.
- Focus on correcting explicit color values, especially in `## Color Tokens`.
- Do not invent colors that appear in neither the source report nor the screenshot grounding.
- If a clear source-backed or grounding-backed replacement does not exist, rewrite that wording to avoid an unsupported explicit color value instead of guessing.
- Return the full corrected markdown document.

## Component Color Pairing Rules

- Treat buttons, eyebrows, badges, chips, tags, inputs, tabs, cards, and other portable UI components as surface-paired recipes, not just references to global palette frequency.
- If the grounding says a compact control on an `inverseStrong`, dark, inverse, light, tonal, or card surface has a particular color family, preserve that family even when another source color token has a similar role name.
- For example, a warm/yellow highlight control on a darkest inverse surface should stay warm/yellow when no close source hex exists; do not replace it with a greener global `highlight` or `accent` merely because that green appears in the source palette.
- Prefer the closest source-supported hex only when it preserves the grounded hue, temperature, saturation, lightness, and component/host contrast relationship.
- If several source colors are available but none is close enough to preserve the screenshot vibe, use the explicit screenshot-grounded color as the fallback.

Pre-color-sync design systemruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/design-system.pre-color-sync.md
schema_version: design_system_yaml.v1
type: design_system
metadata:
  name: warm_editorial_linework_system
  description: "A warm paper-toned editorial system with deep green ink, high-contrast serif display type, architectural hairlines, compact inverse controls, and hard-edged photography."
  source: normalized_site_ast
  generated_from:
    - normalized_site_ast
    - detailed_section_grounding
    - surface_component_map
    - source_style_ledger
    - source_css_report
  confidence: high

tokens:
  color:
    surface:
      primary:
        value: "rgb(249,247,239)"
        role: warm paper canvas
        provenance: "normalized grounding and CSS palette"
        confidence: high
      inverse:
        value: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        role: dark green control or ink-filled surface
        provenance: "normalized grounding and CSS palette"
        confidence: high
      transparent:
        value: "rgba(255,255,255,0)"
        role: same-surface child fill
        provenance: "CSS palette and repeated transparent children"
        confidence: high
      externalOverlay:
        value: "rgb(255,255,255)"
        role: non-site fixed overlay only
        provenance: "grounding marked as external capture overlay"
        confidence: low
    text:
      primary:
        value: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        role: deep green ink on warm canvas
        provenance: "normalized grounding and CSS palette"
        confidence: high
      onInverse:
        value: "rgb(249,247,239)"
        role: warm ivory text and icons on dark green controls
        provenance: "grounding and CSS palette"
        confidence: high
      externalOverlay:
        value: "rgb(34,34,34)"
        role: non-site overlay text only
        provenance: "CSS palette; not page UI"
        confidence: low
    border:
      muted:
        value: "rgb(104,120,105)"
        role: softened green architectural hairlines on same-fill panels
        provenance: "visual grounding"
        confidence: medium
      strong:
        value: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        role: deep green outline for compact circular controls or badges
        provenance: "grounding and CSS palette"
        confidence: high
      onInverse:
        value: "rgb(249,247,239)"
        role: ivory segmentation lines on dark controls
        provenance: "grounding and CSS palette"
        confidence: high
      none:
        value: "transparent"
        role: no visible border
        confidence: high
    accent:
      primary:
        value: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        role: primary action fill and graphic ink
        provenance: "repeated component pairings"
        confidence: high
      onPrimary:
        value: "rgb(249,247,239)"
        role: action text and icon on primary fill
        provenance: "repeated component pairings"
        confidence: high
    graphic:
      photographicWarm:
        value: "warm amber, cream, ochre, olive, deep green-black, brown shadow"
        role: photography palette direction, not CSS token
        confidence: high
      photographicAccent:
        value: "occasional teal, red, lime, and gold pixels"
        role: local photo accent pixels, not UI color
        confidence: medium
      brandInk:
        value: "rgb(38,78,51)"
        role: single-color marks and wordmark placeholders
        confidence: high
  typography:
    body:
      value: "{typography.body}"
    control:
      value: "{typography.control}"
    caption:
      value: "{typography.caption}"
    heading:
      value: "{typography.h2}"
    display:
      value: "{typography.display_contextual}"
  spacing:
    0: "0"
    1: "4px"
    2: "8px"
    3: "12px"
    4: "16px"
    5: "20px"
    6: "24px"
    8: "32px"
    10: "40px"
    12: "48px"
    16: "64px"
    20: "80px"
    24: "96px"
    roles:
      edgeInsetSmall: "16px-24px"
      wideRail: "clamp(24px, 6vw, 88px)"
      sectionAir: "clamp(72px, 12vw, 160px)"
      panelPadding: "clamp(20px, 4vw, 48px)"
      cellPadding: "clamp(18px, 3vw, 36px)"
      compactControlPadding: "8px 12px"
      iconButton: "32px"
      captionGap: "16px-19px"
      mediaGap: "18px-24px"
      looseCollageGap: "clamp(48px, 10vw, 160px)"
  radius:
    none:
      value: "0"
      confidence: high
    controlSmall:
      value: "2px-3px"
      confidence: medium
    circle:
      value: "999px"
      confidence: high
    externalOverlay:
      value: "7px"
      confidence: low
  shadow:
    none:
      value: "none"
      confidence: high
    externalOverlay:
      value: "0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.14)"
      confidence: low
  divider:
    hairlineMuted:
      width: "1px"
      style: "solid"
      color: "{tokens.color.border.muted}"
      confidence: high
    hairlineStrong:
      width: "1px"
      style: "solid"
      color: "{tokens.color.border.strong}"
      confidence: high
    hairlineOnInverse:
      width: "1px"
      style: "solid"
      color: "{tokens.color.border.onInverse}"
      confidence: high
    hardMediaEdge:
      width: "0"
      style: "hard boundary made by adjacent raster image edge"
      confidence: high
  motion:
    durationFast: "120ms"
    durationBase: "180ms"
    durationSlow: "320ms"
    easing: "cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)"
    reducedMotion: "disable non-essential transform motion"

surfaces:
  warm_canvas:
    value: "rgb(249,247,239)"
    role: page_canvas
    text:
      default: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
      muted: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
      accent: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
    border: "none"
    shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
    gradient: "none"
    usage:
      - "Primary full-width warm paper surface for brand/editorial bookends and same-surface modules."
      - "May carry a very subtle low-contrast paper grain; do not convert this into a strong texture."
    confidence: high
  inverse_control_surface:
    value: "rgb(38,78,51)"
    role: control
    text:
      default: "{tokens.color.text.onInverse}"
      muted: "{tokens.color.text.onInverse}"
      accent: "{tokens.color.text.onInverse}"
    border: "{tokens.divider.hairlineOnInverse}"
    shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
    gradient: "none"
    usage:
      - "Compact filled controls and segmented control clusters on warm canvas or same-fill panels."
    confidence: high
  same_fill_panel:
    value: "rgb(249,247,239)"
    role: inset_panel
    text:
      default: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
      muted: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
      accent: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
    border: "{tokens.divider.hairlineMuted}"
    shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
    gradient: "none"
    usage:
      - "Inset modules separated from the canvas by 1px green linework, not by elevation."
    confidence: high
  transparent_on_warm:
    value: "rgba(255,255,255,0)"
    role: other
    text:
      default: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
      muted: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
      accent: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
    border: "none unless inherited from parent linework"
    shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
    gradient: "none"
    usage:
      - "Text, graphics, cells, and link cards that sit directly on warm canvas or same-fill panels."
    confidence: high
  photo_owned_surface:
    value: "raster photo pixels"
    role: media_host
    text:
      default: "none"
      muted: "none"
      accent: "none"
    border: "none"
    shadow: "photographic shadows only, not CSS elevation"
    gradient: "natural photo luminance falloff only"
    usage:
      - "Full-bleed media bands where the raster image owns the visible surface."
      - "Unframed square or portrait media where photo pixels reach the media bounds."
    confidence: high
  external_overlay_surface:
    value: "rgb(255,255,255)"
    role: other
    text:
      default: "{tokens.color.text.externalOverlay}"
      muted: "{tokens.color.text.externalOverlay}"
      accent: "{tokens.color.text.externalOverlay}"
    border: "none"
    shadow: "{tokens.shadow.externalOverlay}"
    gradient: "none"
    usage:
      - "Visible capture/tooling overlay only; not part of generated page UI."
    confidence: low

typography:
  body:
    fontFamily: "\"Switzer\", \"Inter\", sans-serif"
    fontFamilyCategory: sans_serif
    visualCharacteristics:
      - compact
      - clean
      - editorial utility
    fontSize: "14px"
    fontWeight: "400"
    lineHeight: "1.45"
    letterSpacing: "0"
    textTransform: none
    role: "canonical body, values, metadata values, and normal text-bearing UI fallback"
    confidence: high
  body_medium:
    fontFamily: "\"Switzer\", \"Inter\", sans-serif"
    fontFamilyCategory: sans_serif
    visualCharacteristics:
      - compact
      - slightly firm
    fontSize: "14px"
    fontWeight: "500"
    lineHeight: "1.25"
    letterSpacing: "0"
    textTransform: none
    role: "compact card/body copy while respecting normalized body sizing"
    confidence: medium
  control:
    fontFamily: "\"Switzer\", \"Inter\", sans-serif"
    fontFamilyCategory: sans_serif
    visualCharacteristics:
      - compact
      - centered
      - utilitarian
    fontSize: "14px"
    fontWeight: "500"
    lineHeight: "1"
    letterSpacing: "0"
    textTransform: none
    role: "buttons, compact action labels, nav labels, and text-bearing controls"
    confidence: high
  label_upper:
    fontFamily: "\"Switzer\", \"Inter\", sans-serif"
    fontFamilyCategory: sans_serif
    visualCharacteristics:
      - narrow
      - compact
      - editorial
    fontSize: "14px"
    fontWeight: "400"
    lineHeight: "1.15"
    letterSpacing: "0.02em"
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: "eyebrows, metadata labels, and uppercase micro links"
    confidence: high
  caption:
    fontFamily: "\"Switzer\", \"Inter\", sans-serif"
    fontFamilyCategory: sans_serif
    visualCharacteristics:
      - narrow
      - terse
      - caption-like
    fontSize: "14px"
    fontWeight: "400"
    lineHeight: "1.15"
    letterSpacing: "0.02em"
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: "media captions and handle-like captions"
    confidence: high
  h1:
    fontFamily: "\"Bonny\", \"Instrument Serif\", serif"
    fontFamilyCategory: serif
    visualCharacteristics:
      - high_contrast
      - condensed
      - editorial
    fontSize: "56px"
    fontWeight: "400"
    lineHeight: "0.95"
    letterSpacing: "-0.02em"
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: "semantic h1"
    confidence: medium
  h2:
    fontFamily: "\"Bonny\", \"Instrument Serif\", serif"
    fontFamilyCategory: serif
    visualCharacteristics:
      - high_contrast
      - condensed
      - editorial
    fontSize: "44px"
    fontWeight: "400"
    lineHeight: "1"
    letterSpacing: "-0.015em"
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: "semantic h2 and common large section heading"
    confidence: high
  h3:
    fontFamily: "\"Bonny\", \"Instrument Serif\", serif"
    fontFamilyCategory: serif
    visualCharacteristics:
      - high_contrast
      - condensed
      - editorial
    fontSize: "31px"
    fontWeight: "400"
    lineHeight: "1.05"
    letterSpacing: "-0.01em"
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: "semantic h3 and compact section/panel heading"
    confidence: high
  display_contextual:
    fontFamily: "\"Bonny\", \"Instrument Serif\", serif"
    fontFamilyCategory: serif
    visualCharacteristics:
      - extreme_scale
      - high_contrast
      - wordmark_like
      - sparse
    fontSize: "clamp(96px, 18vw, 280px)"
    fontWeight: "400"
    lineHeight: "0.78"
    letterSpacing: "-0.04em"
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: "contextual oversized identity or bookend display; not a semantic heading default"
    confidence: high

components:
  segmented_control_panel:
    kind: panel
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
      - "single dark rectangular cluster"
      - "optional blank upper zone"
      - "bottom row of compact labels"
      - "icon-only segment separated by 1px divider"
      - "internal ivory hairline grid"
    base:
      typography: "{typography.control}"
      padding: "0"
      radius: "{tokens.radius.none}"
      display: grid
      widthBehavior: content_hugging
      cssSizingHint: "display:inline-grid; width:max-content; max-width:100%; white-space:nowrap; flex:0 0 auto;"
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      inverse_on_warm:
        surface: inverse_control_surface
        backgroundColor: "{tokens.color.surface.inverse}"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.text.onInverse}"
        borderColor: "{tokens.color.border.onInverse}"
        dividerColor: "{tokens.color.border.onInverse}"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.text.onInverse}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
    doNotUseFor:
      - "full-width navigation bars"
      - "large menu drawers"
      - "floating dark overlays"
  compact_button:
    kind: button
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
      - "short text label"
      - "optional adjacent icon segment managed by parent compound control"
    base:
      typography: "{typography.control}"
      padding: "{tokens.spacing.roles.compactControlPadding}"
      radius: "{tokens.radius.controlSmall}"
      display: inline-flex
      widthBehavior: content_hugging
      cssSizingHint: "display:inline-flex; width:max-content; max-width:100%; white-space:nowrap; flex:0 0 auto; align-items:center; justify-content:center;"
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      filled_on_warm:
        surface: warm_canvas
        backgroundColor: "{tokens.color.accent.primary}"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}"
        borderColor: "transparent"
        dividerColor: "transparent"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
      filled_on_same_fill_panel:
        surface: same_fill_panel
        backgroundColor: "{tokens.color.accent.primary}"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}"
        borderColor: "transparent"
        dividerColor: "transparent"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
    doNotUseFor:
      - "large rounded CTA pills"
      - "full-width mobile buttons unless locally required"
      - "secondary outlined button systems without evidence"
  split_action_control:
    kind: other
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: medium
    anatomy:
      - "content-hugging text button"
      - "adjacent square icon button"
      - "optional subtle internal divider"
    base:
      typography: "{typography.control}"
      padding: "0"
      radius: "{tokens.radius.controlSmall}"
      display: inline-flex
      widthBehavior: content_hugging
      cssSizingHint: "display:inline-flex; width:max-content; max-width:100%; white-space:nowrap; flex:0 0 auto; overflow:hidden;"
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      filled_compound_on_warm_or_panel:
        surface: warm_canvas
        backgroundColor: "{tokens.color.accent.primary}"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}"
        borderColor: "transparent"
        dividerColor: "rgba(249,247,239,0.45)"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
    doNotUseFor:
      - "large promotional buttons"
      - "multi-icon toolbars"
  icon_button:
    kind: icon_button
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
      - "single currentColor SVG icon"
      - "fixed square or circular hit area"
      - "no text label rendered visually"
    base:
      typography: "{typography.control}"
      padding: "0"
      radius: "{tokens.radius.none}"
      display: inline-flex
      widthBehavior: icon_only
      cssSizingHint: "display:inline-flex; width:32px; height:32px; min-width:32px; max-width:32px; flex:0 0 auto; align-items:center; justify-content:center;"
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      inverse_segment:
        surface: inverse_control_surface
        backgroundColor: "{tokens.color.surface.inverse}"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.text.onInverse}"
        borderColor: "{tokens.color.border.onInverse}"
        dividerColor: "{tokens.color.border.onInverse}"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.text.onInverse}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: same_surface_border
      filled_compact:
        surface: warm_canvas
        backgroundColor: "{tokens.color.accent.primary}"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}"
        borderColor: "transparent"
        dividerColor: "transparent"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
      outline_circle_on_warm:
        surface: warm_canvas
        backgroundColor: "transparent"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        borderColor: "{tokens.color.border.strong}"
        dividerColor: "transparent"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: same_surface_border
      bare_inline_on_warm:
        surface: transparent_on_warm
        backgroundColor: "transparent"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        borderColor: "transparent"
        dividerColor: "transparent"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: whitespace
    doNotUseFor:
      - "photo overlays"
      - "social logo generation"
      - "multi-color pictorial icons"
  ordinal_badge:
    kind: compact_label
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
      - "centered short numeral or marker"
      - "transparent fill"
      - "1px circular outline"
    base:
      typography: "{typography.control}"
      padding: "0"
      radius: "{tokens.radius.circle}"
      display: inline-flex
      widthBehavior: fixed_size
      cssSizingHint: "display:inline-flex; width:24px; height:24px; min-width:24px; flex:0 0 auto; align-items:center; justify-content:center; max-width:100%; white-space:nowrap;"
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      outline_on_warm_cell:
        surface: transparent_on_warm
        backgroundColor: "transparent"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        borderColor: "{tokens.color.border.strong}"
        dividerColor: "transparent"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: same_surface_border
    doNotUseFor:
      - "filled notification badges"
      - "brand emblems"
  same_surface_panel:
    kind: panel
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
      - "same-fill rectangular panel"
      - "1px muted green outline"
      - "optional header divider"
      - "optional internal grid dividers"
    base:
      typography: "{typography.body}"
      padding: "0"
      radius: "{tokens.radius.none}"
      display: block
      widthBehavior: parent_stretched
      cssSizingHint: "display:block; width:100%; max-width:100%;"
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      hairline_on_warm:
        surface: same_fill_panel
        backgroundColor: "{tokens.color.surface.primary}"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        borderColor: "{tokens.color.border.muted}"
        dividerColor: "{tokens.color.border.muted}"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: same_surface_border
    doNotUseFor:
      - "elevated cards"
      - "alternate-tint section backgrounds"
      - "rounded containers"
  same_surface_link_cell:
    kind: card
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
      - "transparent cell surface"
      - "small title or body text"
      - "optional bare currentColor arrow"
      - "unframed media"
      - "separation supplied by parent dividers"
    base:
      typography: "{typography.body_medium}"
      padding: "{tokens.spacing.roles.cellPadding}"
      radius: "{tokens.radius.none}"
      display: flex
      widthBehavior: parent_stretched
      cssSizingHint: "display:flex; width:100%; max-width:100%; flex-direction:column;"
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      divided_on_same_fill_panel:
        surface: same_fill_panel
        backgroundColor: "transparent"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        borderColor: "inherited parent dividers"
        dividerColor: "{tokens.color.border.muted}"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: divider
      divided_on_warm_grid:
        surface: transparent_on_warm
        backgroundColor: "transparent"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        borderColor: "inherited parent dividers"
        dividerColor: "{tokens.color.border.muted}"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: divider
    doNotUseFor:
      - "filled cards"
      - "shadowed cards"
      - "rounded image cards"
  media_frame:
    kind: media_frame
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
      - "raster image"
      - "hard rectangular clipping"
      - "no internal padding"
      - "no overlay"
    base:
      typography: "{typography.body}"
      padding: "0"
      radius: "{tokens.radius.none}"
      display: block
      widthBehavior: intrinsic_media
      cssSizingHint: "display:block; overflow:hidden; line-height:0; flex:0 0 auto;"
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      square_unframed:
        surface: photo_owned_surface
        backgroundColor: "raster photo pixels"
        textColor: "none"
        borderColor: "transparent"
        dividerColor: "transparent"
        iconColor: "none"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: whitespace
      portrait_unframed:
        surface: photo_owned_surface
        backgroundColor: "raster photo pixels"
        textColor: "none"
        borderColor: "transparent"
        dividerColor: "transparent"
        iconColor: "none"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: whitespace
      full_bleed_band:
        surface: photo_owned_surface
        backgroundColor: "raster photo pixels"
        textColor: "none"
        borderColor: "transparent"
        dividerColor: "transparent"
        iconColor: "none"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: none
    doNotUseFor:
      - "device mockups"
      - "photo cards with matte frames"
      - "rounded image masks unless newly evidenced"
  text_link:
    kind: link
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
      - "plain text"
      - "optional currentColor arrow nearby"
      - "no underline by default"
    base:
      typography: "{typography.control}"
      padding: "0"
      radius: "{tokens.radius.none}"
      display: inline-flex
      widthBehavior: content_hugging
      cssSizingHint: "display:inline-flex; width:max-content; max-width:100%; white-space:nowrap; flex:0 0 auto; align-items:center;"
      textTransform: preserve_authored_case
    variants:
      green_on_warm:
        surface: transparent_on_warm
        backgroundColor: "transparent"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        borderColor: "transparent"
        dividerColor: "transparent"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.text.primary}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: whitespace
      ivory_on_inverse:
        surface: inverse_control_surface
        backgroundColor: "transparent"
        textColor: "{tokens.color.text.onInverse}"
        borderColor: "transparent"
        dividerColor: "{tokens.color.border.onInverse}"
        iconColor: "{tokens.color.text.onInverse}"
        shadow: "{tokens.shadow.none}"
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
    doNotUseFor:
      - "blue browser-default links"
      - "underlined editorial links unless required locally"

patterns:
  layout:
    - name: full_width_warm_canvas_with_inset_foreground
      confidence: high
      rule: "Use a viewport-wide warm canvas with foreground content aligned to broad rails or sparse edge insets; transparent children inherit the canvas rather than introducing new fills."
      provenance: "Repeated across normalized light-surface groups."
    - name: same_surface_hairline_module
      confidence: high
      rule: "Build grids and panels as same-fill rectangles with 1px green outer linework and internal dividers; structure comes from borders, not elevation or card backgrounds."
      provenance: "Grounded by repeated inset grid/panel modules."
    - name: centered_intro_above_wide_field
      confidence: high
      rule: "A compact centered label or uppercase serif heading may sit above a wider grid, panel, or freeform media field with generous vertical breathing room."
      provenance: "Repeated centered intro mechanics."
    - name: compact_inverse_control_cluster
      confidence: high
      rule: "Small filled dark green controls sit as content-hugging objects on warm surfaces; labels and icon segments are divided by ivory hairlines."
      provenance: "Repeated compact action/navigation controls."
    - name: unframed_media_pixels_to_edges
      confidence: high
      rule: "Media frames clip photos to square, portrait, or viewport-wide rectangles with zero radius, zero shadow, zero border, and no internal padding."
      provenance: "Dominant media treatment in normalized AST."
    - name: oversized_display_microcopy_contrast
      confidence: high
      rule: "Pair extremely large high-contrast serif identity/display regions with tiny utilitarian text groups or compact controls, separated by whitespace."
      provenance: "Bookend and brand-surface mechanics."
    - name: irregular_editorial_collage
      confidence: medium
      rule: "When using a collage, keep it sparse and manually staggered with large negative space, square hard-edged photos, and centered captions; do not regularize into a card grid."
      provenance: "One-off mechanic translated as optional reusable gallery behavior."
    - name: full_bleed_photo_reset
      confidence: high
      rule: "A raster image may interrupt the warm canvas as a hard-edged viewport-width band with no text overlay, no scrim, no border, no radius, and no CSS shadow."
      provenance: "Repeated photo-owned surface reset."
  page_moments:
    - name: opening_bookend_behavior
      confidence: high
      rule: "An opening brand moment may use the warm canvas continuously with small foreground marks or inverse controls before a hard reset into full-bleed media."
    - name: closing_bookend_behavior
      confidence: high
      rule: "A closing brand moment may return to the warm canvas with sparse microcopy, monochrome marks, and oversized contextual display type; avoid cards, forms, or dividers unless newly evidenced."
    - name: photo_interlude_behavior
      confidence: high
      rule: "Photo interludes are image-owned bands; adjacent warm-canvas slivers are boundary/neighbor surfaces, not a photo-section background token."
    - name: inset_child_panel_behavior
      confidence: high
      rule: "Inset panels remain child modules on the warm canvas; their same-fill background must not be promoted into a full-width section reset."
  content_composition:
    - name: divided_same_surface_cells
      confidence: high
      rule: "Use equal cells separated by inherited 1px hairlines; cells may contain compact labels, body copy, currentColor arrows, and unframed photos."
    - name: media_caption_unit
      confidence: high
      rule: "A media unit is a hard-edged image with a small uppercase or handle-like caption below; no card chrome surrounds the pair."
    - name: sparse_microcopy_grid
      confidence: high
      rule: "Microcopy groups distribute across columns using whitespace only; labels are uppercase, values preserve authored case where needed."
    - name: panel_header_action_row
      confidence: high
      rule: "Panel headers can pair a left-aligned uppercase serif heading with a content-hugging compact filled action pair."
  adjacency_principles:
    - name: parent_surface_ownership
      confidence: high
      rule: "Determine parent canvas from viewport-edge and gutter continuity; same-color child panels and cards do not create new parent surfaces."
    - name: hard_reset_vs_child_media
      confidence: high
      rule: "A full-bleed photo owns the surface only when it reaches the viewport edges; photos inside cells, cards, and collages remain child media."
    - name: linework_separation
      confidence: high
      rule: "Same-surface modules use borders/dividers for separation; do not add fill contrast, shadows, or rounded corners."
    - name: unordered_generation
      confidence: high
      rule: "These patterns are reusable mechanics and do not imply a required page sequence."
  background_systems:
    - name: warm_paper_canvas
      confidence: high
      rule: "Use a flat warm off-white canvas with deep green foreground; optional paper grain must be extremely subtle and low contrast."
    - name: absent_css_gradient_system
      confidence: high
      rule: "Do not create global CSS gradients from photographic light falloff; gradients observed in photos belong to raster imagery."
    - name: green_inverse_blocks
      confidence: high
      rule: "Dark green blocks are compact controls only unless locally grounded as a larger surface."
    - name: hard_photo_edges
      confidence: high
      rule: "Photo resets begin and end with hard horizontal edges, not divider lines or fade washes."
  image_graphics:
    - name: icon_asset_routing
      confidence: high
      rule: "Single-color UI icons are not image-generation candidates and should be inline currentColor SVGs; multi-color pictorial icons may be generated only if explicitly introduced; logos and wordmarks are not generated assets."
    - name: brand_mark_handling
      confidence: high
      rule: "Use fixed logo/wordmark slots or simple text/rectangle placeholders in current surface ink; do not infer reusable illustration style from marks."
    - name: photo_generation
      confidence: high
      rule: "Generated photos should fill their asset edge-to-edge; page components provide clipping, aspect ratio, and placement."
    - name: no_embedded_ui_promotion
      confidence: high
      rule: "Observed live navigation, buttons, panels, and cards are real components; no interface screenshot or device mockup style was observed."
  responsive:
    - name: rail_compression
      confidence: medium
      rule: "Wide rails compress from generous desktop insets to 20px-24px mobile gutters while preserving full-width warm surfaces."
    - name: divided_modules_on_small_screens
      confidence: medium
      rule: "Hairline grids may stack into one or two columns; preserve outer border and internal divider logic rather than converting to individual cards."
    - name: compact_controls
      confidence: high
      rule: "Compact controls remain content-hugging; do not stretch them to full width unless a local mobile layout explicitly requires it."
    - name: oversized_display_scaling
      confidence: high
      rule: "Contextual display type must scale with clamp() and may wrap/split, but should retain sparse, wordmark-like dominance."

imagery:
  icons:
    observed: true
    iconAssetClasses:
      - single-color-icon
      - logo/wordmark
    generationStrategy: mixed
    creativeDirection: "Minimal single-color currentColor SVG-style menu, arrow, and utility glyphs; logo and wordmark slots are monochrome fixed assets or live-type placeholders, not generated illustrations."
    density: sparse
    simplicity: simple
    rendering: line
    paletteRelationship: "Deep green on warm ivory, or warm ivory on dark green controls; no reusable multi-color icon palette observed."
    surfaceRelationship: "Icons sit directly on transparent warm surfaces, inside dark compact controls, inside circular outline controls, or as uncontained link arrows."
    edgeAndScale: "Small, flat, unshadowed; fixed icon buttons around 32px, circular outline controls around 32px, bare arrows sized to text context."
    implementationRule: "Use Phosphor-style inline SVG with stroke/fill driven by currentColor for single-color-icon; route logo/wordmark to no generated asset."
    subjectPolicy: "style from design system; subject from local component slot"
    avoid:
      - "multi-color pictograms"
      - "detailed illustrative icons"
      - "photo-derived icons"
      - "generated logo or wordmark art"
      - "external overlay glyphs as page UI"
  illustrations:
    observed: false
    creativeDirection: "No reusable illustration system is present; leave illustration slots empty unless a new local requirement provides direction."
    density: sparse
    simplicity: minimal
    rendering: none_observed
    paletteRelationship: "N/A; do not derive illustration colors from photography or logos."
    surfaceRelationship: "N/A."
    edgeAndScale: "N/A."
    subjectPolicy: "style from design system; subject from local component slot"
    avoid:
      - "character scenes"
      - "3D scenes"
      - "abstract vector decoration"
      - "turning brand marks into illustrations"
      - "decorative pictorial icons"
  interfaces:
    observed: false
    creativeDirection: "No product/interface imagery or device mockups observed; page UI remains live components."
    density: sparse
    simplicity: minimal
    rendering: none_observed
    paletteRelationship: "N/A."
    surfaceRelationship: "N/A."
    edgeAndScale: "N/A."
    subjectPolicy: "style from design system; subject from local component slot"
    avoid:
      - "dashboard screenshots"
      - "device frames"
      - "browser mockups"
      - "promoting live page controls into image assets"
  photography:
    observed: true
    creativeDirection: "Warm editorial/documentary photography with natural texture, directional light, cinematic shadow contrast, shallow depth or close crops, tactile surfaces, and organic imperfection."
    density: moderate
    simplicity: moderate
    rendering: editorial
    paletteRelationship: "Warm amber, cream, ochre, olive, deep green-black, deep brown shadow, and occasional teal/red/lime accents harmonize with the warm ivory and deep green UI; photo colors are not CSS tokens."
    surfaceRelationship: "Photos either own full-bleed viewport bands or sit as child media in square/portrait frames, collage units, or divided cells."
    edgeAndScale: "Photo pixels reach the asset edges; no internal matte, poster border, CSS shadow, or rounded image corners."
    assetEdgeBehavior: edge_to_edge_photo_content
    subjectPolicy: "style from design system; subject from local component slot"
    avoid:
      - "stock-like isolated cutouts"
      - "internal image padding"
      - "rounded photo corners"
      - "CSS photo shadows"
      - "overlay scrims on photo bands"
      - "treating photographic luminance falloff as a CSS gradient"

rules:
  color:
    - "Use rgb(249,247,239) as the primary warm canvas and rgb(38,78,51) as the primary ink/action color."
    - "Preserve host-surface pairings: deep green ink on warm canvas; warm ivory text/icons on deep green controls."
    - "Use muted green hairlines only for same-fill panels and divided modules; do not add default borders to high-contrast filled controls."
    - "Do not use source blue link defaults for generated page UI; they are not grounded in the visual system."
    - "Treat warm/dark photographic colors as imagery direction, not reusable UI colors."
  typography:
    - "Canonical body, compact body, captions, links, buttons, and text-bearing controls use 14px."
    - "Semantic h1, h2, and h3 share the same serif family and 400 weight; hierarchy changes by size, line-height, and placement."
    - "Oversized wordmark-like display type is contextual and must not replace semantic heading tokens."
    - "Uppercase casing is grounded for serif headings, display lockups, metadata labels, captions, and many micro links."
    - "Preserve authored case for values, card titles, and compact action labels unless the local text role is explicitly uppercase."
  spacing:
    - "Use generous vertical air around editorial modules and large whitespace around contextual display type."
    - "Use wide rails for inset panels/grids; full-bleed photo bands ignore rails."
    - "Keep compact controls content-hugging with tight padding and fixed/icon-only sizing where applicable."
    - "Place caption gaps around 16px-19px when media captions sit below hard-edged photos."
  containers:
    - "Section shells, rows, grids, rails, collage fields, and divider scaffolds are patterns, not standalone components."
    - "Same-fill panels should remain square, flat, and line-defined."
