    - "A child panel or media well must not be promoted to a parent background unless it visibly reaches the viewport edges."
  components:
    - "Content-hugging controls must use inline-flex, width:max-content or fit-content, max-width:100%, white-space:nowrap, and flex:0 0 auto."
    - "Do not bake global align-self behavior into compact labels, buttons, chips, or icon buttons; center them in centered stacks and start-align them in left-aligned stacks via parent layout."
    - "Icon-only controls require fixed dimensions and explicit icon color; do not collapse them into text arrows."
    - "Segmented inverse panels use dark fill plus ivory divider linework; do not turn them into a full-width dark header."
  cards:
    - "Transparent same-surface cells are not elevated cards; separation comes from parent dividers."
    - "Do not add card fills, shadows, or radius to divided grid/link cells."
    - "Unframed media inside cells remains a media child with pixels to edges."
  links_actions:
    - "Text links are plain currentColor text with no default underline; optional arrows are single-color currentColor SVGs."
    - "Filled compact actions use deep green fill, warm ivory label/icon, tiny radius, and no shadow."
    - "Circular carousel-style icon buttons use transparent fill, 1px deep green outline, and deep green currentColor arrows."
  imagery_graphics:
    - "Single-color icons are inline currentColor SVGs and are not image-generation candidates."
    - "Multi-color icons are not part of the observed system; only generate them if a new local slot explicitly requires pictorial multi-color treatment."
    - "Logos, wordmarks, customer marks, payment marks, and brand emblems are non-generated assets; use simple placeholders in current ink when exact art is unavailable."
    - "Illustrations are not observed; do not introduce character, 3D, or abstract vector scenes."
    - "Photography should be warm, tactile, cinematic, and edge-to-edge within the generated asset."
  motion_animation:
    - "Use restrained system-native hover/focus transitions: color, opacity, and very small translate changes under 180ms."
    - "Avoid parallax, shader/canvas effects, elaborate scroll animations, or motion that changes hard photo edges and surface ownership."
    - "Icon buttons may animate icon opacity or a 1px-2px translate on hover, but must preserve fixed dimensions."
    - "Respect reduced-motion by disabling non-essential transforms."
  accessibility:
    - "Maintain sufficient contrast between deep green text and warm ivory canvas, and between ivory text and deep green controls."
    - "Icon-only controls need accessible labels even when no text is visible."
    - "Hairline-only structure should not be the only cue for interactive state."
    - "Do not reduce text-bearing controls below the canonical 14px size."

do_not_generalize:
  - "Do not generate literal logo or wordmark artwork; use fixed asset slots or simple current-ink placeholders."
  - "Do not treat the external white/black fixed overlay badges as page UI."
  - "Do not infer a full-width dark navigation bar from the compact inverse control cluster."
  - "Do not convert same-surface divided cells into filled, rounded, or shadowed cards."
  - "Do not add overlays, borders, padding, radius, or shadows to full-bleed photo bands."
  - "Do not tokenize photographic shadows, bokeh, fabric texture, or luminance falloff as CSS effects."
  - "Do not require the optional irregular collage mechanic on every page."
  - "Do not reconstruct a source page sequence from these reusable patterns."
  - "Do not introduce illustration or interface mockup systems without new evidence."
  - "Do not use external blue link colors from browser/source defaults."

embedded_showcase_only:
  - "No embedded product screenshots, device mockups, or preview-only UI were observed."
  - "Non-site fixed overlay badges are excluded from reusable components and generation."

open_questions:
  - "Exact production font mapping for all small sans roles is partly ambiguous; Switzer/Inter is the safest normalized utility family."
  - "Subtle paper grain may be a real background asset or screenshot/compression noise; keep it optional and extremely low contrast."
  - "Some compact filled action controls may have a subtle internal icon divider; confidence is medium outside clearly segmented controls."
  - "Navigation cluster corner notches or tiny corner details are low-confidence and should not be required."
  - "Boundary slivers near photo resets may belong to adjacent warm canvases rather than the photo-owned surface."
Final design systemruns/v177/2025-12-12_88730-roma-hotel-and-restaurant-framer-website-template/single/design-system.md
---
schema_version: design_system_yaml.v1
type: design_system
metadata:
  name: warm_editorial_linework_system
  description: A warm paper-toned editorial system with deep green ink, high-contrast serif display type, architectural hairlines,
    compact inverse controls, and hard-edged photography.
  confidence: high
tokens:
  color:
    surface:
      primary:
        value: rgb(249,247,239)
        role: warm paper canvas
        confidence: high
      inverse:
        value: rgb(38,78,51)
        role: dark green control or ink-filled surface
        confidence: high
      transparent:
        value: rgba(255,255,255,0)
        role: same-surface child fill
        confidence: high
      externalOverlay:
        value: rgb(255,255,255)
        role: non-site fixed overlay only
        confidence: low
    text:
      primary:
        value: rgb(38,78,51)
        role: deep green ink on warm canvas
        confidence: high
      onInverse:
        value: rgb(249,247,239)
        role: warm ivory text and icons on dark green controls
        confidence: high
      externalOverlay:
        value: rgb(34,34,34)
        role: non-site overlay text only
        confidence: low
    border:
      muted:
        value: rgb(38,78,51)
        role: softened green architectural hairlines on same-fill panels
        confidence: medium
      strong:
        value: rgb(38,78,51)
        role: deep green outline for compact circular controls or badges
        confidence: high
      onInverse:
        value: rgb(249,247,239)
        role: ivory segmentation lines on dark controls
        confidence: high
      none:
        value: transparent
        role: no visible border
        confidence: high
    accent:
      primary:
        value: rgb(38,78,51)
        role: primary action fill and graphic ink
        confidence: high
      onPrimary:
        value: rgb(249,247,239)
        role: action text and icon on primary fill
        confidence: high
    graphic:
      photographicWarm:
        value: warm amber, cream, ochre, olive, deep green-black, brown shadow
        role: photography palette direction, not CSS token
        confidence: high
      photographicAccent:
        value: occasional teal, red, lime, and gold pixels
        role: local photo accent pixels, not UI color
        confidence: medium
      brandInk:
        value: rgb(38,78,51)
        role: single-color marks and wordmark placeholders
        confidence: high
  typography:
    body:
      value: '{typography.body}'
    control:
      value: '{typography.control}'
    caption:
      value: '{typography.caption}'
    heading:
      value: '{typography.h2}'
    display:
      value: '{typography.display_contextual}'
  spacing:
    0: '0'
    1: 4px
    2: 8px
    3: 12px
    4: 16px
    5: 20px
    6: 24px
    8: 32px
    10: 40px
    12: 48px
    16: 64px
    20: 80px
    24: 96px
    roles:
      edgeInsetSmall: 16px-24px
      wideRail: clamp(24px, 6vw, 88px)
      sectionAir: clamp(72px, 12vw, 160px)
      panelPadding: clamp(20px, 4vw, 48px)
      cellPadding: clamp(18px, 3vw, 36px)
      compactControlPadding: 8px 12px
      iconButton: 32px
      captionGap: 16px-19px
      mediaGap: 18px-24px
      looseCollageGap: clamp(48px, 10vw, 160px)
  radius:
    none:
      value: '0'
      confidence: high
    controlSmall:
      value: 2px-3px
      confidence: medium
    circle:
      value: 999px
      confidence: high
    externalOverlay:
      value: 7px
      confidence: low
  shadow:
    none:
      value: none
      confidence: high
    externalOverlay:
      value: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.14)
      confidence: low
  divider:
    hairlineMuted:
      width: 1px
      style: solid
      color: '{tokens.color.border.muted}'
      confidence: high
    hairlineStrong:
      width: 1px
      style: solid
      color: '{tokens.color.border.strong}'
      confidence: high
    hairlineOnInverse:
      width: 1px
      style: solid
      color: '{tokens.color.border.onInverse}'
      confidence: high
    hardMediaEdge:
      width: '0'
      style: hard boundary made by adjacent raster image edge
      confidence: high
  motion:
    durationFast: 120ms
    durationBase: 180ms
    durationSlow: 320ms
    easing: cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)
    reducedMotion: disable non-essential transform motion
surfaces:
  warm_canvas:
    value: rgb(249,247,239)
    role: page_canvas
    text:
      default: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
      muted: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
      accent: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
    border: none
    shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
    gradient: none
    usage:
    - Primary full-width warm paper surface for brand/editorial bookends and same-surface modules.
    - May carry a very subtle low-contrast paper grain; do not convert this into a strong texture.
    confidence: high
  inverse_control_surface:
    value: rgb(38,78,51)
    role: control
    text:
      default: '{tokens.color.text.onInverse}'
      muted: '{tokens.color.text.onInverse}'
      accent: '{tokens.color.text.onInverse}'
    border: '{tokens.divider.hairlineOnInverse}'
    shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
    gradient: none
    usage:
    - Compact filled controls and segmented control clusters on warm canvas or same-fill panels.
    confidence: high
  same_fill_panel:
    value: rgb(249,247,239)
    role: inset_panel
    text:
      default: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
      muted: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
      accent: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
    border: '{tokens.divider.hairlineMuted}'
    shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
    gradient: none
    usage:
    - Inset modules separated from the canvas by 1px green linework, not by elevation.
    confidence: high
  transparent_on_warm:
    value: rgba(255,255,255,0)
    role: other
    text:
      default: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
      muted: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
      accent: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
    border: none unless inherited from parent linework
    shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
    gradient: none
    usage:
    - Text, graphics, cells, and link cards that sit directly on warm canvas or same-fill panels.
    confidence: high
  photo_owned_surface:
    value: raster photo pixels
    role: media_host
    text:
      default: none
      muted: none
      accent: none
    border: none
    shadow: photographic shadows only, not CSS elevation
    gradient: natural photo luminance falloff only
    usage:
    - Full-bleed media bands where the raster image owns the visible surface.
    - Unframed square or portrait media where photo pixels reach the media bounds.
    confidence: high
  external_overlay_surface:
    value: rgb(255,255,255)
    role: other
    text:
      default: '{tokens.color.text.externalOverlay}'
      muted: '{tokens.color.text.externalOverlay}'
      accent: '{tokens.color.text.externalOverlay}'
    border: none
    shadow: '{tokens.shadow.externalOverlay}'
    gradient: none
    usage:
    - Visible capture/tooling overlay only; not part of generated page UI.
    confidence: low
typography:
  body:
    fontFamily: '"Switzer", "Inter", sans-serif'
    fontFamilyCategory: sans_serif
    visualCharacteristics:
    - compact
    - clean
    - editorial utility
    fontSize: 14px
    fontWeight: '400'
    lineHeight: '1.45'
    letterSpacing: '0'
    textTransform: none
    role: canonical body, values, metadata values, and normal text-bearing UI fallback
    confidence: high
  body_medium:
    fontFamily: '"Switzer", "Inter", sans-serif'
    fontFamilyCategory: sans_serif
    visualCharacteristics:
    - compact
    - slightly firm
    fontSize: 14px
    fontWeight: '500'
    lineHeight: '1.25'
    letterSpacing: '0'
    textTransform: none
    role: compact card/body copy while respecting normalized body sizing
    confidence: medium
  control:
    fontFamily: '"Switzer", "Inter", sans-serif'
    fontFamilyCategory: sans_serif
    visualCharacteristics:
    - compact
    - centered
    - utilitarian
    fontSize: 14px
    fontWeight: '500'
    lineHeight: '1'
    letterSpacing: '0'
    textTransform: none
    role: buttons, compact action labels, nav labels, and text-bearing controls
    confidence: high
  label_upper:
    fontFamily: '"Switzer", "Inter", sans-serif'
    fontFamilyCategory: sans_serif
    visualCharacteristics:
    - narrow
    - compact
    - editorial
    fontSize: 14px
    fontWeight: '400'
    lineHeight: '1.15'
    letterSpacing: 0.02em
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: eyebrows, metadata labels, and uppercase micro links
    confidence: high
  caption:
    fontFamily: '"Switzer", "Inter", sans-serif'
    fontFamilyCategory: sans_serif
    visualCharacteristics:
    - narrow
    - terse
    - caption-like
    fontSize: 14px
    fontWeight: '400'
    lineHeight: '1.15'
    letterSpacing: 0.02em
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: media captions and handle-like captions
    confidence: high
  h1:
    fontFamily: '"Bonny", "Instrument Serif", serif'
    fontFamilyCategory: serif
    visualCharacteristics:
    - high_contrast
    - condensed
    - editorial
    fontSize: 56px
    fontWeight: '400'
    lineHeight: '0.95'
    letterSpacing: -0.02em
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: semantic h1
    confidence: medium
  h2:
    fontFamily: '"Bonny", "Instrument Serif", serif'
    fontFamilyCategory: serif
    visualCharacteristics:
    - high_contrast
    - condensed
    - editorial
    fontSize: 44px
    fontWeight: '400'
    lineHeight: '1'
    letterSpacing: -0.015em
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: semantic h2 and common large section heading
    confidence: high
  h3:
    fontFamily: '"Bonny", "Instrument Serif", serif'
    fontFamilyCategory: serif
    visualCharacteristics:
    - high_contrast
    - condensed
    - editorial
    fontSize: 31px
    fontWeight: '400'
    lineHeight: '1.05'
    letterSpacing: -0.01em
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: semantic h3 and compact section/panel heading
    confidence: high
  display_contextual:
    fontFamily: '"Bonny", "Instrument Serif", serif'
    fontFamilyCategory: serif
    visualCharacteristics:
    - extreme_scale
    - high_contrast
    - wordmark_like
    - sparse
    fontSize: clamp(96px, 18vw, 280px)
    fontWeight: '400'
    lineHeight: '0.78'
    letterSpacing: -0.04em
    textTransform: uppercase
    role: contextual oversized identity or bookend display; not a semantic heading default
    confidence: high
components:
  segmented_control_panel:
    kind: panel
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
    - single dark rectangular cluster
    - optional blank upper zone
    - bottom row of compact labels
    - icon-only segment separated by 1px divider
    - internal ivory hairline grid
    base:
      typography: '{typography.control}'
      padding: '0'
      radius: '{tokens.radius.none}'
      display: grid
      widthBehavior: content_hugging
      cssSizingHint: display:inline-grid; width:max-content; max-width:100%; white-space:nowrap; flex:0 0 auto;
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      inverse_on_warm:
        surface: inverse_control_surface
        backgroundColor: '{tokens.color.surface.inverse}'
        textColor: '{tokens.color.text.onInverse}'
        borderColor: '{tokens.color.border.onInverse}'
        dividerColor: '{tokens.color.border.onInverse}'
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.text.onInverse}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
    doNotUseFor:
    - full-width navigation bars
    - large menu drawers
    - floating dark overlays
  compact_button:
    kind: button
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
    - short text label
    - optional adjacent icon segment managed by parent compound control
    base:
      typography: '{typography.control}'
      padding: '{tokens.spacing.roles.compactControlPadding}'
      radius: '{tokens.radius.controlSmall}'
      display: inline-flex
      widthBehavior: content_hugging
      cssSizingHint: display:inline-flex; width:max-content; max-width:100%; white-space:nowrap; flex:0 0 auto; align-items:center;
        justify-content:center;
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      filled_on_warm:
        surface: warm_canvas
        backgroundColor: '{tokens.color.accent.primary}'
        textColor: '{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}'
        borderColor: transparent
        dividerColor: transparent
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
      filled_on_same_fill_panel:
        surface: same_fill_panel
        backgroundColor: '{tokens.color.accent.primary}'
        textColor: '{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}'
        borderColor: transparent
        dividerColor: transparent
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
    doNotUseFor:
    - large rounded CTA pills
    - full-width mobile buttons unless locally required
    - secondary outlined button systems without evidence
  split_action_control:
    kind: other
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: medium
    anatomy:
    - content-hugging text button
    - adjacent square icon button
    - optional subtle internal divider
    base:
      typography: '{typography.control}'
      padding: '0'
      radius: '{tokens.radius.controlSmall}'
      display: inline-flex
      widthBehavior: content_hugging
      cssSizingHint: display:inline-flex; width:max-content; max-width:100%; white-space:nowrap; flex:0 0 auto; overflow:hidden;
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      filled_compound_on_warm_or_panel:
        surface: warm_canvas
        backgroundColor: '{tokens.color.accent.primary}'
        textColor: '{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}'
        borderColor: transparent
        dividerColor: '#F9F7EFBF'
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
    doNotUseFor:
    - large promotional buttons
    - multi-icon toolbars
  icon_button:
    kind: icon_button
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
    - single currentColor SVG icon
    - fixed square or circular hit area
    - no text label rendered visually
    base:
      typography: '{typography.control}'
      padding: '0'
      radius: '{tokens.radius.none}'
      display: inline-flex
      widthBehavior: icon_only
      cssSizingHint: display:inline-flex; width:32px; height:32px; min-width:32px; max-width:32px; flex:0 0 auto; align-items:center;
        justify-content:center;
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      inverse_segment:
        surface: inverse_control_surface
        backgroundColor: '{tokens.color.surface.inverse}'
        textColor: '{tokens.color.text.onInverse}'
        borderColor: '{tokens.color.border.onInverse}'
        dividerColor: '{tokens.color.border.onInverse}'
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.text.onInverse}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: same_surface_border
      filled_compact:
        surface: warm_canvas
        backgroundColor: '{tokens.color.accent.primary}'
        textColor: '{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}'
        borderColor: transparent
        dividerColor: transparent
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.accent.onPrimary}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
      outline_circle_on_warm:
        surface: warm_canvas
        backgroundColor: transparent
        textColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        borderColor: '{tokens.color.border.strong}'
        dividerColor: transparent
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: same_surface_border
      bare_inline_on_warm:
        surface: transparent_on_warm
        backgroundColor: transparent
        textColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        borderColor: transparent
        dividerColor: transparent
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: whitespace
    doNotUseFor:
    - photo overlays
    - social logo generation
    - multi-color pictorial icons
  ordinal_badge:
    kind: compact_label
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
    - centered short numeral or marker
    - transparent fill
    - 1px circular outline
    base:
      typography: '{typography.control}'
      padding: '0'
      radius: '{tokens.radius.circle}'
      display: inline-flex
      widthBehavior: fixed_size
      cssSizingHint: display:inline-flex; width:24px; height:24px; min-width:24px; flex:0 0 auto; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
        max-width:100%; white-space:nowrap;
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      outline_on_warm_cell:
        surface: transparent_on_warm
        backgroundColor: transparent
        textColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        borderColor: '{tokens.color.border.strong}'
        dividerColor: transparent
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: same_surface_border
    doNotUseFor:
    - filled notification badges
    - brand emblems
  same_surface_panel:
    kind: panel
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
    - same-fill rectangular panel
    - 1px muted green outline
    - optional header divider
    - optional internal grid dividers
    base:
      typography: '{typography.body}'
      padding: '0'
      radius: '{tokens.radius.none}'
      display: block
      widthBehavior: parent_stretched
      cssSizingHint: display:block; width:100%; max-width:100%;
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      hairline_on_warm:
        surface: same_fill_panel
        backgroundColor: '{tokens.color.surface.primary}'
        textColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        borderColor: '{tokens.color.border.muted}'
        dividerColor: '{tokens.color.border.muted}'
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: same_surface_border
    doNotUseFor:
    - elevated cards
    - alternate-tint section backgrounds
    - rounded containers
  same_surface_link_cell:
    kind: card
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
    - transparent cell surface
    - small title or body text
    - optional bare currentColor arrow
    - unframed media
    - separation supplied by parent dividers
    base:
      typography: '{typography.body_medium}'
      padding: '{tokens.spacing.roles.cellPadding}'
      radius: '{tokens.radius.none}'
      display: flex
      widthBehavior: parent_stretched
      cssSizingHint: display:flex; width:100%; max-width:100%; flex-direction:column;
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      divided_on_same_fill_panel:
        surface: same_fill_panel
        backgroundColor: transparent
        textColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        borderColor: inherited parent dividers
        dividerColor: '{tokens.color.border.muted}'
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: divider
      divided_on_warm_grid:
        surface: transparent_on_warm
        backgroundColor: transparent
        textColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        borderColor: inherited parent dividers
        dividerColor: '{tokens.color.border.muted}'
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: divider
    doNotUseFor:
    - filled cards
    - shadowed cards
    - rounded image cards
  media_frame:
    kind: media_frame
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
    - raster image
    - hard rectangular clipping
    - no internal padding
    - no overlay
    base:
      typography: '{typography.body}'
      padding: '0'
      radius: '{tokens.radius.none}'
      display: block
      widthBehavior: intrinsic_media
      cssSizingHint: display:block; overflow:hidden; line-height:0; flex:0 0 auto;
      textTransform: none
    variants:
      square_unframed:
        surface: photo_owned_surface
        backgroundColor: raster photo pixels
        textColor: none
        borderColor: transparent
        dividerColor: transparent
        iconColor: none
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: whitespace
      portrait_unframed:
        surface: photo_owned_surface
        backgroundColor: raster photo pixels
        textColor: none
        borderColor: transparent
        dividerColor: transparent
        iconColor: none
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: whitespace
      full_bleed_band:
        surface: photo_owned_surface
        backgroundColor: raster photo pixels
        textColor: none
        borderColor: transparent
        dividerColor: transparent
        iconColor: none
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: none
    doNotUseFor:
    - device mockups
    - photo cards with matte frames
    - rounded image masks unless newly evidenced
  text_link:
    kind: link
    actualPageUI: true
    confidence: high
    anatomy:
    - plain text
    - optional currentColor arrow nearby
    - no underline by default
    base:
      typography: '{typography.control}'
      padding: '0'
      radius: '{tokens.radius.none}'
      display: inline-flex
      widthBehavior: content_hugging
      cssSizingHint: display:inline-flex; width:max-content; max-width:100%; white-space:nowrap; flex:0 0 auto; align-items:center;
      textTransform: preserve_authored_case
    variants:
      green_on_warm:
        surface: transparent_on_warm
        backgroundColor: transparent
        textColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        borderColor: transparent
        dividerColor: transparent
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.text.primary}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: whitespace
      ivory_on_inverse:
        surface: inverse_control_surface
        backgroundColor: transparent
        textColor: '{tokens.color.text.onInverse}'
        borderColor: transparent
        dividerColor: '{tokens.color.border.onInverse}'
        iconColor: '{tokens.color.text.onInverse}'
        shadow: '{tokens.shadow.none}'
        contrastSource: fill_contrast
    doNotUseFor:
    - blue browser-default links
    - underlined editorial links unless required locally
patterns:
  layout:
  - name: full_width_warm_canvas_with_inset_foreground
    confidence: high
    rule: Use a viewport-wide warm canvas with foreground content aligned to broad rails or sparse edge insets; transparent
      children inherit the canvas rather than introducing new fills.
  - name: same_surface_hairline_module
    confidence: high
    rule: Build grids and panels as same-fill rectangles with 1px green outer linework and internal dividers; structure comes
      from borders, not elevation or card backgrounds.
  - name: centered_intro_above_wide_field
    confidence: high
    rule: A compact centered label or uppercase serif heading may sit above a wider grid, panel, or freeform media field with
      generous vertical breathing room.
  - name: compact_inverse_control_cluster
    confidence: high
    rule: Small filled dark green controls sit as content-hugging objects on warm surfaces; labels and icon segments are divided
      by ivory hairlines.
  - name: unframed_media_pixels_to_edges
    confidence: high
    rule: Media frames clip photos to square, portrait, or viewport-wide rectangles with zero radius, zero shadow, zero border,
      and no internal padding.
  - name: oversized_display_microcopy_contrast
    confidence: high
    rule: Pair extremely large high-contrast serif identity/display regions with tiny utilitarian text groups or compact controls,
      separated by whitespace.
  - name: irregular_editorial_collage
    confidence: medium
    rule: When using a collage, keep it sparse and manually staggered with large negative space, square hard-edged photos,
      and centered captions; do not regularize into a card grid.
  - name: full_bleed_photo_reset
    confidence: high
    rule: A raster image may interrupt the warm canvas as a hard-edged viewport-width band with no text overlay, no scrim,
      no border, no radius, and no CSS shadow.
  page_moments:
  - name: opening_bookend_behavior
    confidence: high
    rule: An opening brand moment may use the warm canvas continuously with small foreground marks or inverse controls before
      a hard reset into full-bleed media.
  - name: closing_bookend_behavior
    confidence: high
    rule: A closing brand moment may return to the warm canvas with sparse microcopy, monochrome marks, and oversized contextual
      display type; avoid cards, forms, or dividers unless newly evidenced.
  - name: photo_interlude_behavior
    confidence: high
    rule: Photo interludes are image-owned bands; adjacent warm-canvas slivers are boundary/neighbor surfaces, not a photo-section
      background token.
  - name: inset_child_panel_behavior
    confidence: high
    rule: Inset panels remain child modules on the warm canvas; their same-fill background must not be promoted into a full-width
      section reset.
  content_composition:
  - name: divided_same_surface_cells
    confidence: high
    rule: Use equal cells separated by inherited 1px hairlines; cells may contain compact labels, body copy, currentColor
      arrows, and unframed photos.
  - name: media_caption_unit
    confidence: high
    rule: A media unit is a hard-edged image with a small uppercase or handle-like caption below; no card chrome surrounds
      the pair.
  - name: sparse_microcopy_grid
    confidence: high
    rule: Microcopy groups distribute across columns using whitespace only; labels are uppercase, values preserve authored
      case where needed.
  - name: panel_header_action_row
    confidence: high
    rule: Panel headers can pair a left-aligned uppercase serif heading with a content-hugging compact filled action pair.
  adjacency_principles:
  - name: parent_surface_ownership
    confidence: high
    rule: Determine parent canvas from viewport-edge and gutter continuity; same-color child panels and cards do not create
      new parent surfaces.
  - name: hard_reset_vs_child_media
    confidence: high
    rule: A full-bleed photo owns the surface only when it reaches the viewport edges; photos inside cells, cards, and collages
      remain child media.
  - name: linework_separation
    confidence: high
    rule: Same-surface modules use borders/dividers for separation; do not add fill contrast, shadows, or rounded corners.
  - name: unordered_generation
    confidence: high
    rule: These patterns are reusable mechanics and do not imply a required page sequence.
  background_systems:
  - name: warm_paper_canvas
    confidence: high
    rule: Use a flat warm off-white canvas with deep green foreground; optional paper grain must be extremely subtle and low
      contrast.
  - name: absent_css_gradient_system
    confidence: high
    rule: Do not create global CSS gradients from photographic light falloff; gradients observed in photos belong to raster
      imagery.
  - name: green_inverse_blocks
    confidence: high
    rule: Dark green blocks are compact controls only unless locally grounded as a larger surface.
  - name: hard_photo_edges
    confidence: high
    rule: Photo resets begin and end with hard horizontal edges, not divider lines or fade washes.
  image_graphics:
  - name: icon_asset_routing
    confidence: high
    rule: Single-color UI icons are not image-generation candidates and should be inline currentColor SVGs; multi-color pictorial
      icons may be generated only if explicitly introduced; logos and wordmarks are not generated assets.
  - name: brand_mark_handling
    confidence: high
    rule: Use fixed logo/wordmark slots or simple text/rectangle placeholders in current surface ink; do not infer reusable
      illustration style from marks.
  - name: photo_generation
    confidence: high
    rule: Generated photos should fill their asset edge-to-edge; page components provide clipping, aspect ratio, and placement.
  - name: no_embedded_ui_promotion
    confidence: high
    rule: Observed live navigation, buttons, panels, and cards are real components; no interface screenshot or device mockup
      style was observed.
  responsive:
  - name: rail_compression
    confidence: medium
    rule: Wide rails compress from generous desktop insets to 20px-24px mobile gutters while preserving full-width warm surfaces.
  - name: divided_modules_on_small_screens
    confidence: medium
    rule: Hairline grids may stack into one or two columns; preserve outer border and internal divider logic rather than converting
      to individual cards.
  - name: compact_controls
    confidence: high
    rule: Compact controls remain content-hugging; do not stretch them to full width unless a local mobile layout explicitly
      requires it.
  - name: oversized_display_scaling
    confidence: high
    rule: Contextual display type must scale with clamp() and may wrap/split, but should retain sparse, wordmark-like dominance.
imagery:
  icons:
    observed: true
    iconAssetClasses:
    - single-color-icon
    - logo/wordmark
    generationStrategy: mixed
    creativeDirection: Minimal single-color currentColor SVG-style menu, arrow, and utility glyphs; logo and wordmark slots
      are monochrome fixed assets or live-type placeholders, not generated illustrations.
    density: sparse
    simplicity: simple
    rendering: line
    paletteRelationship: Deep green on warm ivory, or warm ivory on dark green controls; no reusable multi-color icon palette
      observed.
    surfaceRelationship: Icons sit directly on transparent warm surfaces, inside dark compact controls, inside circular outline
      controls, or as uncontained link arrows.
    edgeAndScale: Small, flat, unshadowed; fixed icon buttons around 32px, circular outline controls around 32px, bare arrows
      sized to text context.
    implementationRule: Use Phosphor-style inline SVG with stroke/fill driven by currentColor for single-color-icon; route
      logo/wordmark to no generated asset.
    subjectPolicy: style from design system; subject from local component slot
    avoid:
    - multi-color pictograms
    - detailed illustrative icons
    - photo-derived icons
    - generated logo or wordmark art
    - external overlay glyphs as page UI
  illustrations:
    observed: false
    creativeDirection: No reusable illustration system is present; leave illustration slots empty unless a new local requirement
      provides direction.
    density: sparse
    simplicity: minimal
    rendering: none_observed
    paletteRelationship: N/A; do not derive illustration colors from photography or logos.
    surfaceRelationship: N/A.
    edgeAndScale: N/A.
    subjectPolicy: style from design system; subject from local component slot
    avoid:
    - character scenes
    - 3D scenes
    - abstract vector decoration
    - turning brand marks into illustrations
    - decorative pictorial icons
  interfaces:
    observed: false
    creativeDirection: No product/interface imagery or device mockups observed; page UI remains live components.
    density: sparse
    simplicity: minimal
    rendering: none_observed
    paletteRelationship: N/A.
    surfaceRelationship: N/A.
    edgeAndScale: N/A.
    subjectPolicy: style from design system; subject from local component slot
    avoid:
    - dashboard screenshots
    - device frames
    - browser mockups
    - promoting live page controls into image assets
  photography:
    observed: true
    creativeDirection: Warm editorial/documentary photography with natural texture, directional light, cinematic shadow contrast,
      shallow depth or close crops, tactile surfaces, and organic imperfection.
    density: moderate
    simplicity: moderate
    rendering: editorial
    paletteRelationship: Warm amber, cream, ochre, olive, deep green-black, deep brown shadow, and occasional teal/red/lime
      accents harmonize with the warm ivory and deep green UI; photo colors are not CSS tokens.
    surfaceRelationship: Photos either own full-bleed viewport bands or sit as child media in square/portrait frames, collage
      units, or divided cells.
    edgeAndScale: Photo pixels reach the asset edges; no internal matte, poster border, CSS shadow, or rounded image corners.
    assetEdgeBehavior: edge_to_edge_photo_content
    subjectPolicy: style from design system; subject from local component slot
    avoid:
    - stock-like isolated cutouts
    - internal image padding
    - rounded photo corners
    - CSS photo shadows
    - overlay scrims on photo bands
    - treating photographic luminance falloff as a CSS gradient
rules:
  color:
  - Use rgb(249,247,239) as the primary warm canvas and rgb(38,78,51) as the primary ink/action color.
  - 'Preserve host-surface pairings: deep green ink on warm canvas; warm ivory text/icons on deep green controls.'
  - Use muted green hairlines only for same-fill panels and divided modules; do not add default borders to high-contrast filled
    controls.
  - Do not use source blue link defaults for generated page UI; they are not grounded in the visual system.
  - Treat warm/dark photographic colors as imagery direction, not reusable UI colors.
  typography:
  - Canonical body, compact body, captions, links, buttons, and text-bearing controls use 14px.
  - Semantic h1, h2, and h3 share the same serif family and 400 weight; hierarchy changes by size, line-height, and placement.
  - Oversized wordmark-like display type is contextual and must not replace semantic heading tokens.
  - Uppercase casing is grounded for serif headings, display lockups, metadata labels, captions, and many micro links.
  - Preserve authored case for values, card titles, and compact action labels unless the local text role is explicitly uppercase.
  spacing:
  - Use generous vertical air around editorial modules and large whitespace around contextual display type.
  - Use wide rails for inset panels/grids; full-bleed photo bands ignore rails.
  - Keep compact controls content-hugging with tight padding and fixed/icon-only sizing where applicable.
  - Place caption gaps around 16px-19px when media captions sit below hard-edged photos.
  containers:
  - Section shells, rows, grids, rails, collage fields, and divider scaffolds are patterns, not standalone components.
  - Same-fill panels should remain square, flat, and line-defined.
  - A child panel or media well must not be promoted to a parent background unless it visibly reaches the viewport edges.
  components:
  - Content-hugging controls must use inline-flex, width:max-content or fit-content, max-width:100%, white-space:nowrap, and
    flex:0 0 auto.
  - Do not bake global align-self behavior into compact labels, buttons, chips, or icon buttons; center them in centered stacks
    and start-align them in left-aligned stacks via parent layout.
  - Icon-only controls require fixed dimensions and explicit icon color; do not collapse them into text arrows.
  - Segmented inverse panels use dark fill plus ivory divider linework; do not turn them into a full-width dark header.
  cards:
  - Transparent same-surface cells are not elevated cards; separation comes from parent dividers.
  - Do not add card fills, shadows, or radius to divided grid/link cells.
  - Unframed media inside cells remains a media child with pixels to edges.
  links_actions:
  - Text links are plain currentColor text with no default underline; optional arrows are single-color currentColor SVGs.
  - Filled compact actions use deep green fill, warm ivory label/icon, tiny radius, and no shadow.
  - Circular carousel-style icon buttons use transparent fill, 1px deep green outline, and deep green currentColor arrows.
  imagery_graphics:
  - Single-color icons are inline currentColor SVGs and are not image-generation candidates.
  - Multi-color icons are not part of the observed system; only generate them if a new local slot explicitly requires pictorial
    multi-color treatment.
  - Logos, wordmarks, customer marks, payment marks, and brand emblems are non-generated assets; use simple placeholders in
    current ink when exact art is unavailable.
  - Illustrations are not observed; do not introduce character, 3D, or abstract vector scenes.
  - Photography should be warm, tactile, cinematic, and edge-to-edge within the generated asset.
  motion_animation:
  - 'Use restrained system-native hover/focus transitions: color, opacity, and very small translate changes under 180ms.'
  - Avoid parallax, shader/canvas effects, elaborate scroll animations, or motion that changes hard photo edges and surface
    ownership.
  - Icon buttons may animate icon opacity or a 1px-2px translate on hover, but must preserve fixed dimensions.
  - Respect reduced-motion by disabling non-essential transforms.
  accessibility:
  - Maintain sufficient contrast between deep green text and warm ivory canvas, and between ivory text and deep green controls.
  - Icon-only controls need accessible labels even when no text is visible.
  - Hairline-only structure should not be the only cue for interactive state.
  - Do not reduce text-bearing controls below the canonical 14px size.
do_not_generalize:
- Do not generate literal logo or wordmark artwork; use fixed asset slots or simple current-ink placeholders.
- Do not treat the external white/black fixed overlay badges as page UI.
- Do not infer a full-width dark navigation bar from the compact inverse control cluster.
- Do not convert same-surface divided cells into filled, rounded, or shadowed cards.
- Do not add overlays, borders, padding, radius, or shadows to full-bleed photo bands.
- Do not tokenize photographic shadows, bokeh, fabric texture, or luminance falloff as CSS effects.
- Do not require the optional irregular collage mechanic on every page.
- Do not reconstruct a source page sequence from these reusable patterns.
- Do not introduce illustration or interface mockup systems without new evidence.
- Do not use external blue link colors from browser/source defaults.
embedded_showcase_only:
- No embedded product screenshots, device mockups, or preview-only UI were observed.
- Non-site fixed overlay badges are excluded from reusable components and generation.
open_questions:
- Exact production font mapping for all small sans roles is partly ambiguous; Switzer/Inter is the safest normalized utility
  family.
- Subtle paper grain may be a real background asset or screenshot/compression noise; keep it optional and extremely low contrast.
- Some compact filled action controls may have a subtle internal icon divider; confidence is medium outside clearly segmented
  controls.
- Navigation cluster corner notches or tiny corner details are low-confidence and should not be required.
- Boundary slivers near photo resets may belong to adjacent warm canvases rather than the photo-owned surface.
source_font_implementation:
  guidance: Use the downloaded source font files for generated HTML rather than substituting a guessed web font.
  primaryStack: sans-serif
  decorativeItalicStack: '"Inter"'
  css: "@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Geist\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/01-geist-700-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n\
    \  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Geist\";\n  src:\
    \ url(\"source-fonts/02-geist-700-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display:\
    \ swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Geist\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/03-geist-700-normal.woff2\") format(\"\
    woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Instrument\
    \ Serif\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/04-instrument-serif-400-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n\
    \  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Instrument Serif\";\n  src: url(\"\
    source-fonts/05-instrument-serif-400-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: normal;\n\
    \  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/06-inter-400-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/07-inter-400-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/08-inter-400-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/09-inter-400-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/10-inter-400-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/11-inter-400-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/12-inter-400-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/13-inter-400-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/14-inter-700-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/15-inter-700-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/16-inter-700-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/17-inter-700-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/18-inter-700-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/19-inter-700-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/20-inter-700-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/21-inter-700-italic.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style:\
    \ italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/22-inter-700-italic.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style: italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/23-inter-700-italic.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style:\
    \ italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/24-inter-700-italic.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style: italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/25-inter-700-italic.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style:\
    \ italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/26-inter-700-italic.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style: italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/27-inter-700-italic.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 700;\n  font-style:\
    \ italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/28-inter-400-italic.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/29-inter-400-italic.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style:\
    \ italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/30-inter-400-italic.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/31-inter-400-italic.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style:\
    \ italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/32-inter-400-italic.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/33-inter-400-italic.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style:\
    \ italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/34-inter-400-italic.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/35-inter-600-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/36-inter-600-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/37-inter-600-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/38-inter-600-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/39-inter-600-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/40-inter-600-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Inter\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/41-inter-600-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 600;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Bonny\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/42-bonny-400-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Bonny\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/43-bonny-400-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Switzer\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/44-switzer-400-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Switzer\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/45-switzer-400-normal.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style:\
    \ normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Switzer\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/46-switzer-400-italic.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Switzer\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/47-switzer-400-italic.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style:\
    \ italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Switzer\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/48-switzer-400-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family:\
    \ \"Switzer\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/49-switzer-400-italic.woff2\") format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style:\
    \ italic;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n@font-face {\n  font-family: \"Bonny\";\n  src: url(\"source-fonts/50-bonny-400-normal.woff2\"\
    ) format(\"woff2\");\n  font-weight: 400;\n  font-style: normal;\n  font-display: swap;\n}\n\n:root { --stt-source-font-family:\
    \ sans-serif; --stt-source-decorative-italic-font-family: \"Inter\"; }\n\nhtml, body, button, input, textarea, select\
    \ { font-family: var(--stt-source-font-family) !important; }\n\nh1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, .display, .heading, .heading-lg,\
    \ .heading-md, .heading-sm, [class*=\"display\"], [class*=\"heading\"] { font-family: var(--stt-source-font-family) !important;\
    \ }\n\nh1 em, h2 em, h3 em, h4 em, h5 em, h6 em, .display em, .heading em, [class*=\"display\"] em, [class*=\"heading\"\
    ] em, .emphasis, .italic, [class*=\"emphasis\"], [class*=\"italic\"] { font-family: var(--stt-source-decorative-italic-font-family)\
    \ !important; font-style: italic; }"
---

# Design System

## Overview
- Name: `warm_editorial_linework_system`
- A warm paper-toned editorial system with deep green ink, high-contrast serif display type, architectural hairlines, compact inverse controls, and hard-edged photography.
- Confidence: `high`
- Schema: `design_system_yaml.v1`

## Surface System
- `warm_canvas`: value: rgb(249,247,239); role: page_canvas; confidence: high; text: default: {tokens.color.text.primary}, muted: {tokens.color.text.primary}, accent: {tokens.color.text.primary}
- `inverse_control_surface`: value: rgb(38,78,51); role: control; confidence: high; text: default: {tokens.color.text.onInverse}, muted: {tokens.color.text.onInverse}, accent: {tokens.color.text.onInverse}
- `same_fill_panel`: value: rgb(249,247,239); role: inset_panel; confidence: high; text: default: {tokens.color.text.primary}, muted: {tokens.color.text.primary}, accent: {tokens.color.text.primary}
- `transparent_on_warm`: value: rgba(255,255,255,0); role: other; confidence: high; text: default: {tokens.color.text.primary}, muted: {tokens.color.text.primary}, accent: {tokens.color.text.primary}
- `photo_owned_surface`: value: raster photo pixels; role: media_host; confidence: high; text: default: none, muted: none, accent: none
- `external_overlay_surface`: value: rgb(255,255,255); role: other; confidence: low; text: default: {tokens.color.text.externalOverlay}, muted: {tokens.color.text.externalOverlay}, accent: {tokens.color.text.externalOverlay}

## Typography
- `body`: role: canonical body, values, metadata values, and normal text-bearing UI fallback; fontFamily: "Switzer", "Inter", sans-serif; fontSize: 14px; fontWeight: 400; lineHeight: 1.45; confidence: high
- `body_medium`: role: compact card/body copy while respecting normalized body sizing; fontFamily: "Switzer", "Inter", sans-serif; fontSize: 14px; fontWeight: 500; lineHeight: 1.25; confidence: medium
- `control`: role: buttons, compact action labels, nav labels, and text-bearing controls; fontFamily: "Switzer", "Inter", sans-serif; fontSize: 14px; fontWeight: 500; lineHeight: 1; confidence: high
- `label_upper`: role: eyebrows, metadata labels, and uppercase micro links; fontFamily: "Switzer", "Inter", sans-serif; fontSize: 14px; fontWeight: 400; lineHeight: 1.15; confidence: high
- `caption`: role: media captions and handle-like captions; fontFamily: "Switzer", "Inter", sans-serif; fontSize: 14px; fontWeight: 400; lineHeight: 1.15; confidence: high
- `h1`: role: semantic h1; fontFamily: "Bonny", "Instrument Serif", serif; fontSize: 56px; fontWeight: 400; lineHeight: 0.95; confidence: medium
- `h2`: role: semantic h2 and common large section heading; fontFamily: "Bonny", "Instrument Serif", serif; fontSize: 44px; fontWeight: 400; lineHeight: 1; confidence: high
- `h3`: role: semantic h3 and compact section/panel heading; fontFamily: "Bonny", "Instrument Serif", serif; fontSize: 31px; fontWeight: 400; lineHeight: 1.05; confidence: high
- `display_contextual`: role: contextual oversized identity or bookend display; not a semantic heading default; fontFamily: "Bonny", "Instrument Serif", serif; fontSize: clamp(96px, 18vw, 280px); fontWeight: 400; lineHeight: 0.78; confidence: high

## Components
- `segmented_control_panel`: kind: panel; confidence: high; variants: inverse_on_warm
- `compact_button`: kind: button; confidence: high; variants: filled_on_warm, filled_on_same_fill_panel
- `split_action_control`: kind: other; confidence: medium; variants: filled_compound_on_warm_or_panel
- `icon_button`: kind: icon_button; confidence: high; variants: inverse_segment, filled_compact, outline_circle_on_warm, bare_inline_on_warm
- `ordinal_badge`: kind: compact_label; confidence: high; variants: outline_on_warm_cell
- `same_surface_panel`: kind: panel; confidence: high; variants: hairline_on_warm
- `same_surface_link_cell`: kind: card; confidence: high; variants: divided_on_same_fill_panel, divided_on_warm_grid
- `media_frame`: kind: media_frame; confidence: high; variants: square_unframed, portrait_unframed, full_bleed_band
- `text_link`: kind: link; confidence: high; variants: green_on_warm, ivory_on_inverse

## Patterns

### Layout
- Use a viewport-wide warm canvas with foreground content aligned to broad rails or sparse edge insets; transparent children inherit the canvas rather than introducing new fills.
- Build grids and panels as same-fill rectangles with 1px green outer linework and internal dividers; structure comes from borders, not elevation or card backgrounds.
- A compact centered label or uppercase serif heading may sit above a wider grid, panel, or freeform media field with generous vertical breathing room.
- Small filled dark green controls sit as content-hugging objects on warm surfaces; labels and icon segments are divided by ivory hairlines.
- Media frames clip photos to square, portrait, or viewport-wide rectangles with zero radius, zero shadow, zero border, and no internal padding.
- Pair extremely large high-contrast serif identity/display regions with tiny utilitarian text groups or compact controls, separated by whitespace.
- When using a collage, keep it sparse and manually staggered with large negative space, square hard-edged photos, and centered captions; do not regularize into a card grid.
- A raster image may interrupt the warm canvas as a hard-edged viewport-width band with no text overlay, no scrim, no border, no radius, and no CSS shadow.

### Page Moments
- An opening brand moment may use the warm canvas continuously with small foreground marks or inverse controls before a hard reset into full-bleed media.
- A closing brand moment may return to the warm canvas with sparse microcopy, monochrome marks, and oversized contextual display type; avoid cards, forms, or dividers unless newly evidenced.
- Photo interludes are image-owned bands; adjacent warm-canvas slivers are boundary/neighbor surfaces, not a photo-section background token.
- Inset panels remain child modules on the warm canvas; their same-fill background must not be promoted into a full-width section reset.

### Content Composition
- Use equal cells separated by inherited 1px hairlines; cells may contain compact labels, body copy, currentColor arrows, and unframed photos.
- A media unit is a hard-edged image with a small uppercase or handle-like caption below; no card chrome surrounds the pair.
- Microcopy groups distribute across columns using whitespace only; labels are uppercase, values preserve authored case where needed.
- Panel headers can pair a left-aligned uppercase serif heading with a content-hugging compact filled action pair.

### Adjacency Principles
- Determine parent canvas from viewport-edge and gutter continuity; same-color child panels and cards do not create new parent surfaces.
- A full-bleed photo owns the surface only when it reaches the viewport edges; photos inside cells, cards, and collages remain child media.
- Same-surface modules use borders/dividers for separation; do not add fill contrast, shadows, or rounded corners.
- These patterns are reusable mechanics and do not imply a required page sequence.

### Background Systems
- Use a flat warm off-white canvas with deep green foreground; optional paper grain must be extremely subtle and low contrast.
- Do not create global CSS gradients from photographic light falloff; gradients observed in photos belong to raster imagery.
- Dark green blocks are compact controls only unless locally grounded as a larger surface.
- Photo resets begin and end with hard horizontal edges, not divider lines or fade washes.

### Image Graphics
- Single-color UI icons are not image-generation candidates and should be inline currentColor SVGs; multi-color pictorial icons may be generated only if explicitly introduced; logos and wordmarks are not generated assets.
- Use fixed logo/wordmark slots or simple text/rectangle placeholders in current surface ink; do not infer reusable illustration style from marks.
- Generated photos should fill their asset edge-to-edge; page components provide clipping, aspect ratio, and placement.
- Observed live navigation, buttons, panels, and cards are real components; no interface screenshot or device mockup style was observed.

### Responsive
- Wide rails compress from generous desktop insets to 20px-24px mobile gutters while preserving full-width warm surfaces.
- Hairline grids may stack into one or two columns; preserve outer border and internal divider logic rather than converting to individual cards.
- Compact controls remain content-hugging; do not stretch them to full width unless a local mobile layout explicitly requires it.
- Contextual display type must scale with clamp() and may wrap/split, but should retain sparse, wordmark-like dominance.

## Imagery

### Icons
- observed: `true`
- creativeDirection: `Minimal single-color currentColor SVG-style menu, arrow, and utility glyphs; logo and wordmark slots are monochrome fixed assets or live-type placeholders, not generated illustr...`
- density: `sparse`
- simplicity: `simple`
- rendering: `line`
- paletteRelationship: `Deep green on warm ivory, or warm ivory on dark green controls; no reusable multi-color icon palette observed.`
- surfaceRelationship: `Icons sit directly on transparent warm surfaces, inside dark compact controls, inside circular outline controls, or as uncontained link arrows.`
- edgeAndScale: `Small, flat, unshadowed; fixed icon buttons around 32px, circular outline controls around 32px, bare arrows sized to text context.`
- subjectPolicy: `style from design system; subject from local component slot`
- Avoid: multi-color pictograms; detailed illustrative icons; photo-derived icons; generated logo or wordmark art; external overlay glyphs as page UI

### Illustrations
- observed: `false`
- creativeDirection: `No reusable illustration system is present; leave illustration slots empty unless a new local requirement provides direction.`
- density: `sparse`
- simplicity: `minimal`
- rendering: `none_observed`
- paletteRelationship: `N/A; do not derive illustration colors from photography or logos.`
- surfaceRelationship: `N/A.`
- edgeAndScale: `N/A.`
- subjectPolicy: `style from design system; subject from local component slot`
- Avoid: character scenes; 3D scenes; abstract vector decoration; turning brand marks into illustrations; decorative pictorial icons

### Interfaces
- observed: `false`
- creativeDirection: `No product/interface imagery or device mockups observed; page UI remains live components.`
- density: `sparse`
- simplicity: `minimal`
- rendering: `none_observed`
- paletteRelationship: `N/A.`
- surfaceRelationship: `N/A.`
- edgeAndScale: `N/A.`
- subjectPolicy: `style from design system; subject from local component slot`
- Avoid: dashboard screenshots; device frames; browser mockups; promoting live page controls into image assets

### Photography
- observed: `true`
- creativeDirection: `Warm editorial/documentary photography with natural texture, directional light, cinematic shadow contrast, shallow depth or close crops, tactile surfaces, and organic imperfection.`
- density: `moderate`
- simplicity: `moderate`
- rendering: `editorial`
- paletteRelationship: `Warm amber, cream, ochre, olive, deep green-black, deep brown shadow, and occasional teal/red/lime accents harmonize with the warm ivory and deep green UI; photo colors are not...`
- surfaceRelationship: `Photos either own full-bleed viewport bands or sit as child media in square/portrait frames, collage units, or divided cells.`
- edgeAndScale: `Photo pixels reach the asset edges; no internal matte, poster border, CSS shadow, or rounded image corners.`
- subjectPolicy: `style from design system; subject from local component slot`
- Avoid: stock-like isolated cutouts; internal image padding; rounded photo corners; CSS photo shadows; overlay scrims on photo bands; treating photographic luminance falloff as a CSS gradient

## Rules

### Color
- Use rgb(249,247,239) as the primary warm canvas and rgb(38,78,51) as the primary ink/action color.
- Preserve host-surface pairings: deep green ink on warm canvas; warm ivory text/icons on deep green controls.
- Use muted green hairlines only for same-fill panels and divided modules; do not add default borders to high-contrast filled controls.
- Do not use source blue link defaults for generated page UI; they are not grounded in the visual system.
- Treat warm/dark photographic colors as imagery direction, not reusable UI colors.

### Typography
- Canonical body, compact body, captions, links, buttons, and text-bearing controls use 14px.
- Semantic h1, h2, and h3 share the same serif family and 400 weight; hierarchy changes by size, line-height, and placement.
- Oversized wordmark-like display type is contextual and must not replace semantic heading tokens.
- Uppercase casing is grounded for serif headings, display lockups, metadata labels, captions, and many micro links.
- Preserve authored case for values, card titles, and compact action labels unless the local text role is explicitly uppercase.

### Spacing
- Use generous vertical air around editorial modules and large whitespace around contextual display type.
- Use wide rails for inset panels/grids; full-bleed photo bands ignore rails.
- Keep compact controls content-hugging with tight padding and fixed/icon-only sizing where applicable.
- Place caption gaps around 16px-19px when media captions sit below hard-edged photos.

### Containers
- Section shells, rows, grids, rails, collage fields, and divider scaffolds are patterns, not standalone components.
- Same-fill panels should remain square, flat, and line-defined.
- A child panel or media well must not be promoted to a parent background unless it visibly reaches the viewport edges.

### Components
- Content-hugging controls must use inline-flex, width:max-content or fit-content, max-width:100%, white-space:nowrap, and flex:0 0 auto.
- Do not bake global align-self behavior into compact labels, buttons, chips, or icon buttons; center them in centered stacks and start-align them in left-aligned stacks via parent layout.
- Icon-only controls require fixed dimensions and explicit icon color; do not collapse them into text arrows.
- Segmented inverse panels use dark fill plus ivory divider linework; do not turn them into a full-width dark header.

### Cards
- Transparent same-surface cells are not elevated cards; separation comes from parent dividers.
- Do not add card fills, shadows, or radius to divided grid/link cells.
- Unframed media inside cells remains a media child with pixels to edges.

### Links Actions
- Text links are plain currentColor text with no default underline; optional arrows are single-color currentColor SVGs.
- Filled compact actions use deep green fill, warm ivory label/icon, tiny radius, and no shadow.
- Circular carousel-style icon buttons use transparent fill, 1px deep green outline, and deep green currentColor arrows.

### Imagery Graphics
- Single-color icons are inline currentColor SVGs and are not image-generation candidates.
- Multi-color icons are not part of the observed system; only generate them if a new local slot explicitly requires pictorial multi-color treatment.
- Logos, wordmarks, customer marks, payment marks, and brand emblems are non-generated assets; use simple placeholders in current ink when exact art is unavailable.
- Illustrations are not observed; do not introduce character, 3D, or abstract vector scenes.
- Photography should be warm, tactile, cinematic, and edge-to-edge within the generated asset.

### Motion Animation
- Use restrained system-native hover/focus transitions: color, opacity, and very small translate changes under 180ms.
- Avoid parallax, shader/canvas effects, elaborate scroll animations, or motion that changes hard photo edges and surface ownership.
- Icon buttons may animate icon opacity or a 1px-2px translate on hover, but must preserve fixed dimensions.
- Respect reduced-motion by disabling non-essential transforms.

### Accessibility
- Maintain sufficient contrast between deep green text and warm ivory canvas, and between ivory text and deep green controls.
- Icon-only controls need accessible labels even when no text is visible.
- Hairline-only structure should not be the only cue for interactive state.
- Do not reduce text-bearing controls below the canonical 14px size.

## Do Not Generalize
- Do not generate literal logo or wordmark artwork; use fixed asset slots or simple current-ink placeholders.
- Do not treat the external white/black fixed overlay badges as page UI.
- Do not infer a full-width dark navigation bar from the compact inverse control cluster.
- Do not convert same-surface divided cells into filled, rounded, or shadowed cards.
- Do not add overlays, borders, padding, radius, or shadows to full-bleed photo bands.
- Do not tokenize photographic shadows, bokeh, fabric texture, or luminance falloff as CSS effects.
- Do not require the optional irregular collage mechanic on every page.
- Do not reconstruct a source page sequence from these reusable patterns.
- Do not introduce illustration or interface mockup systems without new evidence.
- Do not use external blue link colors from browser/source defaults.

## Embedded Showcase Only
- No embedded product screenshots, device mockups, or preview-only UI were observed.
- Non-site fixed overlay badges are excluded from reusable components and generation.

## Open Questions
- Exact production font mapping for all small sans roles is partly ambiguous; Switzer/Inter is the safest normalized utility family.
- Subtle paper grain may be a real background asset or screenshot/compression noise; keep it optional and extremely low contrast.
- Some compact filled action controls may have a subtle internal icon divider; confidence is medium outside clearly segmented controls.
- Navigation cluster corner notches or tiny corner details are low-confidence and should not be required.
- Boundary slivers near photo resets may belong to adjacent warm canvases rather than the photo-owned surface.

Step 10

Design-system conversion-loss review. This stage compares the surface/component map against the synthesized design system and scores whether the factual visual pairings survived the conversion into reusable schema language.

Sections
  • Conversion-review prompt
  • Conversion-review token usage
  • Conversion-review summary
  • Conversion-review markdown
  • Conversion-review JSON
Conversion-review promptruns/v177/design-system-conversion-review-prompt.md
You are evaluating design-system conversion loss.

You will receive:
- One `surface-component-map.md`
- One `design-system.md`

No screenshot is available. Treat the surface-component map as the factual source of truth. Evaluate whether the design system preserved, translated, merged, distorted, omitted, or overgeneralized the map's factual host-surface and nested-component pairings.

## Scoring

Use strict 0-10 scores for each dimension:
- `factual_pairing_preservation`: whether the design system preserves critical pairings for host surface, heading text, body text, primary/secondary buttons, compact labels, cards/panels, borders, dividers, shadows, gradients, and image/graphic slots.
- `surface_specificity`: whether surface-specific recipes remain tied to their host surface roles instead of becoming generic global accent/default rules.
- `component_recipe_translation`: whether map facts become reusable implementation recipes, tokens, variants, or rules with enough detail to drive generation.
- `typography_and_casing`: whether heading/body/label hierarchy, host-specific text color, casing such as `textTransform: uppercase`, and emphasis rules are preserved.
- `constraints_and_exceptions`: whether `doNotGeneralize`, one-off/rare facts, ambiguity notes, and source-vs-grounded confidence boundaries are carried forward as useful constraints.
- `unsupported_overgeneralization`: whether the design system avoids inventing unsupported colors, surfaces, cards, buttons, section-specific token names, or broad rules that the map does not support.

## Rules

- Be strict. A polished design system that loses map-specific pairings should score poorly.
- Reward faithful translation into generic reusable roles, not verbatim copying.
- Penalize omitted factual pairings even if the design system looks internally consistent.
- Penalize conversion that preserves source CSS typography too literally when it violates the Typography Normalization Contract: body/paragraph tokens must be `14px-16px`, subhead/lead/intro/supporting-heading tokens must be at most `1.5x` body, text-bearing controls and text links must use canonical body size, and semantic `h1`/`h2`/`h3` tokens must share one font family and one font weight.
- Do not treat source CSS font-size values as mandatory when they conflict with those normalized design-system roles. Exact source values may inform display/decorative tokens, but generation-facing semantic typography must remain normalized.
- Penalize conversion that turns exact source section order or one-off component positions into design-system layout rules instead of leaving them for `layouts.yaml`.

## v172 Source-Order Conversion Gate

- Request changes when the final design system contains source-section IDs, source-section label names, `derived_from`, `evidenceSections`, `run_order`, `source_order`, `page_sequence`, `section_sequence`, `patterns.sections`, or `patterns.surface_runs` as generation-facing content.
- Request changes when surface runs or section patterns encode a chronological source-page recipe rather than reusable parent/child ownership and boundary primitives.
- A strong conversion preserves host/component facts but strips generation-facing provenance. Exact source values may survive; exact source section order must not.
- Penalize conversion that omits the four imagery creative-direction categories (`icons`, `illustrations`, `interfaces`, `photography`) or loses density/simplicity/detail limits between the map and the design system.
- Penalize merging distinct map surfaces when that would change component colors or contrast behavior.
- Penalize overgeneralizing a one-off pairing into a global default.
- Penalize section/content-specific token names, but do not penalize section-local evidence notes if they preserve the factual relationship.
- Do not ask for screenshot evidence. The map is the only factual reference for this review.
- Keep notes concrete enough to guide the next design-system synthesis prompt.
- Return JSON only, with no markdown fences.

Use this exact shape:

{
  "summary": "short overall summary",
  "scores": {
    "factual_pairing_preservation": {"score": 0, "notes": "short note"},
    "surface_specificity": {"score": 0, "notes": "short note"},
    "component_recipe_translation": {"score": 0, "notes": "short note"},
    "typography_and_casing": {"score": 0, "notes": "short note"},
    "constraints_and_exceptions": {"score": 0, "notes": "short note"},
    "unsupported_overgeneralization": {"score": 0, "notes": "short note"}
  },
  "preserved_pairings": ["bullet", "bullet"],
  "conversion_losses": ["bullet", "bullet"],
  "distortions_or_overgeneralizations": ["bullet", "bullet"],
  "actionable_learnings": ["bullet", "bullet"],
  "verdict": "short verdict"
}
